metadata.name: waoowaoo
metadata.description: 首家工业级全流程 AI 影视生产平台。Industry-first professional AI Agent platform for controllable film & video production. From shorts to live-action with Hollywood-standard workflows.

summary.zh: waoowaoo AI 影视 Studio 是首家工业级全流程可控协作式专业 AI 智能体影视生产平台，支持从小说文本自动生成分镜、角色、场景并制作成完整视频，涵盖短片到漫剧再到真人级影视剧的全流程制作，采用好莱坞专业制作团队思路，提供虚拟制片场体验。
summary.en: waoowaoo AI Studio is the first industrial-grade, end-to-end controllable collaborative AI agent platform for professional film and TV production, supporting full-process creation from short films to anime series and feature films. It automatically generates storyboards, characters, and scenes from novel text and assembles them into complete videos, following Hollywood-level production workflows.

metadata.name: WeChatDataAnalysis
metadata.description: 微信4.x数据解密并生成年度总结，高仿微信，支持实时更新，导出聊天记录，朋友圈等大量便捷功能

summary.zh: 微信4.x数据解密与分析工具，支持聊天记录、朋友圈解密与可视化，提供高仿微信界面的年度总结生成、实时更新、搜索及导出功能，涵盖联系人管理与多消息类型展示。
summary.en: WeChat 4.x data decryption and analysis tool with chat history, Moments decryption, annual summary generation, real-time updates, search, export, and contact management features, featuring a WeChat-like interface.

metadata.name: Document-illustrator-skill
metadata.description: 帮你从文档生成对应的多张配图，内置了歸藏精心探索的图片风格，支持 16:9 和 3:4 两种比例，方便发小红书以及推特。

summary.zh: Document Illustrator 是一款基于 AI 智能分析的文档配图生成工具，能自动理解任意格式文档内容并生成专业配图。支持三种风格（渐变玻璃卡片、票据风格、矢量插画）和两种比例（16:9/3:4），可生成封面图与内容配图，适用于小红书、推特等社交媒体内容创作。
summary.en: Document Illustrator is an AI-powered tool that intelligently analyzes document content to generate professional illustrations. It supports three visual styles (gradient glass, ticket, vector illustration) and two aspect ratios (16:9/3:4), capable of creating cover images and thematic illustrations for social media platforms like Xiaohongshu and Twitter.

metadata.name: nanobot
metadata.description: "🐈 nanobot: The Ultra-Lightweight OpenClaw"

summary.zh: nanobot 是一个超轻量级个人 AI 助手，灵感来自 OpenClaw，核心功能仅约 4,000 行代码，比 Clawdbot 缩小 99%。支持多平台通信（Slack、Discord、Feishu、DingTalk 等）、MCP 协议、多模态文件处理及智能会话管理，具备高可靠性与模块化扩展能力，适用于个人自动化与智能交互场景。
summary.en: nanobot is an ultra-lightweight personal AI assistant inspired by OpenClaw, delivering core agent functionality in just ~4,000 lines of code—99% smaller than Clawdbot. It supports multi-platform messaging (Slack, Discord, Feishu, etc.), MCP protocol, multimodal file handling, and robust session management, offering high reliability and modular extensibility for personal automation and intelligent interaction.

metadata.name: memU
metadata.description: Memory for 24/7 proactive agents like openclaw (moltbot, clawdbot).

summary.zh: memU 是一个专为 24/7 主动式 AI 代理设计的内存框架，将内存建模为文件系统，支持层级分类、跨引用和持久化存储。它通过结构化记忆减少 LLM 令牌成本，实现持续理解用户意图并主动执行任务，适用于 openclaw、moltbot 等长期运行代理。
summary.en: memU is a memory framework for 24/7 proactive AI agents, modeling memory as a file system with hierarchical categories, cross-references, and persistent storage. It reduces LLM token costs by caching insights and enables continuous understanding of user intent, making always-on agents practical for production systems like openclaw and moltbot.

metadata.name: prompt-optimizer
metadata.description: 一款提示词优化器，助力于编写高质量的提示词

summary.zh: Prompt Optimizer 是一款专注于提升 AI 提示词质量的优化工具，支持多轮迭代优化、双模式提示词处理、实时对比测试及多模型集成（OpenAI/Gemini/DeepSeek等），同时提供文生图、图生图、MCP协议支持等高级功能，适用于角色扮演、知识图谱提取、创意写作等场景。
summary.en: Prompt Optimizer is an AI prompt optimization tool designed to enhance prompt quality through intelligent refinement, multi-round iteration, and dual-mode optimization. It supports real-time comparison, integration with major AI models (OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek), advanced features like text-to-image generation, MCP protocol compatibility, and secure client-side processing for reliable and efficient prompt engineering.

metadata.name: free-n8n-workflows
metadata.description: 🚀 8000+ Verified n8n Workflows. Free to download. Includes a self-hostable frontend to browse and search automation templates.

summary.zh: 该项目是经过验证的8000+个n8n自动化工作流的开源集合，提供可直接下载使用的JSON格式模板。包含基于Next.js 14构建的自主托管前端，支持按角色和集成智能搜索，涵盖营销、DevOps、销售和AI等场景。数据以JSON和SQL形式开放，支持本地部署，致力于让自动化技术普惠大众。
summary.en: This project offers 8,000+ verified n8n automation workflows in JSON format, freely downloadable for immediate use. It includes a self-hostable Next.js 14 frontend with intelligent search by role/integration, covering marketing, DevOps, sales, and AI scenarios. Open-source data (JSON/SQL) enables local deployment, promoting accessible automation technology for all.

metadata.name: cc-switch
metadata.description: A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode & Gemini CLI.

summary.zh: 跨平台桌面一体化助手工具，支持 Claude Code、Codex 和 Gemini CLI 的统一管理，提供便捷的 AI 编程助手集成与配置，适用于多模型协作开发场景。
summary.en: A cross-platform desktop all-in-one assistant tool for managing Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI, enabling unified configuration and integration of multiple AI coding assistants for streamlined development workflows.

metadata.name: everything-claude-code
metadata.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Cowork, and beyond.

summary.zh: Everything Claude Code 是一个专为 AI 智能体性能优化设计的完整系统，涵盖技能、直觉、记忆、安全和研究优先的开发。它支持 Claude Code、Codex、Cowork 等平台，提供生产级代理、钩子、命令、规则和 MCP 配置，适用于多语言环境，是 Anthropic 黑客马拉松获奖作品。
summary.en: Everything Claude Code is a comprehensive performance optimization system for AI agent harnesses, featuring skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development. It supports Claude Code, Codex, Cowork, and more, offering production-ready agents, hooks, commands, rules, and MCP configurations, evolved over 10+ months of real-world use.

metadata.name: RedInk
metadata.description: 红墨 - 基于🍌Nano Banana Pro🍌 的一站式小红书图文生成器 《一句话一张图片生成小红书图文》 Red Ink - A one-stop Xiaohongshu image-and-text generator based on the 🍌Nano Banana Pro🍌, "One Sentence, One Image: Generate Xiaohongshu Text and Images."

summary.zh: 红墨是基于🍌Nano Banana Pro🍌的一站式小红书图文生成器，支持一句话生成完整图文内容，包含智能大纲、封面页和内容页批量生成。采用Python Flask后端与Vue 3前端，支持Docker一键部署，集成Gemini 3文案与图片生成能力，提供可视化配置界面。
summary.en: RedInk is a one-stop Xiaohongshu image-and-text generator powered by 🍌Nano Banana Pro🍌, enabling instant creation of complete posts from a single sentence. It features AI-driven outline generation, cover page design, and batch content creation. Built with Python Flask backend and Vue 3 frontend, it supports Docker deployment and integrates Gemini 3 for text and image generation with a user-friendly web interface.

summary.zh: beautiful-mermaid 是一个高性能 Mermaid 图表渲染库，支持 SVG 和 ASCII 双输出模式，具备 15 种内置主题、零 DOM 依赖、同步渲染等特性，专为 AI 编程场景优化，可在终端和 UI 中无缝使用。
summary.en: beautiful-mermaid is a high-performance Mermaid diagram renderer supporting dual SVG/ASCII output, 15 built-in themes, zero DOM dependencies, and synchronous rendering. Optimized for AI-assisted programming with seamless terminal and UI integration.

metadata.name: BMAD-METHOD
metadata.description: Breakthrough Method for Agile Ai Driven Development

summary.zh: BMad Method 是一个 AI 驱动的敏捷开发框架，提供结构化工作流程和12+领域专家代理（如PM、架构师、开发者等），支持从小型修复到企业级系统的自适应开发。核心特性包括智能帮助、多代理协作（Party Mode）、完整生命周期管理，并集成官方模块如BMad Builder、Test Architect等，助力高效构建复杂系统。
summary.en: BMad Method is an AI-driven agile development framework offering structured workflows and 12+ domain expert agents (e.g., PM, Architect, Developer), with scale-adaptive intelligence for projects from bug fixes to enterprise systems. Key features include AI-guided help, multi-agent collaboration (Party Mode), full lifecycle support, and official modules like BMad Builder and Test Architect for specialized domains.

metadata.name: Antigravity-Manager
metadata.description: Professional Antigravity Account Manager & Switcher. One-click seamless account switching for Antigravity Tools. Built with Tauri v2 + React (Rust).专业的 Antigravity 账号管理与切换工具。为 Antigravity 提供一键无缝账号切换功能。

summary.zh: Antigravity-Manager 是一款专业的 AI 账号管理与协议代理系统，基于 Tauri v2 + Rust + React 构建。提供多账号无缝切换、OAuth 2.0 授权、智能配额监控、协议转换（OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini）、模型路由与后台任务静默降级等核心功能，打造高性能本地 AI 中转网关。
summary.en: Antigravity-Manager is a professional AI account management and protocol proxy system built with Tauri v2 + Rust + React. It enables seamless multi-account switching, OAuth 2.0 authorization, intelligent quota monitoring, protocol conversion (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini), model routing, and silent background task fallback, serving as a high-performance local AI proxy gateway.

metadata.name: openmozi
metadata.description: 轻量级的clawdbot/openclaw，支持飞书，钉钉，QQ和企业微信

summary.zh: OpenMozi 是一个轻量级 AI 助手框架，专为国产生态设计，支持 DeepSeek、豆包、Qwen 等国产大模型及 OpenAI/Anthropic 兼容接口，提供飞书、钉钉、QQ、企业微信等多平台机器人接入，具备 Function Calling、25 个内置工具、记忆系统、定时任务等核心功能，代码简洁（约1.6万行），适合学习 Agent 原理和快速开发企业级智能助手。
summary.en: OpenMozi is a lightweight AI assistant framework designed for the Chinese ecosystem, supporting domestic LLMs like DeepSeek, Doubao, Qwen, and OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible APIs. It offers multi-platform bot integration (Feishu, DingTalk, QQ, WeCom), native Function Calling, 25 built-in tools, memory system, cron jobs, and a skill-based architecture. With ~16K lines of clean code, it's ideal for learning agent principles and rapid development of enterprise-grade AI assistants.

metadata.name: toMic
metadata.description: ToMic - Turn Your Phone into a PC Microphone

summary.zh: ToMic 是一款基于 Web 技术的局域网虚拟麦克风工具，可将手机浏览器作为电脑的麦克风输入源。通过 Wi-Fi 传输音频流，并利用虚拟声卡（如 BlackHole 或 VB-CABLE）实现低延迟音频路由，适用于 Zoom、Teams、Discord 等会议场景，无需安装 App，支持 macOS 和 Windows 平台。
summary.en: ToMic is a Web-based LAN virtual microphone tool that turns your phone into a PC microphone via browser. It streams audio over Wi-Fi using WebSocket and Opus encoding, then routes it through virtual sound cards (e.g., BlackHole or VB-CABLE) for low-latency input in apps like Zoom, Teams, or Discord. No app installation required on mobile, with native support for macOS and Windows.

metadata.name: creative_tools
metadata.description: 使用 Gemini (Nano Banano 和 Veo) 的短视频和漫画创作工具

summary.zh: 基于 Gemini Nano Banano 和 VEO 的短视频与漫画创作工具，支持剧本导入、AI 生成分镜图/视频、角色一致性管理及画布视图，提供完整的内容创作工作流，适用于自媒体、IP 孵化等场景。
summary.en: A video and comic creation tool powered by Gemini (Nano Banano and VEO), featuring script import, AI-generated storyboards/videos, character consistency management, and canvas view, enabling end-to-end content production for creators and IP developers.

metadata.name: Infographic
metadata.description: 🦋 An Infographic Generation and Rendering Framework, bring words to life with AI!

summary.zh: AntV Infographic 是蚂蚁集团 AntV 团队推出的下一代声明式信息图可视化引擎，提供约200个内置模板和组件，支持AI友好语法配置，可快速生成高质量SVG信息图，具备主题系统、内置编辑器和数据叙事能力，适用于数据可视化与内容创作场景。
summary.en: AntV Infographic is AntV's next-generation declarative infographic visualization engine, offering ~200 built-in templates and components. It supports AI-friendly syntax for rapid generation of high-quality SVG infographics, featuring a theme system, built-in editor, and data storytelling capabilities for visualization and content creation.

metadata.name: MateBot
metadata.description: claudeclaw

summary.zh: MateCode 是一个通过 Telegram 远程控制 Claude Code 的桥接工具，支持长期记忆、会话管理、代码高亮等功能。采用纯 Python 标准库开发，基于长轮询实现低延迟通信，所有数据本地存储保障隐私安全。
summary.en: MateCode is a bridge tool that enables remote control of Claude Code via Telegram, featuring long-term memory, session management, and code highlighting. Built with pure Python standard libraries, it uses long polling for low-latency communication with local SQLite storage for privacy.

metadata.name: workany
metadata.description: Desktop Agent for Any Task

summary.zh: WorkAny 是一款桌面 AI 智能体应用，通过自然语言指令执行复杂任务，支持实时代码生成、工具调用和沙箱环境运行。基于 Claude Agent SDK 构建，集成 MCP 协议与多模型供应商，提供文件管理、文档/网页/表格/幻灯片生成等全场景能力，适用于自动化办公与软件开发。
summary.en: WorkAny is a desktop AI agent that executes tasks via natural language, featuring real-time code generation, sandboxed execution, and workspace management. Built on Claude Agent SDK with MCP support and multi-provider LLM integration, it enables automated file organization, document/web/table/slide generation, and software development workflows.

metadata.name: ThinkFlowAI
metadata.description: ThinkFlow AI 是一个轻量级“从想法到结构化图谱”的工作台：输入一个核心想法，应用会把它扩展为可浏览的知识图谱（模块/子模块）。每个节点支持继续追问扩展、深挖详情，以及可选的配图生成。

summary.zh: ThinkFlow AI 是一个轻量级‘从想法到结构化图谱’工作台，支持输入核心概念自动生成可交互知识图谱。具备AI驱动发散扩展、深度内容挖掘、视觉配图生成、沉浸式演示模式等功能，采用Vue 3 + Vite 5 + @vue-flow/core技术栈，实现本地优先的零平台锁定体验。
summary.en: ThinkFlow AI is a lightweight 'idea-to-structured-graph' workspace that transforms core concepts into interactive knowledge graphs. Features AI-driven divergence expansion, deep content mining, visual image generation, immersive presentation mode, and local-first architecture with zero platform lock-in. Built with Vue 3 + Vite 5 + @vue-flow/core stack.

metadata.name: next-ai-draw-io
metadata.description: A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

summary.zh: Next AI Draw.io 是一个基于 Next.js 的 AI 驱动图表设计工具，通过自然语言指令与 AI 辅助可视化，支持创建、修改和增强 draw.io 风格的流程图与架构图，集成多模态 AI 能力与云服务商图标库。
summary.en: Next AI Draw.io is a Next.js-based web app that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams, enabling users to create, modify, and enhance diagrams via natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization, featuring multi-cloud icon support and real-time diagram generation.

metadata.name: call-me
metadata.description: Minimal plugin that lets Claude Code call you on the phone.

summary.zh: CallMe 是一个极简的 Claude Code 插件，允许通过电话在任务完成、卡住或需要决策时呼叫用户。支持多轮语音对话，兼容智能手机、智能手表等设备，并可通过 ngrok 实现远程 webhook 连接。
summary.en: CallMe is a minimal plugin for Claude Code that enables phone calls to alert users when tasks are done, stuck, or require decisions. It supports multi-turn voice conversations via OpenAI's TTS/STT, works across smartphones and smartwatches, and uses ngrok for secure webhook tunneling.

metadata.name: webnovel-writer
metadata.description: 基于 Claude Code 的长篇网文辅助创作系统，解决 AI 写作中的「遗忘」和「幻觉」问题，支持 200 万字量级 连载创作。

summary.zh: 基于 Claude Code 的长篇网文创作辅助系统，通过双 Agent 架构和六维审查机制解决 AI 写作中的遗忘与幻觉问题，支持 200 万字级连载创作，集成 RAG 检索、创意约束系统和追读力机制，确保叙事连贯性与读者粘性。
summary.en: A long-form webnovel writing assistant built on Claude Code, utilizing dual-agent architecture and six-dimensional review mechanisms to address AI writing issues like forgetting and hallucination, supporting serialized creation up to 2 million words with RAG retrieval, creative constraint systems, and reader engagement mechanics.

metadata.name: XMSLEEP
metadata.description: 一款白噪音应用送给你，祝您牛掰，有的是钱

summary.zh: XMSLEEP 是一款专注于白噪音播放的 Android 应用，提供雨声、篝火、雷声等多种自然声音，支持音量调节、倒计时、预设播放区域及收藏功能。采用 Material Design 3 和 Jetpack Compose 构建，具备深色模式、动态主题色、无缝循环播放及蓝牙耳机支持，界面简洁流畅，适用于放松、专注和助眠场景。
summary.en: XMSLEEP is an Android app focused on white noise playback, offering natural sounds like rain, fire, thunder, and bird chirps. It supports volume control, countdown timer, preset playlists, favorites, and seamless looping. Built with Jetpack Compose and Material Design 3, it features dark mode, dynamic theming, Coil image loading, and Bluetooth headset support for immersive relaxation, focus, and sleep aid.

metadata.name: Handy
metadata.description: A free, open source, and extensible speech-to-text application that works completely offline.

summary.zh: Handy 是一款免费开源的离线语音转文字桌面应用，基于 Whisper 和 Parakeet 模型实现本地语音识别，支持全局快捷键录音、VAD 降噪及多平台运行，注重隐私保护且高度可扩展。
summary.en: Handy is a free, open-source, offline speech-to-text desktop app powered by Whisper and Parakeet models. It offers local transcription with VAD, global hotkeys, and cross-platform support, prioritizing privacy and extensibility.

metadata.name: ui-ux-pro-max-skill
metadata.description: An AI SKILL that provide design intelligence for building professional UI/UX multiple platforms

summary.zh: UI UX Pro Max 是一款 AI 技能，专为多平台构建专业 UI/UX 设计而生。其核心功能是通过 AI 驱动的设计系统生成器，快速分析项目需求并输出适配不同框架的完整设计体系，支持 67 种 UI 风格与 100 条推理规则，显著提升跨平台设计效率与一致性。
summary.en: UI UX Pro Max is an AI skill delivering intelligent design solutions for professional UI/UX across multiple platforms. Its flagship Design System Generator uses AI reasoning to instantly analyze project requirements and generate tailored, framework-agnostic design systems, supporting 67 UI styles and 100 reasoning rules for efficient cross-platform design.

metadata.name: vibe-kanban
metadata.description: Get 10X more out of Claude Code, Codex or any coding agent

summary.zh: Vibe Kanban 是一个专为 AI 编码代理（如 Claude Code、Codex）设计的任务管理与协同工具，支持多代理并行/串行调度、任务状态追踪、远程 SSH 项目访问及统一配置管理，显著提升开发效率。
summary.en: Vibe Kanban is a task orchestration and management tool designed for AI coding agents like Claude Code and Codex. It enables parallel/sequential agent execution, real-time task tracking, remote SSH project access, and centralized MCP configuration, boosting developer productivity by 10x.

metadata.name: easytype
metadata.description: A Flask-based tool that types or copies text from mobile devices directly to Windows computers.

summary.zh: EasyType 是一款基于 Flask 的跨平台输入工具，支持手机实时输入内容并直接推送到 Windows 剪贴板或模拟键盘输入，具备低延迟同步、移动端优化界面和多种快捷键支持，适用于远程办公与高效输入场景。
summary.en: EasyType is a Flask-based tool enabling real-time text input from mobile devices to Windows via clipboard or direct keyboard simulation, featuring low-latency sync, mobile-optimized UI, and shortcut support for remote typing and clipboard sharing.

metadata.name: proxycast
metadata.description: 把灵感、写作、出图、改稿、沉淀放进同一个工作台，让创作从“想到”直接走到“可发布”

summary.zh: ProxyCast 是一个面向创作者的 AI Agent 平台，整合灵感发散、内容生成、素材制作与版本沉淀全流程，支持社媒、短视频、小说、海报等九大创作主题，实现从想法到可发布内容的一站式高效创作。
summary.en: ProxyCast is an AI Agent platform for creators, integrating ideation, content generation, asset creation, and versioning into a unified workspace. It supports nine major creative domains—from social media to novels—enabling seamless workflows from concept to publishable output.

metadata.name: cose
metadata.description: 😃 md 编辑器使用的浏览器扩展，支持一键将文章同步到多个内容平台。

summary.zh: COSE 是一款专为 Markdown 编辑器设计的浏览器扩展，支持一键将文章同步至 30+ 主流内容平台。核心亮点包括跨平台同步、自动登录检测、标签页分组管理，尤其针对微信公众号提供样式保留与草稿自动保存功能，全程本地运行保障隐私安全。
summary.en: COSE is a browser extension designed for Markdown editors, enabling one-click article publishing to 30+ platforms. Key features include cross-platform sync, auto-login detection, tab grouping, and full CSS preservation for WeChat Official Accounts. Runs entirely locally with zero data collection.

metadata.name: kiss-translator
metadata.description: A simple, open source bilingual translation extension & Greasemonkey script (一个简约、开源的 双语对照翻译扩展 & 油猴脚本)

summary.zh: KISS Translator 是一款简约开源的双语对照翻译工具，支持浏览器扩展与油猴脚本两种形式。它适配主流浏览器，集成 Google、OpenAI、DeepL 等10+翻译服务，覆盖网页翻译、划词翻译、输入框翻译、YouTube字幕翻译等场景，支持自定义规则、术语词典、跨端数据同步及AI上下文记忆，提供高度灵活的翻译体验。
summary.en: KISS Translator is a minimalist, open-source bilingual translation tool available as both a browser extension and a Tampermonkey script. It supports 10+ translation services including Google, OpenAI, and DeepL, covering web page translation, text selection, input field translation, and YouTube subtitle translation. Features include custom rules, term dictionaries, cross-device sync via KISS-Worker, and AI context memory for enhanced translation quality.

metadata.name: go-wxpush
metadata.description: 极简且免费的微信消息推送服务 (基于golang)

summary.zh: 基于 Golang 开发的极简免费微信消息推送服务，支持 Docker 一键部署（镜像仅 2MB），提供每日 10 万次推送额度，支持原生弹窗与声音提醒，具备多用户管理、自定义跳转页面及无限换肤功能，适用于个人及小型项目消息通知场景。
summary.en: A minimalist and free WeChat message push service built with Golang, supporting one-click Docker deployment (2MB image), 100K daily push quota, native pop-up and sound alerts, multi-user support, customizable redirect pages, and unlimited skin switching, ideal for personal and small-scale notification systems.

metadata.name: browserwing
metadata.description: BrowserWing turns your browser actions into MCP commands Or Claude Skill, allowing AI agents to control browsers efficiently and reliably. Say goodbye to slow, token-heavy LLM interactions — let agents call commands directly for faster automation. Perfect for AI-driven tasks, browser automation, and boosting productivity.

summary.zh: BrowserWing 是一款原生浏览器自动化平台，支持通过 MCP 协议和 Claude Skill 让 AI 智能体直接控制浏览器。提供 26+ HTTP API 接口、可视化脚本录制、LLM 驱动的数据提取及会话管理，实现高效可靠的浏览器自动化，显著减少 LLM 交互延迟。
summary.en: BrowserWing is a native browser automation platform that enables AI agents to control browsers via MCP commands or Claude Skills. It offers 26+ HTTP APIs, visual script recording, LLM-powered data extraction, and session management for fast, reliable automation with minimal token overhead.

metadata.name: clipsketch-ai
metadata.description: 将视频瞬间转化为手绘故事 Turn Video Moments into Hand-Drawn Stories

summary.zh: ClipSketch AI 是一款专为视频创作者设计的 AI 驱动内容创作工具，支持解析 Bilibili 和小红书视频链接，实现帧级精准标记，并借助 Google Gemini 多模态模型将精彩瞬间一键转化为手绘风格故事板，自动生成适配社交媒体的爆款文案，涵盖角色融合、封面生成和批量精修功能。
summary.en: ClipSketch AI is an AI-powered content creation tool for video creators, enabling frame-level tagging of Bilibili and Xiaohongshu videos, transforming key moments into hand-drawn storyboards via Google Gemini's multimodal models, and auto-generating social media captions, character fusion, cover images, and batch-enhanced visuals.

metadata.name: serena
metadata.description: A powerful coding agent toolkit providing semantic retrieval and editing capabilities (MCP server & other integrations)

summary.zh: Serena 是一个强大的编码代理工具包，通过语义检索和编辑能力（MCP 服务器等集成）将 LLM 转变为可直接操作代码库的全功能代理。它提供类似 IDE 的符号级代码检索与编辑工具，显著提升大模型在代码理解与修改中的效率与准确性，支持多种 LLM 集成方式，包括 MCP、OpenAPI 及自定义代理框架。
summary.en: Serena is a powerful coding agent toolkit that transforms an LLM into a fully-featured agent capable of directly operating on your codebase. It provides IDE-like semantic code retrieval and editing tools at the symbol level, greatly improving token efficiency and code quality. Serena integrates with LLMs via MCP, OpenAPI, or custom agent frameworks, enabling precise code navigation and modification without full-file reads or string replacements.

metadata.name: article-writer
metadata.description: 使用Claude Code，Cursor, codex, gemini 写微信公众号文章工具。

summary.zh: Article Writer 是一款专为微信公众号/自媒体设计的 AI 智能写作系统，集成 Claude、Cursor、Gemini 等 13 个 AI 助手平台。通过九步写作流程与四大多模式创作体系（教练/快速/混合/框架约束），结合素材库、文档爬虫与三遍审校机制，帮助用户产出高真实性、低 AI 检测率的内容，核心目标是保留人类真实表达与个性化细节。
summary.en: Article Writer is an AI-powered intelligent writing system designed for WeChat Official Accounts and self-media content. Integrated with 13 AI assistants including Claude, Cursor, and Gemini, it features a 9-step writing workflow and four multi-mode creation systems (Coach/Quick/Hybrid/Outline-constrained). With material libraries, document crawlers, and triple-review mechanisms, it helps users produce highly authentic content with low AI detection rates, preserving human voice and personal details.

metadata.name: novel-writer
metadata.description: 参考Spec-kit 实现小说撰写工具

summary.zh: Novel Writer 是基于规格驱动开发（SDD）的 AI 智能中文小说创作工具，支持在 Claude、Cursor、Gemini 等 13 个 AI 助手中通过斜杠命令系统化创作。提供七步创作方法论、情节追踪、角色一致性验证等核心功能，专为中文小说写作优化，支持跨平台使用与插件扩展。
summary.en: Novel Writer is an AI-driven Chinese novel writing tool based on Specification-Driven Development (SDD), enabling systematic creation through slash commands in 13 AI assistants like Claude, Cursor, and Gemini. It offers a 7-step methodology, plot tracking, character consistency checks, and Chinese-optimized features, with cross-platform support and extensible plugin architecture.

metadata.name: openscreen
metadata.description: Create stunning screen recordings for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.

summary.zh: OpenScreen 是一款免费开源的屏幕录制工具，提供无广告、无订阅、商业可用的屏幕录制与编辑功能，支持自定义缩放、背景、注释及导出设置，适用于制作产品演示和教程视频，是 Screen Studio 的轻量级替代方案。
summary.en: OpenScreen is a free, open-source screen recording tool offering watermark-free, subscription-free recordings with customizable zooms, backgrounds, annotations, and export options. Ideal for product demos and tutorials, it serves as a lightweight alternative to Screen Studio.

metadata.name: ClashMac
metadata.description: Native Proxy Experience Built for macOS

summary.zh: ClashMac 是一款专为 macOS 打造的本地代理客户端，采用 SwiftUI 原生开发，深度集成系统。提供航线地图、连接拓扑和流量统计三大核心可视化功能，支持系统代理与 TUN 增强模式，具备菜单栏常驻、隐私模式、实时切换和自动重连等特性，带来直观高效的代理管理体验。
summary.en: ClashMac is a native macOS proxy client built with SwiftUI, offering route map visualization, connection topology, and real-time traffic statistics. It supports system proxy and TUN modes, features menu bar integration, privacy mode, instant node switching, and auto-reconnection for an intuitive proxy management experience.

metadata.name: vget
metadata.description: Versatile downloader for audio, video, podcasts, PDFs and more. Available as CLI and Docker | 多功能下载工具，支持音视频、播客、PDF等，提供 CLI 和 Docker 两种方式

summary.zh: vget 是一款多功能下载工具，支持从音视频、播客、社交媒体（如小红书、Twitter）及WebDAV等资源下载内容，提供 CLI 和 Docker 部署方式，具备多语言支持和交互式配置向导，适用于跨平台自动化下载场景。
summary.en: vget is a versatile downloader supporting audio, video, podcasts, PDFs, and social media content from platforms like Xiaohongshu and Twitter. It offers CLI and Docker deployment, multi-language support, and interactive configuration, ideal for cross-platform automated downloads.

metadata.name: auo
metadata.description: 让 Claude Code 更易用，支持多配置切换。

summary.zh: auo 是一个专为 Claude Code 设计的 CLI 工具，通过多配置切换和环境变量管理提升使用体验。支持自动配置升级与向后兼容，适用于多账号/代理场景下的无缝切换，显著简化 Anthropic API 的复杂配置流程。
summary.en: auo is a CLI tool designed to enhance Claude Code usability by enabling easy multi-configuration switching and environment variable management. It supports automatic config upgrades with full backward compatibility, ideal for seamless transitions between multiple accounts or proxy setups, streamlining Anthropic API configuration.

metadata.name: anyrouter-check-in
metadata.description: 支持 AnyRouter、AgentRouter 的多平台多账号签到，理论兼容所有基于 NewAPI、OneAPI 的平台。

summary.zh: AnyRouter 多账号自动签到工具，支持 AnyRouter 和 AgentRouter 平台，兼容 NewAPI/OneAPI 架构。通过 GitHub Actions 实现定时自动签到，支持多账号并行处理、WAF 绕过及机器人通知，配置灵活且维护良好。
summary.en: A multi-account auto check-in tool for AnyRouter and AgentRouter platforms, compatible with NewAPI/OneAPI architectures. Uses GitHub Actions for scheduled automation, supports parallel account processing, WAF bypass, and notification alerts with flexible configuration.

metadata.name: Mole
metadata.description: 🐹 Deep clean and optimize your Mac.

summary.zh: Mole 是一款 macOS 深度清理优化工具，集成 CleanMyMac、AppCleaner 等工具功能于一身。支持深度清理缓存日志、智能卸载应用及其残留文件、可视化磁盘分析、实时系统监控，并提供一键优化系统服务。通过 Homebrew 或脚本安装，提供交互式菜单与命令行操作，支持预览清理计划、白名单管理及详细调试日志，兼顾高效性与安全性。
summary.en: Mole is a comprehensive macOS optimization tool combining features of CleanMyMac, AppCleaner, DaisyDisk, and iStat Menus. It enables deep cleaning of caches/logs, smart app uninstallation with leftover removal, visual disk analysis, real-time system monitoring, and system service optimization. Installed via Homebrew or script, it offers interactive menus and CLI commands with dry-run previews, whitelist management, and detailed debug logging for safe and efficient system maintenance.

metadata.name: skills
metadata.description: Public repository for Agent Skills

summary.zh: Anthropic 公开 Claude 智能体技能库，提供文档处理、开发工具、企业工作流等多样化技能模板，支持动态加载与自定义扩展，助力 AI 智能体实现专业化任务自动化。
summary.en: Anthropic's public repository for Agent Skills provides Claude with dynamic, modular capabilities across document processing, development tools, and enterprise workflows, enabling specialized task automation through customizable, production-grade skill modules.

metadata.name: WeSpy
metadata.description: WeSpy 是一个用于获取wx公众号文章并转换为 Markdown 格式的 Python 工具

summary.zh: WeSpy 是一个专为微信公众号设计的 Python 工具，可抓取文章并转换为 Markdown 格式，支持防盗链处理、专辑批量下载及多格式输出（Markdown/HTML/JSON），提供命令行和 Python API 两种使用方式。
summary.en: WeSpy is a Python tool designed for scraping WeChat Official Account articles and converting them to Markdown format. It supports anti-hotlinking image handling, batch album downloads, and multi-format output (Markdown/HTML/JSON), with both CLI and Python API interfaces.

metadata.name: spec-kit
metadata.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development

summary.zh: Spec Kit 是一个开源工具包，专注于规格驱动开发（Spec-Driven Development），通过将规格转化为可执行代码，帮助开发者快速构建高质量软件。它提供 CLI 工具、AI 助手集成和项目治理框架，支持从零开始或现有项目初始化，显著提升开发效率并减少‘ vibe coding’。
summary.en: Spec Kit is an open-source toolkit for Spec-Driven Development, transforming specifications into executable code to accelerate high-quality software creation. It offers CLI tools, AI agent integration, and project governance via `/speckit.constitution` and `/speckit.specify` commands, enabling rapid project initialization and reducing ad-hoc coding.

metadata.name: Image_matting
metadata.description: 一键批量抠图。两种方法。一.使用remove.bg网站账号免费api额度，二.使用rembg和onnxruntime训练模型本地抠图

summary.zh: Image_matting 提供一键批量抠图功能，支持两种模式：使用 remove.bg 在线 API（高精度需网络）或本地 rembg+onnxruntime 模型（快速清晰需算力）。自动轮换 API 密钥解决额度问题，支持批量处理与文件名规范，适用于电商、设计等领域。
summary.en: Image_matting enables one-click batch background removal with two modes: using remove.bg's online API (higher accuracy, requires internet) or local rembg+onnxruntime model (faster, clearer, requires hardware). It auto-rotates API keys to bypass limits, supports batch processing and standardized file naming, ideal for e-commerce and design workflows.

metadata.name: awesome-claude-code-subagents
metadata.description: A collection of 100+ specialized Claude Code subagents covering a wide range of development use cases

summary.zh: 该仓库是 Claude Code 子代理的精选集合，包含127+个专业化AI助手，覆盖API设计、前后端开发、DevOps、测试等全开发场景。支持插件市场一键安装、交互式脚本及独立安装器，提供开箱即用的开发自动化工具链。
summary.en: This repository is the definitive collection of 127+ specialized Claude Code subagents for development tasks, covering API design, full-stack development, DevOps, and testing. It offers one-click plugin installation, interactive scripts, and standalone installers for instant developer productivity.

metadata.name: zcf
metadata.description: Zero-Config Code Flow for Claude code & Codex

summary.zh: ZCF 是一款零配置 Claude Code & Codex 代码流工具，提供一键安装、双语界面、智能代理系统和个性化 AI 助手。支持多种 API 提供商（如 302.AI、GLM、PackyCode 等），内置工作流、MCP 集成，并持续更新维护，适合开发者快速部署 AI 编程环境。
summary.en: ZCF (Zero-Config Code Flow) is a zero-configuration tool for Claude Code & Codex, enabling one-click setup with bilingual support, intelligent agent system, and personalized AI assistants. It supports multiple API providers (e.g., 302.AI, GLM, PackyCode), includes workflows and MCP integration, and is actively maintained for seamless AI coding experience.

summary.zh: 基于 Claude Sonnet 4.5 的多平台AI写作助手，提供从选题、创作到审校的全流程自动化工作流。通过个人素材库学习作者风格，采用三遍审校机制降低AI味至15-20%，集成标题优化、配图Prompt生成等功能，支持微信公众号、Twitter、小红书等多平台内容适配。
summary.en: A multi-platform AI writing agent built on Claude Sonnet 4.5, offering end-to-end automation from ideation to publication. Features style learning via personal material library, three-round editing to reduce AI flavor to 15-20%, and integrated title optimization with image prompt generation, supporting content adaptation across WeChat, Twitter, Xiaohongshu and other platforms.

metadata.name: gemini-cli
metadata.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

summary.zh: Gemini CLI 是一款开源 AI 智能体，将 Gemini 的强大功能直接集成到终端中，提供对 Gemini 3 模型的轻量级访问，支持 Google 搜索、文件操作、Shell 命令等内置工具，并具备 MCP 扩展能力，专为命令行开发者设计，采用 Apache 2.0 许可。
summary.en: Gemini CLI is an open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal, offering lightweight access to Gemini 3 models with built-in tools like Google Search, file operations, and shell commands, plus extensibility via MCP (Model Context Protocol), designed for developers who live in the command line.

metadata.name: docutranslate
metadata.description: 文档（小说、论文、字幕）翻译工具（支持 pdf/word/excel/json/epub/srt...）Document (Novel, Thesis, Subtitle) Translation Tool (Supports pdf/word/excel/json/epub/srt...)

summary.zh: DocuTranslate 是一款基于大语言模型的本地文档翻译工具，支持 PDF、Word、Excel、JSON、EPUB、SRT 等多种格式。具备自动术语表生成、PDF 表格/公式/代码识别、JSON 路径翻译、格式保留、多 AI 平台支持、异步高并发处理、局域网多用户共享及交互式 Web 界面等功能。提供便携版安装包，适合小说、论文、字幕等场景的批量翻译。
summary.en: DocuTranslate is a lightweight local document translation tool powered by Large Language Models. It supports multiple formats including PDF, Word, Excel, JSON, EPUB, and SRT. Features include automatic glossary generation, PDF table/formula/code recognition, JSON path-based translation, format preservation, multi-AI platform support, async concurrency, LAN multi-user access, and an integrated Web UI. Ideal for translating novels, academic papers, and subtitles with portable installers under 40MB.

metadata.name: SQLBot
metadata.description: 🔥 基于大模型和 RAG 的智能问数系统，对话式数据分析神器。Text-to-SQL Generation via LLMs using RAG.

summary.zh: SQLBot 是基于大语言模型和 RAG 技术的智能问数系统，支持对话式数据分析（ChatBI），实现自然语言转 SQL 查询并生成可视化图表。具备开箱即用、安全可控、易于集成等优势，可嵌入 DataEase、Dify 等应用，支持细粒度权限管理与持续优化，越问越准。
summary.en: SQLBot is an intelligent data querying system powered by LLMs and RAG, enabling conversational analytics (ChatBI) with natural language-to-SQL conversion and visualization. It offers plug-and-play deployment, secure workspace isolation, fine-grained permissions, and seamless integration into platforms like DataEase and Dify, continuously improving accuracy through user interactions.

metadata.name: jta
metadata.description: AI-powered JSON translation tool with agentic reflection using OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini APIs

summary.zh: Jta 是一款基于 AI 的智能 JSON 翻译工具，采用代理式反思机制实现自我优化翻译。通过 OpenAI、Anthropic 和 Gemini 三大 AI 平台，支持多语言国际化文件翻译，具备术语管理、增量翻译和格式保护等生产级功能，确保翻译准确性和一致性。
summary.en: Jta is an AI-powered JSON translation tool featuring an agentic reflection mechanism for self-optimizing translations. Using OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini APIs, it supports multi-language i18n files with terminology management, incremental translation, and format protection for production-grade accuracy and consistency.

metadata.name: zensical
metadata.description: A modern static site generator by the Material for MkDocs team

summary.zh: Zensical 是由 Material for MkDocs 团队打造的新一代现代化静态站点生成器，支持 Markdown 编写，具备搜索、多语言（60+）、响应式布局等特性，专为开源和商业项目提供快速构建专业文档站点的解决方案。
summary.en: Zensical is a modern static site generator crafted by the creators of Material for MkDocs, enabling rapid creation of professional, searchable, multilingual (60+ languages), and responsive documentation sites from Markdown – ideal for open-source and commercial projects.

metadata.name: BettaFish
metadata.description: 微舆：人人可用的多Agent舆情分析助手，打破信息茧房，还原舆情原貌，预测未来走向，辅助决策！从0实现，不依赖任何框架。

summary.zh: 微舆（BettaFish）是一个从0实现的多Agent舆情分析系统，通过AI驱动的全域社媒监控、复合分析引擎、多模态内容解析及Agent协作机制，打破信息茧房，还原舆情原貌并预测趋势。系统支持公私域数据融合，具备轻量化Python架构与高扩展性，可快速定制至金融等垂直领域。
summary.en: BettaFish is a zero-to-one implemented multi-Agent public opinion analysis system that breaks information cocoons and predicts trends through AI-driven social media monitoring, hybrid analysis engines, and agent collaboration. It supports private-public data fusion, offers lightweight Python architecture, and enables rapid customization for vertical domains like finance.

metadata.name: smart-excalidraw-next
metadata.description: A smart, powerful, and beautiful excalidraw drawing tool.Draw Professional Charts with Natural Language

summary.zh: Smart Excalidraw 是一款基于自然语言的专业图表生成工具，集成 AI 大模型与 Excalidraw 画布，支持 20+ 种图表类型（如流程图、架构图、ER 图等），通过独创连接算法优化布局，用户仅需描述需求即可自动生成可编辑的专业级图表，支持本地部署与服务器端 LLM 配置，兼顾易用性与隐私安全。
summary.en: Smart Excalidraw is an AI-powered diagramming tool that generates professional charts from natural language descriptions. It integrates with Excalidraw canvas, supports 20+ chart types (e.g., flowcharts, architecture diagrams, ER diagrams), uses an innovative connection algorithm for optimal layout, and allows users to edit AI-generated diagrams in real-time. Supports local deployment and server-side LLM configuration for enterprise use.

metadata.name: ezbookkeeping
metadata.description: A lightweight, self-hosted personal finance app with a user-friendly interface and powerful bookkeeping features.

summary.zh: ezBookkeeping 是一款轻量级自托管个人财务管理应用，支持 Docker 快速部署，具备用户友好的界面和强大的记账功能。支持多语言、多币种、AI 收据识别、数据导入导出（CSV/OFX/QFX 等），并提供图表分析、地理位置标记、双因素认证等高级特性，适用于 Raspberry Pi、NAS 等低资源设备。
summary.en: ezBookkeeping is a lightweight, self-hosted personal finance app with a user-friendly interface and powerful bookkeeping features. It supports Docker deployment, multi-language/currency, AI receipt recognition, data import/export (CSV/OFX/QFX), chart analytics, location tagging, and 2FA, optimized for low-resource devices like Raspberry Pi and NAS.

metadata.name: agtok
metadata.description: A CLI/TUI tool to manage and switch tokens & base URLs for AI agents like Claude, Gemini, and Codex.

summary.zh: agtok 是一个 CLI/TUI 工具，用于集中管理和切换 Claude、Gemini 和 Codex 等 AI 代理的令牌与基础 URL。支持交互式终端界面、预设分组、原子化写入与备份，适用于多环境 AI 工具配置管理。
summary.en: agtok is a CLI/TUI tool for centrally managing and switching tokens and base URLs for AI agents like Claude, Gemini, and Codex. It supports interactive TUI, preset grouping, atomic writes with backups, and seamless configuration switching across environments.

metadata.name: iflow-cli
metadata.description: iFlow cli is a comprehensive command-line intelligence that embeds in your terminal, analyzes your repositories, does coding tasks, interprets your needs across contexts, and boosts efficiency by performing tasks from simple file operations to complex workflow automation.

summary.zh: iFlow CLI 是一款终端内嵌的 AI 智能助手，支持自然语言交互、代码仓库分析、多模态输入及复杂工作流自动化。集成 iFlow 开放市场，一键安装 MCP 工具与子代理，提供免费版多模态模型（如 Kimi K2、Qwen3 Coder）支持，具备计划模式、任务压缩、插件扩展等高级功能，显著提升开发效率。
summary.en: iFlow CLI is an AI-powered terminal assistant that analyzes codebases, executes coding tasks, and automates workflows via natural language. It integrates free multimodal models (e.g., Kimi K2, Qwen3 Coder), supports SubAgents and MCP tools from its Open Market, and offers advanced features like plan mode, context compression, and plugin support for enhanced developer productivity.

metadata.name: stock-open-api
metadata.description: 股票数据接口

summary.zh: stock-open-api 是一个开源的股票数据接口库，提供从上海证券交易所和东方财富等公开数据源的股票信息查询功能，支持A股、港股、科创板、新三板及中国概念股等市场数据，适用于学习交流与量化研究场景，不可用于商业用途。
summary.en: stock-open-api is an open-source library providing stock data interfaces from public sources like the Shanghai Stock Exchange and East Money, supporting queries for A-shares, Hong Kong stocks, STAR Market, New Third Board, and US-listed Chinese companies, intended for educational and research use only.

summary.zh: 该项目通过 ISBN 空间可视化技术，将全球图书数据映射为二维空间，支持按出版社、稀有度等维度进行交互式探索。基于预处理的 ISBN 前缀数据和图书馆馆藏信息，生成高分辨率 PNG 瓦片数据集，适用于大规模图书数据的直观分析与展示。
summary.en: This project visualizes the global book catalog by mapping ISBNs into a 2D space, enabling interactive exploration by publisher, rarity, and other dimensions. It uses preprocessed ISBN prefix data and library holdings to generate high-resolution PNG tile datasets for intuitive analysis and visualization of massive book collections.

metadata.name: Cent
metadata.description: 完全免费、开源的多人协作记账 Web App | Completely free, open-source, collaborative accounting Web App

summary.zh: Cent 是一款完全免费、开源的多人协作记账 Web App，基于 GitHub 仓库实现数据同步与版本控制，无需服务器即可跨平台实时协作。支持语音记账、AI 智能分析、多币种管理、地图可视化、周期记账等高级功能，采用纯前端 PWA 架构，数据完全自持于用户私有仓库，保障隐私安全。
summary.en: Cent is a completely free, open-source collaborative accounting web app that uses GitHub repositories for data synchronization and version control, enabling real-time cross-platform collaboration without servers. It supports advanced features like voice记账, AI analysis, multi-currency management, map visualization, and recurring transactions. Built as a pure frontend PWA with data stored in user-owned private repositories for full privacy and security.

metadata.name: auto-cursor-releases
metadata.description: 源代码(开源版本到0.8)，后续版本会继续更新但不会开源

summary.zh: Auto Cursor 是一款专业的 Cursor IDE 管理工具，支持一键备份与恢复账户配置、无感换号及自动轮换到期账户，实现真正的无缝切换。核心功能包括机器ID管理、配置备份、SQLite 数据库更新等，适用于 macOS 和 Windows 平台，所有操作均创建备份以确保安全。
summary.en: Auto Cursor is a professional Cursor IDE management tool enabling one-click backup/restore of account configurations, seamless account switching, and automatic rotation of expired accounts. It manages machine IDs, updates storage.json and SQLite databases, and supports macOS and Windows. All operations create backups for safety and user control.

metadata.name: happy
metadata.description: Mobile and Web client for Codex and Claude Code, with realtime voice, encryption and fully featured

summary.zh: Happy Coder 是一款移动端和网页端客户端，支持 Claude Code 和 Codex，具备端到端加密、实时语音交互及全功能远程控制。用户可通过手机或网页随时监控 AI 编码进度，实现设备间无缝切换，保障代码安全。
summary.en: Happy Coder is a mobile and web client for Claude Code and Codex, featuring end-to-end encryption, real-time voice, and full-featured remote control. It enables users to monitor AI coding progress from any device, switch sessions instantly, and ensures code privacy with zero telemetry.

metadata.name: bytebot
metadata.description: Bytebot is a self-hosted AI desktop agent that automates computer tasks through natural language commands, operating within a containerized Linux desktop environment.

summary.zh: Bytebot 是一个自托管的开源 AI 桌面代理，通过自然语言指令自动化计算机任务。它运行在容器化的 Linux 桌面环境中，拥有完整的虚拟桌面，可自主使用各类应用程序、处理文件、登录网站、读取文档并执行复杂的多步骤工作流程，真正实现 AI 拥有独立计算机的自主操作能力。
summary.en: Bytebot is an open-source, self-hosted AI desktop agent that automates computer tasks via natural language commands. Operating within a containerized Linux desktop environment, it provides a full virtual desktop where it can use any application, manage files, authenticate on websites, process documents, and execute complex multi-step workflows with complete autonomy.

metadata.name: n8n-workflows
metadata.description: all of the workflows of n8n i could find (also from the site itself)

summary.zh: 该仓库收集了 n8n 自动化工作流的完整集合，包含 4343+ 个工作流和 365+ 种集成，覆盖网页抓取、AI 智能体、数据同步等场景。核心亮点是集成 AI-BOM 工具，可扫描工作流中的 AI 安全风险，如硬编码密钥、未授权 AI 代理和危险工具组合，提供合规性报告，助力满足 EU AI Act 要求。
summary.en: This repository aggregates 4,343+ n8n automation workflows with 365+ integrations, covering web scraping, AI agents, and data synchronization. Its standout feature is the integration of AI-BOM, the first tool to scan n8n workflows for AI security risks—detecting hardcoded keys, unauthenticated agents, and dangerous tool combinations—while generating compliance-ready reports aligned with EU AI Act deadlines.

metadata.name: WeKnora
metadata.description: LLM-powered framework for deep document understanding, semantic retrieval, and context-aware answers using RAG paradigm.

summary.zh: WeKnora 是腾讯开源的 LLM 驱动文档理解与检索框架，基于 RAG 范式实现深度语义检索与上下文感知回答。支持多模态预处理、向量索引、智能检索及自定义 Agent，提供知识库管理、API 认证、K8s 部署等能力，适用于复杂异构文档的智能问答场景。
summary.en: WeKnora is an LLM-powered framework for deep document understanding and semantic retrieval using the RAG paradigm. It features modular architecture with multimodal preprocessing, vector indexing, intelligent retrieval, and custom agents. Supports knowledge base management, API authentication, K8s deployment, and advanced features like thinking mode and data analysis.

metadata.name: Cap
metadata.description: Open source Loom alternative. Beautiful, shareable screen recordings.

summary.zh: Cap 是一款开源的 Loom 替代工具，提供美观、可分享的屏幕录制功能。支持视频录制、编辑与快速分享，采用 Rust + Tauri 构建桌面端，Next.js + React 开发 Web 端，基于 MySQL 和 Drizzle ORM，支持 Docker 一键部署与自托管。
summary.en: Cap is an open-source alternative to Loom, offering beautiful, shareable screen recordings. It enables quick video recording, editing, and sharing via a desktop app (Tauri/Rust) and web interface (Next.js/React), with MySQL backend, Docker deployment, and self-hosting support.

metadata.name: MagicMirror
metadata.description: MagicMirror² is an open source modular smart mirror platform. With a growing list of installable modules, the MagicMirror² allows you to convert your hallway or bathroom mirror into your personal assistant.

summary.zh: MagicMirror² 是一款开源模块化智能镜平台，可将走廊或浴室镜子转换为个人助手。基于 Electron 构建，无需服务器或浏览器，支持大量可安装插件，提供天气、日历、新闻等实时信息展示，适用于智能家居场景。
summary.en: MagicMirror² is an open source modular smart mirror platform that transforms hallways or bathroom mirrors into personal assistants. Built with Electron, it requires no web server or browser, supports numerous installable modules for displaying real-time info like weather, calendar, and news in smart home environments.

metadata.name: ququ
metadata.description: 开源免费的 Wispr Flow 替代方案 | 集成FunASR本地模型和可配置大语言模型的下一代中文桌面语音工作流

summary.zh: 蛐蛐 (QuQu) 是一款开源免费的 Wispr Flow 替代方案，专为中文用户打造的桌面端智能语音工作流工具。集成阿里巴巴 FunASR 本地语音识别模型和可配置大语言模型，实现高精度中文识别与智能文本优化，支持隐私保护、国产 AI 模型适配及开发者友好功能，完全免费且跨平台。
summary.en: QuQu is an open-source, free alternative to Wispr Flow, designed as a next-generation Chinese desktop voice workflow tool. It integrates Alibaba's FunASR local speech recognition model with configurable large language models, enabling high-precision Chinese transcription and intelligent text optimization. Features include privacy protection, support for domestic AI models, and developer-friendly formatting, all completely free and cross-platform.

metadata.name: aser
metadata.description: Aser is a lightweight, self-assembling AI Agent frame.

summary.zh: Aser 是一个轻量级、自组装的 AI 智能体框架，支持模块化组合与快速开发。通过几行代码即可构建具备工具调用、知识库、记忆、MCP 协议等能力的智能体，适用于 Web3、自动化任务和多智能体协作场景，提供丰富的示例与扩展能力。
summary.en: Aser is a lightweight, self-assembling AI agent framework enabling rapid development of modular agents. With just a few lines of code, users can build agents with tools, knowledge retrieval, memory, MCP protocol, and more, ideal for Web3 automation, multi-agent collaboration, and advanced AI workflows.

metadata.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
metadata.description: Chrome DevTools for coding agents

summary.zh: Chrome DevTools MCP 是一个专为 AI 编码代理（如 Gemini、Claude、Cursor 等）设计的 MCP 服务器，通过 Chrome DevTools 协议实现浏览器自动化、性能分析与深度调试。支持网络请求分析、截图、控制台日志追踪及性能追踪，结合 Puppeteer 实现可靠操作，适用于网页自动化与智能调试场景。
summary.en: Chrome DevTools MCP is an MCP server enabling AI coding agents (e.g., Gemini, Claude, Cursor) to control and inspect a live Chrome browser via the Chrome DevTools Protocol. It provides advanced debugging, performance tracing, network analysis, and screenshot capabilities using Puppeteer for reliable automation, ideal for web automation and intelligent debugging.

metadata.name: core
metadata.description: An out-of-the-box, lightweight JavaScript i18n auto-translation solution

summary.zh: i18n-pro/core 是一个开箱即用的轻量级 JavaScript 国际化自动翻译解决方案，支持文本提取、多平台自动翻译（如 Google、OpenAI、百度等）、增量更新和日志追踪，提供文本即键、变量插值、类型标签等功能，简化多语言开发流程。
summary.en: i18n-pro/core is an out-of-the-box, lightweight JavaScript i18n auto-translation solution that supports text extraction, multi-platform translation (e.g., Google, OpenAI, Baidu), incremental updates, and logging. It offers features like text-as-key, variable interpolation, and type tags to streamline internationalization.

metadata.name: Kode-Agent
metadata.description: Kode Agent — Design for post-human workflows. One unit agent for every human & computer task.

summary.zh: Kode 是一个终端中的强大 AI 编程助手，支持 AGENTS.md 标准，可理解代码库、编辑文件、执行命令并自动化完整工作流程。它兼容 Claude 的 .claude 格式，提供 YOLO 模式（默认）和安全的权限检查模式，支持 20+ AI 模型，具备原生二进制分发能力，注重隐私且无默认遥测。
summary.en: Kode is a powerful AI coding assistant in your terminal that understands codebases, edits files, runs commands, and automates workflows. It supports the AGENTS.md standard, is compatible with .claude formats, offers YOLO and safe modes, works with 20+ AI models, and features native binary distribution with privacy-first design and no telemetry by default.

metadata.name: claude-init
metadata.description: Claude Code 中文开发套件 - 为中国开发者定制的零门槛 AI 编程环境。一键安装完整中文化体验，集成 MCP 服务器、智能上下文管理、安全扫描，支持免翻墙访问。让 AI 编程更简单。

summary.zh: Claude Code 中文开发套件是为中国开发者量身定制的零门槛 AI 编程环境，提供一键安装的全中文化体验。集成 MCP 服务器、智能上下文管理、安全扫描等核心功能，支持免翻墙访问。最新版本融合 Anthropic 黑客松冠军配置，包含 9 个专用智能体、7+ 技能模块、10 个快捷指令和完整规则体系，实现从需求分析到代码审查的全流程 AI 驱动开发。
summary.en: Claude Code Chinese Development Kit is a zero-threshold AI programming environment tailored for Chinese developers, offering one-click installation with full Chinese localization. It integrates MCP servers, intelligent context management, security scanning, and supports direct access without VPN. The latest version incorporates the Anthropic Hackathon-winning configuration, featuring 9 specialized agents, 7+ skill modules, 10 slash commands, and a complete rule system for end-to-end AI-driven development workflows.

summary.zh: 基于 FastMCP 框架的 VSCode 扩展，将 VSCode 转换为 MCP 服务器，支持通过 HTTP Streaming 和 SSE 协议远程执行内部命令，提供工作区信息查询、异步执行、命令白名单等能力，兼容 Model Context Protocol 标准。
summary.en: A VSCode extension using FastMCP framework to convert VSCode into an MCP server, enabling remote execution of internal commands via HTTP Streaming and SSE, with workspace info, async execution, command whitelisting, and full Model Context Protocol compatibility.

metadata.name: file-transfer-go
metadata.description: Go/React开发的端到端webrtc的文件传输/文字传输/桌面共享，安全，隐私，数据不经过服务器。

summary.zh: 基于Go/React和WebRTC的端到端P2P文件传输工具，支持文件、文字传输及桌面共享，数据直连不经过服务器，具备端到端加密、响应式设计和Docker一键部署能力。
summary.en: A secure, privacy-focused P2P file transfer tool built with Go/React and WebRTC, enabling direct file, text, and desktop sharing without server relay, featuring end-to-end encryption, responsive design, and Docker deployment.

metadata.name: next-money
metadata.description: Flux AI Image generator

summary.zh: Next Money 是一个基于 Next.js 14 的全栈 SaaS 启动模板，集成 Stripe 支付、Clerk 认证、Supabase 数据库、React Email 和 Shadcn/ui 等现代技术栈，专为快速构建商业化 SaaS 产品而设计，提供完整的用户管理、支付处理与邮件通知解决方案。
summary.en: Next Money is a full-stack SaaS starter template built with Next.js 14, integrating Stripe payments, Clerk authentication, Supabase database, React Email, and Shadcn/ui. It accelerates SaaS development with ready-to-use user management, payment processing, and email notification features.

metadata.name: Open-Aiartools
metadata.description: AI 图像编辑 Web 应用，使用 **FLUX.1 Kontext [pro]** 前沿模型提供强大的图像编辑功能，支持Stripe支付，注册登录，积分系统等，代码100%开源。

summary.zh: 基于 Next.js 15 构建的现代化 AI 图像编辑 Web 应用，集成前沿 FLUX.1 Kontext Pro 模型，支持智能编辑、背景移除、多格式输出及 Stripe 支付，提供完整的用户认证、积分系统和国际化支持，代码完全开源。
summary.en: A modern AI image editing web app built with Next.js 15, powered by the cutting-edge FLUX.1 Kontext Pro model. Features intelligent editing, background removal, multi-format support, Stripe payments, user authentication, points system, and full internationalization, with 100% open-source code.

metadata.name: gpt-load
metadata.description: Multi-channel AI proxy with intelligent key rotation. 智能密钥轮询的多渠道 AI 代理。

summary.zh: GPT-Load 是一个高性能企业级 AI API 透明代理服务，专为需要集成多 AI 服务的开发者和企业设计。基于 Go 构建，具备智能密钥轮询、负载均衡、故障自动恢复、动态配置热重载等特性，支持 OpenAI、Google Gemini、Anthropic Claude 等多种 AI 服务格式，提供完整的监控和管理界面。
summary.en: GPT-Load is a high-performance, enterprise-grade transparent proxy service for AI APIs, designed for developers and enterprises integrating multiple AI services. Built with Go, it features intelligent key rotation, load balancing, automatic failure recovery, hot-reload configuration, and comprehensive monitoring. Supports OpenAI, Google Gemini, and Anthropic Claude APIs with a Vue 3 management interface.

metadata.name: AionUi
metadata.description: Free, local, open-source 24/7 Cowork app and OpenClaw for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI, Auggie, and more | 🌟 Star if you like it!

summary.zh: AionUi 是一款免费、开源的 AI 协作者应用，支持 24/7 自动化，内置多 AI 智能体（如 Claude Code、OpenClaw、Qwen Code 等），提供跨平台（macOS/Windows/Linux）本地运行、零配置启动、远程访问（WebUI/Telegram/Lark）和任务调度功能，适用于代码开发、文件处理与自动化工作流。
summary.en: AionUi is a free, open-source AI coworking app that enables 24/7 automation with built-in multi-agent support (e.g., Claude Code, OpenClaw, Qwen Code). It offers zero-setup local execution, cross-platform compatibility, remote access via WebUI/Telegram, and scheduled task automation for coding, file operations, and workflow management.

metadata.name: typix
metadata.description: 开源AI生图工具，免登录畅玩 FLUX2、SDXL，支持 cloudflare workers 一键部署自托管，并集成各大主流AI提供商，提供一站式的创作体验。

summary.zh: Typix 是一款开源 AI 生图工具，支持免登录使用 FLUX2、SDXL 等主流模型，提供 Cloudflare Workers 一键自托管部署，集成 Google、OpenAI、Fal 等多平台 AI 服务，兼具浏览器本地存储与可选云同步，保障用户数据隐私与创作自由。
summary.en: Typix is an open-source AI image generation tool that enables login-free access to FLUX2, SDXL, and other models. It offers one-click self-hosting via Cloudflare Workers, integrates multiple AI providers like Google and OpenAI, and supports local browser storage with optional cloud sync for privacy and seamless cross-device creativity.

metadata.name: claude-code-router
metadata.description: Use Claude Code as the foundation for coding infrastructure, allowing you to decide how to interact with the model while enjoying updates from Anthropic.

summary.zh: Claude Code Router 是基于 Claude Code 构建的智能编码基础设施，支持多模型路由、动态切换及请求/响应转换，兼容 OpenRouter、DeepSeek、Ollama 等主流 AI 模型提供商，提供 CLI 管理和 GitHub Actions 集成，适用于复杂编码场景下的灵活 AI 工具编排。
summary.en: Claude Code Router builds on Claude Code to enable intelligent coding infrastructure with multi-model routing, dynamic switching, and request/response transformation. It supports providers like OpenRouter, DeepSeek, and Ollama, offering CLI management and GitHub Actions integration for flexible AI tool orchestration in complex development workflows.

metadata.name: claude-worker-proxy
metadata.description: Cloudflare Worker; Claude Code; Proxy; Easy to deploy; Claude Code Router; claude-code-router; ccr; alternate

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Cloudflare Worker 的 Claude Code 代理工具，支持将 Gemini 和 OpenAI 等第三方大模型 API 转换为 Claude 格式，实现零配置快速部署。核心特性包括流式响应、工具调用支持，并可通过 One-Balance 实现低成本 Claude Code 使用。
summary.en: This project is a Cloudflare Worker-based proxy that converts third-party LLM APIs (Gemini, OpenAI) into Claude-compatible format, enabling zero-config deployment. It supports streaming/non-streaming responses, tool calls, and integrates with One-Balance for cost-effective Claude Code usage.

metadata.name: xiaohongshu-mcp
metadata.description: MCP for xiaohongshu.com

summary.zh: 小红书 MCP 是一个专为 xiaohongshu.com 设计的自动化工具，支持登录验证、图文/视频内容发布、内容搜索、推荐列表获取、帖子详情抓取、评论互动及用户主页信息提取。采用本地路径优先的图片处理机制，确保上传稳定性，并提供完整的 HTTP API 与 MCP 工具调用支持，适用于内容运营与数据采集场景。
summary.en: Xiaohongshu MCP is an automation tool designed for xiaohongshu.com, supporting login verification, publishing text/image and video content, searching posts, fetching recommended feeds, retrieving post details with interactions, commenting, and user profile data extraction. It prioritizes local file paths for media uploads to ensure stability, and offers full HTTP API and MCP tool integration for content operations and data collection.

metadata.name: LiYing
metadata.description: LiYing is an automated photo processing program designed for automating the post-processing workflow of ID photos in general photo studios. | LiYing 是一套适用于自动化 完成一般照相馆后期证件照处理流程的照片自动处理的程序。

summary.zh: LiYing 是一款专为照相馆设计的证件照自动化处理程序，支持人体与面部智能识别、角度自动校正、背景色更换、多尺寸裁切及排版。完全离线运行，所有图像处理均在本地完成，适用于单人标准肖像照的批量高效处理。
summary.en: LiYing is an automated photo processing program tailored for photo studios, enabling intelligent human and face detection, automatic angle correction, background replacement, multi-size cropping, and layout. It runs entirely offline with all image processing performed locally, ideal for batch processing standard single-person ID photos.

metadata.name: MonkeyCode
metadata.description: 企业级 AI 编程助手，专为 研发协作 和 研发管理 场景而设计。

summary.zh: MonkeyCode 是一款企业级 AI 编程助手，专为研发协作与管理场景设计，支持私有化部署与本地大模型接入，提供 IDE 对话式编程、代码补全、安全扫描及 Git 平台机器人能力，内置企业级管理面板用于审计管控与资源统一调度，兼顾效率与代码安全。
summary.en: MonkeyCode is an enterprise-grade AI programming assistant designed for R&D collaboration and management. It supports private deployment, local LLM integration, and offline usage, offering IDE-based coding, intelligent completions, security scanning, Git platform bots, and a management panel for auditing, compliance, and centralized model usage control.

metadata.name: Excel-Plugin-Template
metadata.description: ⚡ Excel Plugin Framework | Excel插件框架 - C# .NET hot-reload template for VSTO add-ins. Features: WPF/WinForms UI, auto-update, COM safety, MVVM pattern. Perfect for Office automation & Excel/WPS plugins

summary.zh: BasePlugin 是一个基于 DTI_Tool.AddIn 热插拔框架的 Excel 插件开发模板，专为 C#/.NET Framework 构建 VSTO 插件而设计。支持 WPF/WinForms UI、MVVM 模式、自动更新、COM 安全交互，适用于 Excel/WPS 自动化扩展开发。
summary.en: BasePlugin is a comprehensive Excel add-in development template built on the DTI_Tool.AddIn hot-pluggable framework, enabling C#/.NET Framework VSTO plugin development with WPF/WinForms UI, MVVM pattern, auto-update, and COM-safe Excel interop for Office automation.

metadata.name: WePush
metadata.description: 专注批量推送的小而美的工具，目前支持：模板消息-公众号、模板消息-小程序、微信客服消息、微信企业号/企业微信消息、阿里云短信、阿里大于模板短信 、腾讯云短信、云片网短信、E-Mail、HTTP请求、钉钉、华为云短信、百度云短信、又拍云短信、七牛云短信

summary.zh: WePush 是一款专注于批量消息推送的轻量级工具，支持微信公众号、小程序、企业微信、短信平台（阿里云、腾讯云等）及邮件等多种渠道。具备变量消息、定时推送、用户导入、多账号管理等功能，提供可视化界面与推送历史管理，适用于营销通知、系统告警等场景。
summary.en: WePush is a lightweight tool for bulk message pushing, supporting WeChat official accounts, mini-programs, enterprise accounts, SMS platforms (e.g., Alibaba Cloud, Tencent Cloud), and email. It offers variable messaging, scheduled delivery, user import, multi-account management, and a user-friendly GUI, ideal for marketing alerts and system notifications.

metadata.name: MoonCakeTV
metadata.description: 月饼TV

summary.zh: MoonCakeTV 是一个基于 Next.js 15 和 TypeScript 的影视聚合搜索服务，支持多源聚合搜索（苹果CMS v10协议）、HLS.js 在线播放、收藏与历史记录、响应式深色主题及可选密码保护，数据持久化存储无需数据库，支持一键 Docker 部署与 HTTPS 自动配置。
summary.en: MoonCakeTV is a simple yet powerful video aggregation and search service built with Next.js 15 and TypeScript. It supports multi-source search via AppleCMS v10 protocol, HLS.js streaming, favorites, watch history, responsive dark mode, optional password protection, and stores data without a database. Features one-click Docker deployment with automatic HTTPS via Caddy.

metadata.name: aggregator
metadata.description: One-stop Proxies Crawling and Aggregation Platform

summary.zh: Aggregator 是一个高效免费的代理池构建工具，支持从 Telegram、GitHub 等多平台爬取代理资源，自动验证质量并转换为 Clash、V2Ray 等格式，提供 GitHub Gist 等灵活存储后端，适用于个人及企业级代理订阅管理。
summary.en: Aggregator is a powerful free proxy pool builder that crawls proxy resources from multiple platforms like Telegram and GitHub, automatically validates quality, and converts them into formats such as Clash and V2Ray. It supports flexible storage backends like GitHub Gist and is ideal for personal and enterprise proxy subscription management.

metadata.name: opcode
metadata.description: A powerful GUI app and Toolkit for Claude Code - Create custom agents, manage interactive Claude Code sessions, run secure background agents, and more.

summary.zh: opcode 是一款基于 Tauri 2 的 Claude Code GUI 工具，提供项目与会话管理、自定义 AI 代理创建、MCP 服务器集成、使用量分析仪表板等功能，将命令行工具转化为直观的桌面应用，提升 AI 辅助开发效率。
summary.en: opcode is a powerful desktop GUI app built with Tauri 2 for Claude Code, enabling custom agent creation, interactive session management, MCP server integration, usage analytics, and secure background agent execution to enhance AI-assisted development productivity.

metadata.name: OmniParser
metadata.description: A simple screen parsing tool towards pure vision based GUI agent

summary.zh: OmniParser 是一个面向纯视觉 GUI 代理的屏幕解析工具，通过将界面截图结构化解析为可理解的元素，显著提升 GPT-4V 等视觉模型在界面区域精准定位和交互的能力。支持图标检测与功能描述，集成 OmniTool 实现 Windows 11 虚拟机控制，兼容多种大语言模型，适用于自动化操作与训练数据生成。
summary.en: OmniParser is a screen parsing tool designed for pure vision-based GUI agents, transforming UI screenshots into structured elements to enhance the accuracy of vision models like GPT-4V in grounding actions. It supports icon detection, interactivity prediction, and integrates with OmniTool for Windows 11 VM control, compatible with OpenAI, DeepSeek, Qwen, and Anthropic models for automation and training data generation.

metadata.name: TrendRadar
metadata.description: ⭐AI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts.🎯 告别信息过载，你的 AI 舆情监控助手与热点筛选工具！聚合多平台热点 +  RSS 订阅，支持关键词精准筛选。AI 翻译 +  AI 分析简报直推手机，也支持接入 MCP 架构，赋能 AI 自然语言对话分析、情感洞察与趋势预测等。支持 Docker ，数据本地/云端自持。集成微信/飞书/钉钉/Telegram/邮件/ntfy/bark/slack 等渠道智能推送。

summary.zh: TrendRadar 是一款 AI 驱动的舆情监控工具，支持多平台热点聚合、RSS 订阅与智能关键词筛选，提供 AI 翻译与分析简报推送。集成微信/飞书/钉钉等 8+ 通知渠道，支持 Docker 部署与 MCP 架构，赋能 AI 对话分析、情感洞察与趋势预测，30 秒快速部署。
summary.en: TrendRadar is an AI-powered public opinion and trend monitoring tool that aggregates multi-platform hot topics, RSS feeds, and offers smart keyword filtering. It delivers AI-translated analysis briefs via 8+ notification channels (WeChat, Feishu, DingTalk, etc.), supports Docker deployment and MCP architecture for AI-driven sentiment analysis and trend forecasting, with a 30-second setup.

metadata.name: liquid-glass-react
metadata.description: Apple's Liquid Glass effect for React

summary.zh: Liquid Glass React 是一款为 React 应用打造的 Apple 液态玻璃特效组件库，完美复现 macOS 和 iOS 中的毛玻璃视觉效果。支持多模式折射、弹性交互、鼠标追踪位移、色差调节等高级特性，适用于现代 UI 设计中的卡片、按钮等组件，显著提升视觉质感与交互体验。
summary.en: Liquid Glass React is a React component library that replicates Apple's Liquid Glass effect, delivering authentic frosted glass visuals with displacement, refraction, and elastic interactions. It supports multiple refraction modes, mouse tracking, chromatic aberration, and customizable blur/saturation, ideal for modern UI elements like cards and buttons.

metadata.name: MultiAgentPPT
metadata.description: MultiAgentPPT 是一个集成了 A2A（Agent2Agent）+ MCP（Model Context Protocol）+ ADK（Agent Development Kit） 架构的智能化演示文稿生成系统，支持通过多智能体协作和流式并发机制

summary.zh: MultiAgentPPT 是基于 A2A+MCP+ADK 架构的多智能体演示文稿生成系统，通过大纲生成、主题拆分、并行调研和流式汇总等智能体协作，实现高质量PPT的自动化生成，支持实时编辑与下载，具备可扩展性和本地模型适配能力。
summary.en: MultiAgentPPT is a multi-agent system leveraging A2A+MCP+ADK architecture to automate PPT generation through outline creation, topic splitting, parallel research, and streaming synthesis. It supports real-time editing, high-quality content, extensibility, and local model compatibility.

metadata.name: AIClient-2-API
metadata.description: Simulates Gemini CLI, Antigravity, Qwen Code, and Kiro client requests, compatible with the OpenAI API. It supports thousands of Gemini model requests per day and offers free use of the built-in Claude model in Kiro. Easily connect to any client via the API, making AI development more efficient!

summary.zh: AIClient-2-API 是一个强大的 API 代理服务，能够将原本仅限客户端使用的大模型（如 Gemini CLI、Antigravity、Qwen Code、Kiro 等）的请求统一转换为兼容 OpenAI 协议的标准接口。支持每日数千次 Gemini 模型请求，内置 Claude 免费调用功能，提供高可用性的模块化架构，包含账户池管理、智能轮询、自动故障转移和健康检查机制，显著提升 AI 开发效率。
summary.en: AIClient-2-API is a powerful proxy service that unifies requests from client-restricted large models (e.g., Gemini CLI, Antigravity, Qwen Code, Kiro) into a standard OpenAI-compatible interface. It supports thousands of daily Gemini model requests, offers free built-in Claude access, and features a modular architecture with account pooling, intelligent polling, automatic failover, and health checks for 99.9% uptime, greatly enhancing AI development efficiency.

metadata.name: cloudflare_temp_email
metadata.description: CloudFlare free temp domain email 免费收发 临时域名邮箱 支持附件 IMAP SMTP TelegramBot

summary.zh: 基于 Cloudflare Workers 构建的免费临时邮箱服务，支持收发邮件、附件处理、IMAP/SMTP 协议及 Telegram 机器人通知，采用 Rust WASM 实现高性能邮件解析，提供现代化多语言响应式界面，支持邮箱地址密码保护，完全免费且无需服务器部署。
summary.en: A fully-featured free temporary email service built on Cloudflare Workers, supporting email sending/receiving, attachments, IMAP/SMTP protocols, and Telegram bot notifications. Uses Rust WASM for high-performance email parsing, offers a modern responsive UI with multi-language support, and enables password protection for email addresses—all at zero cost with no server required.

summary.zh: Augment2Api 是一个连接 Augment API 的中间件服务，提供兼容 OpenAI 的接口，支持 Claude3.7 和 Claude4 模型调用，具备流式输出、多 token 管理、Redis 存储及批量检测功能，但存在账号被封风险，需谨慎使用。
summary.en: Augment2Api is a middleware service that connects to Augment API, offering OpenAI-compatible interfaces for Claude3.7 and Claude4 models with streaming support, multi-token management, and Redis storage, though it carries account ban risks and should be used cautiously.

summary.zh: 为 Windows 平台打造的 Claude Code 原生聊天界面扩展，提供现代化 UI 和自定义 API 支持，兼容 VS Code 和 Cursor，支持第三方 API 接入，显著提升开发效率。
summary.en: A native Windows UI extension for Claude Code that enhances the CLI experience with a modern chat interface, custom API support, and seamless integration with VS Code/Cursor for improved developer productivity.

metadata.name: OpenCut
metadata.description: The open-source CapCut alternative

summary.zh: OpenCut 是一款免费开源的视频编辑器，支持网页、桌面和移动端，提供时间轴编辑、多轨道支持、实时预览等功能，无水印且无需订阅。注重隐私保护，所有视频处理在本地完成，核心功能对标 CapCut，适合追求简洁高效的用户。
summary.en: OpenCut is a free, open-source video editor for web, desktop, and mobile, offering timeline-based editing, multi-track support, and real-time preview. It emphasizes privacy by processing videos locally, avoids watermarks, and targets users seeking CapCut-like simplicity without paywalled features.

metadata.name: illa-helper
metadata.description: 浸入式学语言助手 (Immersive Language Learning Assistant)

summary.zh: 浸入式语言学习助手是一款基于‘可理解输入’理论的浏览器插件，通过智能翻译网页词汇并集成发音功能，实现自然语言习得。支持自动语言检测、AI选词、双语音频朗读及交互式提示，将整个互联网转化为个性化学习材料。
summary.en: An immersive language learning browser extension based on 'comprehensible input' theory, intelligently translating selected words with pronunciation support. Features automatic language detection, AI-driven vocabulary selection, dual TTS, and interactive tooltips to turn the web into personalized learning content.

metadata.name: go-augment-cleaner
metadata.description: 清理Augment缓存和生成设备SessionId/解决 VSCode、Cursor、JetBrains 系列 IDE 中 Augment 插件无法登录的问题（Sign in failed. If you have a firewall, please add）/将所有 d1-d20.api.augmentcode.com 域名统一指向延迟最低的服务器IP

summary.zh: Augment 插件清理工具 v3.4 是一款专为解决 VSCode、Cursor、JetBrains 系列 IDE 中 Augment 插件登录失败问题而设计的跨平台工具。核心功能包括彻底清理插件缓存数据、生成设备 SessionId，以及通过智能测速优化 API 域名解析（将 d1-d20.api.augmentcode.com 指向延迟最低服务器）。支持交互式菜单和命令行模式，提供代理配置、安全预览等高级功能，兼容 Windows/macOS/Linux。
summary.en: Augment Plugin Cleaner v3.4 is a cross-platform utility designed to resolve login failures in Augment plugin for VSCode, Cursor, and JetBrains IDEs. It features comprehensive cache/data cleanup, SessionId generation, and intelligent API domain optimization by testing latency of d1-d20.api.augmentcode.com endpoints. Supports interactive menus, CLI arguments, proxy configurations (Clash/V2Ray/custom), dry-run previews, and works on Windows/macOS/Linux with admin privileges for hosts file modification.

metadata.name: AlgerMusicPlayer
metadata.description: 一个第三方音乐播放器、本地服务、桌面歌词、音乐下载、远程控制

summary.zh: AlgerMusicPlayer 是一款功能强大的第三方跨平台音乐播放器，支持网易云账号登录、本地服务、桌面歌词、音乐下载及远程控制。基于 Electron 和 Vue 开发，提供沉浸式歌词显示、EQ均衡器、多语言界面和明暗主题切换，支持全平台运行（桌面/Web/移动端），兼顾高品质音质与个性化体验。
summary.en: AlgerMusicPlayer is a powerful third-party cross-platform music player supporting NetEase Cloud login, local services, desktop lyrics, music downloads, and remote control. Built with Electron and Vue, it offers immersive lyrics, EQ equalizer, multi-language UI, dark/light themes, and high-fidelity audio, running on Desktop, Web, and Mobile platforms with personalized features.

metadata.name: Scraperr
metadata.description: Self-hosted webscraper.

summary.zh: Scraperr 是一款强大的自托管网页爬虫解决方案，支持无代码配置、XPath精准提取、多任务队列管理、媒体下载及结果可视化导出，适用于数据采集与自动化分析场景。
summary.en: Scraperr is a powerful self-hosted web scraping tool enabling code-free configuration, XPath-based extraction, queue management, media downloads, and structured data export, ideal for automated data collection and analysis.

metadata.name: claude_proxy
metadata.description: 这是一个部署在 Cloudflare Workers 上的 TypeScript 项目，它充当一个代理服务器，能够将 Claude API 格式的请求无缝转换为 OpenAI API 格式。这使得任何与 Claude API 兼容的客户端（例如官方的 @anthropic-ai/claude-code CLI）都能够与任何支持 OpenAI API 格式的服务进行通信，如 Google Gemini, Groq, Ollama 等。

summary.zh: 该项目是一个部署在 Cloudflare Workers 上的 TypeScript 代理服务器，可将 Claude API 请求无缝转换为 OpenAI API 格式，支持动态路由至 Google Gemini、Groq、Ollama 等兼容服务，具备全功能 API 兼容、函数调用转换、Haiku 模型快捷配置及一键部署脚本，实现 Claude 客户端与多 AI 服务的无缝互通。
summary.en: This is a TypeScript project deployed on Cloudflare Workers that acts as a proxy server, seamlessly converting Claude API requests to OpenAI API format. It enables any Claude-compatible client (e.g., @anthropic-ai/claude-code) to communicate with OpenAI-compatible services like Google Gemini, Groq, and Ollama via dynamic routing, full API compatibility, tool calling conversion, and one-click deployment.

metadata.name: mindsdb
metadata.description: Query Engine for AI Analytics: Build self-reasoning agents across all your live data

summary.zh: MindsDB 是一个开源 AI 分析查询引擎，支持构建能直接访问数据库、数据仓库和应用程序的自主推理 AI 代理。它通过 SQL 兼容语言统一 200+ 数据源，无需 ETL，实现自然语言问答和语义搜索，适用于对话式分析、知识库检索等场景。
summary.en: MindsDB is an open-source AI analytics query engine that powers self-reasoning agents to answer questions directly from live data sources like databases and data warehouses without ETL. It unifies 200+ data sources via SQL-compatible syntax, enabling conversational analytics and semantic search across structured and unstructured data.

metadata.name: Ghost
metadata.description: Independent technology for modern publishing, memberships, subscriptions and newsletters.

summary.zh: Ghost 是一个现代化的开源 Node.js 内容管理系统（CMS），专为独立创作者、会员订阅和新闻通讯设计。它提供强大的发布工具、会员管理和订阅功能，支持无头架构，可灵活集成前端框架。核心优势包括简洁的编辑器、SEO 优化、自动化工作流和 Ghost(Pro) 托管服务，适合个人博客、媒体网站及内容变现平台。
summary.en: Ghost is a modern, open-source Node.js CMS designed for professional publishing, memberships, subscriptions, and newsletters. It offers a clean editor, SEO tools, and headless architecture for flexible front-end integration. With features like automated workflows and Ghost(Pro) managed hosting, it's ideal for creators and publishers seeking a developer-friendly, scalable platform.

metadata.name: afilmory
metadata.description: Modern photo gallery for photographers, with S3/GitHub sync, EXIF details, maps, and a WebGL viewer.

summary.zh: Afilmory 是一款专为摄影师打造的高性能现代照片画廊平台，支持 S3/GitHub 同步、EXIF 元数据展示、地理地图可视化和 WebGL 渲染，提供响应式瀑布流布局和国际化支持，适用于自建或 SaaS 部署。
summary.en: Afilmory is a modern, high-performance photo gallery platform for photographers, featuring S3/GitHub sync, EXIF metadata, interactive maps, and WebGL rendering. Built with React + TypeScript, it offers responsive masonry layouts, multi-storage support, and HDR/Live Photo compatibility for professional photo curation.

metadata.name: enableAppleAI
metadata.description: Enable Apple Intelligence on Macs sold in Mainland China with SIP enabled, tested on MacOS 15.4.1+ and 26+

summary.zh: 本工具通过修改系统缓存文件及注入eligibiltyd进程，绕过Apple对Apple Intelligence在中国销售Mac上的区域限制，支持macOS 15.4+及26.1+，无需常驻后台服务。提供方法1（lldb注入+文件锁定）和方法2（直接修改plist）两种方案，新增强制修改地区为美国功能以解锁ChatGPT整合等高级特性，适用于M1及以上芯片设备。
summary.en: This tool enables Apple Intelligence on Macs sold in Mainland China by bypassing regional restrictions via system cache modification and eligibilityd process injection, tested on macOS 15.4+ and 26.1+. It requires no persistent background services and offers two methods: Method 1 (lldb injection + file locking) and Method 2 (direct plist editing), with an added option to force region change to US for advanced features like ChatGPT integration, compatible with M1+ chips.

metadata.name: awesome-mcp-servers
metadata.description: A collection of MCP servers.

summary.zh: Awesome MCP Servers 是一个精心策划的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 服务器集合，涵盖文件访问、数据库连接、API集成等场景，支持本地与云端服务。项目提供多语言 README 和活跃社区支持，并配有在线目录与测试工具，助力开发者快速集成 AI 能力至各类应用。
summary.en: Awesome MCP Servers is a curated collection of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers enabling secure AI interactions with local and remote resources. It includes production-ready and experimental servers for file access, databases, APIs, and more, with multilingual documentation, community support, and integrated testing tools via glama.ai.

metadata.name: ProxyFilter
metadata.description: 节点过滤器

summary.zh: ProxyFilter 是基于 Cloudflare Workers 的 Clash 代理配置过滤工具，支持多格式输入（YAML、Base64、URI列表），智能匹配中英文地区名称，过滤 VMess、Shadowsocks、Trojan 等协议节点，自动去重并支持多源合并与自定义命名，适用于高效管理代理订阅。
summary.en: ProxyFilter is a Cloudflare Workers-based tool for filtering Clash proxy configurations. It supports multiple input formats (YAML, Base64, URI lists), intelligently matches region names in Chinese and English, filters nodes by protocol (VMess, Shadowsocks, Trojan, etc.), removes duplicates, and merges multiple sources with customizable naming.

metadata.name: input-leap
metadata.description: Open-source KVM software

summary.zh: Input Leap 是一款开源 KVM 软件，模拟传统硬件 KVM 切换器的功能，允许用户通过单一键盘和鼠标控制多台计算机。支持跨系统无缝切换，具备剪贴板共享功能（Linux/Wayland 除外），强调跨平台兼容性（Windows/macOS/Linux/FreeBSD）与用户友好的可靠性设计。
summary.en: Input Leap is an open-source KVM software that mimics hardware KVM switches by enabling a single keyboard and mouse to control multiple computers. It supports seamless screen switching, clipboard sharing (except on Linux/Wayland), and prioritizes cross-platform compatibility (Windows, macOS, Linux, FreeBSD) with a focus on hassle-free reliability and open communication.

summary.zh: 这是一个现代化的个人作品集网站，基于 Next.js、Tailwind CSS 和 TypeScript 构建，采用严格模式开发。支持 Markdown/MDX 内容发布，集成 RSS 订阅、站点地图、评论系统和阅读量统计，结合 Motion 实现流畅的滚动动画与视图过渡，性能优化出色，Lighthouse 评分接近完美，适用于开发者展示个人项目与技能。
summary.en: A modern personal portfolio website built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript (strict mode). Features Markdown/MDX content publishing, RSS feed, sitemap, comment system, reading time, and view counter. Includes scroll-based animations via Motion for smooth UX, with near-perfect Lighthouse scores in performance, accessibility, and SEO. Ideal for developers to showcase projects and skills.

metadata.name: mcp-chrome
metadata.description: Chrome MCP Server is a Chrome extension-based Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes your Chrome browser functionality to AI assistants like Claude, enabling complex browser automation, content analysis, and semantic search.

summary.zh: Chrome MCP Server 是一款基于 Chrome 扩展的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 服务器，将浏览器功能暴露给 Claude 等 AI 助手，实现复杂浏览器自动化、内容分析与语义搜索。它直接利用用户现有 Chrome 环境，保留登录状态与配置，支持 20+ 工具，提供本地流式 HTTP 通信，并集成 SIMD 加速的向量数据库，实现智能跨标签页语义检索。
summary.en: Chrome MCP Server is a Chrome extension-based Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes browser functionality to AI assistants like Claude, enabling complex automation, content analysis, and semantic search. It leverages your existing Chrome browser with preserved login states and settings, supports 20+ tools, offers local streamable HTTP communication, and features SIMD-accelerated vector database for intelligent tab content discovery.

metadata.name: GPT-SoVITS
metadata.description: 1 min voice data can also be used to train a good TTS model! (few shot voice cloning)

summary.zh: GPT-SoVITS 是一款强大的少样本语音克隆与文本转语音 WebUI 工具，支持零样本和少样本 TTS 训练，仅需 1 分钟语音数据即可微调模型，实现高保真跨语言语音合成，支持中英日韩等多种语言，集成语音分离、ASR 和文本标注等数据集构建工具。
summary.en: GPT-SoVITS is a powerful few-shot voice cloning and text-to-speech WebUI that enables zero-shot and few-shot TTS training with just 1 minute of audio data. It supports cross-lingual synthesis in Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and more, featuring integrated tools for voice separation, ASR, and dataset preparation.

metadata.name: mcp-feedback-enhanced
metadata.description: Enhanced MCP server for interactive user feedback and command execution in AI-assisted development, featuring dual interface support (Web UI and Desktop Application) with intelligent environment detection and cross-platform compatibility.

summary.zh: MCP Feedback Enhanced 是一个增强型 MCP 服务器，专为 AI 辅助开发设计，支持 Web UI 和跨平台桌面应用双界面，具备智能环境检测与反馈驱动工作流，可显著降低平台成本并提升开发效率。
summary.en: MCP Feedback Enhanced is an enhanced MCP server designed for AI-assisted development, featuring dual interface support (Web UI and cross-platform desktop app) with intelligent environment detection and feedback-driven workflows to reduce platform costs and boost development efficiency.

metadata.name: gallery
metadata.description: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.

summary.zh: Google AI Edge Gallery 是一个展示端侧机器学习与生成式 AI 应用的实验性应用，支持在 Android 和 iOS 设备上本地运行大模型，提供离线聊天、图像问答、音频转录、提示工程等功能，并集成 Tiny Garden 小游戏与设备控制能力，实现完全离线的智能体验。
summary.en: Google AI Edge Gallery is an experimental app showcasing on-device ML/GenAI use cases, enabling users to run generative AI models locally on Android and iOS. It supports offline chat, image Q&A, audio transcription, prompt engineering, and includes a mini game and device control via fine-tuned models, all without requiring an internet connection.

metadata.name: gemini-fullstack-langgraph-quickstart
metadata.description: Get started with building Fullstack Agents using Gemini 2.5 and LangGraph

summary.zh: 该项目展示了使用 Gemini 2.5 和 LangGraph 构建全栈智能代理的完整应用，包含 React 前端与基于 LangGraph 的后端研究代理。代理能动态生成搜索词、调用 Google Search 进行网络研究，并通过反思识别知识缺口，迭代优化搜索结果，最终输出带引用来源的权威回答，适用于构建增强型对话式 AI 系统。
summary.en: This project demonstrates a fullstack application using React frontend and a LangGraph-powered backend agent to perform comprehensive web research via dynamic query generation, Google Search integration, reflective reasoning, and iterative refinement using Google's Gemini models, ultimately producing cited answers from gathered sources.

metadata.name: deep-research
metadata.description: Use any LLMs (Large Language Models) for Deep Research. Support SSE API and MCP server.

summary.zh: Deep Research 是一个基于 AI 的极速深度研究工具，支持多 LLM 模型（如 Gemini、OpenAI、Anthropic 等）和主流搜索引擎，可在约 2 分钟内生成高质量研究报告。采用 Thinking 与 Task 模型协同工作，支持本地知识库构建、知识图谱可视化、内容编辑与历史记录管理，所有数据均本地处理，保障隐私安全。
summary.en: Deep Research is an AI-powered tool for lightning-fast in-depth research, supporting multiple LLMs (e.g., Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic) and search engines. It generates comprehensive reports in ~2 minutes using Thinking and Task models, with local knowledge base, knowledge graph, content editing, and full privacy via on-device processing.

metadata.name: FakeHTTP
metadata.description: Obfuscate all your TCP connections into HTTP protocol.

summary.zh: FakeHTTP 是一款基于 Netfilter Queue 的 TCP 连接混淆工具，可将任意 TCP 流量伪装成 HTTP/HTTPS 协议，有效绕过网络审查与深度包检测。支持自定义接口、目标主机、TTL 跳数及防火墙规则配置，适用于高级网络隐蔽通信场景。
summary.en: FakeHTTP is a TCP connection obfuscation tool that disguises all TCP traffic as HTTP/HTTPS protocols using Netfilter Queue. It enables stealthy network communication by bypassing deep packet inspection and censorship, with support for custom interfaces, hostnames, TTL manipulation, and firewall rule integration.

metadata.name: mcp-feedback-collector
metadata.description: 一个现代化的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 服务器，为AI助手提供交互式用户反馈收集功能。

summary.zh: MCP反馈收集器是一个基于Model Context Protocol的现代化反馈收集服务器，专为AI助手设计。支持多图片上传、文字反馈及中文界面，提供700x800像素GUI交互界面，通过uvx一键安装，适用于Claude Desktop等AI工具，显著提升人机交互效率。
summary.en: MCP Feedback Collector is a modern Model Context Protocol server for interactive user feedback collection in AI assistants. It supports multi-image uploads, text feedback, and a Chinese GUI with a 700x800px interface. Installable via uvx, it enhances AI-human interaction in tools like Claude Desktop.

metadata.name: Open-Sora
metadata.description: Open-Sora: Democratizing Efficient Video Production for All

summary.zh: Open-Sora 是一个开源的高效视频生成项目，致力于降低高质量视频制作的技术门槛。其核心亮点包括11B参数模型在VBench和人类偏好测试中与顶尖模型性能相当，仅需20万美元成本即可训练，并完全开放权重与代码。支持从1B到11B多规模模型，结合3D-VAE、rectified flow等创新架构，显著提升生成质量与效率。
summary.en: Open-Sora is an open-source initiative for efficient high-quality video generation, democratizing access to advanced video creation. Its 11B model matches top-tier performance on VBench and human preference tests at just $200K training cost, with full checkpoint and code transparency. Featuring scalable architectures like 3D-VAE and rectified flow, it enables accessible, high-fidelity video production across model sizes from 1B to 11B.

metadata.name: read-bridge
