metadata.description: AI-enhanced reading tool for immersive language learning using the n+1 method. Learn languages by staying in the target language ecosystem, with a flow-state focused interface.

summary.zh: ReadBridge 是一款基于 AI 的沉浸式语言学习工具，采用 n+1 可理解输入法，帮助学习者在目标语言生态中通过阅读进行自然习得。其核心优势在于减少母语翻译依赖，提供句子级交互阅读、AI 目标语言解释、自定义难度设置及进度追踪，支持网页与跨平台桌面端（Tauri）。
summary.en: ReadBridge is an AI-enhanced reading tool for immersive language learning using the n+1 comprehensible input method. It enables learners to acquire languages naturally by reading within the target language ecosystem, featuring sentence-by-sentence interaction, AI-powered target-language explanations, customizable difficulty prompts, and progress tracking across web and desktop (via Tauri).

metadata.name: tts-server-android
metadata.description: 这是一个Android系统TTS应用，内置微软演示接口，可自定义HTTP请求，可导入其他本地TTS引擎，以及根据中文双引号的简单旁白/对话识别朗读 ，还有自动重试，备用配置，文本替换等更多功能。

summary.zh: TTS Server 是一款专为 Android 设计的文本转语音应用，集成微软演示接口，支持自定义 HTTP 请求、本地 TTS 引擎导入及基于中文双引号的智能旁白识别朗读，具备自动重试、备用配置和文本替换等高级功能，适用于多场景语音合成需求。
summary.en: TTS Server is an Android-based text-to-speech application featuring Microsoft demo interface integration, customizable HTTP requests, local TTS engine support, and smart narration recognition via Chinese quotation marks. It includes advanced features like auto-retry, fallback configurations, and text replacement for versatile speech synthesis.

metadata.name: GPT_API_free
metadata.description: Free ChatGPT&DeepSeek API Key，免费ChatGPT&DeepSeek API。免费接入DeepSeek API和GPT4 API，支持 gpt | deepseek | claude | gemini | grok 等排名靠前的常用大模型。

summary.zh: ChatAnywhere 提供免费 ChatGPT 和 DeepSeek API 转发服务，支持 gpt-5、gpt-4o、deepseek-r1/v3、claude、gemini、grok 等主流大模型。采用 OpenAI 标准协议，兼容各类应用，支持流式响应，国内直连无需代理，免费额度每日 200 次（按 IP 和 Key 共享），适合个人非商业用途。
summary.en: ChatAnywhere offers free ChatGPT and DeepSeek API key forwarding services, supporting top-tier models like gpt-5, gpt-4o, deepseek-r1/v3, claude, gemini, and grok. It uses the official OpenAI-compatible protocol, supports streaming responses, and enables direct access from China without proxies. Free tier allows 200 requests/day per IP+Key combination for personal non-commercial use.

metadata.name: smart-mermaid
metadata.description: 一款基于 AI 技术的 Web 应用程序，可将文本内容智能转换为 Mermaid 格式的代码，并将其渲染成可视化图表。

summary.zh: Smart Mermaid 是一款基于 AI 的 Web 应用，可将自然语言文本智能转换为 Mermaid 图表代码并实时渲染。支持流程图、序列图等多种图表类型，提供标准 SVG 与手绘风格双渲染器，具备 AI 代码修复、优化及文件导入功能，适合快速生成可视化图表。
summary.en: Smart Mermaid is an AI-powered web app that converts natural language text into Mermaid diagram code and renders it visually. It supports multiple chart types, dual rendering modes (SVG and hand-drawn), AI-assisted code fixing/optimization, and file import, enabling efficient text-to-diagram conversion for technical documentation and planning.

metadata.name: LiveWallpaperMacOS
metadata.description: This is a Opensource Live wallpaper solution for MacOS

summary.zh: 这是一个为 macOS 14+ 设计的开源动态壁纸应用，支持 MP4 和 MOV 视频格式，具备多显示器支持与高性能渲染。用户可通过 Homebrew 或源码编译安装，需注意绕过 Gatekeeper 安全限制。项目计划将 Objective-C++ UI 迁移至 SwiftUI，但守护进程保持不变。
summary.en: An open-source live wallpaper app for macOS 14+, supporting MP4/MOV video playback with multi-display rendering and high performance. Install via Homebrew or compile from source using Xcode and CMake. Requires Gatekeeper bypass for unsigned apps. UI modernization to SwiftUI is planned while maintaining the daemon component.

metadata.name: snippai
metadata.description: Snip Anything Solve Everything​

summary.zh: Snippai 是一款基于先进 AI 算法的智能截图工具，支持公式识别（转 LaTeX）、文本提取、表格转 Markdown、图像分析、代码理解、颜色检测和多语言翻译等功能，显著提升截图处理效率与智能化水平。
summary.en: Snippai is an AI-powered intelligent snipping tool that leverages advanced algorithms to recognize formulas (LaTeX conversion), extract text, convert tables to Markdown, analyze images, understand code, detect colors, and translate text in any language—enhancing productivity through smart screenshot processing.

metadata.name: ghostwriter
metadata.description: 影子作家（ghostwriter），一些人的写作或语言特征。

summary.zh: 本项目'ghostwriter'（影子作家）提供多来源语言特征JSON数据集，涵盖微博、文学影视角色及历史人物，支持非商业用途研究。采用CC BY-NC-ND 4.0许可，结合长上下文大模型可显著提升文本生成风格拟合度，适用于AI角色模拟与语言分析。
summary.en: The 'ghostwriter' project provides structured linguistic feature datasets in JSON format, covering sources like Weibo, literary characters, and historical figures. Licensed under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 for non-commercial use, it enhances AI text generation when combined with large language models featuring long context capabilities, ideal for character simulation and stylistic analysis.

metadata.name: weekly
metadata.description: 前端精读周刊。帮你理解最前沿、实用的技术。

summary.zh: 前端精读周刊是一个深度技术分享平台，聚焦前沿前端技术解析、源码解读与工程实践，涵盖React、JavaScript、编译原理等核心领域，结合大厂经验提供高质量技术洞察，助力开发者提升工程能力。
summary.en: Frontend Weekly is a premium technical publication that delivers in-depth analysis of cutting-edge frontend technologies, including React, JavaScript, and compilation principles. It combines insights from industry experts to provide practical engineering knowledge and elevate developer capabilities.

metadata.name: weekly
metadata.description: 科技爱好者周刊，每周五发布

summary.zh: 《科技爱好者周刊》是阮一峰团队推出的科技内容周刊，每周五发布，聚焦前沿科技趋势、AI应用、创业洞察与行业动态，内容涵盖人工智能、互联网经济、软件开发等领域，兼具深度与可读性，是科技从业者与爱好者的重要资讯来源。
summary.en: The Tech Enthusiast Weekly is a curated publication by Ruan YiFeng, releasing every Friday with in-depth coverage of emerging technologies, AI advancements, startup insights, and industry trends, targeting tech professionals and enthusiasts seeking actionable intelligence.

metadata.name: cursor-auto-free
metadata.description: auto sign cursor

summary.zh: 本项目是一个自动化 Cursor Pro 在线签到的工具，支持无人值守运行，适用于提升账户活跃度。采用 Python 实现，具备跨平台兼容性，并集成文档说明与社区支持，适合开发者学习自动化脚本与网页交互技术。
summary.en: This project automates Cursor Pro online check-ins using Python, enabling unattended operation to boost account activity. It features cross-platform compatibility, comprehensive documentation, and community support, ideal for learning web automation and scripting techniques.

summary.zh: 基于多智能体协同与LLM增强的AI投资决策系统，集成多头/空头研究员、辩论室机制和宏观分析，通过智能新闻搜索与缓存优化实现自动化投资建议生成，支持Gemini/OpenAI兼容模型，适用于AI与金融交叉领域研究。
summary.en: An AI investment system leveraging multi-agent collaboration and LLM-enhanced decision-making, featuring bull/bear researchers, debate room mechanisms, and macro analysis. It integrates intelligent news search with caching optimization for automated investment recommendations, supporting Gemini/OpenAI-compatible models for AI-finance research applications.

metadata.name: ChinaTextbook
metadata.description: 所有小初高、大学PDF教材。

summary.zh: 该项目开源了国内小初高及大学PDF教材资源，旨在促进教育公平与普及，消除地区间教育贫困。特别聚焦小学数学和初中数学教材，提供人教版义务教育教科书，支持海外华人子女了解国内教育体系，推动以兴趣为导向的学习。
summary.en: This project provides open access to Chinese K-12 and university PDF textbooks, promoting educational equity and accessibility. It focuses on elementary and middle school math materials, offering People's Education Press editions to support overseas Chinese families and foster interest-driven learning beyond exam-oriented education.

metadata.name: BongoCat
metadata.description: 🐱 跨平台互动桌宠 BongoCat，为桌面增添乐趣！

summary.zh: BongoCat 是一款跨平台互动桌宠应用，基于 Tauri 框架开发，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 系统。它以可爱的猫咪形象提供桌面陪伴功能，用户可通过点击、拖拽等交互触发趣味动画，为日常办公增添轻松娱乐元素。
summary.en: BongoCat is a cross-platform interactive desktop pet built with Tauri, supporting Windows, macOS, and Linux. It features a playful cat character that responds to user interactions like clicks and drags with animated effects, adding entertainment to your desktop experience.

summary.zh: Void 是一款开源的 Cursor 替代 IDE，支持在代码库中使用 AI 智能体、可视化变更与检查点，并允许本地部署任意模型。其核心优势在于直接与 AI 服务商通信而不保留用户数据，基于 VSCode 深度定制，提供高度可定制的 AI 编程体验。
summary.en: Void is an open-source alternative to Cursor, enabling AI agents to work on your codebase with checkpointing, change visualization, and local model hosting. It communicates directly with AI providers without storing your data, built as a VSCode fork with a focus on innovation over feature parity.

metadata.name: minimax-free-api
metadata.description: 🚀 MiniMax大模型海螺AI逆向API【特长：超自然语音】，支持MiniMax Text-01、MiniMax-VL-01模型，支持高速流式输出、语音合成、联网搜索、长文档解读、图像解析、多轮对话，零配置部署，多路token支持，自动清理会话痕迹，仅供测试，如需商用请前往官方开放平台。

summary.zh: 本项目为MiniMax海螺AI提供逆向API服务，支持MiniMax-Text-01和MiniMax-VL-01模型，具备高速流式输出、语音合成与识别、联网搜索、长文档解读、图像解析及多轮对话能力。零配置部署，支持多路token并发，自动清理会话痕迹，接口兼容ChatGPT，适用于测试与个人使用。
summary.en: This project provides a reverse-engineered API for MiniMax Hailuo AI, supporting MiniMax-Text-01 and MiniMax-VL-01 models. It features high-speed streaming output, speech synthesis/ASR, web search, document analysis, image parsing, and multi-turn conversations. Zero-configuration deployment, multi-token concurrency, session auto-cleanup, and full ChatGPT compatibility. For testing only; commercial use requires official platform access.

summary.zh: 魔法AI绘画是一个基于Next.js构建的跨平台AI绘画应用，支持多种主流AI模型（如Sora、DALL-E、GPT、GEMINI等）及自定义模型扩展。提供文生图、图生图、区域编辑和多图参考功能，所有数据本地存储保障隐私安全，支持网页版与桌面应用部署。
summary.en: Magic Image is a cross-platform AI painting application built with Next.js, supporting multiple AI models (Sora, DALL-E, GPT, GEMINI, etc.) and custom model integration. It offers text-to-image, image-to-image, region editing, and multi-reference image support, with all data stored locally for privacy. Available as both a web app and desktop application.

metadata.name: WeChatReaderEnhancer
metadata.description: 公众号阅读增强插件是一款 Chrome 浏览器扩展，旨在提升用户阅读微信公众号文章的体验。通过自动生成文章的结构化目录，让您轻松了解文章结构、快速导航到感兴趣的部分，并在阅读长文时保持位置感知。

summary.zh: 公众号阅读增强插件是一款 Chrome 扩展，专为优化电脑端阅读微信公众号长文体验而设计。核心功能包括自动生成结构化目录、图片放大预览、链接智能识别与跳转，以及阅读位置实时追踪，显著提升信息获取效率与视觉舒适度。
summary.en: WeChat Reader Enhancer is a Chrome extension designed to improve the reading experience of WeChat Official Account articles on desktop. It features auto-generated structured table of contents, image zoom-in preview, URL recognition and clickable linking, and real-time reading position tracking, significantly enhancing content navigation and visual comfort.

metadata.name: Adobe-Downloader
metadata.description: macOS Adobe apps download & installer

summary.zh: Adobe Downloader 是一款专为 macOS 设计的 Adobe 应用程序下载与安装工具，支持多产品并行下载、版本与语言选择，并集成自动化安装与清理功能。通过内置 Helper 机制实现免密操作，无需用户干预即可完成 Setup 组件修改，确保合法官方渠道下载，适用于专业创意软件部署。
summary.en: Adobe Downloader is a macOS-native tool for downloading and installing Adobe applications. It supports parallel downloads, version/language selection, and automated installation via a built-in Helper mechanism that eliminates password prompts. All downloads are from official Adobe sources, with full cleanup utilities for residual files, ideal for enterprise or personal use.

metadata.name: free-for-dev
metadata.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

summary.zh: free-for.dev 是一个面向开发者和运维人员的精选免费服务清单，涵盖 SaaS、PaaS、IaaS 等基础设施类工具。该列表聚焦于 DevOps 和系统管理员常用服务，强调长期可用的免费层级（非试用），并排除自托管软件。内容由社区协作维护，包含云管理、CI/CD、监控、安全等 30+ 个分类，帮助开发者快速发现并评估适合的免费资源。
summary.en: free-for.dev is a curated list of free-tier SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS services tailored for developers and infrastructure teams. It focuses on tools useful for DevOps, sysadmins, and cloud engineers, excluding self-hosted software and limited-time trials. Maintained by a community of 1600+ contributors, it covers 30+ categories including cloud management, CI/CD, monitoring, security, and more, enabling informed decisions about free developer offerings.

metadata.name: MoneyPrinterTurbo
metadata.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

summary.zh: MoneyPrinterTurbo 是一款基于 AI 大模型的智能短视频生成工具，支持一键生成高清横竖屏视频。用户只需输入主题或关键词，即可自动完成文案生成、素材匹配、语音合成、字幕添加及背景音乐配置，全面覆盖视频创作流程，支持多模型接入与批量处理，适用于内容创作者快速产出高质量短视频。
summary.en: MoneyPrinterTurbo is an AI-powered short video generation tool that leverages large language models to automatically create high-definition videos with one click. Users input a topic or keyword to generate scripts, visuals, voiceovers, subtitles, and background music. It supports multiple AI models, batch processing, and both vertical and horizontal formats, ideal for content creators seeking efficient video production.

metadata.name: edit
metadata.description: Make changes to FMHY

summary.zh: FMHY 是一个聚合海量免费资源的互联网平台，涵盖软件、工具、学习资料等，提供结构化索引与社区推荐。项目通过 Wiki 维护内容，支持 Markdown/JSON API 备份，强调去中心化存储与社区协作，所有文件均托管于第三方，确保内容自由开放。
summary.en: FMHY is the largest internet platform curating free resources like software, tools, and learning materials, offering structured indexes and community recommendations. It maintains content via a Wiki, supports Markdown/JSON API backups, emphasizes decentralized storage, and operates without hosting files, ensuring open and free access.

metadata.name: MusicFreeDesktop
metadata.description: 插件化、定制化、无广告的免费音乐播放器

summary.zh: MusicFree 桌面版是一款插件化、无广告的免费音乐播放器，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux。其核心特性包括：通过插件机制接入任意音源（如搜索、播放、歌单导入），高度定制化主题系统（支持 CSS 变量与 iframe 背景），以及本地数据存储保障隐私。用户可自由扩展音源与界面风格，实现个性化音乐体验。
summary.en: MusicFree Desktop is a plugin-based, ad-free, open-source music player supporting Windows, macOS, and Linux. Key features include: plugin-driven access to any audio source (search, playback, playlist import), highly customizable themes via CSS variables and iframe backgrounds, and local data storage for privacy. Users can extend sources and personalize UI freely.

metadata.name: MusicFree
metadata.description: 插件化、定制化、无广告的免费音乐播放器

summary.zh: MusicFree 是一款开源、无广告、插件化的免费音乐播放器，专为 Android 和 Harmony OS 设计。其核心特性包括完全本地化数据存储、支持自定义主题与歌词关联功能。通过插件架构，用户可接入第三方音源（如音乐搜索、歌单导入、歌词获取），实现高度定制化体验。项目基于 AGPL 3.0 协议开源，强调隐私保护与合法合规使用。
summary.en: MusicFree is an open-source, ad-free, plugin-based music player for Android and Harmony OS. It features local data storage, customizable themes, and lyric linking. Its plugin architecture enables integration with third-party audio sources for search, playback, and playlist import. Built on AGPL 3.0, it prioritizes privacy and ethical use without VIP or cracked content.

metadata.name: QuickLook
metadata.description: Bring macOS “Quick Look” feature to Windows

summary.zh: QuickLook 是一款为 Windows 系统移植的 macOS ‘快速查看’ 功能工具，支持通过空格键即时预览文件内容，涵盖图片、文档、视频等多种格式。其核心优势在于轻量化设计、低资源占用和高度可扩展性，用户可通过插件系统自定义预览功能，极大提升文件浏览效率。
summary.en: QuickLook brings macOS 'Quick Look' functionality to Windows, enabling instant file previews by pressing the spacebar. It supports diverse file types including images, documents, and videos with minimal resource usage and extensibility via plugins, significantly enhancing file browsing efficiency.

metadata.name: gedoor.github.io
metadata.description: 网站

summary.zh: 开源阅读官网基于 Docusaurus 2 构建，提供文档、博客和下载功能，支持 Markdown 内容创作，便于用户贡献阅读APP相关资源，提升社区知识共享效率。
summary.en: The open-source reading official website is built with Docusaurus 2, featuring documentation, blogs, and downloads. It supports Markdown-based content contributions for the reading app, enhancing community knowledge sharing.

metadata.name: servers
metadata.description: Model Context Protocol Servers

summary.zh: 该仓库提供 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 的官方参考服务器实现，涵盖文件操作、网络抓取、Git 管理、内存存储等场景，支持多语言 SDK（Python、TypeScript 等），旨在帮助开发者理解 MCP 架构并构建安全的 LLM 工具集成方案。
summary.en: This repository offers reference implementations of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, including file system access, web fetching, Git operations, and memory management. Built with multi-language SDKs (Python, TypeScript, etc.), it serves as an educational resource for developers to build secure LLM-integrated tools using MCP.

summary.zh: 这是一个简洁的 GitHub 仓库，项目名称为 'bye'，带有告别表情符号，可能用于快速退出或关闭某个进程、服务或应用，适合作为轻量级工具或脚本使用。
summary.en: This is a simple GitHub repository named 'bye' with a farewell emoji, likely intended as a lightweight utility or script for exiting or closing processes, services, or applications.

metadata.name: system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
metadata.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models

summary.zh: 该仓库汇集了30,000+行关于主流AI编程工具（如Claude Code、Cursor、Devin AI等）的系统提示、内部工具和模型架构的深度解析，涵盖其设计理念、功能实现与技术细节，为开发者提供全面的AI编程助手技术洞察与最佳实践参考。
summary.en: This repository contains over 30,000 lines of insights into system prompts, internal tools, and AI models of major AI coding agents (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Devin AI), offering deep technical analysis of their architecture, functionality, and design principles for developers seeking to understand and leverage AI-powered development tools.

metadata.name: remotion
metadata.description: 🎥      Make videos programmatically with React

summary.zh: Remotion 是一个基于 React 的视频编程框架，允许开发者使用 Web 技术（如 CSS、Canvas、SVG、WebGL）和 React 组件库来创建动态视频。它支持变量、API 调用、算法等编程能力，适用于个性化视频生成、数据可视化动画等场景，如 GitHub Unwrapped 年度报告。
summary.en: Remotion is a React-based framework for programmatically creating videos using web technologies like CSS, Canvas, SVG, and WebGL. It enables dynamic video generation through programming logic, reusable components, and real-time preview, ideal for personalized content, data-driven animations, and automated video production.

metadata.name: gitdiagram
metadata.description: Free, simple, fast interactive diagrams for any GitHub repository

summary.zh: GitDiagram 是一款免费的交互式 GitHub 仓库可视化工具，可将任意仓库结构秒级转换为系统架构图。支持点击组件跳转源码、导出 Mermaid 代码或 PNG 图片，集成 OpenAI GPT-5.2 实现智能分析，提供私有仓库支持与自托管部署方案，适用于快速理解复杂代码库。
summary.en: GitDiagram is a free, fast tool that converts any GitHub repository into interactive architecture diagrams in seconds. It leverages OpenAI GPT-5.2 for intelligent analysis, supports clickable navigation to source files, exports Mermaid/PNG formats, and offers private repo support with self-hosting capabilities for deep codebase understanding.

metadata.name: fastmcp
metadata.description: 🚀 The fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.

summary.zh: FastMCP 是构建 MCP 服务器和客户端的快速 Pythonic 框架，提供声明式工具定义、自动生成 Schema 和文档、内置协议协商与认证机制，支持从原型到生产的一站式开发，已集成至官方 MCP Python SDK 并成为行业标准。
summary.en: FastMCP is a fast, Pythonic framework for building MCP servers and clients. It enables declarative tool definition, automatic schema generation, protocol negotiation, and authentication, streamlining development from prototype to production. Integrated into the official MCP Python SDK, it powers 70% of MCP servers globally.

metadata.name: markitdown
metadata.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

summary.zh: MarkItDown 是一个轻量级 Python 工具，用于将各类文件（如 PDF、Office 文档、图片、音频、HTML 等）转换为结构化的 Markdown 格式，专为 LLM 和文本分析流水线设计。它支持 OCR、语音转文本、ZIP 内文件遍历及 YouTube 链接解析，注重保留文档结构（标题、表格、列表等），输出高度兼容主流大模型。
summary.en: MarkItDown is a lightweight Python utility that converts various file types (PDF, Office docs, images, audio, HTML, etc.) into structured Markdown for use with LLMs and text analysis pipelines. It supports OCR, speech-to-text, ZIP extraction, and YouTube URL conversion, preserving document structure like headings and tables for optimal LLM compatibility.

metadata.name: GridBNB-USDT
metadata.description: 这是一个基于AI的自动化交易程序，专为数字货币市场（BNB/USDT）设计。该程序旨在实现全自动化交易，通过AI算法帮助用户在数字货币市场中做出更智能的交易决策。

summary.zh: GridBNB 是一个基于 Python 的企业级自动化交易程序，专为币安交易所设计，支持多币种并发网格交易。通过动态波动率分析、EWMA 混合算法和多层风险管理，实现稳定捕捉市场波动收益。提供 Docker 容器化部署、Nginx 反向代理、实时监控 Web 界面及理财功能集成，适合专业交易者进行自动化数字货币交易。
summary.en: GridBNB is a Python-based enterprise-grade automated trading program designed for Binance exchange, supporting concurrent grid trading across multiple cryptocurrency pairs. It leverages dynamic volatility analysis, EWMA hybrid algorithms, and multi-layer risk management to capture market fluctuations profitably. Features include Docker deployment, Nginx proxy, real-time monitoring web UI, and integrated savings functionality for professional crypto trading automation.

metadata.name: Thinking-Claude
metadata.description: Let your Claude able to think

summary.zh: Thinking Claude 是一个 Chrome 扩展项目，通过注入深度思考协议，让 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 在回复前进行系统化、可交互的思维过程展示。核心包含可折叠的思维链模块、一键复制功能和现代化 UI，显著提升 AI 推理透明度与用户体验。
summary.en: Thinking Claude is a Chrome extension that enhances Claude 3.5 Sonnet by injecting a comprehensive thinking protocol. It displays Claude's internal monologue as collapsible, readable sections with copy functionality, making AI reasoning transparent and user-friendly through structured thought processes.

metadata.name: StreamCap
metadata.description: Multi-Platform Live Stream Automatic Recording Tool | 多平台直播流自动录制客户端 · 基于FFmpeg · 支持监控/定时/转码

summary.zh: StreamCap 是一款基于 FFmpeg 的多平台直播流自动录制工具，支持 40+ 国内外主流直播平台（如抖音、B站、Twitch、TikTok），具备循环监控、定时录制、批量任务管理和自动转码功能，提供 Windows/macOS/Linux/Web 全平台支持，适用于内容存档与直播数据分析。
summary.en: StreamCap is a multi-platform live stream recording tool powered by FFmpeg and StreamGet, supporting 40+ global platforms (e.g., Douyin, Bilibili, Twitch, TikTok). It features real-time monitoring, scheduled recording, batch processing, and automatic transcoding, with full support for Windows, macOS, Linux, and web deployment for content archiving and live data analysis.

metadata.name: Umi-OCR
metadata.description: OCR software, free and offline. 开源、免费的离线OCR软件。支持截屏/批量导入图片，PDF文档识别，排除水印/页眉页脚，扫描/生成二维码。内置多国语言库。

summary.zh: Umi-OCR 是一款开源免费的离线OCR软件，支持截图识别、批量图片处理、PDF文档扫描及二维码识别。具备智能排版解析、水印页眉页脚排除功能，内置多国语言识别库，无需联网即可高效运行，适用于Windows和Linux系统。
summary.en: Umi-OCR is a free, open-source, offline OCR software supporting screenshot recognition, batch image processing, PDF scanning, and QR code detection. It features intelligent layout parsing, watermark/header/footer removal, and multi-language recognition libraries, running efficiently without internet on Windows and Linux.

metadata.name: droidrun
metadata.description: Automate your mobile devices with natural language commands - an LLM agnostic mobile Agent 🤖

summary.zh: DroidRun 是一个强大的移动端自动化框架，通过 LLM 智能体实现自然语言控制 Android 和 iOS 设备。支持多模型提供商（OpenAI、Anthropic 等），具备复杂任务规划能力，提供 CLI 工具和 Python API，集成截图分析与执行追踪，实现高效移动端自动化。
summary.en: DroidRun is a powerful framework for controlling Android and iOS devices via LLM agents using natural language commands. It supports multiple LLM providers, offers planning capabilities for complex tasks, includes a CLI tool with debugging features, and integrates screenshot analysis and execution tracing for mobile automation.

metadata.name: gemini-balance
metadata.description: Gemini polling proxy service （gemini轮询代理服务）

summary.zh: Gemini Balance 是一个基于 FastAPI 的 Gemini API 代理与负载均衡服务，支持多密钥轮询、OpenAI 格式兼容、图像文本对话、网页搜索及实时状态监控，提供灵活的配置管理和详细的日志追踪。
summary.en: Gemini Balance is a FastAPI-based proxy and load balancer for Google's Gemini API, enabling multi-key polling, OpenAI API compatibility, image-text chat, web search, and real-time key status monitoring with dynamic configuration and detailed logging.

metadata.name: jimeng-free-api
metadata.description: 🚀 即梦3.0逆向API【特长：图像生成顶流】，零配置部署，多路token支持，仅供测试，如需商用请前往官方开放平台。

summary.zh: 即梦3.0逆向API服务，提供零配置部署的图像生成能力，支持多路token并发，兼容OpenAI接口标准，每日免费66次生成额度，适用于个人测试与学习用途。
summary.en: Jimeng AI Free API service enables zero-configuration deployment of image generation via reverse-engineered API, supporting multiple tokens and OpenAI-compatible interface, offering 66 daily free generations for testing purposes.

metadata.name: Roo-Code
metadata.description: Roo Code gives you a whole dev team of AI agents in your code editor.

summary.zh: Roo Code 是一款 VS Code 扩展，将 AI 智能体团队集成到代码编辑器中，支持自然语言生成代码、多模式协作（编码/架构/调试/问答）、自动化任务处理及文档维护，显著提升开发效率。
summary.en: Roo Code is a VS Code extension that embeds an AI-powered development team directly into your editor. It enables natural language code generation, multi-mode workflows (coding, architecture, debugging, Q&A), automation, and documentation, dramatically boosting developer productivity.

metadata.name: BiliNote
metadata.description: AI 视频笔记生成工具 让 AI 为你的视频做笔记

summary.zh: BiliNote 是一款开源 AI 视频笔记生成工具，支持哔哩哔哩、YouTube、抖音等平台视频链接自动提取内容，结合 GPT 或通义千问等模型生成结构化 Markdown 笔记，支持插入截图、跳转链接及多版本记录，提供本地部署与在线体验。
summary.en: BiliNote is an open-source AI video note generator that automatically extracts content from Bilibili, YouTube, Douyin, and other platforms to create structured Markdown notes using GPT, DeepSeek, or Qwen models. It supports screenshots, jump links, multiple versions, and local deployment with optional CUDA acceleration.

metadata.name: casibase
metadata.description: ⚡️AI Cloud OS: Open-source enterprise-level AI knowledge base and MCP (model-context-protocol)/A2A (agent-to-agent) management platform with admin UI, user management and Single-Sign-On⚡️, supports ChatGPT, Claude, Llama, Ollama, HuggingFace, etc., chat bot demo: https://ai.casibase.com, admin UI demo: https://ai-admin.casibase.com

summary.zh: Casibase 是一个开源企业级 AI 知识库与 MCP/A2A 管理平台，提供管理员界面、用户管理及单点登录功能，支持 ChatGPT、Claude、Llama、Ollama 等多种模型，具备完整的知识库管理、智能对话和 Agent 协作能力。
summary.en: Casibase is an open-source enterprise-level AI knowledge base and MCP/A2A management platform featuring admin UI, user management, and SSO, supporting ChatGPT, Claude, Llama, Ollama, and more, with full knowledge management and agent collaboration capabilities.

metadata.name: LibreTTS
metadata.description: TTS-文本转语音/文本转语音前端，兼容OpenAI、EdgeTTS等接口

summary.zh: LibreTTS 是一款开源在线文本转语音工具，支持300+种语言和口音的声音，兼容OpenAI与EdgeTTS等主流TTS接口。提供实时试听、语速语调调节、长文本分段处理、历史记录及自定义API配置功能，支持Vercel和Cloudflare Pages一键部署，适合个人或企业快速搭建私有化TTS服务。
summary.en: LibreTTS is an open-source online text-to-speech tool supporting 300+ voices across multiple languages and accents. It integrates with OpenAI, EdgeTTS, and other compatible APIs, offering real-time preview, adjustable speech rate/pitch, long-text segmentation, history tracking, and custom API configuration. Deployable via Vercel or Cloudflare Pages for private TTS solutions.

metadata.name: ttsfm
metadata.description: TTSFM mirrors OpenAI's TTS service, providing a compatible interface for text-to-speech conversion with multiple voice options for free.

summary.zh: TTSFM 是一个免费的 OpenAI 兼容文本转语音 API 服务，基于 OpenAI GPT-4o mini TTS 提供多语音选项、6种音频格式支持、速度调节和实时流式生成，包含 Python SDK、Web 交互界面及 Docker 部署方案，适用于教育与研究场景。
summary.en: TTSFM is a free, OpenAI-compatible text-to-speech API service based on OpenAI's GPT-4o mini TTS, offering 11 voice options, 6 audio formats, speed control (0.25x–4.0x), real-time streaming, Python SDK, web playground, and Docker deployment for educational and research use.

metadata.name: d2l-zh
metadata.description: 《动手学深度学习》：面向中文读者、能运行、可讨论。中英文版被70多个国家的500多所大学用于教学。

summary.zh: 《动手学深度学习》是一本面向中文读者的开源深度学习教材，提供可运行代码与交互式学习体验，覆盖数学原理、算法实现与工程实践。该书被全球500多所大学采用，支持中英双语教学，强调批判性思维与动手能力，助力学习者成为具备实战能力的AI应用科学家。
summary.en: Dive into Deep Learning is an open-source textbook designed for Chinese readers, offering executable code and interactive learning. It integrates mathematical theory, algorithmic implementation, and engineering practice, adopted by over 500 universities worldwide. The book emphasizes hands-on learning to cultivate AI application scientists with both theoretical depth and practical skills.

metadata.name: desktop
metadata.description: Browser-Use Desktop app, control your local Chrome browser with AI agents!

summary.zh: Browser-Use Desktop 是一款基于 Electron 和 Gradio 的桌面应用，通过 AI 智能体控制本地 Chrome 浏览器，实现网页自动化操作。支持多模态 LLM（如 OpenAI、Google、Anthropic 等）和自定义浏览器配置，无需重新登录网站，支持高清屏幕录制，适用于网页抓取、自动化测试等场景。
summary.en: Browser-Use Desktop is an Electron-based desktop app that enables AI agents to control your local Chrome browser via Gradio UI. It supports multiple LLMs (OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, etc.), custom browser profiles, and high-definition screen recording, eliminating re-authentication issues and ideal for web automation and scraping tasks.

metadata.name: n8n
metadata.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

summary.zh: n8n 是一款面向技术团队的安全工作流自动化平台，融合可视化拖拽与自定义代码（JavaScript/Python），支持 400+ 集成和原生 AI 能力（基于 LangChain），提供自托管或云端部署选项，采用公平源代码许可，确保数据控制与可定制性。
summary.en: n8n is a secure workflow automation platform combining visual building with custom code (JavaScript/Python), offering 400+ integrations, native AI capabilities via LangChain, and flexible deployment options—self-hosted or cloud—under a fair-code license for full data control and extensibility.

metadata.name: cline
metadata.description: Autonomous coding agent right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, using the browser, and more with your permission every step of the way.

summary.zh: Cline 是一款集成在 IDE 中的自主编码代理，基于 Claude Sonnet 的代理能力，支持文件创建/编辑、终端命令执行、浏览器操作等，全程需用户授权。通过 AST 分析、正则搜索和上下文管理，可处理复杂开发任务，支持 MCP 扩展工具，提供安全的 AI 编程辅助。
summary.en: Cline is an autonomous coding agent integrated directly into your IDE, powered by Claude Sonnet's agentic capabilities. It can create/edit files, execute terminal commands, use browsers, and more—with your permission at every step. Designed for complex software development tasks through AST analysis, regex searches, and context-aware workflows, it extends functionality via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) while maintaining human oversight for safety.

summary.zh: bestK/tv 是一个基于 Next.js 的现代化电视直播应用，支持多源直播流聚合、频道分类与搜索功能，提供响应式界面与 EdgeOne Pages 一键部署，适用于构建个人或社区级 IPTV 平台。
summary.en: bestK/tv is a modern TV streaming app built with Next.js, featuring multi-source live stream aggregation, channel categorization, and search functionality. It offers a responsive interface and one-click deployment via EdgeOne Pages, ideal for building personal or community IPTV platforms.

metadata.name: Maccy
metadata.description: Lightweight clipboard manager for macOS

summary.zh: Maccy 是一款轻量级 macOS 剪贴板管理器，支持历史记录保存、快速搜索与检索，提供键盘优先操作体验。具备原生界面、隐私安全、开源免费等特性，支持快捷键复制/粘贴、忽略特定应用、自定义过滤规则等高级功能，适用于高效文本管理与重复内容复用场景。
summary.en: Maccy is a lightweight clipboard manager for macOS that preserves copy history with fast search and retrieval. It emphasizes keyboard-first interaction, native UI, privacy, and open-source design. Features include smart filtering, hotkey-based actions, and customizable ignore rules for enhanced productivity.

metadata.name: xhs
metadata.description: 一个基于 Nuxt.js 3 开发的小红书工具网站，提供图文，视频，评论 浏览与导出

summary.zh: 基于 Nuxt.js 3 构建的小红书工具网站，支持图文视频内容浏览、评论导出及下载功能，集成多代理轮换与本地数据持久化，提供现代化 UI 与完整代理配置，适用于内容采集与数据分析场景。
summary.en: A Nuxt.js 3-based tool for browsing, exporting, and downloading Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) content including images, videos, and comments. Features modern UI, multi-proxy support, local data persistence, and automated browser interactions via Playwright.

metadata.name: clash-rules
metadata.description: 🦄️ 🎃 👻 Clash Premium 规则集(RULE-SET)，兼容 ClashX Pro、Clash for Windows 等基于 Clash Premium 内核的客户端。

summary.zh: 本项目提供专为 Clash Premium 内核设计的规则集（RULE-SET），涵盖直连、代理和广告拦截域名列表，兼容 ClashX Pro、Clash for Windows 等主流客户端。规则数据源自 v2ray-rules-dat、domain-list-community 等权威源，每日自动更新，支持中国大陆 IP 地址识别，适用于科学上网与网络流量精细化管控。
summary.en: This project provides rule sets (RULE-SET) specifically designed for Clash Premium kernel, including direct, proxy, and ad-blocking domain lists. Compatible with ClashX Pro, Clash for Windows, and other GUI clients. Data sources include v2ray-rules-dat and domain-list-community, with daily automatic updates and support for China IP address recognition, ideal for network traffic control and bypassing restrictions.

metadata.name: an-codeAI
metadata.description: AI generate code

summary.zh: needware.dev 是一个开源的 AI 驱动全栈开发平台，支持在浏览器中直接生成、预览和部署 Web 应用。通过多智能体系统，可将文本描述、截图或 URL 转化为完整代码，集成 Supabase 数据库、实时预览和代码编辑器，实现从想法到产品的全流程开发。
summary.en: needware.dev is an open-source AI-powered full-stack development platform that generates, previews, and deploys web applications directly in the browser. It leverages a multi-agent system to transform text, screenshots, or URLs into functional code, with integrated Supabase database, real-time preview, and code editor for end-to-end development.

metadata.name: wxocr
metadata.description: nothing

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Go 语言开发的微信小程序 OCR 识别工具，旨在为小程序用户提供便捷的文本识别功能，支持多种图片格式输入，并可将识别结果直接复制到剪贴板。
summary.en: This is a WeChat Mini Program OCR tool built with Go, designed to provide convenient text recognition for mini-program users. It supports multiple image formats and allows direct copying of recognition results to the clipboard.

metadata.name: chatlog
metadata.description: chat log tool, easily use your own chat data. 聊天记录工具，轻松使用自己的聊天数据

summary.zh: chatlog 是一款聊天记录工具，旨在帮助用户轻松管理和使用自己的聊天数据。由于微信官方函件指出其核心功能存在合规风险，项目于2025年10月20日被主动移除，仅保留说明文件。用户无法再获取代码或支持，建议删除本地副本以规避法律风险。
summary.en: Chatlog was a chat log tool designed to help users easily manage and utilize their own chat data. Due to compliance risks identified in an official letter from WeChat, the project was voluntarily removed on October 20, 2025. Only this notice remains; no code, binaries, or support are available. Users are advised to delete any local copies to avoid legal issues.

metadata.name: Spark-TTS
metadata.description: Spark-TTS Inference Code

summary.zh: Spark-TTS 是基于 Qwen2.5 大语言模型的高效文本转语音系统，支持中英双语及零样本语音克隆，具备可控语音生成能力。其核心创新在于单流解耦语音标记与 LLM 直接预测音频编码，无需额外声学模型，显著提升推理效率并降低部署复杂度，适用于多语言场景下的语音合成与跨语言迁移。
summary.en: Spark-TTS is an efficient LLM-based text-to-speech model using Qwen2.5 for high-quality, bilingual (Chinese/English) speech synthesis. It supports zero-shot voice cloning and controllable generation (e.g., gender, pitch) with a single-stream decoupled architecture that directly reconstructs audio from LLM-predicted tokens, eliminating the need for separate acoustic models and enabling cross-lingual applications.

metadata.name: awesome-mcp-clients
metadata.description: A collection of MCP clients.

summary.zh: Awesome MCP Clients 是一个精心策划的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 客户端集合，涵盖 CLI、桌面应用、AI 助手等多种类型，支持跨平台运行，旨在扩展 AI 模型对本地和远程资源的访问能力，提升智能交互体验。
summary.en: Awesome MCP Clients is a curated collection of Model Context Protocol (MCP) clients, including CLI tools, desktop apps, and AI assistants, supporting cross-platform use to extend AI models' access to local and remote resources for enhanced intelligent interaction.

metadata.name: bookmark-summary
metadata.description: 用 LLM 和 jina reader 生成的总结

summary.zh: 该项目利用 LLM 和 jina reader 自动读取 bookmark-collection 中的网页书签内容，生成结构化摘要。通过 GitHub Action 实现自动化处理，支持按月归档，适用于个人知识管理和内容聚合，核心亮点在于结合 AI 总结与网页内容提取技术。
summary.en: This project uses LLM and jina reader to automatically extract and summarize web content from bookmarks in bookmark-collection. Integrated with GitHub Actions for automation, it supports monthly archiving and enables personal knowledge management through AI-powered content aggregation and summarization.

metadata.name: web_clipper
metadata.description: singleFile + gh pages + deepseek api + notion db + tg bot = web clipper and notify

summary.zh: Web Clipper Backend 是一个网页剪藏服务，支持将网页通过 SingleFile 插件保存至 GitHub Pages，利用 DeepSeek API 自动生成摘要与标签，并同步至 Notion 数据库，同时通过 Telegram Bot 推送通知，实现全自动化内容归档与知识管理。
summary.en: Web Clipper Backend is an automated web clipping service that saves web pages via SingleFile to GitHub Pages, uses DeepSeek API for AI-generated summaries and tags, syncs data to Notion database, and sends notifications via Telegram Bot, enabling seamless content archiving and knowledge management.

metadata.name: gpt_academic
metadata.description: 为GPT/GLM等LLM大语言模型提供实用化交互接口，特别优化论文阅读/润色/写作体验，模块化设计，支持自定义快捷按钮&函数插件，支持Python和C++等项目剖析&自译解功能，PDF/LaTex论文翻译&总结功能，支持并行问询多种LLM模型，支持chatglm3等本地模型。接入通义千问, deepseekcoder, 讯飞星火, 文心一言, llama2, rwkv, claude2, moss等。

summary.zh: GPT Academic 是为 GPT/GLM 等 LLM 大语言模型设计的实用化交互接口，专注论文阅读、润色与写作优化，支持模块化插件与自定义快捷按钮，集成 Python/C++ 项目剖析、PDF/LaTeX 论文翻译与总结功能，兼容通义千问、DeepSeek、文心一言等主流模型，支持本地部署与多模型并行调用。
summary.en: GPT Academic is a practical interface for GPT/GLM and other LLMs, optimized for academic tasks like paper reading, editing, and writing. It features modular plugins, custom shortcuts, code analysis, PDF/LaTeX translation, and supports multiple models including Qwen, DeepSeek, and local deployments like ChatGLM3.

metadata.name: maple-font
metadata.description: Maple Mono: Open source monospace font with round corner, ligatures and Nerd-Font icons for IDE and terminal, fine-grained customization options. 带连字和控制台图标的圆角等宽字体，中英文宽度完美2:1，细粒度的自定义选项

summary.zh: Maple Mono 是一款专为提升编码体验而设计的开源等宽字体，具有圆角设计、连字功能及 Nerd-Font 图标支持，适用于 IDE 和终端环境。其特色包括可变字重、智能连字、中英文 2:1 完美对齐，以及细粒度自定义选项，支持简繁中文和日文，适合多语言开发场景。
summary.en: Maple Mono is an open-source monospace font designed to enhance coding flow, featuring rounded corners, ligatures, and Nerd-Font icons for IDEs and terminals. It offers variable font weights, smart ligatures, perfect 2:1 Chinese-English alignment, and extensive customization, supporting Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and Japanese for multilingual development environments.

metadata.name: chatmcp
metadata.description: ChatMCP is an AI chat client implementing the Model Context Protocol (MCP).

summary.zh: ChatMCP 是一款跨平台 AI 聊天客户端，完整实现 Model Context Protocol (MCP)，支持 MacOS、Windows、Linux、iOS、Android 和 Web 多端运行。提供本地存储、数据同步、LaTeX 渲染、Mermaid 图表生成、HTML 预览及多 LLM 模型接入等功能，适用于智能对话与工具集成场景。
summary.en: ChatMCP is a cross-platform AI chat client implementing the Model Context Protocol (MCP), supporting MacOS, Windows, Linux, iOS, Android, and Web. It offers local storage, data sync, LaTeX rendering, Mermaid diagram generation, HTML preview, and multi-LLM provider integration for intelligent conversations and tool workflows.

metadata.name: py-iztro
metadata.description: 著名紫薇排盘工具iztro的python版本，用法和原版完全一致

summary.zh: py-iztro 是著名紫微排盘工具 iztro 的 Python 版本，完全复刻原版功能，支持通过公历日期和性别生成详细的紫微斗数命盘，包含星曜分布、五行局等信息，采用 pydantic 进行数据建模，确保类型安全与代码可维护性。
summary.en: py-iztro is a Python reimplementation of the renowned iztro astrology tool, offering identical functionality to the original JavaScript version. It generates comprehensive Ziwei Dou Shu charts using solar dates and gender, with full Pydantic-based data modeling for type safety and maintainability.

metadata.name: iztro
metadata.description: ⭐This is a lightweight kit for generating astrolabes for Zi Wei Dou Shu (The Purple Star Astrology), an ancient Chinese astrology. It allows you to obtain your horoscope and personality analysis. 支持多语言轻量级获取紫微斗数排盘信息的javascript开源库。

summary.zh: iztro 是一个轻量级紫微斗数排盘 JavaScript 库，支持多语言输入输出，可生成星盘数据、生肖星座、四柱运限及四化分析，提供链式调用和插件扩展，适用于个人命理分析、文化应用开发及学术研究。
summary.en: iztro is a lightweight JavaScript library for generating Zi Wei Dou Shu astrolabes, supporting multi-language input/output, star charts, zodiac signs, four pillars, luck cycles, and four transformations. It offers chainable APIs, plugin extensibility, and is ideal for astrology apps, cultural tools, and research.

metadata.name: fake-cursor
metadata.description: 一个用于重新生成 Cursor 设备 ID 和设置 Access Token 的 Cursor 扩展

summary.zh: Fake Cursor 是一款专为 Cursor 编辑器设计的 VS Code 扩展，支持重新生成设备 ID、修补机器码获取逻辑及设置 Access Token，实现多账号共用同一设备。支持 0.45.x~0.46.x 版本，具备使用情况监控、自动备份配置等功能，适用于 Windows/macOS/Linux 系统。
summary.en: Fake Cursor is a VS Code extension for Cursor editor that enables device ID regeneration, machine code patching, and Access Token configuration to allow multiple accounts on one device. Supports Cursor 0.45.x-0.46.x, featuring usage monitoring, config backup, and cross-platform support (Windows/macOS/Linux).

metadata.name: pot-desktop
metadata.description: 🌈一个跨平台的划词翻译和OCR软件 | A cross-platform software for text translation and recognition.

summary.zh: Pot 是一款跨平台划词翻译与 OCR 软件，支持 Windows/macOS/Linux 及 Wayland 环境，集成 OpenAI、Google、DeepL 等 20+ 翻译接口，提供多接口并行翻译、语音合成、生词本导出等功能，具备插件系统和外部调用能力，界面简洁高效。
summary.en: Pot is a cross-platform software for text translation and OCR, supporting Windows/macOS/Linux and Wayland. It integrates 20+ translation APIs including OpenAI, Google, and DeepL, offering parallel translation, speech synthesis, vocabulary export, plugin system, and external call functionality with a clean interface.

metadata.name: STranslate
metadata.description: A ready-to-go translation ocr tool developed with WPF/WPF 开发的一款即用即走的翻译、OCR工具

summary.zh: STranslate 是一款基于 WPF 开发的即用即走翻译与 OCR 工具，支持多语言实时翻译与屏幕文字识别，具备轻量化、跨平台特性，提供简洁高效的用户界面，适用于办公、学习等场景的文本快速处理需求。
summary.en: STranslate is a ready-to-use translation and OCR tool built with WPF, offering real-time multilingual translation and screen text recognition. It features a lightweight, cross-platform design with an intuitive interface, ideal for quick text processing in work and study environments.

metadata.name: checkchan-dist
metadata.description: Check酱：监测网页内容变化，并发送异动到微信。亦支持http status、json和rss监测。配合自架云端，关电脑后也能运行。

summary.zh: Check酱是一款网页内容监控工具，支持通过浏览器插件监测网页内容变化，并将异动推送至微信等消息通道。支持HTTP状态、JSON和RSS监测，配合自建云端服务可实现24小时运行。具备可视化选择器、周期任务调度及多平台部署能力。
summary.en: Check酱 is a web content monitoring tool that detects changes on web pages via a browser plugin and sends alerts to WeChat or other channels. It supports HTTP status, JSON, and RSS monitoring, with optional cloud deployment for continuous operation. Features include visual selector, scheduled tasks, and multi-platform support.

metadata.name: browser-use
metadata.description: 🌐 Make websites accessible for AI agents. Automate tasks online with ease.

summary.zh: Browser-Use 是一个专为 AI 智能体设计的网页自动化框架，通过 LLM 驱动浏览器完成复杂在线任务。支持主流大模型（Gemini、Claude 等），提供 stealth 模式云浏览器服务，实现高效、隐蔽的网页交互与数据采集，适用于自动化测试、信息抓取等场景。
summary.en: Browser-Use is an AI agent framework that enables LLM-driven automation of web tasks. It supports major LLMs (Gemini, Claude, etc.) and offers stealth cloud browsers for secure, scalable automation. Ideal for web scraping, testing, and data collection with seamless integration.

metadata.name: FastGPT
metadata.description: FastGPT is a knowledge-based platform built on the LLMs, offers a comprehensive suite of out-of-the-box capabilities such as data processing, RAG retrieval, and visual AI workflow orchestration, letting you easily develop and deploy complex question-answering systems without the need for extensive setup or configuration.

summary.zh: FastGPT 是一个基于大语言模型（LLM）的知识型 AI 智能体构建平台，提供开箱即用的数据处理、RAG 检索、可视化 AI 工作流编排等功能，支持复杂问答系统的快速开发与部署，无需繁琐配置。
summary.en: FastGPT is a knowledge-based AI agent platform built on LLMs, offering out-of-the-box capabilities such as data processing, RAG retrieval, and visual AI workflow orchestration. It enables rapid development and deployment of complex question-answering systems without extensive setup.

metadata.name: pollinations
metadata.description: Your Friendly Open-Source Gen-AI Platform

summary.zh: Pollinations.ai 是一个开源生成式 AI 平台，提供免费的文本到图像、音频、视频和文本生成 API，支持多种模型如 Stable Diffusion 和 Llama。开发者可通过简单 API 调用快速集成 AI 能力，适用于创意项目、应用开发和自动化内容生成，社区活跃且持续扩展应用场景。
summary.en: Pollinations.ai is an open-source generative AI platform offering free APIs for text-to-image, audio, video, and text generation using models like Stable Diffusion and Llama. It enables developers to integrate AI capabilities via simple API calls, supporting creative projects, app development, and automated content creation with an active community and growing ecosystem.

metadata.name: moepush
metadata.description: 一个基于 NextJS + Cloudflare 技术栈构建的可爱消息推送服务, 支持多种消息推送渠道✨

summary.zh: MoePush 是基于 Next.js 和 Cloudflare 构建的开源消息推送服务，支持钉钉、企业微信、Telegram 等 8 种推送渠道，提供简洁的 API 接口与精美 UI，采用 Drizzle ORM 和 D1 数据库，支持 GitHub 登录与 Docker 部署，适合快速集成多平台消息通知。
summary.en: MoePush is an open-source message push service built with Next.js and Cloudflare, supporting 8+ channels including DingTalk, WeCom, and Telegram. It offers a clean API, shadcn/ui-based UI, GitHub OAuth, D1 database via Drizzle ORM, and Docker deployment for easy multi-platform notification integration.

metadata.name: deepchat
metadata.description: 🐬DeepChat - A smart assistant that connects powerful AI to your personal world

summary.zh: DeepChat 是一个功能丰富的开源 AI 智能体平台，统一整合模型、工具和智能体，支持多 LLM 对话、MCP 工具调用和 ACP 智能体集成，提供强大的桌面端 AI 助手体验。
summary.en: DeepChat is a powerful open-source AI agent platform that unifies models, tools, and agents, offering multi-LLM chat, MCP tool calling, and ACP agent integration for seamless desktop AI assistance.

metadata.name: system_architect
metadata.description: :100: 2026年系统架构设计师（软考高级）备考资料。

summary.zh: 该项目为2026年软考高级系统架构设计师备考资料库，涵盖历年真题、模拟卷、精讲视频及论文范文，支持免费与付费资源更新。提供多平台刷题工具（网页/小程序/App），并持续优化教程与考纲解析，助力考生高效通过考试。
summary.en: This repository provides comprehensive study materials for the 2026 System Architect Designer exam (a senior-level soft certification). It includes past papers, mock tests, video courses, and essay templates. Free and paid resources are updated regularly, with multi-platform practice tools (web, WeChat mini-program, mobile app) and optimized tutorials to help candidates pass efficiently.

metadata.name: deepseek-free-api
metadata.description: 🚀 DeepSeek-V3 & R1大模型逆向API【特长：良心厂商】（官方贼便宜，建议直接走官方），支持高速流式输出、多轮对话，联网搜索，R1深度思考，零配置部署，多路token支持，仅供测试，如需商用请前往官方开放平台。

summary.zh: 本项目提供 DeepSeek-V3 和 R1 大模型的逆向 API 接口，支持高速流式输出、多轮对话、联网搜索及深度思考功能，兼容 ChatGPT 接口标准，支持零配置部署与多账号 token 负载均衡，仅限个人测试使用，商用请转官方平台。
summary.en: This project provides a reverse-engineered API for DeepSeek-V3 and R1 models, featuring high-speed streaming output, multi-turn conversations, web search, and deep reasoning. It is fully compatible with ChatGPT's API interface, supports zero-configuration deployment and multi-token load balancing, intended only for personal testing, commercial use requires official platform access.

metadata.name: hacker-podcast
metadata.description: 一个基于 AI 的 Hacker News 中文播客项目，每天自动抓取 Hacker News 热门文章，通过 AI 生成中文总结并转换为播客内容。

summary.zh: Agili 的 Hacker Podcast 是一个基于 AI 的 Hacker News 中文播客项目，每日自动抓取热门文章，利用 AI 生成中文摘要并转换为语音播客。项目采用 Cloudflare Workers 部署，结合 OpenAI API 与 TTS 技术，支持多平台订阅，实现技术资讯的自动化聚合与分发。
summary.en: Agili's Hacker Podcast is an AI-powered Chinese podcast project that automatically fetches daily top articles from Hacker News, generates Chinese summaries via AI, and converts them into audio content. Built with Cloudflare Workers, OpenAI API, and TTS, it supports multi-platform RSS and web access for automated tech news aggregation.

metadata.name: Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
metadata.description: Open-source Windows and Office activator featuring HWID, Ohook, TSforge, and Online KMS activation methods, along with advanced troubleshooting.

summary.zh: MAS 是一个开源的 Windows 和 Office 激活工具，支持 HWID、Ohook、TSforge 和在线 KMS 等多种激活方式，并提供高级故障排除功能。通过 PowerShell 脚本或传统 CMD 文件一键激活系统，适用于 Windows 8.1/10/11 及 Office 产品，集成自动化与跨平台支持。
summary.en: MAS is an open-source activator for Windows and Office using HWID, Ohook, TSforge, and Online KMS methods, with advanced troubleshooting. It enables one-click activation via PowerShell or CMD scripts, supporting Windows 8.1/10/11 and Office, featuring automation and cross-platform compatibility.

metadata.name: anx-reader
metadata.description: Featuring powerful AI capabilities and supporting various e-book formats, it makes reading smarter and more focused.

summary.zh: Anx Reader 是一款专为书迷打造的智能电子书阅读器，集成强大 AI 功能，支持 EPUB、MOBI、AZW3、FB2、TXT、PDF 等多种格式。提供 AI 摘要、翻译、思维导图生成、多端同步、自定义排版、语音朗读及阅读统计等深度功能，致力于提升阅读效率与沉浸体验。
summary.en: Anx Reader is an AI-powered e-book reader designed for book lovers, supporting multiple formats like EPUB, MOBI, AZW3, FB2, TXT, and PDF. It features AI summaries, translation, mind mapping, cross-platform sync, customizable typography, TTS, and reading analytics to enhance focus and reading pleasure.

metadata.name: ragflow
metadata.description: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

summary.zh: RAGFlow 是一款领先的开放源代码检索增强生成（RAG）引擎，深度融合 RAG 与 Agent 能力，为大型语言模型构建卓越的上下文层。它提供简洁高效的 RAG 工作流，适用于各类规模企业，支持多语言文档处理、智能问答、知识库构建及 Agent 驱动任务自动化。
summary.en: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that seamlessly integrates advanced RAG with Agent capabilities to build superior context layers for LLMs. It delivers a streamlined, scalable workflow ideal for enterprises, supporting multilingual document processing, intelligent Q&A, knowledge base construction, and agent-driven task automation.

metadata.name: HanAnalytics
metadata.description: 一个简单的网络分析跟踪器和仪表板，在 Cloudflare Pages 上即可快速部署的网站分析仪表板,无成本稳定运行

summary.zh: Han-Analytics 是一个基于 Cloudflare Pages 的无服务器网站分析工具，提供轻量级网络跟踪与可视化仪表板功能，支持零成本部署、高并发访问（每日10万次免费统计），具备密码保护和网站白名单等安全特性，适用于个人或企业快速集成网站数据分析。
summary.en: Han-Analytics is a serverless web analytics tool built on Cloudflare Pages, offering lightweight tracking and dashboard visualization with zero-cost deployment, high-concurrency support (up to 100k daily free stats), password protection, and website whitelisting for secure data collection and analysis.

metadata.name: onlook
metadata.description: The Cursor for Designers • An Open-Source AI-First Design tool • Visually build, style, and edit your React App with AI

summary.zh: Onlook 是一款面向设计师的开源 AI 驱动可视化代码编辑器，支持在浏览器中实时编辑 React 应用。它结合 Next.js 和 TailwindCSS，提供类 Figma 的 UI 设计体验，实现视觉化开发、实时预览、组件管理和一键部署，是 Bolt.new 等工具的替代方案。
summary.en: Onlook is an open-source, AI-first visual code editor for designers, enabling real-time React app editing in the browser. Built with Next.js and TailwindCSS, it offers a Figma-like interface for visual development, component management, and instant deployment, serving as an alternative to tools like Bolt.new.

metadata.name: meDisplay
metadata.description: 使用任何设备(浏览器)作为mac的副屏(随航) 将Android平板用作Mac的第二台显示器 还能在Win和Linux镜像屏幕

summary.zh: 咩Display 是一款跨平台屏幕镜像工具，支持将任意带浏览器的设备（如 Android 平板）作为 Mac 的副屏，实现类似 Apple 随航的功能。基于 ffmpeg 实时转码，支持 mjpg、vp8、h264、hevc 多种编码，延迟低至 100ms（mjpg 模式），适用于 Windows/Linux 屏幕镜像。内置自动旋转、全屏切换，支持通过 ADB 实现 Android 有线连接，适合多屏办公与移动场景。
summary.en: meDisplay is a cross-platform screen mirroring tool that turns any browser-equipped device (e.g., Android tablet) into a secondary display for Mac, mimicking Apple's Sidecar. Built with real-time ffmpeg transcoding, it supports mjpg, vp8, h264, and hevc encoding with ultra-low latency (as low as 100ms in mjpg mode). Also supports Windows/Linux X11 mirroring, auto-rotation, fullscreen toggle, and ADB-based Android wired connection for seamless multi-screen workflows.

metadata.name: anything-llm
metadata.description: The all-in-one Desktop & Docker AI application with built-in RAG, AI agents, No-code agent builder, MCP compatibility,  and more.

summary.zh: AnythingLLM 是一款全栈式桌面与 Docker AI 应用，集成 RAG、AI 智能体、无代码智能体构建器及 MCP 兼容性，支持多用户管理与权限控制，提供灵活 LLM 与向量数据库配置，实现文档智能对话与自动化处理。
summary.en: AnythingLLM is a full-stack desktop and Docker-based AI application featuring built-in RAG, AI agents, no-code agent builder, and MCP compatibility. It supports customizable LLMs and vector databases, multi-user management, and seamless document interaction for intelligent chat and automation.

metadata.name: rag-web-ui
metadata.description: RAG Web UI is an intelligent dialogue system based on RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) technology.

summary.zh: RAG Web UI 是一个基于检索增强生成（RAG）技术的智能对话系统，支持多格式文档管理与向量化处理，提供精准知识问答服务。系统具备前后端分离架构、分布式文件存储及高性能向量数据库（如 ChromaDB、Qdrant），支持 OpenAI、DeepSeek 及本地 Ollama 模型部署，适用于私有化部署与 API 集成场景。
summary.en: RAG Web UI is an intelligent dialogue system powered by Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) technology, enabling precise knowledge-based Q&A through document retrieval and LLM integration. It supports multi-format document ingestion, asynchronous processing, vectorization, and flexible LLM deployment (OpenAI, DeepSeek, Ollama), with a scalable backend architecture and OpenAPI for external access.

metadata.name: wool_scripts
metadata.description: 收集一些Loon、Surge、QuantumultX、ShadowRocket、Egern的配置与去广告规则。

summary.zh: 本仓库提供 Loon、Surge、Quantumult X 等代理工具的配置与去广告规则，涵盖抖音、微博等主流 App 的广告过滤与 IP 修改功能，支持 MITM 响应体解析，适用于净化网络环境，提升使用体验。
summary.en: This repository offers configuration files and ad-blocking rules for Loon, Surge, Quantumult X, and other proxy tools, including ad removal for apps like Douyin and Weibo, with MITM-based response parsing to enhance browsing experience.

metadata.name: midjourney-proxy
metadata.description: 🦄 The world's largest Midjourney drawing API, generating over 1 million drawings daily, supporting Discord Youchuan Midjourney 🐂！

summary.zh: Midjourney API 是全球最大的 Midjourney 绘图 API 代理项目，日生成图像超百万张，完全免费开源。支持 Discord 绘图、悠船绘图及官网接入，提供 Imagine、Vary、Remix 等全套指令，集成账号池管理、多数据库支持、负载均衡、CloudFlare 验证绕过、图片/视频一键换脸等功能，适用于企业级绘图服务部署。
summary.en: Midjourney API is the world's largest free and open-source proxy for Midjourney's Discord channel, generating over 1 million images daily. It supports full-featured drawing via Discord, YouChuan, and official Midjourney, with comprehensive commands like Imagine, Vary, Remix, account pooling, load balancing, CloudFlare bypass, image/video face swap, and enterprise-grade deployment features.

metadata.name: go-cursor-help
metadata.description: 解决Cursor在免费订阅期间出现以下提示的问题:  Your request has been blocked as our system has detected suspicious activity / You've reached your trial request limit.  /  Too many free trial accounts used on this machine.

summary.zh: 该工具用于重置 Cursor 免费试用限制，解决因系统检测可疑活动或试用请求超限导致的访问阻断问题。支持一键恢复试用额度，适用于开发者快速恢复 AI 编程环境使用权，提升开发效率。
summary.en: This tool resets Cursor's free trial limits, resolving access blocks caused by suspicious activity detection or trial request limits. It enables developers to restore trial credits instantly, ensuring uninterrupted access to AI-powered coding features.

metadata.name: GenQL
metadata.description: Generate SQL query from natural language.

summary.zh: GenQL 是一款将自然语言转换为 SQL 查询的工具，基于 Pinecone 向量数据库和 OpenAI 大模型技术，支持数据库模式索引、语音输入、查询历史记录等功能，适用于数据分析、应用开发和团队协作等场景，显著提升非技术用户与数据库交互的效率。
summary.en: GenQL is a natural language to SQL translation tool powered by Pinecone vector database and OpenAI LLM, enabling schema indexing, voice input, and query history. It streamlines database interactions for data analysts, developers, and non-technical users, enhancing productivity in reporting, exploration, and app development.

metadata.name: VutronMusic
metadata.description: 高颜值的第三方网易云播放器；支持流媒体音乐，如navidrome、jellyfin、emby；支持本地音乐播放、离线歌单、逐字歌词、桌面歌词、Touch Bar歌词、Mac状态栏歌词显示、Linux-gnome与Linux-kde桌面状态栏歌词显示；支持降调降速，支持自定义主题等。支持 Windows / macOS / Linux :electron:

summary.zh: VutronMusic 是一款高颜值跨平台第三方网易云音乐播放器，支持本地音乐、流媒体服务（如Navidrome、Jellyfin）、离线歌单及逐字歌词。具备桌面歌词、状态栏歌词、变调变速、自定义主题等功能，采用 Vue3 + TypeScript + Fastify 架构，支持 Windows/macOS/Linux 多平台。
summary.en: VutronMusic is a high-end third-party NetEase Cloud Music player supporting local music, streaming services (Navidrome, Jellyfin), offline playlists, and karaoke-style lyrics. Features include desktop lyrics, system tray display, pitch/speed control, custom themes, and advanced audio effects. Built with Vue3, TypeScript, Fastify, and Electron for cross-platform support.

metadata.name: feishin
metadata.description: A modern self-hosted music player.

summary.zh: Feishin 是一款现代化的自托管音乐播放器，支持 MPV 和 Web 播放器后端，提供现代化 UI、智能播放列表编辑、歌词同步与反同步功能，并支持将播放记录同步至服务器，适用于个人音乐库管理与流媒体播放。
summary.en: Feishin is a modern self-hosted music player featuring MPV and web player backends, a sleek UI, smart playlist editing, synchronized lyrics, and playback scrobbling to your server, ideal for managing personal music libraries and streaming.

metadata.name: artab
metadata.description: Get Inspired by the World's Greatest Artworks Every Time You Open a New Tab. Extension Available for Chrome, Edge, and Firefox.

summary.zh: Artab 是一款浏览器扩展，每次打开新标签页时展示世界顶级艺术作品，为用户提供每日艺术灵感。支持 Chrome、Edge 和 Firefox，基于现代前端技术栈开发，具备本地存储管理和跨浏览器兼容特性。
summary.en: Artab is a browser extension that displays world-class artworks on every new tab, inspiring users with daily art inspiration. Available for Chrome, Edge, and Firefox, it features modern frontend architecture with local storage and cross-browser compatibility.

metadata.name: moemail
metadata.description: A cute temporary email service built with NextJS + Cloudflare technology stack 🎉 | 一个基于 NextJS + Cloudflare 技术栈构建的可爱临时邮箱服务🎉

summary.zh: MoeMail 是一个基于 Next.js 和 Cloudflare 技术栈构建的可爱临时邮箱服务，提供隐私保护、实时邮件接收、灵活有效期设置、主题切换、PWA 支持等功能，支持自建部署、邮件发送、Webhook 通知及 OpenAPI 访问，界面简洁友好，适合个人或团队使用。
summary.en: MoeMail is a cute temporary email service built with Next.js and Cloudflare, offering privacy protection, real-time email receipt, flexible validity periods, theme switching, PWA support, and self-hosting capabilities. It supports email sending, webhook notifications, OpenAPI access, and a user-friendly interface for personal or team use.

metadata.name: Video_note_generator
metadata.description: 一键将视频转换为优质小红书笔记，自动优化内容和配图

summary.zh: 视频笔记生成器一键将视频内容转换为优质小红书笔记，支持自动语音转文字、AI内容优化、标题创作、配图获取及标签生成。V2.0版本采用FastAPI提供现代化Web界面，支持批量处理、长视频解析、智能错误重试与历史记录管理，显著提升内容创作效率。
summary.en: Video Note Generator automatically converts videos into high-quality Xiaohongshu notes with speech-to-text, AI content optimization, title generation, image fetching, and hashtag creation. V2.0 features a modern FastAPI web interface, batch processing, 30-minute video support, smart retry mechanisms, and history tracking for efficient content production.

metadata.name: cursor-vip
metadata.description: cursor IDE enjoy VIP

summary.zh: cursor-vip 是一个通过共享方式解锁 Cursor IDE 付费 VIP 功能的工具，支持多语言配置与代理模式。它提供稳定的 Claude 模型访问，通过脚本或二进制文件快速部署，适用于开发者绕过区域限制使用高级 AI 编程功能，但稳定性不及官方版本。
summary.en: cursor-vip is a tool that unlocks Cursor IDE's paid VIP features via shared access, supporting multi-language configuration and proxy modes. It offers stable Claude model access, easy deployment via scripts or binaries, and enables developers to use advanced AI coding features despite regional payment restrictions, though with lower stability than the official version.

summary.zh: Cursor Fake Machine 是一款专为 Cursor 编辑器设计的 VSIX 扩展工具，通过修改 machineid 实现机器信息伪装，帮助用户绕过设备限制或环境检测，适用于开发环境隔离与多实例管理场景。
summary.en: Cursor Fake Machine is a VSIX extension for the Cursor editor that modifies the machineid to spoof device information, allowing users to bypass device restrictions or environment checks. It's useful for managing isolated development environments or multiple instances.

metadata.name: acme.sh
metadata.description: A pure Unix shell script ACME client for SSL / TLS certificate automation

summary.zh: acme.sh 是一个纯 Unix shell 脚本实现的 ACME 客户端，用于自动化 SSL/TLS 证书申请与续期。支持 ECDSA、通配符和多域名证书，兼容主流操作系统和容器环境，部署简单，仅需3分钟掌握，是运维自动化的理想工具。
summary.en: acme.sh is a pure Unix shell script ACME client for automating SSL/TLS certificate issuance and renewal. It supports ECDSA, wildcard, and SAN certificates, runs on major OS platforms and containers, and is easy to deploy—masterable in just 3 minutes for efficient DevOps automation.

metadata.name: Color-diffusion
metadata.description: A diffusion model to colorize black and white images

summary.zh: 该项目利用扩散模型对黑白图像进行自动着色，采用LAB颜色空间分离亮度与色彩通道，仅对色彩通道添加噪声并预测去噪结果。模型基于UNet架构，结合灰度图像特征进行条件控制，实现端到端的图像着色。项目展示了从噪声生成彩色图像的过程，适用于历史影像修复、老照片上色等场景。
summary.en: This project implements a diffusion model for automatic colorization of black-and-white images using the LAB color space, where only the color channels are noised and predicted. The UNet-based model conditions on grayscale features and predicts denoised color channels, enabling end-to-end image colorization. It's suitable for restoring historical photos and enhancing old images.

metadata.name: developer-roadmap
metadata.description: Interactive roadmaps, guides and other educational content to help developers grow in their careers.

summary.zh: roadmap.sh 是一个社区驱动的开发者成长平台，提供交互式技术路线图、学习指南和最佳实践资源，覆盖前端、后端、DevOps、AI、数据科学等 30+ 技术领域，支持按初学者/进阶路径定制学习路径，助力开发者系统化职业发展。
summary.en: roadmap.sh is a community-driven platform offering interactive technology roadmaps, guides, and best practices for developers. It covers 30+ domains including Frontend, Backend, DevOps, AI, and Data Science, with beginner/advanced learning paths to support structured career growth in tech.

metadata.name: playwright-python
metadata.description: Python version of the Playwright testing and automation library.

summary.zh: Playwright-Python 是微软开源的跨平台浏览器自动化库，支持 Chromium、Firefox 和 WebKit 三大内核。提供同步/异步 API，具备无头模式、自动等待、网络拦截等特性，适用于端到端测试、网页爬虫和自动化任务，性能可靠且支持多平台部署。
summary.en: Playwright-Python is Microsoft's cross-browser automation library supporting Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit. It offers sync/async APIs with features like headless mode, auto-waiting, and network interception, ideal for E2E testing, web scraping, and automation across platforms with high reliability and performance.

metadata.name: playwright
metadata.description: Playwright is a framework for Web Testing and Automation. It allows testing Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API.

summary.zh: Playwright 是一个现代化的 Web 测试与自动化框架，支持 Chromium、Firefox 和 WebKit 三大浏览器内核的统一 API 调用。其核心优势在于内置智能等待机制、原生支持跨浏览器测试、无人工超时设计，以及自动生成测试追踪与录屏功能，显著提升端到端测试的稳定性与效率。
summary.en: Playwright is a modern framework for web testing and automation that provides a single API to test Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit browsers. It features built-in auto-waiting, cross-browser support, no artificial timeouts, and native tracing/video capture, making end-to-end tests more reliable and efficient.

metadata.name: bananas
metadata.description: Bananas🍌, Cross-Platform screen 🖥️ sharing 📡 made simple ⚡.

summary.zh: Bananas 是一款跨平台屏幕共享工具，支持 macOS、Windows 和 Linux，采用点对点连接技术，无需注册或服务器中转（仅需 STUN/TURN 和信令服务器完成初始连接）。主打隐私安全、简单易用，适合快速分享屏幕。
summary.en: Bananas is a cross-platform screen sharing tool for Mac, Windows, and Linux, using peer-to-peer connections without requiring accounts or central servers (except for STUN/TURN and signaling servers). It emphasizes privacy, simplicity, and instant sharing.

metadata.name: scrcpy
metadata.description: Display and control your Android device

summary.zh: scrcpy 是一款高性能、低延迟的 Android 设备屏幕镜像与控制工具，支持 USB/TCP 连接，无需 root 或额外应用。具备 30~120fps 流畅传输、1920×1080 高清画质、35~70ms 低延迟、1 秒内启动等特性，并提供音频转发、录制、虚拟显示、键盘鼠标模拟、游戏手柄支持等丰富功能，适用于 Linux、Windows、macOS 三大平台。
summary.en: scrcpy is a lightweight, high-performance Android device mirroring and control tool that supports USB/TCP connections without requiring root access or additional apps. It delivers 30~120fps video at 1920×1080+ quality with 35~70ms latency and sub-second startup. Features include audio forwarding, recording, virtual display, HID keyboard/mouse simulation, gamepad support, and more, available on Linux, Windows, and macOS.

metadata.name: xiaoju-survey
metadata.description: XIAOJUSURVEY is an enterprises form builder and analytics platform that allows users to create questionnaires, exams, polls, quizzes, and analyze data online.

summary.zh: XIAOJUSURVEY 是一套企业级表单构建与数据分析平台，支持问卷、考试、投票等多样化调研场景。基于 Vue3 + NestJS 技术栈，提供 40+ 题型、100+ 模板，具备智能逻辑编排、AI 生成问卷、分题统计与交叉分析能力，支持品牌化定制与多端嵌入，适用于市场调研、客户满意度测评等复杂业务场景。
summary.en: XIAOJUSURVEY is an enterprise-grade form builder and analytics platform enabling creation of questionnaires, exams, polls, and quizzes with online data analysis. Built on Vue3 + NestJS, it offers 40+ question types, 100+ templates, AI-powered survey generation, logic rules, cross-analysis, and brand customization for market research, customer feedback, and educational assessments.

metadata.name: gpt-engineer
metadata.description: CLI platform to experiment with codegen. Precursor to: https://lovable.dev

summary.zh: gpt-engineer 是一个基于 CLI 的代码生成实验平台，支持通过自然语言描述需求，由 AI 自动生成并执行代码，并可迭代优化。它支持 OpenAI API、本地模型及 Azure 等多种模型，提供项目创建、代码改进和自定义代理基准测试功能，是早期 AI 编程工具的重要探索。
summary.en: gpt-engineer is a CLI platform for experimenting with AI-driven code generation. It allows users to specify software in natural language, watch an AI write and execute code, and iteratively improve it. Supports OpenAI, local models, and Azure, with features for project creation, code improvement, and benchmarking custom agents.

metadata.name: tailwind-nextjs-starter-blog
metadata.description: This is a Next.js, Tailwind CSS blogging starter template. Comes out of the box configured with the latest technologies to make technical writing a breeze. Easily configurable and customizable. Perfect as a replacement to existing Jekyll and Hugo individual blogs.

summary.zh: 这是一个功能强大的 Next.js + Tailwind CSS 博客模板，基于 App Router 和 React Server Components，集成 Contentlayer 管理 Markdown 内容。开箱即用，支持高度可定制，适合替代 Jekyll 和 Hugo 个人博客，提供现代化的技术写作体验。
summary.en: A feature-rich Next.js and Tailwind CSS blogging starter template based on the App Router and React Server Components, using Contentlayer for markdown content management. Fully configured out-of-the-box, highly customizable, and ideal for replacing Jekyll and Hugo personal blogs with modern technical writing capabilities.

metadata.name: wenyan
metadata.description: 文颜- Markdown文章排版美化工具，支持微信公众号、今日头条、知乎等平台。

summary.zh: 文颜是一款专为 Markdown 内容创作者设计的排版美化工具，支持一键将 Markdown 文章转换为适配微信公众号、知乎、今日头条等主流平台的富文本格式，内置多款 Typora 主题并支持自定义样式，自动处理图片上传与数学公式渲染，让写作者专注于内容创作而非繁琐排版。
summary.en: Wenyan is a Markdown formatting and publishing tool designed for content creators, enabling one-click conversion of Markdown articles into platform-specific rich text formats for WeChat Official Accounts, Zhihu, Toutiao, and more. It features built-in Typora themes, custom styling, automatic image uploads, MathJax support, and seamless cross-platform publishing.

metadata.name: NGCBot
metadata.description: 一个基于✨HOOK机制的微信机器人，支持🌱安全新闻定时推送【FreeBuf，先知，安全客，奇安信攻防社区】，👯Kfc文案，⚡漏洞查询，⚡手机号归属地查询，⚡知识库查询，🎉星座查询，⚡天气查询，🌱摸鱼日历，⚡微步威胁情报查询， 🐛视频，⚡图片，👯帮助菜单。📫 支持积分功能，⚡支持自动拉人，，🌱自动群发，👯Ai回复（国内主流AI模型，扣子，FastGpt，Dify全面支持！），⚡视频号解析，😄自定义程度丰富，小白也可轻松上手！

summary.zh: NGCBot 是一款基于 HOOK 机制的微信机器人，集成安全资讯推送、AI 智能回复、漏洞查询、天气日历等丰富功能，支持主流 AI 平台，具备自动拉群、群发、视频解析等自动化能力，自定义程度高，适合安全从业者与社群运营。
summary.en: NGCBot is a HOOK-based WeChat robot supporting security news push, AI replies, vulnerability queries, weather, calendar, and more. It integrates with major AI platforms, offers automation features like auto-invite and group messaging, and is highly customizable for non-technical users.

metadata.name: awesome-LLM-resources
metadata.description: 🧑‍🚀 全世界最好的LLM资料总结（多模态生成、Agent、辅助编程、AI审稿、数据处理、模型训练、模型推理、o1 模型、MCP、小语言模型、视觉语言模型） | Summary of the world's best LLM resources.

summary.zh: 该仓库是全网最全面的大语言模型（LLM）资源汇总，涵盖多模态生成、Agent、辅助编程、AI审稿、数据处理、模型训练与推理等全链路技术方向，持续更新维护，为研究者与开发者提供权威的一站式学习与实践指南。
summary.en: This repository is the most comprehensive collection of LLM resources globally, covering multimodal generation, agents, code assistance, AI review, data processing, model training and inference, and more. It serves as an authoritative one-stop guide for researchers and developers, continuously updated.

metadata.name: LSPosed
metadata.description: LSPosed Framework resuscitated

summary.zh: LSPosed 是一个基于 Zygisk 的 ART 钩子框架，旨在提供与经典 Xposed 框架一致的 API 体验。它利用 LSPlant 实现核心 ART 方法钩取，支持 Android 8.1 至 16 系统，兼容原版 Xposed 模块，无需修改 APK 即可动态修改系统和应用行为，适用于 Magisk 环境。
summary.en: LSPosed is an ART hooking framework based on Zygisk that delivers consistent APIs with the original Xposed. It leverages LSPlant for core ART method hooking, supports Android 8.1–16, and is fully compatible with legacy Xposed modules, enabling dynamic system and app behavior modification without APK changes in a Magisk environment.

metadata.name: clash-party
metadata.description: :electron: Another Mihomo GUI.

summary.zh: Clash Party 是一款基于 Electron 的 Mihomo（Clash Meta）图形界面客户端，提供开箱即用的代理管理工具。支持 Smart Core 智能节点选择、多主题 UI、WebDAV 配置备份、Sub-Store 订阅集成及内核切换，简化了复杂代理配置流程，适合需要高效网络代理的用户。
summary.en: Clash Party is an Electron-based GUI for Mihomo (Clash Meta) that offers an out-of-the-box proxy management tool. It features Smart Core AI-driven node selection, multi-theme UI, WebDAV config backup, Sub-Store integration, and dual-core support, streamlining complex proxy configurations for end users.

metadata.name: docling
metadata.description: Get your documents ready for gen AI

summary.zh: Docling 是一个强大的文档处理工具，支持多种格式（PDF、DOCX、PPTX等）的解析与理解，具备高级 PDF 布局分析、表格识别、OCR 及音频转文本功能。它提供统一的 DoclingDocument 输出格式，支持导出为 Markdown、HTML、JSON 等格式，并无缝集成 LangChain、LlamaIndex 等 AI 框架，专为生成式 AI 应用打造。
summary.en: Docling is a powerful document processing tool that parses diverse formats (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, etc.) with advanced PDF layout analysis, table recognition, OCR, and ASR capabilities. It outputs unified DoclingDocument format, supports exports to Markdown, HTML, JSON, and integrates seamlessly with LangChain, LlamaIndex, and other AI frameworks for gen AI applications.

metadata.name: figura
metadata.description: A free macOS native app to remove image backgrounds locally

summary.zh: Figura 是一款免费的 macOS 原生应用，利用系统 Vision 框架实现本地快速背景去除，支持拖拽、粘贴或点击上传，界面简洁现代，兼容深色/浅色模式，专为 macOS 14+ 设计。
summary.en: Figura is a free native macOS app that leverages the system's Vision framework for fast, local background removal. It supports drag-and-drop, paste (⌘V), or click upload, features a minimalist SwiftUI interface, and works on macOS 14+ with dark/light mode support.

metadata.name: maxun
metadata.description: 🔥 The open-source no-code platform for web scraping, crawling, search and AI data extraction • Turn websites into structured APIs in minutes 🔥

summary.zh: Maxun 是一个开源无代码平台，专为实时网页抓取、爬取、搜索和 AI 数据提取设计，可将任意网站快速转换为结构化 API。支持录制操作、自然语言驱动提取、网页转 Markdown/HTML 及全站爬取，适用于构建自动化数据流水线，无需编程即可实现复杂的数据采集任务。
summary.en: Maxun is an open-source no-code platform for real-time web scraping, crawling, search, and AI-powered data extraction. It transforms any website into a structured API in minutes, offering recorder mode, LLM-driven extraction, full-page scraping, and scalable crawling—ideal for building automated data pipelines without coding.

metadata.name: MinerU
metadata.description: Transforms complex documents like PDFs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.

summary.zh: MinerU 是一款高效文档解析工具，可将 PDF 等复杂文档自动转换为 LLM 友好的结构化输出（Markdown/JSON），显著提升 Agentic 工作流的文档处理效率与数据可用性。
summary.en: MinerU is a high-performance document parsing tool that transforms complex documents like PDFs into LLM-ready structured outputs (Markdown/JSON), significantly enhancing document processing efficiency and data accessibility for agentic workflows.

metadata.name: html-to-markdown
metadata.description: ⚙️ Convert HTML to Markdown. Even works with entire websites and can be extended through rules.

summary.zh: html-to-markdown 是一款强大的 HTML 到 Markdown 转换工具，支持完整网页转换、复杂格式处理、自定义选项和插件扩展。提供 Golang 库、CLI 工具和在线 API 三种使用方式，具备智能转义、表格支持、嵌套列表等高级功能，适用于内容提取、文档转换等场景。
summary.en: html-to-markdown is a robust HTML-to-Markdown converter that transforms entire websites into clean, readable Markdown with support for complex formatting, customizable options, and extensible plugins. It offers a Golang library, CLI tool, and hosted REST API, featuring smart escaping, table conversion, nested lists, and relative-to-absolute link resolution.

metadata.name: text-extract-api
metadata.description: Document (PDF, Word, PPTX ...) extraction and parse API using state of the art modern OCRs + Ollama supported models. Anonymize documents. Remove PII. Convert any document or picture to structured JSON or Markdown

summary.zh: text-extract-api 是一个本地部署的文档提取与解析 API，支持 PDF、Word、PPT 和图片转换为高精度 Markdown 或结构化 JSON，集成 EasyOCR、Llama3.2-vision 等先进 OCR 模型及 Ollama 大模型，具备 PII 匿名化、分布式 Celery 队列处理、Redis 缓存等功能，无需依赖云端服务。
summary.en: text-extract-api is a locally deployed document extraction and parsing API that converts images, PDFs, and Office documents into high-accuracy Markdown or structured JSON using advanced OCRs like EasyOCR and Llama3.2-vision, integrated with Ollama LLMs for text refinement and PII removal. It features distributed Celery processing, Redis caching, and no external cloud dependencies.

metadata.name: memfree
metadata.description: MemFree - Hybrid AI Search Engine & AI Page Generator

summary.zh: MemFree 是一款混合 AI 搜索引擎与 AI 页面生成器，支持多模态输入（文本/图片/文件）、多 AI 模型（Claude/GPT/Gemini）及多搜索引擎，可快速检索知识库与全网信息并生成生产级 UI 页面，显著提升效率并降低成本。
summary.en: MemFree is a Hybrid AI Search Engine & AI Page Generator that supports multimodal inputs (text/images/files), integrates multiple AI models (Claude/GPT/Gemini) and search engines, enabling fast retrieval from knowledge bases and the web, plus instant generation of production-ready UI pages to boost efficiency and reduce costs.

metadata.name: DreamClear
metadata.description: [NeurIPS 2024] DreamClear: High-Capacity Real-World Image Restoration with Privacy-Safe Dataset Curation

summary.zh: DreamClear 是 NeurIPS 2024 论文提出的高容量真实世界图像修复系统，通过隐私安全的语料库构建技术，实现高质量图像恢复。其核心创新在于结合 PixArt-α 生成模型与多模态对齐能力，支持文本引导修复，并在 RealLQ250 基准测试中表现优异，适用于摄影、遥感等真实场景。
summary.en: DreamClear, presented at NeurIPS 2024, is a high-capacity real-world image restoration framework featuring privacy-safe dataset curation. It leverages the PixArt-α generative model with multimodal alignment for text-guided restoration, achieving state-of-the-art performance on the RealLQ250 benchmark across diverse real-world scenarios including photography and remote sensing.

metadata.name: wx_channels_download
metadata.description: 微信视频号下载器

summary.zh: 微信视频号下载器是一款轻量级跨平台工具，支持 Windows 和 macOS 系统，通过注入浏览器扩展实现一键下载视频号视频。无需登录或复杂配置，自动安装证书并启动代理服务，在微信 PC 端界面直接添加下载按钮，支持多画质选择，下载完成后自动展示文件信息，体积小巧且操作简便。
summary.en: WeChat Channels Video Downloader is a lightweight cross-platform tool for Windows and macOS that enables one-click downloading of videos from WeChat Channels. It automatically installs certificates, starts a proxy service, and injects download buttons into the WeChat PC client interface. Users can select video quality (e.g., xWT111, xWT98) and download files with metadata displayed post-download, offering a simple and efficient experience.

metadata.name: AsrTools
metadata.description: ✨ AsrTools: Smart Voice-to-Text Tool | Efficient Batch Processing | User-Friendly Interface | No GPU Required | Supports SRT/TXT Output | Turn your audio into accurate text in an instant!

summary.zh: AsrTools 是一款智能语音转文字工具，支持批量音频/视频文件处理，提供 SRT/TXT/字幕文件输出，具备高颜值 PyQt5 界面与多线程并发能力，无需 GPU 即可快速生成准确文本，适用于字幕制作与语音内容提取。
summary.en: AsrTools is an intelligent voice-to-text tool that supports batch processing of audio and video files, generating SRT/TXT/subtitle outputs with a user-friendly PyQt5 interface. It uses multi-threading for fast conversion, requires no GPU, and enables instant text extraction from media files.

metadata.name: ChatGPT-On-CS
metadata.description: 基于大模型的智能对话客服工具，支持微信、拼多多、千牛、哔哩哔哩、抖音企业号、抖音、抖店、微博聊天、小红书专业号运营、小红书、知乎等平台接入，可选择 GPT3.5/GPT4.0/ 懒人百宝箱 （后续会支持更多平台），能处理文本、语音和图片，通过插件访问操作系统和互联网等外部资源，支持基于自有知识库定制企业 AI 应用。

summary.zh: 金销数据云智能客服是基于大语言模型的专业电商SaaS解决方案，支持微信、拼多多、千牛、抖音、小红书等10+主流平台接入，具备文本/语音/图片处理能力，支持自有知识库定制与插件扩展，提供多维度数据分析与意图识别功能。
summary.en: JinXiao Data Cloud AI Customer Service is a professional e-commerce SaaS solution powered by large language models, supporting integration with 10+ mainstream platforms including WeChat, Pinduoduo, Qianniu, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, with capabilities for text/voice/image processing, custom knowledge base configuration, plugin ecosystem, and multi-dimensional data analytics including intent recognition.

metadata.name: paper-ai
metadata.description: 搜索真实文献并生成引用对应文献的AI论文

summary.zh: paper-ai 是一个基于 AI 的论文写作工具，支持通过真实文献自动生成引用，集成 Semantic Scholar、arXiv 和 PubMed 进行文献检索，结合大模型生成高质量学术内容，显著提升论文撰写效率与引用准确性。
summary.en: Paper-ai is an AI-powered academic writing tool that generates papers with real citations by searching Semantic Scholar, arXiv, and PubMed. It combines large language models with academic databases to streamline research and writing workflows.

metadata.name: mihomo
metadata.description: A simple Python Pydantic model for Honkai: Star Rail parsed data from the Mihomo API.

summary.zh: mihomo 是一个专为《崩坏：星穹铁道》设计的 Python Pydantic 数据模型库，提供对 Mihomo API 解析数据的强类型支持与自动补全。支持 V1/V2 两种数据格式，内置工具函数处理角色去重与数据合并，并提供 JSON 和 Pickle 持久化方案，显著提升游戏数据集成开发效率。
summary.en: mihomo is a Python Pydantic model library designed for Honkai: Star Rail, offering strongly-typed data structures and autocompletion support for parsed data from the Mihomo API. It supports both V1 and V2 data formats, includes utility functions for character deduplication and data merging, and provides JSON/Pickle persistence options, greatly enhancing game data integration workflows.

metadata.name: clash-nyanpasu
metadata.description: Clash Nyanpasu～(∠・ω< )⌒☆​

summary.zh: Clash Nyanpasu 是一款基于 Tauri 框架的 Clash 网络代理图形界面客户端，支持 Clash Premium、Mihomo 和 Clash Rust 内核。提供多配置文件和 Provider 管理功能，采用 Google Material You 设计语言，具备深色/浅色主题切换，支持跨平台运行。
summary.en: Clash Nyanpasu is a Tauri-based GUI client for Clash network proxy, supporting Clash Premium, Mihomo, and Clash Rust cores. It offers profile and provider management with Google Material You UI design, dark/light themes, and cross-platform support.

metadata.name: clash-verge-rev
metadata.description: A modern GUI client based on Tauri, designed to run in Windows, macOS and Linux for tailored proxy experience

summary.zh: Clash Verge Rev 是基于 Tauri 2 和 Rust 构建的现代化 Clash.Meta 客户端，支持跨平台（Windows/macOS/Linux），提供简洁美观的 GUI 界面、配置文件管理、TUN 模式、WebDav 同步及自定义主题，适用于高性能代理需求。
summary.en: Clash Verge Rev is a modern GUI client for Clash.Meta (mihomo) built with Tauri 2 and Rust, offering cross-platform support (Windows, macOS, Linux), intuitive UI, config management, TUN mode, WebDav sync, and customizable themes for advanced proxy control.

metadata.name: TMSpeech
metadata.description: 腾讯会议摸鱼工具

summary.zh: TMSpeech 是一款 Windows 平台的实时语音转文字工具，基于 sherpa-onnx 框架实现中文会议语音识别，支持 WASAPI 内录、实时字幕显示与历史记录保存。具备低 CPU 占用（<5%）、无边框可拖动界面、自定义外部识别器集成等功能，适用于会议转录、走神备忘等场景。
summary.en: TMSpeech is a Windows-based real-time speech-to-text tool using the sherpa-onnx framework for Chinese meeting transcription. It captures system audio via WASAPI, displays live subtitles like lyrics, and saves recognition history. Features include low CPU usage (<5%), draggable UI, and support for custom external recognizers, ideal for meetings and note-taking.

metadata.name: UserScripts
metadata.description: 🐒一些修改自网络的油猴脚本 Some Tampermonkey scripts modified from the internet

summary.zh: 该仓库提供一系列基于油猴脚本（Tampermonkey）的自动化工具，多数脚本改编自网络资源，涵盖网页功能增强、界面优化及实用小工具。所有脚本均托管于GreasyFork平台，支持多语言版本，具备高安装量和良好用户评价，适用于提升日常浏览与操作效率。
summary.en: This repository hosts a collection of Tampermonkey user scripts, mostly modified from online sources, designed to enhance web functionality, optimize interfaces, and provide utility tools. Hosted on GreasyFork with multi-language support, these scripts boast high installation counts and positive user ratings, ideal for improving browsing efficiency and user experience.

metadata.name: hiddify-app
metadata.description: Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

summary.zh: Hiddify 是一款跨平台代理客户端，基于 Sing-box 构建，支持 Vless、Vmess、Reality、TUIC、Hysteria、WireGuard、SSH 等多种协议。具备自动节点选择、TUN 模式、远程配置同步等功能，界面简洁、无广告、开源安全，支持多语言及深色/浅色主题，适用于 Android、iOS、Windows、macOS 和 Linux 平台。
summary.en: Hiddify is a multi-platform proxy client built on Sing-box, supporting Vless, Vmess, Reality, TUIC, Hysteria, WireGuard, SSH, and more. It features automatic node selection, TUN mode, remote configuration sync, and an intuitive UI. Open-source, ad-free, and secure, it's available on Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and Linux.

metadata.name: FlClash
metadata.description: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

summary.zh: FlClash 是一款基于 ClashMeta 的多平台代理客户端，支持 Android、Windows、macOS 和 Linux，具备 Material You 设计、深色模式、WebDAV 数据同步及订阅链接管理功能，界面简洁无广告，适用于需要跨平台网络代理的用户。
summary.en: FlClash is a multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta, supporting Android, Windows, macOS, and Linux. It features Material You design, dark mode, WebDAV sync, subscription management, and an ad-free, open-source interface for seamless cross-device proxy control.

metadata.name: crawl4ai
metadata.description: 🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN

summary.zh: Crawl4AI 是一个开源的 LLM 友好型网络爬虫与抓取工具，专为将网页转换为干净、适合大语言模型（LLM）处理的 Markdown 格式而设计，广泛应用于 RAG、智能体和数据流水线场景。其核心亮点包括高吞吐量、可控性强、支持 Docker 部署，并具备崩溃恢复、预抓取加速等高级功能，拥有 5 万+ GitHub 星标社区。
