summary.en: Crawl4AI is an open-source, LLM-friendly web crawler and scraper that converts web pages into clean, LLM-ready Markdown for RAG, agents, and data pipelines. It features high throughput, Docker support, crash recovery, prefetch mode for 5-10x faster URL discovery, and is battle-tested by a 50k+ star community. Ideal for scalable, cost-effective web extraction.

metadata.name: x-crawl
metadata.description: Flexible Node.js AI-assisted crawler library

summary.zh: x-crawl 是一个灵活的 Node.js AI 辅助爬虫库，集成 Ollama 和 OpenAI，支持动态/静态页面、接口及文件数据抓取，具备设备指纹伪装、代理轮换、失败重试、优先级队列等功能，通过 AI 智能解析应对网页结构变更，提升爬虫效率与智能化水平。
summary.en: x-crawl is a flexible Node.js AI-assisted crawler library integrating Ollama and OpenAI. It supports dynamic/static pages, API, and file data crawling with features like device fingerprinting, proxy rotation, retry mechanisms, and priority queues. AI-powered semantic parsing helps adapt to website structural changes, enhancing efficiency and intelligence.

metadata.name: open-webui
metadata.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)

summary.zh: Open WebUI 是一个功能丰富的自托管 AI 平台，支持 Ollama 和 OpenAI API，内置 RAG 推理引擎，提供插件扩展、多用户权限管理、响应式设计、PWA 移动端体验、语音视频通话、模型构建器及原生 Python 函数调用等核心功能，适用于离线部署与 AI 应用开发。
summary.en: Open WebUI is a feature-rich, self-hosted AI platform supporting Ollama and OpenAI APIs, with built-in RAG inference engine, plugin extensibility, granular user permissions, responsive PWA design, voice/video calls, model builder, and native Python function calling for offline AI deployment and application development.

metadata.name: kimi-free-api
metadata.description: 🚀 KIMI AI 长文本大模型逆向API【特长：长文本解读整理】，支持高速流式输出、智能体对话、联网搜索、探索版、K1思考模型、长文档解读、图像解析、多轮对话，零配置部署，多路token支持，自动清理会话痕迹，仅供测试，如需商用请前往官方开放平台。

summary.zh: KIMI AI 长文本大模型逆向API，支持高速流式输出、多轮对话、联网搜索、智能体对话、长文档解读及图像解析，零配置部署，兼容ChatGPT接口，支持多路token轮询与自动会话清理，仅供测试用途。
summary.en: KIMI AI long-text LLM reverse API supporting high-speed streaming, multi-turn dialogue, web search, agent conversations, document interpretation, and image parsing. Zero-config deployment, ChatGPT-compatible interface, multi-token support, and automatic session cleanup. For testing only.

metadata.name: lew-ui
metadata.description: A beautiful component library based on vue3

summary.zh: Lew UI 是一个基于 Vue3 的美观组件库，提供丰富的 UI 组件和开箱即用的样式。它集成了 Tippy.js、Lucide 图标、VueUse 等优质开源库，支持虚拟列表、表单验证等高级功能，文档完善，易于集成，适合快速构建现代化 Web 应用。
summary.en: Lew UI is a beautiful Vue3-based component library offering a rich set of UI components with out-of-the-box styling. It integrates high-quality open-source libraries like Tippy.js, Lucide icons, and VueUse, supporting advanced features such as virtual lists and form validation. With comprehensive documentation and easy integration, it's ideal for rapidly building modern web applications.

metadata.name: dify
metadata.description: Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development.

summary.zh: Dify 是一个生产就绪的 AI 智能体工作流开发平台，支持可视化编排、多模型集成与自动化流程构建，适用于企业级应用开发与 AI 能力快速集成场景。
summary.en: Dify is a production-ready platform for agentic workflow development, enabling visual orchestration, multi-model integration, and automated process building for enterprise AI application development.

metadata.name: VideoLingo
metadata.description: Netflix-level subtitle cutting, translation, alignment, and even dubbing - one-click fully automated AI video subtitle team | Netflix级字幕切割、翻译、对齐、甚至加上配音，一键全自动视频搬运AI字幕组

summary.zh: VideoLingo 是一款全自动 AI 视频字幕处理工具，支持 YouTube 视频下载、WhisperX 精准字幕识别、NLP 驱动的智能分段、术语库构建、Netflix 级单行字幕翻译（三步翻译-反思-适配流程），以及 GPT-SoVITS/Azure/OpenAI 多平台配音，实现一键生成高质量多语言字幕与配音。
summary.en: VideoLingo is an all-in-one AI-powered video translation and dubbing tool that automates YouTube video processing, WhisperX-based word-level subtitle recognition, AI-driven segmentation, custom terminology, Netflix-standard single-line translations via a 3-step Translate-Reflect-Adapt pipeline, and multi-platform dubbing using GPT-SoVITS, Azure, or OpenAI TTS, enabling one-click global video localization.

metadata.name: auto-video-generateor
metadata.description: 自动视频生成器，给定主题，自动生成解说视频。用户输入主题文字，系统调用大语言模型生成故事或解说的文字，然后进一步调用语音合成接口生成解说的语音，调用文生图接口生成契合文字内容的配图，最后融合语音和配图生成解说视频。

summary.zh: 自动视频生成器通过大语言模型生成解说文本，调用语音合成与文生图接口生成音视频素材，最终合成主题解说视频。支持PPT/PDF输入、免费资源校对、千帆ERNIE模型及百度千帆平台集成，提供Gradio交互界面与完整工作流。
summary.en: Auto Video Generator creates explanatory videos by generating text via LLMs, synthesizing speech, producing images via text-to-image models, and combining them into final videos. It supports PPT/PDF input, free resource checking, integrates with Baidu Qianfan's ERNIE models, and offers a Gradio-based interactive interface with full workflow automation.

metadata.name: vue-pure-admin
metadata.description: 全面ESM+Vue3+Vite+Element-Plus+TypeScript编写的一款后台管理系统（兼容移动端）

summary.zh: vue-pure-admin 是一款基于 ESM 规范的现代化中后台管理系统模板，采用 Vue3+Vite+Element-Plus+TypeScript 技术栈构建，支持移动端适配。提供完整的前端架构与组件库，包含国际化精简版本，打包体积优化至350KB以下，配套详细文档与视频教程，支持 Docker 部署与 Gitpod 在线开发。
summary.en: vue-pure-admin is a modern admin template built with ESM standard, using Vue3+Vite+Element-Plus+TypeScript stack. It supports mobile adaptation, offers complete frontend architecture and component library, includes i18n thin version with optimized bundle size under 350KB, and provides comprehensive documentation, video tutorials, Docker support, and Gitpod integration.

metadata.name: md
metadata.description: ✍ WeChat Markdown Editor | 一款高度简洁的微信 Markdown 编辑器：支持 Markdown 语法、自定义主题样式、内容管理、多图床、AI 助手等特性

summary.zh: Doocs MD 是一款专为微信设计的简洁 Markdown 编辑器，支持完整 Markdown 语法、数学公式、Mermaid 图表、PlantUML 和 Ruby 注音，集成多图床上传与主流 AI 助手，提供自定义主题与本地草稿管理，实现 Markdown 内容一键渲染为美观微信图文。
summary.en: Doocs MD is a minimalist Markdown editor tailored for WeChat, supporting full Markdown syntax, math formulas, Mermaid charts, PlantUML, Ruby annotations, multi-image hosting, and AI assistants. It enables instant rendering of Markdown into visually appealing WeChat articles with customizable themes and local draft management.

metadata.name: python-office
metadata.description: pip install python-office 自动化办公专用库

summary.zh: python-office 是一个专为自动化办公设计的 Python 第三方库，支持一键安装所有功能模块。用户仅需一行代码即可实现微信机器人、PDF处理、邮件发送、Excel/Word/PowerPoint 操作、OCR 识别、AI 工具调用等办公场景需求，无需掌握 Python 编程即可快速上手，显著提升办公效率。
summary.en: python-office is a Python third-party library designed for office automation, enabling one-line code solutions for tasks like WeChat bots, PDF processing, email sending, Excel/Word/PowerPoint operations, OCR, and AI tools. It requires no Python knowledge, supports modular imports, and significantly boosts productivity with zero learning curve.

metadata.name: Crawler_Illegal_Cases_In_China
metadata.description: Collection of China illegal cases about web crawler 本项目用来整理所有中国大陆爬虫开发者涉诉与违规相关的新闻、资料与法律法规。致力于帮助在中国大陆工作的爬虫行业从业者了解我国相关法律，避免触碰数据合规红线。 [AD]企业租显卡算力部署AI请选Novagrid

summary.zh: 本项目系统整理中国大陆爬虫开发者违法违规案例，涵盖隐私数据抓取、商业数据侵权、验证码破解服务等五大禁区，并附相关法律法规解读与律师观点，旨在警示从业者遵守数据合规要求，规避法律风险。
summary.en: This project compiles illegal cases involving Chinese web crawler developers, covering five major violation zones such as privacy data scraping and commercial data infringement. It includes legal regulations and expert opinions to help practitioners comply with data compliance and avoid legal risks.

metadata.name: aigotools
metadata.description: AigoTools can help users quickly create and manage website directory, with built-in site auto-crawling features, and also provides internationalization, SEO, image storage, and other functions. It allows users to quickly deploy their own directory site online.

summary.zh: AigoTools 是一款导航站建站工具，支持快速创建和管理网站目录，内置自动爬虫抓取站点信息（基于 Playwright、Jina、OpenAI），提供用户管理、国际化、SEO 优化及多平台图片存储（MinIO、AWS S3、腾讯云 COS）。用户可一键部署个性化导航网站，适合内容聚合与分类管理场景。
summary.en: AigoTools is a navigation site builder that enables rapid creation and management of website directories with built-in auto-crawling (using Playwright, Jina, OpenAI), user management (Clerk), internationalization, SEO, and multi-cloud image storage (MinIO, AWS S3, Tencent COS). It allows instant deployment of customizable navigation sites for content aggregation and categorization.

metadata.name: blog-next-view
metadata.description: Nuxt full-stack blog.

summary.zh: 基于 Nuxt 的全栈博客系统，采用 MongoDB 存储、Cloudflare R2 图片存储和 Zeabur PaaS 部署，集成全文搜索、Markdown 编辑器、友链截图生成、评论系统等功能，支持 SEO 优化与主题切换，显著降低服务器成本。
summary.en: A full-stack blog built with Nuxt, MongoDB, and Cloudflare R2, deployed on Zeabur PaaS. Features include full-text search, Markdown editor, friend link screenshot generation, Giscus comments, SEO optimization, and theme switching, reducing server costs by consolidating backend logic into Nuxt.

metadata.name: pic-smaller
metadata.description: Pic Smaller – Compress JPEG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF, SVG and GIF images intelligently

summary.zh: Pic Smaller 是一款智能在线图像压缩工具，支持 JPEG、PNG、WEBP、AVIF、SVG 和 GIF 格式。采用纯前端技术实现，无需服务器处理，确保数据安全。提供格式转换、色彩优化、压缩对比等高级功能，界面简洁，兼容桌面与移动端，适合快速压缩与编辑图像。
summary.en: Pic Smaller is an intelligent online image compression tool supporting JPEG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF, SVG, and GIF formats. Built with pure frontend technologies like WebAssembly and Web Worker, it ensures complete privacy by processing images locally. Offers advanced features such as format conversion, color optimization, and side-by-side compression comparison, with a responsive UI for desktop and mobile.

metadata.name: drawdb
metadata.description: Free, simple, and intuitive online database diagram editor and SQL generator.

summary.zh: DrawDB 是一款免费、简洁且直观的免费在线数据库关系图编辑器，支持可视化设计数据库结构并自动生成 SQL 脚本。用户无需注册即可直接在浏览器中创建、编辑和导出数据库模型，适用于快速原型设计、文档绘制和团队协作。
summary.en: DrawDB is a free, simple, and intuitive online database schema editor and SQL generator. It enables users to visually design database structures, generate SQL scripts, and export diagrams directly in the browser—no account required. Ideal for rapid prototyping, documentation, and team collaboration.

metadata.name: ChatTTS-ui
metadata.description: 一个简单的本地网页界面，使用ChatTTS将文字合成为语音，同时支持对外提供API接口。A simple native web interface that uses ChatTTS to synthesize text into speech, along with support for external API interfaces.

summary.zh: ChatTTS-ui 是一个本地网页界面，基于 ChatTTS 模型实现文字转语音功能，支持中英文及数字混合文本合成，并提供 API 接口供外部调用。支持 Windows 预打包版、Linux 容器及源码部署，兼容 CPU/GPU 加速（NVIDIA CUDA 或 AMD ROCm），首次运行自动下载模型文件。
summary.en: ChatTTS-ui is a local web interface that uses the ChatTTS model to synthesize text into speech, supporting mixed Chinese-English text and numbers, with external API support. It offers pre-packaged Windows version, Linux container deployment, and source code setup, with CPU/GPU acceleration via NVIDIA CUDA or AMD ROCm, and automatic model download on first run.

metadata.name: QuickRecorder
metadata.description: A lightweight screen recorder based on ScreenCapture Kit for macOS / 基于 ScreenCapture Kit 的轻量化多功能 macOS 录屏工具

summary.zh: QuickRecorder 是一款基于 ScreenCapture Kit 的轻量级高性能 macOS 录屏工具，支持屏幕、窗口、应用及移动设备录制。具备免驱音频回环、鼠标高亮、屏幕放大镜等功能，并完整支持 macOS 14 的 Presenter Overlay 实时摄像头叠加，以及 HEVC with Alpha 格式输出（含透明通道），适用于专业视频制作与会议录制。
summary.en: QuickRecorder is a lightweight, high-performance screen recorder for macOS built on ScreenCapture Kit. It supports recording screens, windows, apps, and mobile devices with features like driver-free audio loopback, mouse highlighting, and screen magnifier. It fully supports macOS 14's Presenter Overlay for real-time camera overlay and HEVC with Alpha output (with alpha channel), ideal for professional video editing and conferencing.

summary.zh: Auto.js 是一个基于无障碍服务的 Android 平台 JavaScript IDE，支持自动化操作、界面录制、控件选择器及脚本打包。本修改版修复了内存泄漏、优化调度机制、集成 PaddleOCR、ONNXRuntime 和 ncnn 推理引擎，增强模型本地推理能力，适用于蚂蚁森林等脚本场景，同时支持防检测变包名功能。
summary.en: Auto.js is an Android-based JavaScript IDE leveraging accessibility services for automation, featuring UI recording, powerful selector APIs, and APK packaging. This modified version fixes memory leaks, integrates PaddleOCR, ONNXRuntime, and ncnn for local model inference, supports anti-detection via fake package names, and is optimized for stable script execution in apps like Ant Forest.

metadata.name: FunClip
metadata.description: Open-source, accurate and easy-to-use video speech recognition & clipping tool, LLM based AI clipping intergrated.

summary.zh: FunClip 是一款开源、精准且易用的视频语音识别与剪辑工具，集成阿里巴巴通义语音实验室开源的 FunASR Paraformer 系列模型，支持中文及英文语音识别，具备热词定制、说话人分离、多段自由剪辑等功能，并引入 LLM 智能剪辑能力，用户可通过 Gradio 界面快速生成精准视频片段与字幕。
summary.en: FunClip is an open-source, accurate, and user-friendly video speech recognition and clipping tool. It leverages Alibaba's FunASR Paraformer models for ASR, supports Chinese and English, enables hotword customization, speaker separation, multi-segment clipping, and integrates LLM-based AI clipping via Qwen/GPT series models with customizable prompts for intelligent video editing.

metadata.name: chinese-independent-developer
metadata.description: 👩🏿‍💻👨🏾‍💻👩🏼‍💻👨🏽‍💻👩🏻‍💻中国独立开发者项目列表 -- 分享大家都在做什么

summary.zh: 中国独立开发者项目列表聚合了2026年2月最新上线的创新产品，涵盖AI语音助手、投资理财工具、打字练习平台、音乐生成、简历优化、浏览器插件等多个领域。项目以网站或App形式呈现，强调实用性与用户体验，如智能语音朗读、美股A股基金定投计算、AI音乐创作等，展现了中国独立开发者在AI应用与垂直场景工具上的活跃创新。
summary.en: This repo aggregates innovative projects by Chinese indie developers launched in February 2026, including AI voice assistants, investment calculators, typing trainers, music generation tools, resume optimizers, and browser extensions. All projects are web or app-based, emphasizing practicality and user experience, such as intelligent text-to-speech, stock/fund investment analysis, AI-powered songwriting, and productivity tools, showcasing active innovation in AI applications and niche utility apps.

metadata.name: firecrawl
metadata.description: 🔥 The Web Data API for AI - Turn entire websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data

summary.zh: Firecrawl 是一个专为 AI 设计的网页数据 API，可将任意网站转换为 LLM 可直接使用的结构化数据（如 Markdown、JSON、截图等），支持 JavaScript 渲染、动态内容抓取、批量处理和内容变更监控，显著提升 AI 应用的数据获取效率与准确性。
summary.en: Firecrawl is a web data API designed for AI, converting any website into LLM-ready structured data (e.g., Markdown, JSON, screenshots). It supports JavaScript rendering, dynamic content extraction, batch processing, and change tracking, significantly enhancing data acquisition for AI applications.

metadata.name: Awesome-AI-GPTs
metadata.description: Awesome AI GPTs, OpenAI GPTs, GPT-4, ChatGPT, GPTs, Prompts, plugins, Prompts leaking

summary.zh: Awesome AI GPTs 是一个精选的 OpenAI GPTs 资源库，涵盖提示词工程、内容创作、编程辅助、数据分析等场景。项目提供热门 GPTs 推荐、插件安装指南、知识库构建工具及安全防护方案，助力用户高效利用 AI 能力。
summary.en: Awesome AI GPTs is a curated collection of OpenAI GPTs resources, covering prompt engineering, content creation, coding assistance, and data analysis. It offers hot GPTs recommendations, plugin installation guides, knowledge base tools, and security solutions to enhance AI utilization.

metadata.name: wxauto
metadata.description: Windows版本微信客户端（非网页版）自动化，可实现简单的发送、接收微信消息，简单微信机器人

summary.zh: wxauto 是一个基于 Windows 平台、使用 UIAutomation 技术实现的微信客户端自动化工具，支持消息发送与接收，适用于开发简单微信机器人的场景。项目于2025年10月28日停止维护，仅支持微信3.9.x版本及Windows 10/11或Server 2016+系统。
summary.en: wxauto is a Windows-based automation tool for the WeChat desktop client (non-web version) using UIAutomation technology. It enables basic message sending and receiving, suitable for building simple WeChat bots. The project was discontinued on October 28, 2025, supporting WeChat 3.9.x and Windows 10/11 or Server 2016+. It is intended solely for technical learning and not for production or illegal use.

metadata.name: MediaCrawler
metadata.description: 小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫  | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫

summary.zh: MediaCrawler 是一个基于 Playwright 的多平台自媒体数据采集工具，支持小红书、抖音、B站等7大主流平台的公开内容抓取，具备关键词搜索、评论爬取、登录态缓存、IP代理池及词云图生成等功能，无需复杂逆向即可高效采集数据。
summary.en: MediaCrawler is a powerful multi-platform media crawler built with Playwright, supporting data extraction from Xiaohongshu, Douyin, Bilibili, and 7+ platforms. It enables keyword search, comment scraping, login state caching, proxy pools, and comment word cloud generation without requiring complex reverse engineering.

metadata.name: aiwechat-vercel
metadata.description: 使用vercel的functions，将ai功能加入微信公众号

summary.zh: 该项目利用 Vercel Functions 实现零服务器成本部署，将 AI 功能接入微信公众号，支持 GPT、星火、通义千问、Gemini 等多种大模型，具备连续对话、自定义指令、关键词回复、图床等功能，通过 Redis 实现会话记忆，无需备案域名即可运行。
summary.en: This project leverages Vercel Functions to deploy AI-powered WeChat Official Account integration with zero server cost. It supports multiple AI models (GPT, Spark, Qwen, Gemini), continuous conversations via Redis, custom commands, keyword replies, image hosting, and system prompt configuration, all without domain registration or server maintenance.

metadata.name: screenshot-to-code
metadata.description: Drop in a screenshot and convert it to clean code (HTML/Tailwind/React/Vue)

summary.zh: screenshot-to-code 是一款 AI 驱动的工具，支持将截图、设计稿或 Figma 设计直接转换为高质量的前端代码（HTML/Tailwind/React/Vue），支持 Gemini 3、Claude Opus 4.5 等先进模型，提供实验性视频录制转代码功能，适用于快速原型开发和 UI 自动化生成。
summary.en: screenshot-to-code is an AI-powered tool that converts screenshots, mockups, and Figma designs into clean, functional front-end code (HTML/Tailwind/React/Vue). It supports advanced models like Gemini 3 and Claude Opus 4.5, with experimental video-to-code capabilities for rapid prototyping and UI automation.

metadata.name: kirara-ai
metadata.description: 🤖 可 DIY 的 多模态 AI 聊天机器人 | 🚀 快速接入 微信、 QQ、Telegram、等聊天平台 | 🦈支持DeepSeek、Grok、Claude、Ollama、Gemini、OpenAI | 工作流系统、网页搜索、AI画图、人设调教、虚拟女仆、语音对话 |

summary.zh: Kirara AI 是一款可自定义的多模态 AI 聊天机器人，支持快速接入微信、QQ、Telegram 等主流聊天平台，兼容 DeepSeek、Grok、Claude、Ollama、Gemini、OpenAI 等主流大模型。具备工作流系统、网页搜索、AI 绘图、人设调教、虚拟女仆、语音对话等功能，提供 WebUI 和 Docker 部署方案。
summary.en: Kirara AI is a customizable multimodal AI chatbot that supports rapid integration with WeChat, QQ, Telegram, and other major messaging platforms. It integrates with leading LLMs including DeepSeek, Grok, Claude, Ollama, Gemini, and OpenAI. Features include workflow systems, web search, AI image generation, persona tuning, virtual maid mode, voice interaction, and offers both WebUI and Docker deployment options.

metadata.name: sigma-file-manager
metadata.description: "Sigma File Manager" is a free, open-source, quickly evolving, modern file manager (explorer / browser) app for Windows and Linux.

summary.zh: Sigma File Manager 是一款免费开源的现代文件管理器，专为 Windows 和 Linux 设计，支持快速文件浏览与操作。项目已进入 v2 稳定测试阶段，提供直观界面与高效功能，适用于日常文件管理需求。
summary.en: Sigma File Manager is a free, open-source, modern file manager for Windows and Linux, offering fast file browsing and operations. Now in v2 beta, it features an intuitive interface and efficient tools for streamlined file management.

metadata.name: XHS-Downloader
metadata.description: 小红书（XiaoHongShu、RedNote）链接提取/作品采集工具：提取账号发布、收藏、点赞、专辑作品链接；提取搜索结果作品、用户链接；采集小红书作品信息；提取小红书作品下载地址；下载小红书作品文件

summary.zh: XHS-Downloader 是一款功能强大的小红书（XiaoHongShu/RedNote）作品采集与下载工具，支持提取账号作品、收藏、点赞链接，采集作品信息及下载地址，批量下载图文、视频、LivePhoto 文件，具备断点续传、文件完整性校验、自定义命名格式、剪贴板监听、MCP 调用等高级功能，适用于内容创作者与数据收集场景。
summary.en: XHS-Downloader is a powerful tool for extracting and downloading content from Xiaohongshu (XHS/RedNote). It supports fetching posts, likes, collections, and albums, downloading media files (images, videos, LivePhotos), with features like resume downloads, file integrity checks, custom naming, clipboard monitoring, and MCP integration, ideal for content creators and data collectors.

metadata.name: Awesome-Love-Code
metadata.description: 表白代码收藏馆~谁说程序猿不懂浪漫❤️

summary.zh: Awesome Love Code 是一个创意表白代码集合项目，汇集多种网页表白特效，涵盖动画、交互、音乐等元素，为开发者提供浪漫表白的技术实现方案，展现程序员表达爱意的独特方式。
summary.en: Awesome Love Code is a curated collection of romantic coding projects featuring web-based confession effects with animations, interactions, and music. It showcases how programmers express love through creative technical implementations.

metadata.name: GPTs
metadata.description: leaked prompts of GPTs

summary.zh: 该仓库收集了多个泄露的 GPTs 提示词（prompts），涵盖开发、翻译、娱乐、教育、图像生成、视频脚本、游戏等多个领域，展示了 OpenAI GPTs 功能的广泛应用场景与技术实现方式。
summary.en: This repository compiles leaked prompts from various GPTs, covering development, translation, entertainment, education, image generation, video scripting, gaming, and more, showcasing diverse use cases and technical implementations of OpenAI's GPTs platform.

metadata.name: TikTokDownloader
metadata.description: TikTok 发布/喜欢/合辑/直播/视频/图集/音乐；抖音发布/喜欢/收藏/收藏夹/视频/图集/实况/直播/音乐/合集/评论/账号/搜索/热榜数据采集工具/下载工具

summary.zh: DouK-Downloader 是一款基于 Python 和 HTTPX 的免费开源数据采集工具，支持批量下载抖音/TikTok 视频、图集、直播、合集及评论数据。具备 Web UI、API 接口、多线程下载、代理支持、增量采集、文件断点续传等功能，可部署至私有或公开服务器，适用于内容创作者、数据分析师等场景。
summary.en: DouK-Downloader is a free open-source data collection tool built with Python and HTTPX, enabling batch downloads of videos, albums, live streams, collections, and comments from Douyin/TikTok. It features Web UI, API interface, multi-threaded downloads, proxy support, incremental scraping, and resume capability, deployable on private or public servers for content creators and data analysts.

metadata.name: aimoneyhunter
metadata.description: ai副业赚钱大集合，教你如何利用ai做一些副业项目，赚取更多额外收益。The Ultimate Guide to Making Money with AI Side Hustles: Learn how to leverage AI for some cool side gigs and rake in some extra cash. Check out the English version for more insights.

summary.zh: 该仓库为AI副业赚钱指南，系统整理利用AI技术开展副业的多种方法，涵盖内容创作、图片生成、音频处理、直播等方向。通过技术变现思路分享与实操案例，帮助用户在AI时代构建可持续的流量与收益模式，强调做垂类内容、卖工具（铲子）而非直接挖金子的策略。
summary.en: This repository serves as a comprehensive guide to making money with AI side hustles, curating proven methods across content creation, image generation, audio processing, and live streaming. It emphasizes strategic positioning—focusing on niche content and selling tools (shovels) rather than competing in saturated markets—to help users build scalable AI-driven income streams in the current era.

metadata.name: lanproxy
metadata.description: lanproxy是一个将局域网个人电脑、服务器代理到公网的内网穿透工具，支持tcp流量转发，可支持任何tcp上层协议（访问内网网站、本地支付接口调试、ssh访问、远程桌面、http代理、https代理、socks5代理...）。技术交流QQ群 736294209

summary.zh: lanproxy 是一款高性能内网穿透工具，支持 TCP 流量转发，可代理访问内网网站、SSH、远程桌面等任何 TCP 上层协议。提供 Java 客户端和跨平台 Go 客户端，支持 SSL 加密、多用户管理、自定义域名绑定及 HTTPS 证书自动申请，解决公网访问内网服务的安全与便捷问题。
summary.en: Lanproxy is a high-performance intranet penetration tool that supports TCP traffic forwarding for any TCP-based protocol (e.g., web access, SSH, remote desktop). It offers Java and cross-platform Go clients, with SSL encryption, multi-user support, custom domain binding, and automatic HTTPS certificate issuance, enabling secure and easy public access to private networks.

summary.zh: WeChatMsg 是一个微信聊天记录导出与分析工具，支持将聊天记录导出为多种格式（如 Excel、HTML），并提供可视化分析功能。项目强调个人数据主权，倡导用户自主管理生活痕迹，未来计划结合 AI 技术构建个人记忆数据中心，实现智能相册与年度报告生成。
summary.en: WeChatMsg is a WeChat chat export and analysis tool that supports exporting chats to formats like Excel and HTML with visualization features. It emphasizes personal data ownership, enabling users to manage their digital footprints. The project aims to integrate AI for building personal memory data centers, including smart photo albums and annual report generation.

metadata.name: robotframework
metadata.description: Generic automation framework for acceptance testing and RPA

summary.zh: Robot Framework 是一个开源的通用自动化框架，专用于验收测试、验收测试驱动开发（ATDD）和机器人流程自动化（RPA）。它采用简洁的纯文本语法，易于扩展，支持跨平台运行，并通过丰富的生态系统和 Python 集成提供强大的测试能力。
summary.en: Robot Framework is an open-source generic automation framework for acceptance testing, acceptance test-driven development (ATDD), and robotic process automation (RPA). It features simple plain-text syntax, easy extensibility via Python-based libraries, and cross-platform support, backed by a rich ecosystem of tools and resources.

metadata.name: RPA-Python
metadata.description: Python package for doing RPA

summary.zh: RPA for Python 是一个强大的自动化工具包，提供简洁的 API 实现网页、桌面应用及 OCR 流程的自动化，支持跨平台运行，适用于重复性任务的高效处理，显著提升工作效率。
summary.en: RPA for Python is a powerful automation toolkit offering a simple API to automate web, desktop, and OCR workflows across platforms, enabling efficient handling of repetitive tasks with minimal code.

metadata.name: EasySpider
metadata.description: A visual no-code/code-free web crawler/spider易采集：一个可视化浏览器自动化测试/数据采集/爬虫软件，可以无代码图形化的设计和执行爬虫任务。别名：ServiceWrapper面向Web应用的智能化服务封装系统。

summary.zh: 易采集/EasySpider 是一款完全免费的视觉无代码浏览器自动化工具，支持图形化设计爬虫任务，无需编程即可实现网页数据采集与自动化测试。通过可视化操作选择网页元素，自动识别同类内容并批量采集，同时支持命令行模式嵌入其他系统，适用于电商、数据抓取等场景。
summary.en: EasySpider is a completely free visual no-code web crawler and browser automation tool that enables users to design and execute data collection tasks through a graphical interface without programming. It automatically detects similar elements on web pages, supports batch data extraction, and can also run via command line for integration into other systems, ideal for e-commerce scraping and automation testing.

metadata.name: LxgwWenKai
metadata.description: An unprofessional open-source Chinese font derived from Fontworks' Klee One. 一款非专业的开源中文字体，基于 FONTWORKS 出品字体 Klee One 衍生。

summary.zh: 霞鹜文楷是一款基于 FONTWORKS Klee One 衍生的开源中文字体，采用 OFL 1.1 协议授权，支持免费商用。提供多个变体版本，包括屏幕阅读版、轻便版、GB 规范版及繁体旧字形版，适配不同场景需求。
summary.en: LXGW WenKai is an open-source Chinese font derived from Fontworks' Klee One, licensed under OFL 1.1 for free commercial use. It offers multiple variants including screen-optimized, lite, GB-compliant, and traditional character editions for diverse applications.

metadata.name: Awesome-Marp
metadata.description: 🤙 Easy replacement for LaTeX Beamer! 🥂 custom Marp templates with a selection of over a dozen themes

summary.zh: Awesome Marp 是一个基于 Markdown 的演示文稿工具，提供 38 种自定义 CSS 样式和 6 种主题，支持分栏布局、导航进度、封面页、目录页及定理框等，可替代 LaTeX Beamer。配套 VS Code 和 Obsidian，支持字体自定义，适合高效制作美观幻灯片。
summary.en: Awesome Marp is a Markdown-based presentation tool offering 38 custom CSS styles and 6 themes, supporting multi-column layouts, navigation progress bars, cover pages, table of contents, and callout boxes. It replaces LaTeX Beamer with enhanced styling, integrates with VS Code and Obsidian, and allows font customization for professional slides.

metadata.name: public-apis
metadata.description: A collective list of free APIs

summary.zh: public-apis 是一个由社区维护的免费 API 集合库，涵盖地理定位、金融、天气、通信等多个领域，提供即用型 RESTful API 接口，支持 Postman 一键调用，助力开发者快速集成第三方数据服务。
summary.en: The public-apis repository is a community-curated collection of free, ready-to-use REST APIs across diverse domains like geolocation, finance, weather, and communication, enabling developers to quickly integrate third-party data services via Postman.

metadata.name: How-To-Ask-Questions-The-Smart-Way
metadata.description: 本文原文由知名 Hacker Eric S. Raymond 所撰寫，教你如何正確的提出技術問題並獲得你滿意的答案。

summary.zh: 本指南由知名黑客 Eric S. Raymond 撰写，系统阐述高效提问的技术沟通原则，涵盖问题筛选、论坛选择、标题撰写、代码呈现等关键技巧，帮助开发者获得精准解答，提升开源社区协作效率。
summary.en: Authored by renowned hacker Eric S. Raymond, this guide systematically outlines principles for effective technical communication, covering question selection, forum choice, title writing, and code presentation to help developers obtain accurate answers and improve open-source community collaboration.

metadata.name: 1Remote
metadata.description: One Remote Access Manager to Rule Them All

summary.zh: 1Remote 是一款现代化的个人远程会话管理与启动工具，支持 RDP、SSH、VNC、Telnet、(S)FTP 等多种协议，提供多屏幕 HiDPI 连接、标签化界面、自定义运行器及 mRemoteNG 导入功能，支持便携运行与多语言主题定制。
summary.en: 1Remote is a modern personal remote session manager and launcher supporting RDP, SSH, VNC, Telnet, (S)FTP, RemoteApp, NoMachine and more. It offers multi-screen HiDPI RDP support, customizable runners, mRemoteNG import, portable deployment, and a tabbed, multi-language interface.

metadata.name: chatgpt-wework-robot
metadata.description: 零代码、一键部署chatgpt到企业微信，无须VPN，速度快

summary.zh: 本项目实现零代码一键部署ChatGPT至企业微信，无需翻墙，支持手机端与电脑端使用。基于OpenAI API构建，提供智能问答、客服自动化等能力，适用于企业内部沟通、客户服务及营销场景，大幅降低沟通成本并提升效率。
summary.en: This project enables zero-code, one-click deployment of ChatGPT into WeCom (WeChat Enterprise), with no need for VPN. It integrates OpenAI's ChatGPT API to deliver intelligent Q&A and automated customer service, enhancing internal communication and business efficiency across mobile and desktop platforms.

metadata.name: chatgpt-dingtalk-robot
metadata.description: 零代码、一键部署chatgpt到钉钉，无须VPN

summary.zh: 本项目提供零代码、一键部署ChatGPT到钉钉的完整解决方案，无需翻墙即可在钉钉中直接使用ChatGPT智能问答功能。支持个人与企业级场景，集成钉钉机器人实现一对一或群聊交互，适用于客服、办公助手等场景，大幅降低AI接入门槛。
summary.en: This project enables zero-code, one-click deployment of ChatGPT into DingTalk without requiring a VPN. It integrates ChatGPT with DingTalk via robot functionality, supporting both individual and group interactions. Ideal for enterprise customer service and office automation, it significantly lowers the barrier to AI adoption.

metadata.name: LangGPT
metadata.description: LangGPT: Empowering everyone to become a prompt expert! 🚀  📌 结构化提示词（Structured Prompt）提出者 📌 元提示词（Meta-Prompt）发起者   📌 最流行的提示词落地范式 | Language of GPT  The pioneering framework for structured & meta-prompt design 10,000+ ⭐ | Battle-tested by thousands of users worldwide  Created by 云中江树

summary.zh: LangGPT 是一个革命性的结构化提示词设计框架，将提示词工程转化为可复用、模块化的‘提示词编程语言’。通过角色定义、目标规范、技能拆解和流程控制，帮助用户快速创建高质量 AI 提示词，已在全球超万名用户中验证有效，相关论文发表于 arXiv。
summary.en: LangGPT is a pioneering framework that treats prompt design as a structured, reusable programming language. It enables anyone to create high-quality prompts through role-based templates, modular skills, and systematic workflows, backed by academic research and battle-tested by 10,000+ users worldwide.

metadata.name: autocut
metadata.description: 用文本编辑器剪视频

summary.zh: AutoCut 是一款基于 Whisper 字幕识别的视频剪辑工具，用户通过编辑 Markdown 文件选择保留片段，即可自动裁切视频。支持多种 Whisper 模型（含 large-v3-turbo 加速版）、faster-whisper 及 OpenAI API，兼容本地与 Docker 部署，无需专业视频软件即可完成精准剪辑。
summary.en: AutoCut is a video editing tool that uses Whisper-based automatic subtitle generation. Users select clips by editing Markdown files, enabling precise video cutting without professional software. It supports multiple Whisper models (including large-v3-turbo for speed), faster-whisper, and OpenAI API, with local and Docker deployment options.

metadata.name: roop
metadata.description: one-click face swap

summary.zh: Roop 是一款一键式人脸替换工具，支持将视频中的面部替换为任意单张图片中的面孔，无需训练或数据集。基于深度学习技术，提供 CPU/GPU 加速，适用于视频角色动画、影视特效等创作场景，同时内置伦理限制以防范滥用。
summary.en: Roop is a one-click face swap tool that replaces faces in videos using a single image, without requiring training or datasets. Powered by deep learning with CPU/GPU acceleration, it supports creative applications like character animation and film effects, while incorporating safeguards against misuse.

metadata.name: GPT-Prompts
metadata.description: Useful GPT Prompts

summary.zh: 该仓库收集并整理了实用的 GPT 提示词，涵盖 Midjourney 等 AI 工具的生成模板，旨在提升用户与 AI 交互的效率和创意表达，适用于内容创作、设计辅助等场景。
summary.en: This repository curates useful GPT prompts, starting with a Midjourney Prompt Generator, designed to enhance AI interaction efficiency and creative output for content creation and design assistance.

metadata.name: readme-ai
metadata.description: README file generator, powered by AI.

summary.zh: ReadmeAI 是一款基于 AI 的 README 文件自动生成工具，支持通过代码仓库 URL 或本地路径一键生成结构化、详细的文档。支持 OpenAI、Ollama、Anthropic、Gemini 等多种 LLM 模型，具备智能文件过滤、离线模式运行、高度可定制化模板与样式等功能，旨在提升开发者文档编写效率。
summary.en: ReadmeAI is an AI-powered tool that automatically generates high-quality README files from code repositories. It supports multiple LLM backends (OpenAI, Ollama, Anthropic, Gemini), offers customizable templates, intelligent file filtering via .readmeaiignore, and works offline. Designed to boost developer productivity and ensure consistent documentation across projects.

metadata.name: awesome-chatgpt-api
metadata.description: Curated list of apps and tools that not only use the new ChatGPT API, but also allow users to configure their own API keys, enabling free and on-demand usage of their own quota.

summary.zh: Awesome ChatGPT API 是一个精心策划的资源列表，汇集了支持用户自定义 API 密钥的应用和工具，实现免费按需调用自有配额。涵盖浏览器插件、Web/桌面应用、CLI 工具及开发资源，适用于多场景 AI 集成，如翻译、搜索摘要、代码辅助等，助力开发者构建高效 ChatGPT 生态。
summary.en: Awesome ChatGPT API is a curated collection of apps and tools that support custom API key configuration, enabling free on-demand usage of personal quotas. It includes browser extensions, web/desktop apps, CLI tools, and development resources, supporting diverse AI integrations like translation, search summarization, and code assistance for building a robust ChatGPT ecosystem.

metadata.name: apicat
metadata.description: An efficient API documentation management tool that fully adheres to the OpenAPI specification and incorporates advanced LLM technology. This tool can automate the generation of API documentation, data models, and test cases, greatly enhancing development efficiency and documentation quality.

summary.zh: ApiCat 是一款高效 API 文档管理工具，完全遵循 OpenAPI 规范，集成先进 LLM 技术，可自动化生成 API 文档、数据模型和测试用例，显著提升开发效率与文档质量，支持本地部署与云端服务。
summary.en: ApiCat is an efficient API documentation management tool fully compliant with the OpenAPI specification. It leverages advanced LLM technology to automate API documentation, data model, and test case generation, significantly enhancing development efficiency and documentation quality. Supports local deployment and cloud services.

metadata.name: postcat
metadata.description: Postcat 是一个可扩展的 API 工具平台。集合基础的 API 管理和测试功能，并且可以通过插件简化你的 API 开发工作，让你可以更快更好地创建 API。An extensible API tool.

summary.zh: Postcat 是一个开源、跨平台的 API 开发测试工具，支持 REST 和 WebSocket 协议，具备 API 管理、测试、Mock 及团队协作功能。通过插件系统实现功能扩展，提供多语言界面与自定义主题，适用于中小团队快速构建和验证 API。
summary.en: Postcat is an open-source, cross-platform API development and testing tool supporting REST and WebSocket protocols. It offers API management, testing, Mock, team collaboration, and extensibility via plugins. With customizable themes and multi-language support, it enables efficient API creation and validation for small to medium teams.

metadata.name: Chinese-LangChain
metadata.description: 中文langchain项目|小必应，Q.Talk，强聊，QiangTalk

summary.zh: Chinese-LangChain 是基于 ChatGLM-6B 和 LangChain 的中文本地化智能问答系统，支持知识库检索与生成、多文档解析（PDF/DOCX/PPT）、互联网搜索及增量更新，提供 Gradio 交互界面，适用于垂直领域知识问答场景。
summary.en: Chinese-LangChain is a localized Chinese LLM application built on ChatGLM-6B and LangChain, enabling knowledge retrieval, multi-format document parsing, web search, and incremental updates via a Gradio interface for domain-specific Q&A.

metadata.name: DB-GPT
metadata.description: AI Native Data App Development framework with AWEL(Agentic Workflow Expression Language) and Agents

summary.zh: DB-GPT 是一个开源的 AI 原生数据应用开发框架，集成 AWEL（智能体工作流表达式语言）和多智能体协作机制，支持多模型管理与 Text2SQL 优化，提供 RAG 增强生成能力，旨在降低企业级数据应用开发门槛，实现低代码构建定制化数据产品。
summary.en: DB-GPT is an open-source AI-native data application development framework featuring AWEL (Agentic Workflow Expression Language) and multi-agent collaboration. It supports multi-model management, Text2SQL optimization, and RAG-enhanced generation, enabling low-code development of enterprise-grade data applications.

metadata.name: ChatGPT-Prompt-Engineering-for-Developers-in-Chinese
metadata.description: 《面向开发者的 ChatGPT 提示词工程》非官方版中英双语字幕 Unofficial subtitles of "ChatGPT Prompt Engineering for Developers"

summary.zh: 该项目为非官方中英双语字幕，涵盖吴恩达与 OpenAI 开发者合著的《ChatGPT 提示工程》课程，重点讲解面向开发者的 Prompt 编写技巧，包括文本分类、摘要、翻译、聊天机器人构建等 9 个实战章节，配套交互式 Notebook 与 B 站视频，助力开发者掌握高杠杆 AI 技能。
summary.en: This project provides unofficial bilingual Chinese-English subtitles for Andrew Ng and OpenAI's 'ChatGPT Prompt Engineering for Developers' course, covering 9 practical chapters on prompt writing, including text classification, summarization, translation, and chatbot development, with interactive notebooks and Bilibili videos to help developers master this high-leverage AI skill.

metadata.name: understand-prompt
metadata.description: 【🔞🔞🔞 内含不适合未成年人阅读的图片】基于我擅长的编程、绘画、写作展开的 AI 探索和总结：StableDiffusion 是一种强大的图像生成模型，能够通过对一张图片进行演化来生成新的图片。ChatGPT 是一个基于 Transformer 的语言生成模型，它能够自动为输入的主题生成合适的文章。而 Github Copilot 是一个智能编程助手，能够加速日常编程活动。

summary.zh: 该项目深入探索了基于编程、绘画与写作的AI应用，涵盖StableDiffusion图像生成、ChatGPT文本创作及GitHub Copilot代码辅助。通过Prompt工程实践，系统解析了AI模型在图像描述、文章构思与代码生成中的交互逻辑，并提出了'Prompt编程'概念，探讨自然语言驱动软件开发的可能性。
summary.en: This project explores AI applications in programming, painting, and writing through StableDiffusion image generation, ChatGPT text creation, and GitHub Copilot code assistance. It systematically analyzes how AI models interact with human input via prompt engineering for image description, article structuring, and code generation, proposing the concept of 'prompt programming' as a bridge between natural language and software development.

metadata.name: cypress
metadata.description: Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.

summary.zh: Cypress 是一款专为浏览器端应用设计的现代化端到端测试框架，提供快速、易用且可靠的测试体验。它支持实时重载、时间旅行调试和自动等待等特性，显著提升前端测试效率与稳定性，适用于现代 Web 应用的全流程自动化测试。
summary.en: Cypress is a modern end-to-end testing framework designed for browser-based applications, offering fast, easy, and reliable testing. It features real-time reloads, time-travel debugging, and automatic waiting to enhance frontend test efficiency and stability, ideal for full-stack automation across modern web apps.

metadata.name: StableStudio
metadata.description: Community interface for generative AI

summary.zh: StableStudio 是 Stability AI 开源的生成式 AI 社区界面，作为 DreamStudio 的开源版本，提供图像生成与编辑功能。采用插件化架构支持灵活后端集成，用户可通过自定义插件对接任意 AI 服务。项目鼓励社区贡献，支持 TypeScript 扩展，默认使用 Stability API 插件需配置 API 密钥。
summary.en: StableStudio is Stability AI's open-source community interface for generative AI, serving as the open-source variant of DreamStudio. It enables image generation and editing through a web-based UI with a plugin system for flexible backend integration. Users can create custom plugins in TypeScript to connect any AI service, with default Stability API plugin requiring an API key.

metadata.name: feishu-openai
metadata.description: 🎒 飞书  ×（GPT-4 + GPT-4V + DALL·E-3 + Whisper）=  飞一般的工作体验  🚀 语音对话、角色扮演、多话题讨论、图片创作、表格分析、文档导出 🚀

summary.zh: 飞书 × OpenAI 深度集成工具，支持 GPT-4、GPT-4V、DALL·E-3 和 Whisper，提供语音对话、图片生成、表格分析、角色扮演等功能，无缝嵌入飞书生态，支持多场景 AI 工作流，提升企业协作效率。
summary.en: Feishu OpenAI integrates GPT-4, GPT-4V, DALL·E-3, and Whisper into Feishu, enabling voice chat, image generation, table analysis, role-playing, and more. It enhances enterprise collaboration with AI-powered workflows, supporting private deployment, cloud functions, and Docker.

metadata.name: ChatGPT_Project
metadata.description: ChatGPT&AIGC资料汇总，包含前沿资讯、应用案例、技术教程、开源项目和商业变现等

summary.zh: 本项目为ChatGPT与AIGC领域的综合性资料库，涵盖前沿资讯、应用案例、技术教程、开源项目与商业变现路径，提供注册升级指南及深度行业研报，助力开发者与从业者快速掌握AI技术生态与落地场景。
summary.en: This repository aggregates comprehensive resources on ChatGPT and AIGC, including cutting-edge news, application cases, technical tutorials, open-source projects, and monetization strategies. It provides registration/guide tutorials and in-depth industry reports to help developers and professionals quickly master the AI technology ecosystem and real-world applications.

metadata.name: AChat
metadata.description: 🌊 AChat - An open-source/self-hosted/local-first AI platform, designed for enterprises and teams, perfectly combining powerful local processing capabilities with seamless remote synchronization.

summary.zh: AChat 是一个开源、自托管的企业级 AI 协作平台，支持本地化处理与远程同步，提供用户管理、支付集成、内容过滤等全套功能，适用于团队和组织内部 AI 应用部署。
summary.en: AChat is an open-source, self-hosted AI platform designed for enterprises and teams, combining local processing with remote synchronization. It offers user management, payment integration, and content filtering out of the box.

metadata.name: chatgpt-on-wechat
metadata.description: CowAgent是基于大模型的超级AI助理，能主动思考和任务规划、访问操作系统和外部资源、创造和执行Skills、拥有长期记忆并不断成长。同时支持飞书、钉钉、企业微信应用、微信公众号、网页等接入，可选择OpenAI/Claude/Gemini/DeepSeek/ Qwen/GLM/Kimi/LinkAI，能处理文本、语音、图片和文件，可快速搭建个人AI助手和企业数字员工。

summary.zh: CowAgent 是基于大模型的超级AI助理，支持主动任务规划、多模态交互（文本/语音/图片/文件）、长期记忆与技能系统，可接入飞书、钉钉、企业微信、微信公众号等多平台，兼容OpenAI/Claude/Gemini/DeepSeek等主流模型，适用于个人AI助手与企业数字员工场景。
summary.en: CowAgent is a super AI assistant based on large language models, supporting autonomous task planning, multimodal interaction (text/audio/image/files), long-term memory, and a skill system. It integrates with platforms like Feishu, DingTalk, WeCom, and WeChat Official Accounts, compatible with OpenAI/Claude/Gemini/DeepSeek models, ideal for personal AI assistants and enterprise digital employees.

metadata.name: chatbox
metadata.description: Powerful AI Client

summary.zh: Chatbox 是一款跨平台桌面 AI 客户端，支持 ChatGPT、Claude 等主流大模型，提供多端同步、插件扩展、提示工程优化等功能，适用于开发者、研究人员和AI爱好者的高效生产力工具。
summary.en: Chatbox is a powerful cross-platform desktop AI client supporting ChatGPT, Claude, and other LLMs. It offers multi-device sync, plugin support, prompt engineering, and advanced customization for developers and AI enthusiasts.

metadata.name: Huatuo-Llama-Med-Chinese
metadata.description: Repo for BenTsao [original name: HuaTuo (华驼)], Instruction-tuning Large Language Models with Chinese Medical Knowledge. 本草（原名：华驼）模型仓库，基于中文医学知识的大语言模型指令微调

summary.zh: 本草（原名华驼）开源基于中文医学知识指令微调的LLaMA、Alpaca-Chinese、Bloom、活字等模型，采用LoRA方法在医学知识库与文献数据上训练，显著提升医疗问答效果，支持多基模型适配与推理部署。
summary.en: BenTsao (formerly HuaTuo) is an open-source collection of instruction-tuned large language models including LLaMA, Alpaca-Chinese, Bloom, and Huozi, fine-tuned on Chinese medical knowledge using LoRA. It enhances medical Q&A performance across multiple base models with support for inference deployment.

metadata.name: LangChain-ChatGLM-Webui
metadata.description: 基于LangChain和ChatGLM-6B等系列LLM的针对本地知识库的自动问答

summary.zh: 本项目基于LangChain和ChatGLM-6B系列大模型，构建了一个针对本地知识库的自动问答Web应用。支持上传PDF、TXT、DOCX、MD等格式文档，结合多种Embedding模型实现语义检索，提供本地部署和云端体验，适用于私有知识问答、文档理解等场景。
summary.en: This project builds a web-based QA system using LangChain and ChatGLM-6B series LLMs for local knowledge base queries. It supports uploading PDF, TXT, DOCX, MD files and integrates multiple embedding models for semantic retrieval, enabling private, offline document understanding and question answering.

metadata.name: langchain
metadata.description: The agent engineering platform

summary.zh: LangChain 是一个构建可靠 AI 智能体的框架，提供标准化的 LLM、嵌入、向量存储等组件接口，支持实时数据增强、模型互操作性和快速原型开发，助力开发者高效构建生产级 LLM 应用。
summary.en: LangChain is a framework for building reliable AI agents and LLM-powered applications. It offers standardized interfaces for models, embeddings, and vector stores, enabling real-time data augmentation, model interoperability, and rapid prototyping for production-ready AI solutions.

metadata.name: Langchain-Chatchat
metadata.description: Langchain-Chatchat（原Langchain-ChatGLM）基于 Langchain 与 ChatGLM, Qwen 与 Llama 等语言模型的 RAG 与 Agent 应用 | Langchain-Chatchat (formerly langchain-ChatGLM), local knowledge based LLM (like ChatGLM, Qwen and Llama) RAG and Agent app with langchain

summary.zh: Langchain-Chatchat 是基于 Langchain 框架的开源本地知识库问答系统，支持 ChatGLM、Qwen、Llama 等主流开源大模型，提供 RAG（检索增强生成）与 Agent 应用能力。项目支持离线部署，兼容多种向量数据库与 Embedding 模型，具备 FastAPI 接口与 Streamlit WebUI，适用于私有化部署的文档问答与智能助手场景。
summary.en: Langchain-Chatchat is an open-source local knowledge base QA system built on the Langchain framework, supporting mainstream open-source LLMs like ChatGLM, Qwen, and Llama. It provides RAG and Agent capabilities with offline deployment, compatibility for various vector databases and embedding models, and offers both FastAPI endpoints and a Streamlit WebUI for document-based Q&A and intelligent assistant applications.

metadata.name: LangChain-Chinese-Getting-Started-Guide
metadata.description: LangChain 的中文入门教程

summary.zh: LangChain 中文入门教程系统讲解大模型应用开发框架，涵盖文档加载、文本分割、向量存储、Chain 链与 Agent 代理等核心概念，提供 OpenAI API 集成、PDF/YouTube 数据处理等实战案例，配套 GitBook 与 Colab 代码，适合 AI 开发者快速上手构建智能应用。
summary.en: This comprehensive LangChain Chinese tutorial covers core concepts like document loading, text splitting, vectorstores, chains, and agents for building LLM-powered applications. It includes practical examples with OpenAI integration, PDF/YouTube data processing, and provides GitBook and Colab code resources for developers to quickly build AI applications.

metadata.name: surfboard
metadata.description: https://getsurfboard.com

summary.zh: Surfboard 是一个专为 AI 智能体设计的自动化工具平台，支持网页爬虫、数据抓取与任务自动化。它提供直观的界面和强大的调度能力，帮助用户快速构建和部署 AI 驱动的自动化工作流，适用于内容聚合、数据收集等场景。
summary.en: Surfboard is an automation platform designed for AI agents, enabling web scraping, data extraction, and task automation. It offers an intuitive interface and robust scheduling to help users build and deploy AI-driven workflows efficiently, ideal for content aggregation and data collection.

metadata.name: llm-cookbook
metadata.description: 面向开发者的 LLM 入门教程，吴恩达大模型系列课程中文版

summary.zh: 本项目是面向开发者的 LLM 入门教程，基于吴恩达大模型系列课程打造，覆盖 Prompt Engineering、RAG、模型微调等全流程。内容涵盖从基础 API 调用到 LangChain 应用开发，提供中文复现代码与 Prompt 优化方案，支持 Jupyter Notebook 实践，助力开发者快速掌握 LLM 应用开发技能。
summary.en: This project is a developer-focused LLM入门教程 based on Andrew Ng's large language model courses, covering Prompt Engineering, RAG, and fine-tuning. It includes translated, reproduced code examples and optimized Chinese prompts, enabling hands-on learning via Jupyter Notebooks to help developers master LLM application development.

metadata.name: NextChat
metadata.description: ✨ Light and Fast AI Assistant. Support: Web | iOS | MacOS | Android |  Linux | Windows

summary.zh: NextChat 是一款轻量级、高性能的 AI 助手应用，支持 Web、iOS、macOS、Android、Linux 和 Windows 全平台。它集成了 Claude、DeepSeek、GPT-4 和 Gemini Pro 等多种 AI 模型，提供现代化的用户界面和强大的功能，包括 MCP 支持、企业级私有化部署、知识库集成和权限管理，适用于个人用户和企业客户。
summary.en: NextChat is a lightweight and fast AI assistant supporting Web, iOS, macOS, Android, Linux, and Windows. It integrates multiple AI models including Claude, DeepSeek, GPT-4, and Gemini Pro. Featuring modern UI, MCP support, enterprise-grade private deployment, knowledge base integration, and admin panel with permission controls.

metadata.name: ComfyUI
metadata.description: The most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface.

summary.zh: ComfyUI 是一款功能强大的模块化扩散模型 GUI 工具，采用节点/流程图界面设计，支持复杂 Stable Diffusion 工作流的图形化编排。它提供无代码可视化操作，兼容 SD1.x/SD2.x/SDXL/SD3/Flux 等多种模型，支持 NVIDIA/AMD/Intel/Apple Silicon 等全平台 GPU，适用于图像生成、视频处理、AI 艺术创作等场景。
summary.en: ComfyUI is a powerful modular GUI for diffusion models featuring a node-based graph interface for building complex Stable Diffusion pipelines without coding. It supports multiple models including SD1.x, SDXL, SD3, Flux, and PixArt, runs on Windows, Linux, and macOS with full GPU support across NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, and Apple Silicon platforms.

summary.zh: TaskMatrix 通过连接 ChatGPT 与一系列视觉基础模型，实现聊天中发送和接收图像。其核心创新在于引入模板机制，将人类经验转化为多模型协作的预定义执行流，支持图像编辑、目标检测、语义分割等复杂视觉任务，无需额外训练即可实现跨模型协同。
summary.en: TaskMatrix connects ChatGPT with visual foundation models to enable image sending/receiving during chat. It introduces a template mechanism—pre-defined execution flows that leverage human expertise to orchestrate complex multi-model tasks like image editing, object detection, and segmentation, enabling seamless collaboration without additional training.

metadata.name: llama_index
metadata.description: LlamaIndex is the leading document agent and OCR platform

summary.zh: LlamaIndex 是一个领先的文档智能代理与 OCR 平台，专为构建基于大模型的文档应用而设计。它提供数据连接、索引、查询与可视化能力，支持多模态输入与复杂推理，广泛应用于知识库问答、文档分析与智能检索等场景。
summary.en: LlamaIndex is a leading document agent and OCR platform designed for building LLM-powered document applications. It enables data ingestion, indexing, querying, and visualization, supporting multimodal inputs and complex reasoning for use cases like knowledge base QA, document analysis, and intelligent retrieval.

metadata.name: chatgpt-dingtalk
metadata.description: 🎒 钉钉 & 🤖 GPT-3.5 让你的工作效率直接起飞 🚀 私聊群聊方式、单聊串聊模式、角色扮演、图片创作 🚀

summary.zh: 基于Go语言开发的钉钉ChatGPT机器人，集成GPT-3.5/4/4o-mini模型，支持私聊、群聊、角色扮演、图片生成等功能，提供Docker部署和Azure-OpenAI支持，显著提升办公沟通效率。
summary.en: A Go-based ChatGPT bot integrated with DingTalk, supporting GPT-3.5/4/4o-mini models, featuring private/group chat, role-playing, image generation, and Azure-OpenAI compatibility via Docker deployment for enhanced workplace productivity.

metadata.name: awesome-chatgpt-prompts-zh
metadata.description: ChatGPT 中文调教指南。各种场景使用指南。学习怎么让它听你的话。

summary.zh: 本项目提供全面的 ChatGPT 中文调教指南，涵盖学术论文、创意写作、商业文案、翻译、数据分析等 20+ 应用场景，帮助用户掌握提示词技巧，让 AI 高效完成各类任务，提升工作效率与内容质量。
summary.en: This repository offers a comprehensive guide to prompting ChatGPT in Chinese, covering over 20 use cases including academic writing, creative content, business communication, translation, and data analysis. It empowers users to master prompt engineering and leverage AI for enhanced productivity and content quality.

metadata.name: HelloGitHub
metadata.description: :octocat: 分享 GitHub 上有趣、入门级的开源项目。Share interesting, entry-level open source projects on GitHub.

summary.zh: HelloGitHub 是一个专注于分享 GitHub 上有趣、入门级开源项目的月刊，每月28日定期发布，涵盖有趣项目、开源书籍、实战及企业级项目。旨在通过精选优质开源内容，帮助用户快速发现开源魅力，激发学习兴趣，降低入门门槛，从而爱上开源生态。
summary.en: HelloGitHub is a monthly publication that curates and shares interesting, beginner-friendly open-source projects from GitHub. Released on the 28th of each month, it features engaging projects, open-source books, practical tutorials, and enterprise-level codebases to help newcomers discover the joy of open source and build real-world skills quickly.

metadata.name: wechaty
metadata.description: Conversational RPA SDK for Chatbot Makers. Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/7q8NBZbQzt

summary.zh: Wechaty 是一个对话式 RPA SDK，专为聊天机器人开发者设计，提供跨 WhatsApp、微信等主流消息平台的统一接口，支持 TypeScript、Python、Go 等多语言开发，实现一次编写多平台运行，显著降低聊天机器人开发复杂度。
summary.en: Wechaty is a conversational RPA SDK that simplifies chatbot development by offering a universal interface across messaging platforms like WhatsApp and WeChat. It supports multiple languages including TypeScript and Python, enabling developers to write once and deploy anywhere, streamlining bot creation with open-source ease and community support.

metadata.name: Open-Assistant
metadata.description: OpenAssistant is a chat-based assistant that understands tasks, can interact with third-party systems, and retrieve information dynamically to do so.

summary.zh: Open Assistant 是一个开源的聊天式AI助手项目，旨在提供可交互、可集成第三方系统的语言模型服务。项目已完成，核心贡献是构建并发布了 oasst2 高质量对话数据集，推动开放语言模型发展。
summary.en: Open Assistant was an open-source chat-based AI assistant project designed to provide accessible, interactive large language model capabilities with third-party system integration. The project is now completed, with its final oasst2 dataset published on HuggingFace, marking a significant contribution to open-source language model training data.

metadata.name: howto-make-more-money
metadata.description: 程序员如何优雅的挣零花钱，2.0版，升级为小书了。Most of this not work outside China , so no English translate

summary.zh: 《程序员如何优雅的挣零花钱？》是一本专为程序员设计的副业指南，聚焦中国市场的变现策略，涵盖知识付费、网课制作、内容创作等路径，结合《一人企业方法论2.0》与《全栈路线图》资源，提供实战思维导图与电子书下载，助力技术人实现可持续的被动收入。
summary.en: This repo offers a practical guide for programmers to earn side income in China, covering monetization strategies like online courses, content creation, and knowledge products. It integrates resources from 'One-Person Business Methodology 2.0' and 'Full-Stack Roadmap', providing downloadable mind maps and eBooks to help tech professionals build passive income streams.

metadata.name: teamide
metadata.description: Team IDE 集成MySql、Oracle、金仓、达梦、神通等数据库、SSH、FTP、Redis、Zookeeper、Kafka、Elasticsearch、Mongodb、小工具等管理工具

summary.zh: Team IDE 是一款集成多种数据库（MySQL、Oracle、金仓等）、中间件（Redis、Kafka、Elasticsearch等）及开发工具的跨平台IDE。支持SSH终端、数据库可视化操作、SQL执行、Thrift服务测试、JSON/YAML转换等，提供终端透传、SSH隧道、节点管理等高级功能，支持单机和服务器部署。
summary.en: Team IDE is a cross-platform integrated development environment featuring support for multiple databases (MySQL, Oracle, Kingbase, etc.), middleware (Redis, Kafka, Elasticsearch), and development tools. It offers SSH terminal, database visualization, SQL execution, Thrift service testing, and JSON/YAML conversion, with advanced features like terminal passthrough, SSH tunneling, and node management. Supports both standalone and server deployment modes.

metadata.name: austin
metadata.description: 消息推送平台🔥 推送下发【邮件】【短信】【微信服务号】【微信小程序】【企业微信】【钉钉】等消息类型。

summary.zh: Austin 是一个企业级统一消息推送平台，支持邮件、短信、微信、钉钉、企业微信等10+渠道的消息下发，具备全链路追踪、资源隔离、定时任务等能力，采用 SpringBoot + Kafka + Redis + Xxl-Job 等技术栈，适用于业务通知、营销触达等场景。
summary.en: Austin is an enterprise-grade unified messaging push platform supporting 10+ channels including email, SMS, WeChat, DingTalk, and enterprise WeChat. It features full-lifecycle tracking, channel isolation, and scheduled delivery via cron. Built with SpringBoot, Kafka, Redis, and Xxl-Job, it serves business notifications and marketing campaigns.

metadata.name: cat
metadata.description: CAT 作为服务端项目基础组件，提供了 Java, C/C++, Node.js, Python, Go 等多语言客户端，已经在美团点评的基础架构中间件框架（MVC框架，RPC框架，数据库框架，缓存框架等，消息队列，配置系统等）深度集成，为美团点评各业务线提供系统丰富的性能指标、健康状况、实时告警等。

summary.zh: CAT 是美团点评开源的实时应用监控平台，支持 Java、C/C++、Node.js、Python、Go 等多语言客户端，提供 Transaction、Event、Heartbeat、Metric 四种监控模型。其核心优势在于秒级实时数据处理、全量数据采集、高可用部署及高吞吐扩展能力，广泛应用于服务端性能监控、故障定位与业务优化。
summary.en: CAT is a real-time application monitoring platform developed by Meituan-Dianping, offering multi-language clients (Java, C/C++, Node.js, Python, Go) and supporting four monitoring models: Transaction, Event, Heartbeat, and Metric. It excels in sub-minute real-time processing, full-data collection, high availability, and scalable distributed deployment, enabling comprehensive performance tracking, fault detection, and system optimization across enterprise infrastructure.

metadata.name: GitHub-Chinese-Top-Charts
metadata.description: :cn: GitHub中文排行榜，各语言分设「软件 | 资料」榜单，精准定位中文好项目。各取所需，高效学习。

summary.zh: GitHub中文排行榜是一个按编程语言分类的中文开源项目榜单，涵盖软件与资料两类，提供总榜、增速榜和新秀榜，帮助开发者高效发现优质中文开源项目，降低语言障碍，提升学习效率。
summary.en: GitHub Chinese Top Charts is a categorized ranking system of high-quality Chinese open-source projects by programming language, featuring software and knowledge categories, with overall, growth, and new repo rankings to help developers discover and learn from top Chinese projects efficiently.

metadata.name: Java-Summarize
metadata.description: :books:Java核心知识点整理（包括Java基础、JVM、数据库、计算机网络、算法、操作系统、设计模式、系统设计、框架原理）

summary.zh: 本仓库系统整理 Java 核心技术知识体系，涵盖 Java 基础、JVM、并发编程、容器类、数据库（MySQL、Redis）、计算机网络、算法（数据结构、LeetCode、海量数据处理）、操作系统（Linux）、设计模式及主流框架原理（Spring、MyBatis、Dubbo、Netty、Kafka、Zookeeper、Nginx、Tomcat）。内容结构清晰，适合 Java 开发者系统学习与面试准备。
summary.en: This repository systematically organizes core Java knowledge, covering Java fundamentals, JVM, concurrency, collections, databases (MySQL, Redis), computer networks, algorithms (data structures, LeetCode, big data), operating systems (Linux), design patterns, and framework principles (Spring, MyBatis, Dubbo, Netty, Kafka, Zookeeper, Nginx, Tomcat). It provides structured learning materials ideal for Java developers and interview preparation.

metadata.name: CS-Notes
metadata.description: :books: 技术面试必备基础知识、Leetcode、计算机操作系统、计算机网络、系统设计

summary.zh: CS-Notes 是面向技术面试的综合性学习资源，涵盖算法、操作系统、计算机网络、数据库、Java 核心技术及系统设计等计算机基础核心领域。内容结构清晰，包含剑指 Offer 和 Leetcode 题解，适合系统复习与刷题备考。
summary.en: CS-Notes is a comprehensive study resource for technical interviews, covering core computer science topics including algorithms, operating systems, computer networks, databases, Java fundamentals, and system design. It features structured content with solutions to 'Jianzhi Offer' and Leetcode problems, ideal for systematic review and coding practice.

metadata.name: github-readme-stats
metadata.description: :zap: Dynamically generated stats for your github readmes

summary.zh: GitHub Readme Stats 是一个动态生成 GitHub 统计信息的项目，可自动在个人 README 中展示仓库贡献、语言使用、活跃度等数据，支持高度自定义主题、布局与指标，提升开发者主页展示效果。
summary.en: GitHub Readme Stats dynamically generates GitHub statistics for READMEs, displaying repository contributions, language usage, activity metrics, and more. It supports customizable themes, layouts, and options to enhance developer profile visibility.

metadata.name: WeChatExtension-ForMac
metadata.description: A plugin for Mac WeChat

summary.zh: MustangYM/WeChatExtension-ForMac 是一款专为 macOS 设计的微信插件，支持多开、免认证登录、消息撤回同步、自定义回复及AI自动回复等功能。集成迷离/黑夜/上帝/少女等主题皮肤，适配微信3.1.2+，兼容企业微信与简版助手，提供跨平台消息转发与小程序详情展示，是Objective-C生态中广受欢迎的自动化工具之一。
summary.en: MustangYM/WeChatExtension-ForMac is a macOS plugin for WeChat that enables multi-account login, message recall sync, custom replies, and AI auto-reply. It supports themes like Mysterious/Dark/God/Daughter modes, integrates with WeChat 3.1.2+, and offers features like message forwarding, mini-program details, and cross-device notifications. A popular Objective-C project with enterprise and lightweight versions.

metadata.name: ant-design
metadata.description: An enterprise-class UI design language and React UI library

summary.zh: Ant Design 是蚂蚁集团开源的企业级 UI 设计语言和 React 组件库，提供高质量、可复用的前端组件与完整的设计系统。支持 TypeScript、主题定制、国际化及 SSR，适用于中后台管理系统开发，具备完善的开发工具链和丰富的设计资源。
summary.en: Ant Design is an enterprise-class UI design language and React UI library developed by Ant Group, offering a comprehensive set of high-quality, customizable components and design resources. Built with TypeScript, it supports internationalization, theme customization, SSR, and modern tooling for efficient enterprise application development.

metadata.name: coder2gwy
metadata.description: 互联网首份程序员考公指南，由3位已经进入体制内的前大厂程序员联合献上。

summary.zh: 《程序员考公指南》由三位成功上岸的前大厂程序员联合撰写，总结一年在职备考经验，提供从备考策略、时间管理到岗位选择的系统性指导，帮助程序员转型进入体制内，涵盖公务员、事业编制及教师岗位，强调实用性与可行性。
summary.en: The 'Programmer's Guide to Civil Service Exams' is co-authored by three former tech employees who successfully transitioned into government roles after a year of part-time preparation. It offers practical strategies for programmers considering public sector careers, covering civil service, public institutions, and teaching positions with real-world insights and actionable advice.

metadata.name: magic-python
metadata.description: Python 黑魔法手册

summary.zh: 《Python 黑魔法手册》是一本深入解析 Python 语言隐藏特性与进阶技巧的电子书，涵盖冷门语法、Shell 高级用法、代码炫技及底层机制解读，旨在帮助开发者突破常规认知，掌握高效、优雅的 Python 编程范式。
summary.en: The 'Magic Python' handbook is an eBook exploring advanced and lesser-known Python features, including obscure syntax, shell tricks, code hacks, and deep technical insights, designed to help developers master elegant and efficient Python programming beyond basic tutorials.

metadata.name: Ant-Forest
metadata.description: AutoJs6-based ant forest energy auto-collect script (基于 AutoJs6 的蚂蚁森林能量自动收取脚本)

summary.zh: 基于 Auto.js 6 的蚂蚁森林能量自动收取脚本，支持自动收集好友能量、能量雨识别与点击、排行榜策略配置等功能，提供模块化扩展与配置工具，适用于 Android 设备自动化操作，显著提升蚂蚁森林能量获取效率。
summary.en: An Auto.js 6-based script for automating energy collection in Ant Forest, featuring auto-collection of friend energy, rain energy detection, ranking strategies, and modular configuration tools to enhance efficiency on Android devices.

metadata.name: open-source-mac-os-apps
metadata.description: 🚀 Awesome list of open source applications for macOS. https://t.me/s/opensourcemacosapps

summary.zh: 该仓库是 macOS 开源应用精选列表，收录 689 款高质量开源应用，涵盖音频、开发、图形、生产力等 49 个类别。以 Swift 为主力语言，支持跨平台与原生应用，旨在帮助用户发现优质免费工具并鼓励社区贡献。
summary.en: This repository curates 689 open source macOS applications across 49 categories, including audio, development, graphics, and productivity. Primarily written in Swift, it features both native and cross-platform apps to help users discover free tools and encourages community contributions.

metadata.name: Lunar
metadata.description: Intelligent adaptive brightness for your external monitors

summary.zh: Lunar 是一款专为 macOS 设计的显示器控制应用，支持通过 DDC/CI 协议直接调节外接显示器亮度、音量、输入源及屏幕方向。其核心亮点包括传感器/同步/位置自适应亮度调节、XDR/HDR 高亮度支持、低于 0% 的暗光模式、App 预设配置及 BlackOut 功能（关闭屏幕同时保留充电、音频等功能），完美兼容 Intel 与 Apple Silicon 芯片。
summary.en: Lunar is a macOS app for controlling external monitors via DDC/CI, enabling hardware-level brightness, volume, input switching, and orientation adjustments. Key features include sensor/sync/location-based adaptive brightness, support for 1000–1600 nits XDR/HDR displays, sub-zero dimming, app-specific presets, and BlackOut mode—preserving charging, audio, and input while turning off screens. Fully compatible with both Intel and Apple Silicon Macs.

metadata.name: Magisk
metadata.description: The Magic Mask for Android

summary.zh: Magisk 是一款专为 Android 6.0+ 设备设计的开源定制工具，提供系统级 root 权限、模块化功能扩展及 Zygisk 动态注入能力，支持在不修改系统分区的情况下深度定制设备，广泛用于解锁系统限制、安装模块和高级调试。
summary.en: Magisk is an open-source suite for customizing Android devices above Android 6.0, offering root access via MagiskSU, systemless modification through modules, and Zygisk for runtime code injection, enabling deep customization without altering system partitions.

metadata.name: spiders
metadata.description: Python爬虫，返回一定格式的信息，下载，使用flask提供简易api。抖音无水印、皮皮虾、快手、网易云音乐、qq音乐、咪咕音乐、荔枝FM音频、知乎视频、最右语音、视频、微博......

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Python 的网页爬虫集合，支持抖音、快手、网易云音乐、知乎等平台的无水印视频、音频及内容下载，通过 Flask 提供简易 API 接口。代码风格较旧但功能实用，现计划迁移至 FastAPI 框架重构，适合学习或日常使用。
summary.en: This project is a collection of Python web crawlers for downloading unwatermarked videos, audio, and content from platforms like Douyin, Kuaishou, NetEase Music, and Zhihu. It provides a simple API via Flask. The codebase is outdated but functional, with plans to migrate to FastAPI for better structure and usability.

metadata.name: scrcpy-gui
metadata.description: 👻 A simple & beautiful GUI application for scrcpy.

summary.zh: Scrcpy GUI 是一个简洁美观的图形界面应用，用于便捷控制 Android 设备屏幕。它基于 scrcpy 实现，支持 USB 和无线连接、实时屏幕镜像、键盘鼠标控制、多设备管理、剪贴板共享等功能，无需 Root，跨平台运行，提升手机操作效率。
summary.en: Scrcpy GUI is a simple and beautiful graphical application for controlling Android devices via scrcpy. It supports USB and wireless connections, real-time screen mirroring, keyboard/mouse input, multi-device management, clipboard sharing, and more—without requiring root access. It enhances mobile productivity across Windows, macOS, and Linux.

metadata.name: qrcp
metadata.description: :zap: Transfer files over wifi from your computer to your mobile device by scanning a QR code without leaving the terminal.

summary.zh: qrcp 是一款通过扫描二维码实现电脑与移动设备间 Wi-Fi 文件传输的工具，无需离开终端即可完成操作。它通过生成包含随机路径 URL 的二维码，扫描后自动在移动端浏览器打开下载链接，支持单文件、多文件或文件夹传输，并提供压缩选项，兼容主流操作系统。
summary.en: qrcp is a tool that enables Wi-Fi file transfer between computers and mobile devices by scanning a QR code, all from the terminal. It generates a QR code containing a URL with a random path; scanning it opens the download link in the mobile browser, supporting single/multiple files, folders, and optional compression. Compatible with Linux, macOS, and Windows.

metadata.name: mkdocs-material
metadata.description: Documentation that simply works

summary.zh: Material for MkDocs 是一个基于 MkDocs 的强大文档框架，支持 Markdown 编写，可快速生成专业、可搜索、多语言（60+）且跨设备的静态网站。提供高度定制化主题与现代化界面，适用于开源和商业项目文档。
summary.en: Material for MkDocs is a powerful documentation framework built on top of MkDocs, enabling fast creation of professional, searchable, multilingual (60+), and device-agnostic static sites from Markdown. It offers a customizable Material Design theme ideal for open-source and commercial projects.

metadata.name: JavaGuide
metadata.description: Java 面试 & 后端通用面试指南，覆盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发与系统设计。准备后端技术面试，首选 JavaGuide！

summary.zh: JavaGuide 是 Java 及后端技术面试的权威指南，涵盖 Java 基础、集合、并发、IO、JVM、数据库、分布式、高并发与系统设计等核心知识。提供系统化面试题解析、源码深度剖析及实战项目（如 AI 智能面试平台），支持在线阅读与 PDF 下载，是后端开发者备战大厂面试的首选资源。
summary.en: JavaGuide is the authoritative guide for Java and backend technical interviews, covering core topics including Java fundamentals, collections, concurrency, I/O, JVM, databases, distributed systems, high-concurrency, and system design. It offers systematic interview question analysis, in-depth source code breakdowns, and practical projects (e.g., AI-powered interview assistant), with online reading and PDF download options. It's the top resource for backend developers preparing for top-tier tech interviews.

metadata.name: showdoc
metadata.description: ShowDoc is a tool greatly applicable for an IT team to share documents online一个非常适合IT团队的在线API文档、技术文档工具

summary.zh: ShowDoc 是一款专为 IT 团队设计的在线文档协作工具，支持 API 文档、数据字典和技术说明的编写与管理。采用 Markdown 编辑，提供模板插入、版本历史、权限控制等功能，支持响应式网页和离线导出，显著提升团队文档协作效率。
summary.en: ShowDoc is an online documentation tool designed for IT teams to create and share API documents, data dictionaries, and technical specs. It features Markdown editing, template insertion, version history, permission management, responsive design, and offline export, enhancing team collaboration efficiency.

metadata.name: wanandroid_flutter
metadata.description: :collision::collision::collision:【Flutter版】玩安卓，非常适合学习，代码不多、注释多。

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Flutter 开发的玩安卓客户端应用，代码简洁、注释详尽，非常适合 Flutter 初学者学习。项目完整实现了登录注册、首页列表、搜索、侧边栏、WebView 加载、主题切换、状态管理等功能，涵盖常用 UI 组件和状态管理方案，并提供多平台截图与 APK 下载。
summary.en: This is a WanAndroid client app built with Flutter, featuring clean code and extensive comments, ideal for Flutter beginners. It implements core features like login, homepage, search, sidebar, WebView, theme switching, and state management, covering essential UI components and state management patterns, with multi-platform screenshots and APK available.

metadata.name: easyexcel
metadata.description: 快速、简洁、解决大文件内存溢出的java处理Excel工具

summary.zh: EasyExcel 是阿里巴巴开源的高性能 Java Excel 处理工具，解决传统框架如 Apache POI 在处理大文件时的内存溢出问题。通过重写底层解析逻辑，在仅 16M 内存下 23 秒完成 75M 超大 Excel 文件解析，支持读写、模板导出、极速模式，提供简洁 API 和完整文档，适用于企业级大数据量场景。
summary.en: EasyExcel is a high-performance Java tool for reading and writing Excel files, developed by Alibaba. It addresses memory overflow issues in traditional frameworks like Apache POI by re-engineering the parsing logic. Capable of processing a 75MB Excel file (460K rows) in just 23 seconds using only 16MB RAM, it supports templates, export, and ultra-fast mode, offering a simple API and comprehensive documentation for enterprise-scale data handling.

metadata.name: cross-storage
metadata.description: Cross domain local storage, with permissions

summary.zh: cross-storage 是一个跨域本地存储解决方案，通过权限控制实现多浏览器窗口/标签页安全共享 localStorage。采用 Hub-Client 架构，支持 ES6 Promise API，突破同源限制，允许不同域名间共享最多 2.49MB 数据，适用于单点登录、多页面状态同步等场景。
summary.en: Cross-storage enables secure cross-domain localStorage sharing via a permission-controlled Hub-Client architecture. Using iframes and postMessage, it allows multiple browser tabs/windows from different domains to share a single storage space with up to 2.49MB capacity, featuring ES6 Promise-based API for seamless integration.

metadata.name: wtfpython-cn
metadata.description: wtfpython的中文翻译/持续🚧.../ 能力有限，欢迎帮我改进翻译

summary.zh: wtfpython-cn 是经典项目 wtfpython 的中文翻译版，旨在揭示 Python 中鲜为人知但令人困惑的特性与反直觉行为。通过一系列精心设计的示例，帮助开发者深入理解语言底层机制，涵盖字符串处理、操作符误用、对象身份与相等性、生成器行为等核心议题，适合进阶学习或规避常见陷阱。
summary.en: wtfpython-cn is the Chinese translation of the renowned wtfpython project, exposing obscure yet counterintuitive Python behaviors. Through curated examples, it demystifies core language mechanics—such as string quirks, operator pitfalls, object identity, and generator nuances—making it ideal for intermediate to advanced developers seeking deeper Python mastery.

metadata.name: gridea
metadata.description: ✍️ A static blog writing client (一个静态博客写作客户端)

summary.zh: Gridea 是一款跨平台静态博客写作客户端，支持 Markdown 编辑、多语言界面、主题定制及 Gitalk/DisqusJS 评论系统。用户可本地创作并一键发布至 GitHub Pages 等平台，集成 OneDrive/iCloud 实现多设备同步，适合个人知识管理与内容创作。
summary.en: Gridea is a cross-platform static blog writing client that supports Markdown editing, multi-language interface, theme customization, and Gitalk/DisqusJS comment systems. It enables local content creation with one-click publishing to platforms like GitHub Pages, featuring OneDrive/iCloud sync for multi-device workflows, ideal for personal knowledge management and content creation.

metadata.name: wenyan
metadata.description: 文言文編程語言 A programming language for the ancient Chinese.

summary.zh: 文言（wenyan-lang）是一款基于文言文语法的编程语言，将古典中文与现代编程结合，支持自然语言编程风格。它可将文言文代码编译为 JavaScript，实现如 Hello World、埃拉托斯特尼筛法、快速排序等算法，兼具文化传承与实用功能，适合教学、趣味编程及跨时代语言实验。
summary.en: Wenyan-lang is a programming language based on Classical Chinese grammar, blending ancient Chinese literature with modern programming. It compiles to JavaScript and supports natural language programming, enabling implementations of algorithms like Hello World, Sieve of Eratosthenes, and Quicksort, making it ideal for educational, cultural, and experimental use cases.

metadata.name: RxPY
metadata.description: ReactiveX for Python

summary.zh: RxPY 是一个基于 Python 的 ReactiveX 实现，支持响应式编程范式，提供超过 120 个操作符和 1300+ 单元测试，支持异步事件流处理、可观察序列操作及调度器管理，兼容 Python 3.9+，适用于构建高并发、事件驱动型应用。
summary.en: RxPY is a ReactiveX implementation for Python, enabling reactive programming with over 120 operators and 1300+ unit tests. It supports asynchronous event streams, observable sequences, and schedulers, designed for building concurrent, event-driven applications in Python 3.9+.

metadata.name: remote-working
metadata.description: 收集整理远程工作相关的资料

summary.zh: 该仓库系统整理远程工作相关资源，涵盖文章、问题解答、团队案例、视频播客、工具站点等，聚焦中国受众，提供远程办公经验分享、招聘信息、协作工具推荐及行业报告，助力远程工作者获取实用信息与职业发展支持。
summary.en: This repository curates comprehensive resources on remote work, including articles, Q&A, team cases, videos, podcasts, tools, and reports, primarily targeting Chinese audiences. It offers practical guidance on remote work, job opportunities, collaboration tools, and industry insights to support freelancers and remote professionals.

metadata.name: Auto.js
metadata.description: Automation&Workflow JavaScript IDE on Android(安卓平台上的JavaScript编程IDE)

summary.zh: Auto.js (Pro) 是一款专为 Android 设计的 JavaScript IDE，专注于编程学习与效率提升，支持自动化脚本开发与工作流管理，提供丰富的 API 和可视化工具，适用于移动端自动化场景。
summary.en: Auto.js (Pro) is a JavaScript-based IDE for Android, designed for programming education and productivity enhancement. It enables automation scripting and workflow management with rich APIs and visual tools, ideal for mobile automation tasks.

metadata.name: ydata-profiling
metadata.description: 1 Line of code data quality profiling & exploratory data analysis for Pandas and Spark DataFrames.

summary.zh: ydata-profiling 是一款强大的数据质量探查与探索性数据分析（EDA）工具，支持 Pandas 和 Spark DataFrame。仅需一行代码即可生成包含类型推断、缺失值分析、统计摘要、可视化图表、时间序列和文本分析的综合报告，支持 HTML 和 JSON 导出，显著提升数据理解效率。
summary.en: ydata-profiling is a powerful data quality profiling and exploratory data analysis (EDA) tool for Pandas and Spark DataFrames. With just one line of code, it generates comprehensive reports including type inference, missing data analysis, statistical summaries, visualizations, time-series, and text analysis, exportable in HTML and JSON formats for rapid data insights.

metadata.name: black
metadata.description: The uncompromising Python code formatter

summary.zh: Black 是一个无妥协的 Python 代码格式化工具，强制统一代码风格，提升团队协作效率。它基于 AST 分析实现确定性格式化，支持 Python 3.10+ 及 Jupyter Notebook，提供极小 diff 输出以加速代码审查，并内置语法有效性验证确保代码安全。
summary.en: Black is the uncompromising Python code formatter that enforces consistent style across projects. It reformats entire files in place using AST analysis, supports Python 3.10+ and Jupyter Notebooks, produces minimal diffs for faster code reviews, and validates syntax safety through built-in AST checks.

metadata.name: miaosha
metadata.description: ⭐⭐⭐⭐秒杀系统设计与实现.互联网工程师进阶与分析🙋🐓

summary.zh: 该仓库聚焦秒杀系统的高并发设计与实现，涵盖Spring、Redis、MQ、ZK等核心技术栈，提供完整的高可用、高性能解决方案。项目包含多线程导入框架、JVM调优实战、分布式流程引擎等进阶内容，适合中高级工程师系统学习互联网架构核心能力。
summary.en: This repository focuses on high-concurrency design and implementation of flash sale systems, covering core tech stacks like Spring, Redis, MQ, and ZooKeeper. It provides complete solutions for high availability and performance, including multi-threaded import frameworks, JVM tuning, and distributed workflow engines, ideal for intermediate to advanced engineers.

metadata.name: regular-investing-in-box
metadata.description: 定投改变命运 —— 让时间陪你慢慢变富 https://onregularinvesting.com

summary.zh: 《定投改变命运》系统阐述普通人通过定期投资实现财富积累与阶层跃迁的路径，强调定投作为唯一可操作、可坚持的长期投资策略，结合证券市场奇迹属性与人性弱点分析，提供可落地的投资哲学与实践指南。
summary.en: This book systematically explains how ordinary people can break through class barriers through regular investing, emphasizing that dollar-cost averaging is the only feasible and sustainable investment strategy. It combines market insights with human psychology to offer a practical philosophy and actionable guidance for long-term wealth building.

metadata.name: dio
metadata.description: A powerful HTTP client for Dart and Flutter, which supports global settings, Interceptors, FormData, aborting and canceling a request, files uploading and downloading, requests timeout, custom adapters, etc.

summary.zh: dio 是一个强大的 Dart 和 Flutter HTTP 客户端库，支持全局配置、拦截器、FormData、请求取消、文件上传下载、超时控制及自定义适配器。提供完整的 REST API 调用能力，适用于移动端和 Web 应用开发，具备高度可定制性和跨平台兼容性。
summary.en: dio is a powerful HTTP client for Dart and Flutter, supporting global settings, interceptors, FormData, request cancellation, file uploads/downloads, timeouts, and custom adapters. It offers full REST API capabilities with high customization and cross-platform compatibility for mobile and web apps.

metadata.name: flukit
metadata.description: A Flutter UI Kit（一个 Flutter UI组件库），包含 ScaleView, Swiper, PullRefresh, WaterMark, GradientCircularProgressIndicator...

summary.zh: Flukit 是一个功能丰富的 Flutter UI 组件库，提供 ScaleView、Swiper、PullRefresh、WaterMark 等实用 Widget，涵盖手势交互、动画效果、进度指示器等场景，支持自定义渐变按钮、弹性滚动头部等高级功能，显著提升 Flutter 开发效率。
summary.en: Flukit is a comprehensive Flutter UI kit offering essential widgets like ScaleView, Swiper, PullRefresh, and WaterMark. It supports advanced features such as gesture interactions, gradient animations, elastic headers, and progress indicators, significantly enhancing Flutter app development efficiency.

metadata.name: leedl-tutorial
metadata.description: 《李宏毅深度学习教程》（李宏毅老师推荐👍，苹果书🍎），PDF下载地址：https://github.com/datawhalechina/leedl-tutorial/releases

summary.zh: 《李宏毅深度学习教程》是台湾大学李宏毅教授经典课程的中文教程，涵盖深度学习核心理论与前沿技术。教程以幽默易懂的方式讲解复杂概念，结合动画案例与详细公式推导，降低学习门槛。内容源自2021年春课程并扩展2017年春课程及外部知识，适合深度学习初学者系统入门。
summary.en: LeeDL-Tutorial is a comprehensive Chinese guide to deep learning based on Professor Hung-yi Lee's renowned courses. It simplifies complex concepts through engaging examples and detailed derivations, covering core theories and techniques. Expanded from the 2021 Spring course with additional content from 2017 and external resources, it serves as an ideal entry point for beginners in deep learning.

metadata.name: flutter-book
metadata.description: 📚《Flutter 入门指南》

summary.zh: 《Flutter 入门指南》是一本系统介绍 Flutter 跨平台开发框架的电子书，涵盖 Dart 语言、Skia 图形引擎及 Material Design UI 开发。适合有 JavaScript 基础的前端开发者快速掌握移动端、Web 和桌面端应用开发技能。
summary.en: 《Flutter 入门指南》is a comprehensive guide to Flutter, covering Dart language, Skia graphics engine, and Material Design UI development for cross-platform apps (mobile, web, desktop). Ideal for frontend developers with JavaScript background.

metadata.name: HistoryOfEverything
metadata.description: Flutter Launch Timeline Demo

summary.zh: 该应用是一个基于 Flutter 开发的交互式时间轴应用，展示从宇宙大爆炸到互联网诞生的历史事件。通过精美的动画和垂直滚动时间轴，用户可探索不同时代的关键事件，每个事件配有动态气泡和详细文章页面。核心技术包括 Flutter 框架、Flare 和 Nima 动画库，以及自定义 LeafRenderObjectWidget 实现高性能渲染。
summary.en: This is an interactive vertical timeline app built with Flutter, showcasing historical events from the Big Bang to the Internet. It features animated event bubbles, detailed article pages, and smooth scrolling/zooming. Built using Flutter with Flare and Nima animation libraries, plus custom LeafRenderObjectWidget for high-performance rendering.

metadata.name: flutter-go
metadata.description: flutter 开发者帮助 APP，包含 flutter 常用 140+ 组件的demo 演示与中文文档

summary.zh: FlutterGo 是阿里巴巴推出的 Flutter 开发者辅助应用，提供 140+ 组件的中文文档与演示，帮助开发者快速掌握 Flutter 开发。因团队调整暂停维护，但计划未来迭代并招募社区贡献者。
summary.en: FlutterGo is an Alibaba-developed Flutter developer helper app featuring 140+ component demos and Chinese documentation. It aids developers in mastering Flutter. Due to internal restructuring, maintenance is temporarily paused, with plans for future updates and community contributions.

metadata.name: VeryNginx
metadata.description: A very powerful and friendly  nginx base on lua-nginx-module( openresty ) which provide WAF, Control Panel, and Dashboards.

summary.zh: VeryNginx 是基于 OpenResty 的强大 Nginx 增强工具，集成 WAF、访问统计、控制面板和仪表盘，支持自定义匹配器与动作实现灵活规则引擎，提供友好的 Web 界面管理复杂流量策略。
summary.en: VeryNginx is a powerful and user-friendly Nginx extension based on OpenResty, featuring built-in WAF, real-time access statistics, control panel, and dashboards. It enables advanced traffic management through customizable matchers and actions, offering a web interface for complex rule-based request processing and security enforcement.

metadata.name: OpenPano
metadata.description: Automatic Panorama Stitching From Scratch

summary.zh: OpenPano 是一个从零开始用 C++ 编写的自动全景拼接程序，无需依赖任何计算机视觉库。它实现了基于不变特征的经典全景拼接算法，支持圆柱面、相机参数估计和平移三种模式，适用于手持相机拍摄的连续图像拼接，输出高质量无缝全景图。
summary.en: OpenPano is a C++-based automatic panorama stitching tool implemented from scratch without external vision libraries. It follows the pipeline from 'Automatic Panoramic Image Stitching using Invariant Features' and supports cylinder, camera estimation, and translation modes for seamless image stitching from handheld captures.

metadata.name: squoosh
metadata.description: Make images smaller using best-in-class codecs, right in the browser.

summary.zh: Squoosh 是一款浏览器内图像压缩工具，利用顶级编解码器显著减小图像体积，所有处理均在本地完成，保护用户隐私。支持多种格式压缩，提供实时预览与尺寸对比，适用于网页优化与资源管理。
summary.en: Squoosh is a browser-based image compression tool that reduces image sizes using best-in-class codecs entirely in the browser. It supports multiple formats, offers real-time preview and size comparison, and ensures privacy by processing images locally without server transmission.

metadata.name: el-data-table
metadata.description: 🥘Base on element-ui, makes crud easily

summary.zh: el-data-table 是基于 element-ui 封装的 CRUD 表格组件，支持自动请求、分页、树形数据、自定义搜索和操作列，集成 @femessage/el-form-renderer 渲染表单，通过配置化实现快速开发 RESTful API 管理界面。
summary.en: el-data-table is a CRUD table component built on element-ui, featuring auto data fetching via axios, pagination, tree structures, custom search, and operation columns. It uses @femessage/el-form-renderer for form rendering and supports configuration-driven RESTful API management.

metadata.name: awesome-flutter
metadata.description: An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

summary.zh: Solido/awesome-flutter 是一个精选的 Flutter 资源库，涵盖最佳库、工具、教程、文章等，为开发者提供全面的 Flutter 开发指南，助力跨平台应用开发。
summary.en: Solido/awesome-flutter is a curated list of the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, and articles, serving as a comprehensive resource for Flutter developers to build cross-platform applications.

metadata.name: proxy_pool
metadata.description: Python ProxyPool for web spider

summary.zh: ProxyPool 是一个 Python 实现的爬虫代理 IP 池，支持定时采集、验证和更新免费代理 IP，提供 RESTful API 接口。项目具备高可用代理源扩展能力，适用于网页爬虫、数据采集等场景，支持多版本 Python 环境及 Docker 部署，显著提升爬虫反爬绕过效率。
summary.en: ProxyPool is a Python-based proxy IP pool for web scraping, featuring automated collection, validation, and management of free proxies. It offers a RESTful API for integration with crawlers, supports extensible proxy sources, and enables efficient anti-scraping bypass via rotating IPs. Compatible with Python 2.7–3.11 and deployable via Docker.

metadata.name: app-ideas
metadata.description: A Collection of application ideas which can be used to improve your coding skills.

summary.zh: 本项目是面向开发者的应用创意集合，旨在解决编程灵感枯竭问题。提供从基础到高级的30+个应用项目，每个项目包含明确目标、用户故事、扩展功能和学习资源。项目按难度分为三个层级，涵盖前端交互、数据处理、API集成等场景，适合提升编码能力、技术实验和作品集建设。
summary.en: This repository offers a curated collection of application ideas designed to overcome developer's creative blocks. With 30+ projects across three difficulty tiers, each includes clear objectives, user stories, bonus features, and learning resources. Ideal for skill improvement, tech experimentation, and portfolio development.

metadata.name: yapi
metadata.description: YApi 是一个可本地部署的、打通前后端及QA的、可视化的接口管理平台

summary.zh: YApi 是一款高效、易用、功能强大的可视化接口管理平台，支持本地部署，专为开发、产品、测试团队提供优雅的 API 管理服务。基于 Json5 和 Mockjs 定义接口结构，集成接口调试、自动化测试、Mock 期望等功能，支持 Postman/HAR/Swagger 导入，并提供丰富的插件生态与代码生成工具，助力企业级接口协作与效率提升。
summary.en: YApi is a powerful, user-friendly, and efficient visual API management platform designed for developers, product managers, and QA teams.
