It supports multi-file editing, drag-and-drop loading, auto-save to local storage, toolbar-based markdown insertion, and export to .md or .html. With smooth animations, low-contrast colors, and componentized architecture, it offers a seamless online experience akin to desktop apps.

metadata.name: deepin-terminal
metadata.description: Deepin Terminal written by vala

summary.zh: Deepin Terminal 是深度操作系统默认终端模拟器，基于 Vala 语言开发，支持多标签页、分屏、快捷键操作及主题定制，提供高效命令行工作环境。
summary.en: Deepin Terminal is the default terminal emulator for Deepin OS, built with Vala, offering multi-tab, split-screen, customizable shortcuts, and theming for efficient command-line workflows.

metadata.name: awesome-python-books
metadata.description: 如果有人让你推荐 Python 技术书，请让他看这个列表

summary.zh: 本项目为 Python 开发者精心整理的权威技术书籍推荐列表，涵盖入门到进阶全阶段，包含《Head First Python》《集体智慧编程》《利用 Python 进行数据分析》等经典著作，结合社区投票与豆瓣评分，提供高质量学习资源导航。
summary.en: This repo curates a comprehensive list of authoritative Python technical books from beginner to advanced levels, featuring classics like 'Head First Python', 'Programming Collective Intelligence', and 'Python for Data Analysis', backed by community votes and Douban ratings for reliable learning guidance.

metadata.name: ColorfulNews
metadata.description: A news-reading App (MVP+Dagger2+RxJava+Retrofit2+Material Design)

summary.zh: ColorfulNews 是一款基于 MVP 架构的新闻阅读应用，采用 Material Design 风格，集成 Dagger2、RxJava 和 Retrofit2 实现高效的数据绑定与网络请求。支持多频道浏览、图片新闻展示及流畅交互体验，适用于 Android 平台学习与实践。
summary.en: ColorfulNews is a news-reading app built with MVP architecture and Material Design, utilizing Dagger2, RxJava, and Retrofit2 for robust dependency injection, reactive programming, and network communication. It supports multi-channel browsing, image news display, and smooth user interactions, ideal for Android development learning.

metadata.name: pickadate.js
metadata.description: The mobile-friendly, responsive, and lightweight jQuery date & time input picker.

summary.zh: pickadate.js 是一个轻量级、响应式且移动端友好的 jQuery 日期和时间选择器库，支持多种主题和语言翻译，提供灵活的 API 和 LESS 样式定制能力，适用于现代化 Web 表单交互。
summary.en: pickadate.js is a lightweight, responsive, and mobile-friendly jQuery date & time picker library with support for multiple themes, language translations, and customizable LESS-based styling, ideal for modern web form inputs.

metadata.name: mobi.css
metadata.description: A lightweight, scalable, mobile-first CSS framework

summary.zh: Mobi.css 是一个轻量级、可扩展、移动优先的 CSS 框架，默认包仅 3kb（gzip 后），提供基础样式以构建简洁优雅的网页。其插件系统支持模块化扩展，可独立使用插件，专为移动端优化，同时兼容桌面端，适合内容丰富的页面。
summary.en: Mobi.css is a lightweight, scalable, mobile-first CSS framework. With a default bundle of only 3kb (gzipped), it provides essential styles for clean and elegant webpages. Its plugin system enables modular scalability, allowing plugins to be used standalone or integrated, optimized for mobile but also excellent on desktop.

metadata.name: ant-design-mobile
metadata.description: Essential UI blocks for building mobile web apps.

summary.zh: Ant Design Mobile 是构建移动端 Web 应用的核心 UI 组件库，提供高性能、可定制的原子化组件，支持 CSS 变量主题定制与流畅动画，适用于快速开发跨平台移动应用。
summary.en: Ant Design Mobile is a core UI component library for building mobile web apps, offering high-performance, customizable atomic components with CSS variable theming and smooth animations for cross-platform mobile development.

metadata.name: bootstrap-tokenfield
metadata.description: A jQuery tag/token input plugin for Twitter's Bootstrap, by the guys from Sliptree

summary.zh: Bootstrap Tokenfield 是一个基于 jQuery 和 Twitter Bootstrap 的标签输入插件，支持键盘操作、复制粘贴、自动补全集成等功能。虽然项目已停止维护，但仍可用于需要轻量级标签输入的场景，尤其适合与 Bootstrap 3+ 和 jQuery 1.9+ 配合使用。
summary.en: Bootstrap Tokenfield is a jQuery plugin for tag/token input built on Twitter Bootstrap, supporting keyboard navigation, copy-paste, and integration with autocomplete/typeahead. Though unmaintained, it remains useful for lightweight tagging in Bootstrap 3+ environments with jQuery 1.9+.

metadata.name: data_location
metadata.description: 中华人民共和国行政区划数据【省、市、区县、乡镇街道】中国省市区镇三级四级联动地址数据（GB/T 2260）

summary.zh: 提供中华人民共和国省、市、区县、乡镇街道四级完整行政区划数据，严格遵循GB/T 2260国家标准，数据权威且实时更新。支持三级联动选择、身份证号识别等实用功能，适用于地址选择、表单验证、地理信息系统等场景。
summary.en: Comprehensive Chinese administrative division data covering provinces, cities, districts, counties, towns, and streets, adhering to the national standard GB/T 2260. Includes authoritative and regularly updated data from official sources, supporting three-level cascading selection, ID card validation, and integration with web components or jQuery plugins for address selection and geographic applications.

metadata.name: django-redis
metadata.description: Full featured redis cache backend for Django.

summary.zh: django-redis 是一个功能完整的 Redis 缓存和会话后端，专为 Django 设计。它支持原生 redis-py URL 连接字符串、可插拔客户端/解析器/序列化器，提供主从支持、无限超时、Unix 套接字连接及原始 Redis 客户端访问，适用于高并发生产环境。
summary.en: django-redis is a full-featured, BSD-licensed Redis cache and session backend for Django. It supports native redis-py URL connections, pluggable clients/parsers/serializers, primary/secondary setups, infinite timeouts, Unix sockets, and raw Redis client access, making it ideal for production-scale Django applications.

metadata.name: django-sslserver
metadata.description: A SSL-enabled development server for Django

summary.zh: django-sslserver 是一个为 Django 框架提供 SSL 支持的本地开发服务器，支持自签名证书和自定义 CA 证书，适用于开发环境 HTTPS 调试，但不建议用于生产部署。
summary.en: Django SSL Server is a development-only SSL-enabled server for Django, supporting self-signed and CA-trusted certificates, ideal for local HTTPS testing during development, though not recommended for production use.

metadata.name: toilet
metadata.description: Urban governance - Where is the restroom?

summary.zh: 该应用为解决城市如厕难问题，提供附近2公里内卫生间实时搜索、导航及基础信息查询，集成地图、天气、文章推荐等功能，采用高德地图、七牛云存储、微信公众号及阿里云部署，展示如何快速构建实用型移动应用。
summary.en: This app addresses urban restroom accessibility by enabling users to search nearby toilets within 2km, view basic info, and get navigation. It integrates map services, weather, articles, and uses platforms like Amap, Qiniu Cloud, WeChat, and Aliyun for rapid deployment of a practical mobile solution.

metadata.name: GB2260
metadata.description: 中华人民共和国国家标准 GB/T 2260 行政区划代码

summary.zh: GB/T 2260 是中国行政区划代码国家标准，提供县及县级以上行政区划的完整编码数据，支持多语言实现（Python、JavaScript、Ruby、Java、PHP、Go、Elixir、Swift、C#），可用于构建地理信息系统、地址解析、数据统计等应用，数据权威且持续更新。
summary.en: GB/T 2260 is the Chinese national standard for administrative division codes, providing complete coding data for counties and above-level administrative regions. It supports multi-language implementations (Python, JavaScript, Ruby, Java, PHP, Go, Elixir, Swift, C#) and is ideal for GIS, address parsing, and data analysis applications with authoritative and regularly updated sources.

metadata.name: electronic-wechat
metadata.description: :speech_balloon: A better WeChat on macOS and Linux. Built with Electron by Zhongyi Tong.

summary.zh: Electronic WeChat 是一款基于 Electron 开发的跨平台微信客户端，专为 macOS 和 Linux 设计。它复刻了网页版微信的所有功能，包括消息撤回拦截、表情包支持、拖拽发送图片等，并优化了原生应用体验。项目已停止维护，但作为 Electron 桌面应用开发的优秀范例仍具参考价值。
summary.en: Electronic WeChat is an Electron-based cross-platform WeChat client for macOS and Linux, replicating all Web WeChat features including message recall blocking and sticker support. It offers native-like experience with optimizations like direct URL access and drag-and-drop file sharing. Though discontinued, it serves as an excellent reference for Electron desktop app development.

metadata.name: frp
metadata.description: A fast reverse proxy to help you expose a local server behind a NAT or firewall to the internet.

summary.zh: frp 是一款高性能反向代理工具，专为穿透 NAT 或防火墙设计，支持 TCP、UDP、HTTP、HTTPS 协议转发，提供 P2P 连接模式。具备多协议支持、自定义域名访问内网服务、SSH 穿透、HTTP 文件服务器暴露、HTTPS 加密转发、私有服务暴露、Prometheus 监控、客户端认证等核心功能，适用于远程开发、内网服务访问、IoT 设备连接等场景。
summary.en: frp is a high-performance reverse proxy designed to expose local servers behind NAT or firewalls to the internet. It supports TCP, UDP, HTTP, and HTTPS protocols, with P2P connectivity. Key features include multi-protocol forwarding, custom domain access to internal services, SSH tunneling, HTTP file server exposure, HTTPS encryption, private service exposure, Prometheus monitoring, and client authentication, ideal for remote development and IoT access.

metadata.name: react-native-sudoku
metadata.description: a sudoku game written in React Native

summary.zh: 这是一个使用 React Native 开发的数独游戏应用，具备动画效果、编辑模式、游戏进度保存及在线排行榜功能。开发者曾创下 3分43秒的解题记录，并计划扩展多难度等级、国际化支持和云端数据存储。
summary.en: A React Native-based Sudoku game featuring animations, editing mode, game resume, and online leaderboards. The developer holds a personal record of 3:43 and plans to add multiple difficulty levels, i18n support, and cloud-based score storage.

metadata.name: lumen
metadata.description: Magic auto brightness based on screen contents 💡

summary.zh: Lumen 是一款 macOS 菜单栏应用，能根据屏幕内容自动调节亮度。用户只需使用亮度键即可控制，系统会自动学习偏好。当屏幕显示深色内容（如终端）时自动调亮，显示浅色内容（如网页）时自动调暗，显著提升夜间使用舒适度，尤其适合长时间编程或阅读。
summary.en: Lumen is a macOS menu bar app that automatically adjusts screen brightness based on displayed content. It learns user preferences via brightness keys, brightening the screen for dark content (e.g., terminal) and dimming it for light content (e.g., web pages), offering a more comfortable viewing experience, especially at night.

metadata.name: 30-days-of-react-native
metadata.description: 30 days of React Native demos

summary.zh: 本项目是30天React Native实战教程，涵盖从基础组件到高级动画、手势识别、地图定位、生物识别等22个完整案例，包含iOS原生级交互效果，适合移动端开发学习者系统掌握React Native核心技能。
summary.en: This project is a 30-day React Native tutorial series featuring 22 complete demos, covering core components, animations, gestures, maps, biometric authentication, and more. It provides hands-on experience with iOS-level interactions for mobile development learners.

metadata.name: react-native-guide
metadata.description: React Native指南汇集了各类react-native学习资源、开源App和组件

summary.zh: React Native学习指南是一个全面的中文资源库，汇集了React Native开发教程、开源APP案例、组件库、工具链及权威文档，覆盖从入门到原生模块开发的完整技术栈，助力开发者快速构建跨平台移动应用。
summary.en: The React Native Learning Guide is a comprehensive Chinese resource hub compiling tutorials, open-source apps, components, tools, and official documentation for React Native development, covering everything from beginner guides to native module integration for cross-platform mobile app creation.

metadata.name: serpy
metadata.description: ridiculously fast object serialization

summary.zh: serpy 是一个极致快速的 Python 对象序列化框架，专为高性能场景设计。它支持将复杂数据类型（如 Django 模型、自定义类）高效转换为原生类型（字典、列表等），并易于转为 JSON。相比 marshmallow 或 Django REST Framework，其性能优势可达一个数量级以上，同时保持简洁的类继承式架构和高度可定制性。
summary.en: serpy is a ridiculously fast object serialization framework for Python, optimized for high performance. It efficiently converts complex data types (e.g., Django models, custom classes) into native Python types (dicts, lists), easily convertible to JSON. It outperforms alternatives like marshmallow or Django REST Framework by an order of magnitude, while offering a clean, extensible class-based design with minimal code duplication.

metadata.name: html-json-forms
metadata.description: Python implementation of the (inactive) HTML JSON Forms spec.

summary.zh: html-json-forms 是一个 Python 实现的 HTML JSON Forms 规范库，用于通过传统 HTML 表单提交结构化 JSON 数据。它采用数组式命名约定（如 items[0][name]），支持嵌套对象解析，兼容 Django REST Framework，提供功能函数与序列化器集成，适用于前后端分离场景下的表单数据处理。
summary.en: html-json-forms is a Python implementation of the HTML JSON Forms specification, enabling structured JSON submission via traditional HTML forms using array-style naming (e.g., items[0][name]). It supports nested object parsing, integrates with Django REST Framework via JSONFormSerializer, and provides both functional parsing and DRF-compatible serializers for complex form data handling.

metadata.name: react-native-tab-navigator
metadata.description: A tab bar that switches between scenes, written in JS for cross-platform support

summary.zh: react-native-tab-navigator 是一个基于 JavaScript 的跨平台标签栏组件，专为 React Native 设计，支持 iOS 和 Android。它允许在多个场景间切换，提供自定义图标、徽章、标题等交互元素，兼容 React Native 0.16+，适用于构建原生级标签导航界面。
summary.en: react-native-tab-navigator is a cross-platform tab bar component written in JavaScript for React Native, supporting iOS and Android. It enables switching between scenes with customizable icons, badges, and titles, compatible with React Native 0.16+. Ideal for building native-like tab navigation interfaces.

metadata.name: ZeroNet
metadata.description: ZeroNet - Decentralized websites using Bitcoin crypto and BitTorrent network

summary.zh: ZeroNet 是一个去中心化网站平台，利用比特币加密和 BitTorrent 网络实现无中心托管。网站内容通过 P2P 网络分发，支持实时更新、Namecoin 域名、Tor 匿名访问及 TLS 加密，无需服务器即可永久运行，抗审查且用户即服务提供者。
summary.en: ZeroNet is a decentralized web platform using Bitcoin cryptography and the BitTorrent network for censorship-resistant, peer-to-peer hosting. Sites run on users' devices, support real-time updates, .bit domains, Tor anonymity, and automatic peer discovery without relying on central servers.

metadata.name: file_sync
metadata.description: Detect file modification in background and push it to git automatically.

summary.zh: file_sync 是一个轻量级自动化工具，通过监听文件变化并自动提交到 Git 仓库，实现配置文件的实时同步与版本追踪。支持跨平台运行，可设置开机自启，适用于个人配置文件管理场景。
summary.en: file_sync is a lightweight automation tool that monitors file modifications in the background and automatically pushes changes to a Git repository, enabling real-time synchronization and version tracking of configuration files. It supports cross-platform operation and can be configured to run at system startup.

metadata.name: v2ex-gae
metadata.description: Legacy code of V2EX running on Google App Engine

summary.zh: Project Babel 2 是基于 Python 和 Google App Engine 的开源社区建站系统，专为构建类似 V2EX 的分享与发现型社区设计。支持节点分类、多主题管理、响应式主题、WebDAV 头像托管、Atom 订阅、HTML5 兼容、MapReduce 数据优化及 Twitter OAuth 集成，具备高性能扩展能力，支持百万级日访问量。
summary.en: Project Babel 2 is an open-source community platform built with Python on Google App Engine, designed for sharing and discovery communities like V2EX. It features node-based organization, responsive themes, WebDAV avatars, Atom feeds, HTML5 support, MapReduce data optimization, and Twitter OAuth integration, capable of scaling to millions of daily pageviews with proper configuration.

metadata.name: codelf
metadata.description: A search tool helps dev to solve the naming things problem.

summary.zh: CODELF 是一个智能变量命名工具，通过搜索 GitHub 等代码托管平台上的真实项目，为开发者提供精准的变量命名建议。支持 VS Code、Atom、Sublime Text 等编辑器插件，并集成每日算法题推荐功能，同时可管理 GitHub 仓库标签与收藏，显著提升代码命名效率与规范性。
summary.en: CODELF is a smart variable naming tool that helps developers find real-world naming patterns by searching across GitHub and other code repositories. It offers IDE plugins for VS Code, Atom, and Sublime Text, features a daily algorithm practice guide, and includes GitHub repository tagging/organization tools to improve code naming consistency and productivity.

metadata.name: ReactNativeTestApp
metadata.description: 利用reactnative技术，开发，生成app

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 React Native 开发的移动端应用 demo，参考淘宝手机端 UI 设计，实现了包含首页、微淘、社区、购物车、个人中心等模块的 TabBar 界面。支持图标切换、角标提醒等功能，展示了 React Native 在跨平台 App 开发中的高效性和前端开发者上手友好的特点。
summary.en: This project is a React Native-based mobile app demo, inspired by Taobao's mobile interface. It features a TabBar with modules like Home, Weitao, Community, Cart, and Profile, supporting icon switching and badge notifications. It demonstrates React Native's efficiency in cross-platform development and ease of use for frontend developers.

metadata.name: React-Dou
metadata.description: Douban Search App Based on React Native

summary.zh: React-Dou 是基于 React Native 和豆瓣开放 API 开发的跨平台搜索应用，支持图书、音乐、电影三大类内容的搜索、列表展示与详情查看，具备完整的移动端交互体验，适用于快速构建豆瓣生态相关的数据检索工具。
summary.en: React-Dou is a cross-platform search app built with React Native and Douban Open API, supporting search, listing, and detail views for books, music, and movies. It delivers a complete mobile experience for accessing Douban's content ecosystem.

metadata.name: React-Native-App
metadata.description: RN 开源之初，写几个Mini-App

summary.zh: 该项目是React Native早期实战项目集合，包含通讯录、LBS附近服务、豆瓣API搜索等Mini-App。涵盖文件系统Node.js服务端、通讯录管理、公告系统、地图定位及Webview集成，提供完整移动端开发范例，适合RN初学者学习全栈移动应用开发。
summary.en: This repository contains early React Native practical projects including address book, LBS nearby services, and Douban API search apps. It covers Node.js file-based backend, contact management, announcements, map positioning, and Webview integration, serving as a comprehensive full-stack mobile development tutorial for RN beginners.

metadata.name: django-jquery-file-upload
metadata.description: A minimal django project containing a minimal app with a working jquery file upload form based on the work by Sebastian Tschan: http://aquantum-demo.appspot.com/file-upload

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Sebastian Tschan 的 jQuery-File-Upload 组件的极简 Django 文件上传示例，支持拖拽上传、多文件选择、上传取消及文件删除功能，无需 Flash 等浏览器插件，适用于快速集成前端文件上传到 Django 后端。
summary.en: This is a minimal Django project demonstrating how to integrate Sebastian Tschan's jQuery-File-Upload component, featuring drag-and-drop, multi-file selection, upload cancellation, and file deletion. It requires no browser plugins like Flash and is ideal for quickly adding robust file upload functionality to Django applications.

metadata.name: django-basic-apps
metadata.description: Simple prebuilt applications.

summary.zh: Django Basic Apps 是一组预构建的 Django 应用集合，提供博客、媒体内嵌等基础功能模块。支持通过模板标记语法 `<inline type="app.model" id="1"/>` 实现内容内嵌，需依赖 Django Comments、Tagging、Markdown 等第三方库。
summary.en: Django Basic Apps is a collection of prebuilt Django applications offering core features like blogging and content inlining. It supports embedding objects via template markup `<inline type="app.model" id="1"/>` and requires dependencies such as Django Comments, Tagging, and Markdown libraries.

metadata.name: react-native-lesson
metadata.description: React Native入门指南

summary.zh: React Native入门指南，系统讲解从环境搭建到组件开发的全流程，涵盖JSX语法、布局设计、UI组件使用及与原生代码集成，适合初学者快速掌握移动端跨平台开发技能。
summary.en: A comprehensive React Native tutorial covering fundamentals like JSX, layout design, UI components, and native module integration, designed for developers to master cross-platform mobile app development efficiently.

metadata.name: react-native-hiapp
metadata.description: HiApp written in react-native.

summary.zh: HiApp 是一款基于 React Native 开发的跨平台移动应用，支持 iOS 和 Android 平台。项目提供完整的开发环境配置指南，包含依赖安装、打包器启动及真机运行方案，适合学习 React Native 开发实践。
summary.en: HiApp is a cross-platform mobile application built with React Native, supporting both iOS and Android. It includes setup instructions for dependency installation, packager startup, and device deployment, serving as a practical reference for React Native development.

metadata.name: elasticsearch-definitive-guide
metadata.description: elasticsearch 权威指南

summary.zh: 《Elasticsearch 权威指南》中文版项目，由译者 Gavin Foo 翻译自 Clinton Gormley 和 Zachary Tong 的原作，涵盖 Elasticsearch 的核心概念、全文搜索、结构化查询、数据分析、地理定位、自动补全等高级功能，并提供生产环境配置与监控实践，适合开发者与数据工程师系统学习 Elasticsearch。
summary.en: The Chinese translation of 'Elasticsearch: The Definitive Guide' by Gavin Foo, based on the original work by Clinton Gormley and Zachary Tong. This project covers core concepts, full-text search, structured queries, analytics, geolocation, autocomplete, and production deployment of Elasticsearch, serving as a comprehensive resource for developers and data engineers.

metadata.name: elasticsearch-definitive-guide-cn
metadata.description: Elasticsearch权威指南中文版

summary.zh: 《Elasticsearch权威指南》中文版由Looly团队主导翻译，系统解析Elasticsearch核心原理与高级特性，涵盖索引设计、查询优化、集群管理等关键技术点，是深入掌握Elasticsearch的权威学习资料，支持多平台阅读。
summary.en: The Chinese translation of 'Elasticsearch: The Definitive Guide', led by Looly, provides a comprehensive deep-dive into Elasticsearch's core concepts, including indexing, advanced querying, and cluster management. It serves as an authoritative resource for mastering Elasticsearch's advanced features and internal mechanisms.

metadata.name: imouto
metadata.description: 快速、明确、极简

summary.zh: 妹Blog v2 是一款基于 PHP+MySQL 的极简静态博客系统，采用 iTorr.JS 和 Q.JS 框架实现前后端分离，支持 Markdown 写作、代码高亮、多用户、分类管理、原生评论及多说集成，并针对 SAE/Hostker 云环境优化部署，提供缓存、模板与静态化加速，适合追求快速搭建与内容优先的个人博客。
summary.en: Imouto v2 is a minimalist static blog system built with PHP+MySQL, leveraging iTorr.JS and Q.JS for frontend-backend separation. It supports Markdown writing, syntax highlighting, multi-user management, categories, native and Duoshuo comments, and is optimized for cloud platforms like SAE and Hostker. Features include caching, templating, static generation, and AJAX search for fast content delivery.

metadata.name: hexo-theme-yilia
metadata.description: 一个简洁优雅的hexo主题  A simple and elegant theme for hexo.

summary.zh: Yilia 是一款为 Hexo 博客系统设计的简洁优雅主题，注重移动端体验与极致加载性能，支持目录导航、打赏、搜索、分享等功能，采用 webpack 构建，强调内容呈现与用户专注度。
summary.en: Yilia is a simple and elegant theme for Hexo 2.4+, focusing on mobile experience, fast loading, and content-first design. It supports features like TOC, rewards, search, sharing, and is built with webpack for performance and extensibility.

metadata.name: gfw_whitelist
metadata.description: gfw_whitelist

summary.zh: 该项目提供基于白名单的PAC代理配置方案，通过维护国内常用域名白名单，实现国内网站直连、境外网站走代理的科学上网模式。支持自动生成whitelist.pac/whiteiplist.pac/proxy.pac三种格式的代理配置文件，兼容Chrome、Firefox等主流浏览器，支持SOCKS5/HTTPS等多种代理协议，并提供在线PAC生成服务。
summary.en: This project provides a PAC proxy configuration solution based on whitelisting, allowing direct connection for domestic websites and proxy for international sites. It supports generating three types of proxy config files (whitelist.pac/whiteiplist.pac/proxy.pac), compatible with major browsers, supporting multiple proxy protocols like SOCKS5/HTTPS, and offers online PAC generation service.

metadata.name: django-wpadmin
metadata.description: WordPress look and feel for Django administration panel

summary.zh: Django WP Admin 为 Django 管理后台提供 WordPress 风格界面，支持响应式设计、可折叠侧边栏、Font Awesome 图标及9种配色主题，兼容 Python3 与多 Django 版本，显著提升后台操作体验。
summary.en: Django WP Admin delivers a WordPress-inspired interface for Django's admin panel, featuring responsive design, collapsible menus, Font Awesome icons, 9 color themes, and Python3 compatibility across multiple Django versions for enhanced usability.

metadata.name: docopt
metadata.description: Create *beautiful* command-line interfaces with Python

summary.zh: docopt 是一个 Python 命令行接口生成工具，通过编写美观的文档字符串自动生成解析器，支持基于 Usage 模式的参数和选项解析，简化 CLI 开发流程，提升代码可读性。
summary.en: docopt is a Python library that automatically generates command-line interfaces from docstrings, parsing usage patterns and options to create clean, readable CLI tools without manual parser coding.

metadata.name: RimeFiles
metadata.description: Rime 词库及配置

summary.zh: Rime 输入法跨平台配置文件集合，涵盖 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 系统下的词库与配置扩展，支持自定义快捷键、候选栏、输入方案及外观样式，提供 luna_pinyin 扩展词库与个性化定制模板，适用于高效中文输入与本地化部署。
summary.en: A comprehensive collection of Rime input method configurations for Windows, macOS, and Linux, including custom dictionaries, input scheme definitions, candidate display settings, and UI styling. Features extended pinyin dictionaries and user-customizable templates for personalized Chinese input experience.

metadata.name: MyPlatform
metadata.description: 文科生也会配的微信个人号后台，Content based wechat massive platform framework, what you need to do is only adding your articles in :)

summary.zh: MyPlatform 是一个专为非技术用户设计的微信个人号内容管理平台，支持通过添加文章快速搭建微信公众号。基于 Python 开发，部署于新浪云（SAE），完全免费且配置简单，文科生也可在20分钟内完成搭建，实现内容分发与互动功能。
summary.en: MyPlatform is a content-based WeChat personal account backend framework designed for non-technical users. Built with Python and hosted on SAE, it enables quick setup by adding articles, allowing anyone to create a functional WeChat content platform in under 20 minutes with zero cost.

metadata.name: ItChat
metadata.description: A complete and graceful API for Wechat. 微信个人号接口、微信机器人及命令行微信，三十行即可自定义个人号机器人。

summary.zh: itchat 是一个基于 Python 的微信个人号完整 API，支持微信机器人开发、命令行微信及自动化操作。通过简单代码即可实现消息收发、好友管理、附件下载、群聊处理等功能，支持多开、热重载、命令行二维码显示等高级特性，适合快速构建个性化微信应用。
summary.en: itchat is a complete and elegant Python API for WeChat personal accounts, enabling easy development of WeChat bots, command-line WeChat, and automation. It supports message handling, friend management, file downloads, group chat processing, multi-instance operation, hot reload, and command-line QR code display, ideal for building custom WeChat applications quickly.

metadata.name: django-request
metadata.description: django-request is a statistics module for django. It stores requests in a database for admins to see, it can also be used to get statistics on who is online etc.

summary.zh: django-request 是一个为 Django 框架设计的网站统计模块，自动记录用户请求至数据库，支持管理员查看访问数据、在线用户统计及流量分析。通过中间件集成和模板标签，可轻松实现用户活跃度监控与访问趋势可视化，适用于需要精细化运营分析的网站项目。
summary.en: django-request is a Django statistics module that logs HTTP requests to a database for admins to analyze. It enables real-time tracking of online users, visitor statistics, and traffic insights via built-in middleware and template tags, ideal for monitoring user engagement and site performance in Django applications.

metadata.name: AndroidGuide
metadata.description: AndroidCat安卓书签导航集合

summary.zh: AndroidCat 是一个专为 Android 开发者打造的网址导航集合，涵盖资源文档、技术社区、教程、开源项目等八大类别，提供官方文档、设计指南、开发框架、技术资讯等一站式学习资源，助力开发者高效获取 Android 开发所需工具和知识。
summary.en: AndroidCat is a curated collection of Android development resources, serving as a comprehensive navigation hub for developers. It aggregates official documentation, design guidelines, frameworks, tutorials, open-source projects, and tech communities across eight categories, enabling efficient access to essential tools and knowledge for Android development.

metadata.name: one-python
metadata.description: We don't need a lot of libraries. We just need the best ones. | Unofficial recommended first choice.

summary.zh: one-python 精选 Python 生态中最优质的库，涵盖机器学习、深度学习、自然语言处理、网络爬虫、数据分析等核心领域，推荐 scikit-learn、TensorFlow、pandas、requests、Scrapy 等高效工具，助力开发者以最少依赖实现强大功能。
summary.en: one-python curates the best Python libraries across key domains like machine learning, deep learning, NLP, web crawling, and data analysis. It recommends top tools such as scikit-learn, TensorFlow, pandas, requests, and Scrapy, enabling developers to build powerful applications with minimal dependencies.

metadata.name: celery-task-tigger
metadata.description: A controllable timing task widgets with Celery

summary.zh: celery-task-tigger 是一个基于 Celery 的可控定时任务组件，支持任务执行次数限制（max_times）和自定义执行间隔（countdown），解决了原生周期性任务依赖 beat 的痛点，实现更灵活的任务调度与控制。
summary.en: celery-task-tigger is a Celery-based controllable timing task widget that supports execution frequency control (max_times) and custom intervals (countdown), solving the limitation of native periodic tasks relying on beat for more flexible task scheduling.

metadata.name: district
metadata.description: 中国省/自治区/直辖市、市/自治州、区/县/旗数据，包含名称、拼音、拼音首字母、行政代码、区号

summary.zh: 该仓库提供中国完整的行政区划数据，涵盖省、市、县三级行政单位，包含名称、拼音、行政代码、区号等关键字段，支持MySQL和CSV格式导出，适用于地理信息系统、地址解析、数据统计分析等场景，数据来源权威且定期更新。
summary.en: This repository provides comprehensive Chinese administrative division data, covering provinces, cities, and counties, including name, pinyin, administrative code, and area code. It supports MySQL and CSV formats for easy integration into various databases and applications, ideal for GIS, address parsing, and data analysis.

metadata.name: ohmyzsh
metadata.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

summary.zh: Oh My Zsh 是一个社区驱动的 zsh 配置管理框架，提供 300+ 插件（如 Git、Docker、Node.js）和 140+ 主题，支持自动更新。它通过丰富的扩展功能提升终端体验，让用户在开发效率与个性化之间获得平衡，同时保持轻量与易用性。
summary.en: Oh My Zsh is a community-driven framework for managing zsh configurations, offering 300+ optional plugins (e.g., Git, Docker, Node.js) and 140+ themes, with auto-update support. It enhances terminal productivity and personalization through extensible plugins and beautiful themes, balancing power and simplicity for developers.

metadata.name: awesome-python
metadata.description: An opinionated list of awesome Python frameworks, libraries, software and resources.

summary.zh: Awesome Python 是一个精选的 Python 框架、库、软件和资源的权威列表，涵盖 Web 开发、数据科学、机器学习、自动化工具等多个领域，为开发者提供高质量的开源工具参考。
summary.en: Awesome Python is an opinionated curated list of top-tier Python frameworks, libraries, software, and resources across domains like web development, data science, machine learning, and automation, serving as a definitive reference for developers.

metadata.name: PinchImageView
metadata.description: 体验极佳的Android图片手势控件。An Android image gesture control with excellent user experience.

summary.zh: PinchImageView 是一款高性能 Android 图片手势控件，提供流畅的单指滑动、双指缩放、惯性滚动等交互体验。支持大图分段加载、分辨率切换、边界反弹及自定义扩展，集成简单且无外部依赖，适用于高清图片浏览场景。
summary.en: PinchImageView is a high-performance Android image gesture control with smooth single-finger swipe, two-finger pinch-zoom, and inertia scrolling. It supports large image segment loading, resolution switching, boundary rebound, and extensible APIs, making it ideal for high-definition image viewing with minimal integration effort.

metadata.name: interview_python
metadata.description: 关于Python的面试题

summary.zh: 该仓库系统整理了Python语言特性、操作系统、数据库、网络及数据结构等核心面试知识点，涵盖函数参数传递、元类、装饰器、GIL、协程、垃圾回收机制等高级特性，并提供经典编程题解析（如斐波那契、链表操作、排序算法），是Python开发者面试准备的权威资料库。
summary.en: This repository compiles comprehensive Python interview questions covering language features (e.g., metaclasses, decorators, GIL), operating systems (IPC, memory management), databases (transactions, MVCC), networking (TCP/IP, HTTP), and data structures. It includes algorithm implementations like Fibonacci, sorting, and tree traversals, serving as a complete technical reference for Python job interviews.

metadata.name: pyPdf
metadata.description: Pure-Python PDF Library; this repository is no longer maintained, please see https://github.com/knowah/PyPDF2/ insead.

summary.zh: pyPdf 是一个纯 Python 编写的 PDF 处理库，支持 PDF 文档的读取、写入、页面旋转、水印合并和裁剪等操作，适用于文档自动化处理场景。尽管项目已停止维护，其核心功能仍可用于基础 PDF 操作。
summary.en: pyPdf is a pure-Python library for reading, writing, and manipulating PDF files, supporting operations like page rotation, watermarking, and cropping. Though unmaintained, it remains useful for basic PDF automation tasks.

metadata.name: pdfminer
metadata.description: Python PDF Parser (Not actively maintained). Check out pdfminer.six.

summary.zh: PDFMiner 是一个用于从 PDF 文档中提取文本和布局信息的纯 Python 工具，支持 PDF-1.7 格式及多种字体类型，具备自动排版分析、加密文档处理、CJK 语言支持等功能，可将 PDF 转换为文本、HTML、XML 等格式，并提供命令行工具与调试接口。
summary.en: PDFMiner is a pure Python tool for extracting text and layout information from PDF documents, supporting PDF-1.7, various fonts, encryption, and CJK languages. It enables conversion to text, HTML, XML, and provides detailed layout analysis via command-line tools. Note: This project is no longer actively maintained.

metadata.name: pdf2htmlEX
metadata.description: Convert PDF to HTML without losing text or format.

summary.zh: pdf2htmlEX 是一款将 PDF 转换为高质量 HTML 的工具，完美保留原文文本、字体、排版及复杂布局（如数学公式、图表、多栏排版），支持链接、书签、SVG 背景等功能。适用于学术文献、杂志等复杂文档的网页化发布，提供单文件输出或按需加载模式，文件体积通常小于原 PDF。
summary.en: pdf2htmlEX converts PDF files into HTML while preserving text, fonts, layout, and complex elements like formulas and figures. It supports links, bookmarks, SVG backgrounds, and more. Ideal for publishing academic papers and magazines online, offering compact output (often smaller than PDF) with optional on-demand loading via JavaScript.

metadata.name: django-notifications
metadata.description: GitHub notifications alike app for Django

summary.zh: django-notifications 是一个专为 Django 设计的 GitHub 风格通知系统，基于 Activity Streams 规范构建。它通过 Actor、Verb、Action Object 和 Target 四元组模型实现灵活的事件通知机制，支持任意 Django 对象间的关联，适用于构建用户动态、活动提醒等场景。
summary.en: django-notifications is a GitHub-style notification system for Django, built on the Activity Streams specification. It uses a four-component model (Actor, Verb, Action Object, Target) to create flexible event-based notifications, supporting arbitrary Django object relationships for user activity feeds and real-time alerts.

metadata.name: react-native-macos
metadata.description: [deprecated in favor of https://microsoft.github.io/react-native-windows/] React Native for macOS is an experimental fork for writing desktop apps using Cocoa

summary.zh: React Native macOS 是一个实验性分支，允许使用 React Native 和 Cocoa 构建 macOS 桌面应用。该项目已停止维护，推荐迁移至微软官方支持的 React Native Windows 或利用 Catalyst 技术运行。
summary.en: React Native for macOS was an experimental fork enabling desktop app development using React Native and Cocoa. The project is now deprecated and no longer maintained, with Microsoft's React Native Windows recommended as the successor.

metadata.name: Wox
metadata.description: A cross-platform launcher that simply works

summary.zh: Wox 是一款跨平台启动器，提供快速搜索应用、文件、文件夹及AI聊天功能，支持MCP集成。通过插件系统和主题扩展，用户可用JavaScript或Python开发自定义功能。软件为单文件免安装，兼容Windows/macOS/Linux，快捷键操作高效便捷，是Alfred和Raycast的开源替代方案。
summary.en: Wox is a cross-platform launcher offering fast search for apps, files, and folders, plus AI chat with MCP support. It features a plugin system (JavaScript/Python) and themes, runs as a single executable without installation, and supports Windows, macOS, and Linux. Designed as an open-source alternative to Alfred and Raycast, it emphasizes simplicity and extensibility.

metadata.name: django-newcache
metadata.description: Improved memcached cache backend for Django

summary.zh: django-newcache 是 Django 的增强型 memcached 缓存后端，支持 pylibmc、键哈希/版本化/风味化、无限超时及雪崩防护。通过自动处理键格式、版本控制和命名空间隔离，提升缓存安全性与多环境兼容性，默认行为已优化，支持自定义键生成函数。
summary.en: django-newcache is an enhanced memcached backend for Django, offering pylibmc support, key hashing/versioning/flavoring, infinite timeouts, and thundering herd mitigation. It auto-hashes keys for safety, uses versioning for cache invalidation, and adds flavor prefixes for environment isolation—all with sensible defaults and optional custom key functions.

metadata.name: django-ft-cache
metadata.description: A fault-tolerant pylibmc cache backend for Django

summary.zh: django-ft-cache 是一个为 Django 设计的容错 pylibmc 缓存后端，通过 FaultTolerantCacheMixin 机制在缓存操作失败时记录日志而非抛出异常，避免因缓存故障导致应用崩溃，提升系统稳定性。
summary.en: django-ft-cache is a fault-tolerant pylibmc cache backend for Django that catches and logs cache failures instead of raising exceptions, preventing application crashes due to cache issues and improving system resilience.

metadata.name: django-devserver
metadata.description: A drop-in replacement for Django's runserver.

summary.zh: django-devserver 是 Django runserver 的即用型替代方案，提供实时 SQL 日志、Werkzeug 调试器集成、多进程/线程支持及内存分析等功能，显著提升开发调试效率。
summary.en: django-devserver is a drop-in replacement for Django's runserver, offering real-time SQL logging, Werkzeug debugger integration, multi-process/threaded modes, and memory profiling to enhance development debugging.

metadata.name: django-debug-panel
metadata.description: django-debug-toolbar in WebKit DevTools. Works fine with background Ajax requests and non-HTML responses.

summary.zh: Django Debug Panel 将 Django Debug Toolbar 集成至 WebKit DevTools，支持 AJAX 请求和 HTML 响应外的调试场景，专为单页应用和 AJAX 密集型项目设计，提供浏览器内实时调试能力。
summary.en: Django Debug Panel embeds the Django Debug Toolbar into WebKit DevTools, enabling debugging for AJAX requests and non-HTML responses. Ideal for single-page and AJAX-heavy applications, it offers in-browser real-time debugging.

metadata.name: django-filer
metadata.description: File and Image Management Application for django

summary.zh: django-filer 是专为 Django 设计的文件与图片管理应用，提供直观的文件库管理、图片裁剪、批量操作等功能，深度集成 django CMS，支持拖拽上传、权限控制和多格式预览，显著提升内容管理系统的媒体资源管理效率。
summary.en: Django Filer is a file and image management application for Django that simplifies handling of media assets. It offers intuitive file browsing, image manipulation, batch operations, and seamless integration with django CMS, enhancing content management workflows with drag-and-drop uploads, permission controls, and multi-format support.

metadata.name: django-rest-framework-docs
metadata.description: Document Web APIs made with Django Rest Framework

summary.zh: DRF Docs 是一个专为 Django Rest Framework 设计的 API 文档生成工具，支持 Python 2.7/3.x 和 Django 1.8+。它能自动解析 DRF 项目中的 API 结构，生成交互式文档页面，并提供安装配置指南、模板扩展及开发示例。项目提供实时 API 端点演示，支持隐藏文档和登录验证等配置选项，适合快速构建可维护的 RESTful API 文档。
summary.en: DRF Docs is a tool to auto-generate interactive documentation for Django Rest Framework APIs, supporting Python 2.7/3.x and Django 1.8+. It parses API structures to create browsable docs with installation guides, template customization, and live demo endpoints. Features include optional doc hiding, login protection, and seamless integration via pip and URL routing, ideal for maintaining RESTful API documentation.

metadata.name: django-rest-framework-docs
metadata.description: Document Web APIs made with Django Rest Framework

summary.zh: DRF Docs 是一个专为 Django Rest Framework 设计的 API 文档自动生成工具，支持 Python 2.7/3.x 和 Django 1.8+。它能自动解析 DRF 项目中的 API 结构，生成交互式文档页面，并提供配置选项控制文档可见性。项目包含演示环境，支持模板扩展，适用于需要快速搭建标准化 API 文档的中大型后端服务。
summary.en: DRF Docs is an automated API documentation generator for Django Rest Framework, supporting Python 2.7/3.x and Django 1.8+. It auto-generates interactive API docs by parsing DRF project structures, with configurable visibility and template extension support. Includes a demo project for development and testing, ideal for medium-to-large backend services requiring standardized API documentation.

metadata.name: cxSelect
metadata.description: cxSelect 是基于 jQuery 的多级联动菜单插件，适用于省市、商品分类等联动菜单。

summary.zh: cxSelect 是一个基于 jQuery 和 Zepto 的多级联动菜单插件，支持通过 AJAX 或自定义 JSON 数据动态加载省市、商品分类等层级选项，兼容移动端，提供灵活的参数配置与 API 控制，适用于表单联动场景。
summary.en: cxSelect is a jQuery and Zepto-based plugin for multi-level cascading menus, supporting dynamic loading of hierarchical options (e.g., provinces, cities) via AJAX or custom JSON data. It offers flexible configuration, mobile compatibility, and full API control for form interactions.

metadata.name: zh_mysite
metadata.description: django最佳实践 项目目录结构布局

summary.zh: 该项目提供 Django 最佳实践的项目目录结构布局，推荐采用分层结构：apps 存放功能模块，configs 管理各类服务配置（如 Gunicorn、Nginx），deploy 包含自动化部署脚本，settings 按环境分离配置，static 和 templates 分别管理静态资源与模板文件。同时建议用 Gunicorn 替代 Apache、Celery + Redis 处理异步任务、MongoDB 替代传统 SQL 数据库，并推荐使用 TastyPie 构建 REST API。
summary.en: This project presents Django best practices for directory structure, recommending a modular layout with apps for functionality, configs for service setups (Gunicorn, Nginx), deploy for deployment scripts, settings per environment, and static/templates for assets. It also advises using Gunicorn over Apache, Celery+Redis for async tasks, MongoDB for schema flexibility, and Django-TastyPie for REST APIs.

metadata.name: django-layout
metadata.description: Django project template layout

summary.zh: django-layout 是一个基于最佳实践的 Django 项目模板，提供开箱即用的现代化开发体验。集成 uv 依赖管理、ruff/prettier 代码规范、goodconf 环境配置、结构化日志、TailwindCSS 样式方案、pytest 测试框架及 mypy 类型检查，支持 Docker 部署，显著提升 Django 项目初始化效率与生产环境健壮性。
summary.en: django-layout is a modern Django project template offering sane defaults based on best practices. It integrates uv for dependency management, ruff/prettier for linting, goodconf for config, structured logging, TailwindCSS, pytest with coverage, mypy for type safety, and production-ready settings via Docker, streamlining Django project setup and deployment.

metadata.name: django-import-export
metadata.description: Django application and library for importing and exporting data with admin integration.

summary.zh: django-import-export 是一个专为 Django 应用设计的强大数据导入导出库，支持 CSV、Excel、JSON 等多种格式，提供 Admin 后台集成和编程接口。核心功能包括数据预览、批量导入、CRUD 操作控制、外键与多对多关系处理、数据验证及自定义转换，适用于需要高效处理大规模数据迁移或批量操作的 Web 应用。
summary.en: django-import-export is a robust Django library for importing and exporting data across multiple formats (CSV, Excel, JSON, etc.). It offers seamless Admin UI integration and programmatic access, featuring data preview, bulk import, CRUD control, foreign key/many-to-many relation handling, validation, and custom transformations—ideal for data migration and batch operations in Django applications.

metadata.name: pace
metadata.description: Automatically add a progress bar to your site.

summary.zh: PACE 是一个自动为网站添加进度条的轻量级 JavaScript 库，无需手动配置即可通过监控 Ajax 请求、事件循环延迟、文档就绪状态和页面元素来智能计算加载进度，支持多种主题样式和自定义配置，适用于提升用户页面加载体验。
summary.en: PACE is a lightweight JavaScript library that automatically adds a progress bar to websites. It intelligently monitors Ajax requests, event loop lag, document readiness, and page elements to calculate loading progress without manual setup, featuring multiple themes and customizable options for enhanced user experience.

metadata.name: django-debug-toolbar
metadata.description: A configurable set of panels that display various debug information about the current request/response.

summary.zh: Django Debug Toolbar 是一个可配置的调试面板集合，实时展示当前请求/响应的详细信息，包括 SQL 查询、模板渲染、缓存状态等，显著提升 Django 开发调试效率。支持社区贡献的第三方扩展面板，兼容 Django 4.2+，并提供异步视图实验性支持。
summary.en: Django Debug Toolbar is a configurable set of panels that display detailed debug information about the current request/response, including SQL queries, templates, caching, and more. It enhances Django development by providing real-time insights and supports third-party community panels. Compatible with Django 4.2+, with experimental async view support.

metadata.name: weui-sketch
metadata.description: weui sketch by ZTfer

summary.zh: 该仓库提供微信官方 WeUI 设计框架的 Sketch 源文件，包含完整 UI 组件库（按钮、单元格、弹窗、进度条等），尺寸与色彩严格遵循 WeUI 规范，支持 750*1334 设计稿尺寸，配套字体与@0.5x/@2x 效果图，助力设计师高效产出符合微信原生体验的界面。
summary.en: This repository provides Sketch source files for WeUI, a UI framework by WeChat. It includes fully designed components (buttons, cells, dialogs, progress bars, etc.) with exact adherence to WeUI's design specs, supporting 750*1334 layout, bundled with @0.5x/@2x preview images and system fonts for rapid prototyping.

metadata.name: vue-weui
metadata.description: (Deprecated) WeUI Components with love of vue.js

summary.zh: vue-weui 是一个已停止维护的 Vue 组件库，封装了 WeUI 0.4.0+ 的微信风格 UI 组件，完全解耦 CSS 样式，支持按需引入以优化包体积，适用于移动端 Web 应用开发。
summary.en: vue-weui is a deprecated Vue component library that encapsulates WeUI 0.4.0+ components for WeChat Web apps. It decouples CSS for full customization and supports selective imports to minimize bundle size.

metadata.name: vue-weui
metadata.description: 针对 Vue 框架移植的 We UI 框架的适配，让 mobile开发过程成为一种享受。 Demo:

summary.zh: vue-weui 是将 WeUI 移动端 UI 框架适配到 Vue.js 的项目，结合 vue-router、ES6 和 Webpack 构建现代化移动应用开发环境，提供开箱即用的组件库和开发工具链，显著提升移动端开发效率与体验。
summary.en: vue-weui is a Vue.js adaptation of the WeUI mobile UI framework, integrating vue-router, ES6, and Webpack to deliver a modern development stack for mobile apps. It offers ready-to-use components and tooling to streamline mobile development.

metadata.name: react-weui
metadata.description: weui for react

summary.zh: React-WeUI 是基于 React 框架封装的 WeUI 组件库，提供与微信原生 UI 风格一致的移动端界面组件，支持 npm 安装与 CDN 引用，具备完善的文档与示例，适用于快速构建移动端 Web 应用。
summary.en: React-WeUI is a React-based component library implementing WeUI's native WeChat UI design, enabling rapid development of mobile web interfaces with npm installation, CDN support, and comprehensive documentation.

metadata.name: weui
metadata.description: A UI library by WeChat official design team, includes the most useful widgets/modules in mobile web applications.

summary.zh: WeUI 是腾讯微信官方设计团队打造的开源 UI 库，专为微信小程序和 Web 应用设计，提供丰富的移动端组件（如按钮、表单、弹窗等），确保与微信生态一致的用户体验，支持快速构建美观、标准化的移动 Web 应用。
summary.en: WeUI is an open-source UI library developed by Tencent's WeChat design team, specifically tailored for WeChat web and mini-program development. It offers a comprehensive set of mobile-first components (e.g., buttons, forms, dialogs) to deliver a consistent and standardized user experience across WeChat ecosystems, enabling rapid development of visually appealing mobile web apps.

metadata.name: react-demos
metadata.description: a collection of simple demos of React.js

summary.zh: 阮一峰 React.js 简易演示集，通过 13 个清晰示例系统讲解 React 核心概念，涵盖 JSX 语法、组件开发、状态管理、生命周期、表单处理及 Ajax 等，适合初学者快速上手 React 开发。
summary.en: A collection of simple React.js demos by Ruan YiFeng, covering core concepts like JSX, components, state management, lifecycle, forms, and Ajax through 13 clear examples, ideal for beginners to learn React effectively.

metadata.name: django-rest-framework-jwt
metadata.description: JSON Web Token Authentication support for Django REST Framework

summary.zh: 该项目为 Django REST Framework 提供 JSON Web Token (JWT) 身份验证支持，实现无状态用户认证。适用于需要安全、可扩展 API 的场景，如前后端分离应用。现已停止维护，建议使用官方或活跃替代方案。
summary.en: This package adds JSON Web Token (JWT) authentication support for Django REST Framework, enabling stateless API security. Ideal for modern web applications requiring secure, scalable authentication. Note: Project is unmaintained; alternatives recommended.

metadata.name: django-audit-log
metadata.description: Audit log for your Django models

summary.zh: django-audit-log 是一个 Django 模型审计日志库，提供用户追踪、变更记录和会话信息存储功能。支持 Django 1.6/1.7 及多版本 Python，通过中间件自动记录模型创建与修改操作，适用于需要完整操作历史追溯的 Web 应用。
summary.en: django-audit-log is a Django model audit logging library that tracks user actions, changes, and session keys for model instances. It supports Django 1.6/1.7, South and Django 1.7 migrations, and both Python 2.x and 3.x, enabling full audit trails for data modifications in web applications.

metadata.name: django-extensions
metadata.description: This is a repository for collecting global custom management extensions for the Django Framework.

summary.zh: Django Extensions 是一个为 Django 框架提供增强功能的扩展集合，包含模型可视化、URL 路由分析、模板验证、增强版 shell_plus 和 runserver_plus 等实用工具，显著提升开发效率与调试体验。
summary.en: Django Extensions is a collection of custom management extensions for Django, offering tools like model graphing, URL inspection, template validation, shell_plus, and runserver_plus to enhance developer productivity and debugging workflows.

summary.zh: 本项目演示如何使用 Docker Compose 快速搭建基于 Docker 的 Django 应用开发环境，包含 Django、MySQL 和 Redis 服务编排，支持一键构建与部署，适用于容器化 Django 项目的开发与测试。
summary.en: This project demonstrates how to quickly set up a Django development environment using Docker Compose, including orchestration of Django, MySQL, and Redis services. It supports one-click build and deployment, ideal for containerized Django development and testing.

metadata.name: django-threadedcomments
metadata.description: django-threadedcomments is a simple yet flexible threaded commenting system for Django.

summary.zh: django-threadedcomments 是一个基于 Django 的简洁灵活线程化评论系统，支持评论嵌套回复。它构建于 django_comments 之上，易于扩展，提供完整的模板标签和表单渲染功能，适用于博客、文章等内容的互动评论场景。
summary.en: django-threadedcomments is a lightweight yet flexible threaded commenting system for Django, enabling nested replies to both posts and other comments. Built on django_comments, it offers extensible template tags and seamless integration with custom designs, ideal for blogs and articles.

metadata.name: Django-Design-Patterns-and-Best-Practices
metadata.description: 《Django设计模式与最佳实践》2015年03月-基于Django 1.7

summary.zh: 《Django设计模式与最佳实践》系统讲解Django 1.7下的模型设计模式与工程实践，涵盖规范化、类图建模、多文件模型拆分等核心模式，强调模型作为Django应用基石的重要性，适用于构建可维护的大型Web应用。
summary.en: This book systematically covers Django 1.7 design patterns and best practices, focusing on model design including normalization, class diagrams, and modularization. It emphasizes models as the foundation of Django applications, enabling scalable and maintainable web development.

metadata.name: django-qiniu-storage
metadata.description: Django storage for 七牛云存储

summary.zh: Django Qiniu Storage 是一个专为 Django 框架设计的七牛云存储后端存储库，支持通过标准 Django Storage API 无缝集成七牛云存储服务，适用于托管静态资源和用户上传文件，支持 HTTPS 访问和灵活的配置方式。
summary.en: Django Qiniu Storage is a Django backend storage library for Qiniu Cloud Storage, enabling seamless integration with Django's Storage API to manage static files and user uploads via Qiniu's CDN, supporting HTTPS access and flexible configuration via environment variables or settings.

metadata.name: django-qiniu
metadata.description: Qiniu(http://www.qiniu.com) is a cloud storage service, this package interages it with django framework.

summary.zh: django-qiniu 是一个过时的 Django 插件，用于将七牛云存储服务集成到 Django 框架中。它通过自定义字段（如 QiniuFileField 和 QiniuImageField）简化文件上传与管理，支持自动生成文件 URL 和图像缩略图处理。需配合七牛 Python SDK 使用，现已不推荐使用，建议迁移至更现代的 django-qiniu-storage 方案。
summary.en: django-qiniu is an outdated Django package that integrates Qiniu cloud storage with Django. It provides custom fields like QiniuFileField and QiniuImageField for seamless file uploads, URL generation, and image processing (e.g., thumbnails). Requires the Qiniu Python SDK and is no longer maintained; modern alternatives like django-qiniu-storage are recommended.

metadata.name: django-filter
metadata.description: A generic system for filtering Django QuerySets based on user selections

summary.zh: Django-filter 是一个用于在 Django 中基于用户选择动态过滤 QuerySet 的通用应用，支持通过 URL 参数生成类似 admin 的筛选界面，提供类似 ModelForms 的声明式 API，并深度集成 Django REST Framework，适用于构建灵活的数据筛选接口。
summary.en: Django-filter is a reusable Django application that enables declarative dynamic QuerySet filtering via URL parameters, offering an API similar to ModelForms. It supports admin-like filtering interfaces and integrates seamlessly with Django REST Framework for building flexible data filtering endpoints.

metadata.name: django-crontab
metadata.description: dead simple crontab powered job scheduling for django.

summary.zh: django-crontab 是一个为 Django 项目提供极简 Cron 任务调度的工具，支持通过 Python 方法或 Django 管理命令定义定时任务，自动同步到系统 crontab，并提供添加、查看和移除任务的管理命令，适用于 1.8-2.0 版本的 Django 项目。
summary.en: django-crontab is a dead-simple tool for Django that enables cron-powered job scheduling via Python methods or management commands. It automatically syncs CRONJOBS to the system crontab and provides commands to add, show, and remove tasks, supporting Django 1.8-2.0.

metadata.name: iOSInterviewQuestions
metadata.description: iOS interview questions;iOS面试题集锦（附答案）

summary.zh: 该仓库系统整理了iOS开发面试中的核心知识点，涵盖Objective-C和Swift两大技术栈，包含55道经典面试题及详细参考答案，重点涉及内存管理、多线程、Runtime机制、KVC/KVO、Block等底层原理，并提供理论篇与实践篇双版本解析，是iOS开发者求职与技能提升的权威参考资料。
summary.en: This repository compiles 55 essential iOS interview questions with comprehensive answers in both Objective-C and Swift, covering core topics like memory management, multithreading, Runtime mechanisms, KVC/KVO, and Blocks. It includes theoretical and practical sections, serving as a definitive resource for iOS developers preparing for technical interviews and deepening their understanding of system-level concepts.

metadata.name: wechat-deleted-friends
metadata.description: 查看被删的微信好友

summary.zh: 该项目通过微信网页版接口检测被删除好友，原理为新建群组测试好友是否可添加。因接口存在人数限制及微信策略变更，已无法正常使用。推荐替代方案包括网页版微信API及Electron桌面客户端，支持Python、Go、Node.js等多语言实现。
summary.en: This project detects WeChat users who deleted you by creating group tests via the web interface. It is now unusable due to API rate limits and policy changes. Alternatives include web-based WeChat APIs and Electron desktop clients, with implementations in Python, Go, and Node.js.

metadata.name: bootstrap
metadata.description: PLEASE READ THE PROJECT STATUS BELOW.  Native AngularJS (Angular) directives for Bootstrap. Smaller footprint (20kB gzipped), no 3rd party JS dependencies (jQuery, bootstrap JS) required. Please read the README.md file before submitting an issue!

summary.zh: UI Bootstrap 是专为 AngularJS 设计的原生指令库，提供 Bootstrap 组件的轻量实现（仅20kB gzipped），无需依赖 jQuery 或 Bootstrap 的 JavaScript。项目已停止维护，推荐迁移至 ng-bootstrap 以支持 Angular 2+。核心优势包括模块化构建、与 AngularJS 深度集成及完善的动画支持。
summary.en: UI Bootstrap provides native AngularJS directives for Bootstrap components with a minimal footprint (20kB gzipped), requiring no jQuery or Bootstrap JS dependencies. The project is now feature-complete and unmaintained, with migration to ng-bootstrap recommended for Angular 2+ users. Key features include modular builds, deep AngularJS integration, and ngAnimate support.

metadata.name: django-photologue
metadata.description: A customizable plug-in photo gallery management application for the Django web framework.

summary.zh: Django-photologue 是一个专为 Django 框架设计的强大图片管理与画廊应用，支持上传照片、创建画廊、添加水印等效果，提供灵活的插件化架构，适用于构建定制化图片展示网站。
summary.en: Django-photologue is a powerful image management and gallery application for Django, enabling photo uploads, gallery organization, watermarking, and flexible customization for web-based photo displays.

metadata.name: githug
metadata.description: Git your game on!

summary.zh: Githug 是一个通过游戏化方式学习 Git 命令的实践工具，包含多个难度递增的关卡，每个关卡要求玩家使用特定 Git 命令达成目标。它基于 Ruby 开发，支持跨平台运行，提供提示、重置和关卡列表功能，适合 Git 初学者系统掌握版本控制技能。
summary.en: Githug is a practical game designed to teach Git through interactive levels. Each level challenges users to use specific Git commands to achieve a goal. Built in Ruby, it runs on Linux, macOS, and Windows, offering hints, resets, and level progression to help beginners master version control effectively.

metadata.name: markdown
metadata.description: A Python implementation of John Gruber’s Markdown with Extension support.

summary.zh: Python-Markdown 是 Python 实现的 John Gruber 官方 Markdown 语法解析器，高度兼容参考实现，支持扩展机制，提供简洁的 API 将 Markdown 文本转换为标准 HTML，广泛用于文档生成、静态站点构建和内容管理系统。
summary.en: Python-Markdown is a Python implementation of John Gruber's Markdown, nearly fully compliant with the reference implementation. It supports extensible syntax via plugins, offering a clean API to convert Markdown text into HTML, widely used in documentation, static site generation, and content management systems.

metadata.name: django-markdown-deux
metadata.description: A django app that provides Markdown-related template tags using the python-markdown2 library.

summary.zh: django-markdown-deux 是一个轻量级 Django 应用，基于 python-markdown2 库提供 Markdown 模板标签支持。它允许在 Django 模板中通过 `markdown` 过滤器或块标签渲染 Markdown 内容，并支持自定义样式配置，适用于需要统一 Markdown 渲染选项的场景。
summary.en: django-markdown-deux is a lightweight Django app that provides Markdown template tags using the python-markdown2 library. It enables rendering Markdown in Django templates via the `markdown` filter or block tag, with support for customizable styles via configuration, ideal for consistent Markdown processing across templates.

metadata.name: django-suit
metadata.description: Modern theme for Django admin interface

summary.zh: Django Suit 是一个现代化的 Django 管理后台主题，提供简洁美观的界面设计，显著提升 Django 管理员的使用体验。支持 v1 稳定版与 v2 开发版，具备响应式布局和增强的交互功能，适用于需要优化后台管理界面的 Django 项目。
summary.en: Django Suit is a modern theme for the Django admin interface, offering a clean and enhanced UI to improve the admin experience. It supports both stable v1 and experimental v2 versions, featuring responsive design and improved usability for Django projects requiring a professional admin panel.

metadata.name: nprogress
metadata.description: For slim progress bars like on YouTube, Medium, etc

summary.zh: NProgress 是一个轻量级进度条库，专为 Ajax 应用设计，灵感来自 YouTube、Medium 等网站。它提供极简的 API 控制进度条，支持 Turbolinks、Pjax 等现代前端框架集成，并允许自定义配置如最小值、动画速度和模板。
summary.en: NProgress is a minimalist progress bar library for Ajax applications, inspired by YouTube and Medium. It offers a simple API to control the bar, integrates with frameworks like Turbolinks and Pjax, and supports customization of minimum value, animation speed, and template.

metadata.name: atom
metadata.description: :atom: The hackable text editor

summary.zh: Atom 是一款基于 Electron 构建的现代化可定制文本编辑器，专为 21 世纪开发者设计。它融合了经典编辑器的优点，支持深度自定义但默认配置友好易用，适用于跨平台开发环境。
summary.en: Atom is a hackable, modern text editor built on Electron, designed for deep customization while remaining approachable. It combines the best features of traditional editors with a flexible, open-source architecture for developers.

metadata.name: blog
metadata.description: My hexo blog source code

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Hexo 框架的个人博客源码仓库，用于部署静态博客网站。项目包含完整的博客配置、主题定制、文章管理及插件集成，适合技术分享与个人内容发布。
summary.en: This repository contains the source code of my personal blog built with Hexo, a static site generator. It includes configuration, themes, posts, and plugins for deploying a fully functional blog.

metadata.name: python-social-auth
metadata.description: Social auth made simple

summary.zh: Python Social Auth 是一个简单易用的社交认证/注册机制库，支持多种框架和第三方认证提供商。基于 django-social-auth 重构，提供统一接口定义新认证源，并扩展对更多框架和 ORM 的支持。该项目已于2016年12月3日停止维护，代码已迁移至 python-social-auth 组织。
summary.en: Python Social Auth is a simple social authentication/registration library supporting multiple frameworks and auth providers. Built on django-social-auth, it offers a unified interface to define third-party authentication providers and extend support for additional frameworks and ORMs. Deprecated since Dec 3, 2016, with code migrated to the python-social-auth organization.

metadata.name: django-social-auth
metadata.description: Django social authentication made simple

summary.zh: Django Social Auth 是一个为 Django 项目提供社交登录功能的库，支持 Google、Facebook、Twitter 等 40+ 主流平台的 OAuth/OAuth2/OpenID 认证。它基于 python-social-auth 构建，提供用户注册、多账号关联、自定义用户模型和认证管道扩展等核心能力，现已被官方标记为弃用状态。
summary.en: Django Social Auth is a deprecated library enabling social login via OAuth/OAuth2/OpenID for Django projects. It supports 40+ providers including Google, Facebook, and Twitter, offering user registration, multi-account association, custom user models, and extensible authentication pipelines. Now superseded by python-social-auth.

metadata.name: django-rest-swagger
metadata.description: Swagger Documentation Generator for Django REST Framework: deprecated

summary.zh: Django REST Swagger 是一个为 Django REST Framework 提供 Swagger 文档生成的工具，现已废弃。它通过 OpenAPIRenderer 和 SwaggerUIRenderer 自动生成 API 的 OpenAPI 规范及交互式文档界面，支持自定义标题和路由配置，适用于快速构建可浏览的 REST API 文档。
summary.en: Django REST Swagger was a deprecated tool for generating Swagger documentation for Django REST Framework. It provided OpenAPIRenderer and SwaggerUIRenderer to auto-generate API specs and interactive UI, enabling browsable REST API docs with customizable titles and routing, now succeeded by drf-yasg.

metadata.name: PyZh
metadata.description: :books: 一起写Python文章，一起看Python文章 - 利用readthedocs的Python技术文章的收集和翻译。

summary.zh: PyZh 是一个基于 ReadTheDocs 的 Python 技术文章翻译与收集项目，致力于汇聚优质英文技术文档并提供中文翻译。项目采用 RST 格式编写，支持多语言协作，提供 RSS 订阅和在线浏览功能，鼓励社区共同参与内容创作与翻译。
summary.en: PyZh is a Python technology article translation and collection project built on ReadTheDocs, aiming to aggregate high-quality English technical articles with Chinese translations. It uses RST format, supports collaborative writing, offers RSS subscription and online reading, and encourages community contributions.

metadata.name: scrapy-djangoitem
metadata.description: Scrapy extension to write scraped items using Django models

summary.zh: scrapy-djangoitem 是一个 Scrapy 扩展，允许使用 Django 模型定义 Scrapy 项目中的 Item。它提供 DjangoItem 类，将 Django 模型字段自动映射为 Scrapy Item 字段，并支持通过 save() 方法将抓取数据直接保存为 Django 模型实例，简化了爬虫与 Django 应用的数据集成。
summary.en: scrapy-djangoitem is a Scrapy extension that enables defining Scrapy items using existing Django models. It provides the DjangoItem class, which automatically maps Django model fields to Scrapy item fields and supports saving scraped data directly into Django model instances via the save() method, streamlining integration between Scrapy crawlers and Django applications.

metadata.name: quick-cocos2d-x
metadata.description: quick-cocos2d-x is a quick framework, based on cocos2d-x. Make mobile games in Lua.

summary.zh: quick-cocos2d-x 是触控科技基于 cocos2d-x 开发的 Lua 脚本扩展框架，专为移动端游戏快速开发设计。它提供完整的 Lua 脚本支持、高级 UI 库、代码加密与自动更新功能，显著降低开发成本并提升效率，适用于高品质手游产品的敏捷开发。
summary.en: Quick-Cocos2d-x is a Lua-based extension framework built on cocos2d-x by Touch Technology, designed for rapid mobile game development. It offers full Lua scripting support, advanced UI libraries, code encryption, and auto-update features, significantly reducing development costs and accelerating time-to-market for high-quality mobile games.

metadata.name: LocationReportEnabler
metadata.description: A simple android app to enable Google Location Report, Google Now and related functions in China mainland or somewhere like.

summary.zh: LocationReportEnabler 是一款专为中国大陆用户设计的 Android 应用，通过修改系统参数启用 Google 位置报告、Google Now 及相关功能。支持 ROOT 和 Xposed 框架两种模式，后者更稳定。核心功能包括设置运营商代码和 ISO 国家代码，以绕过地理限制，恢复 Google 服务的时间线功能。
summary.en: LocationReportEnabler is a simple Android app designed to enable Google Location Report, Google Now, and related features in mainland China. It works by setting system properties like gsm.sim.operator.numeric and iso-country to bypass regional restrictions. Available in ROOT and Xposed variants, with the latter recommended for better stability and clarity.

metadata.name: scrapy
metadata.description: Scrapy, a fast high-level web crawling & scraping framework for Python.

summary.zh: Scrapy 是一个高性能的 Python 网络爬虫框架，专为高效提取结构化数据而设计。支持跨平台运行，基于异步架构实现高并发抓取，提供灵活的中间件扩展机制，广泛用于数据采集、价格监控、内容聚合等场景。
summary.en: Scrapy is a high-performance Python web crawling and scraping framework designed for extracting structured data from websites. Built on an asynchronous architecture, it enables high-concurrency data extraction with flexible middleware support, widely used in data collection, price monitoring, and content aggregation.

metadata.name: django-pjax
metadata.description: This is a Django helper for @defunkt's jquery-pjax.

summary.zh: django-pjax 是一个 Django 扩展库，用于集成 jQuery-PJAX 实现页面局部异步加载，提升用户体验并保持浏览器历史记录。支持函数视图和类视图装饰器，自动替换模板为 `-pjax` 后缀版本，兼容 Python 2.7+/3.3+ 和 Django 1.3+。
summary.en: django-pjax is a Django helper library that integrates jQuery-PJAX for partial page loading via AJAX, enhancing performance while maintaining browser navigation. It supports decorators for function and class-based views, auto-swapping templates to `-pjax` variants, compatible with Python 2.7+/3.3+ and Django 1.3+.

metadata.name: pygments-css
metadata.description: css files created from pygment's built-in styles

summary.zh: 该项目提供由 Pygments 内置样式生成的预编译 CSS 文件，用于代码高亮显示，避免用户手动生成。支持一键重新生成所有样式文件，简化了代码语法高亮在网页中的集成流程。
summary.en: This repository provides pre-generated CSS files from Pygments' built-in styles for code syntax highlighting, eliminating the need for manual generation. It allows easy regeneration of all styles using the current Pygments version via a simple make command.

metadata.name: misaka
metadata.description: A Python binding for Hoedown.

summary.zh: Misaka 是一个已停止维护的 Python 绑定库，用于 Hoedown 的 Markdown 解析器。它提供高性能的 Markdown 转 HTML 功能，适用于需要轻量级、快速解析的场景。尽管项目不再更新，仍可作为历史参考或特定环境下的替代方案。
summary.en: Misaka is a discontinued Python binding for the Hoedown Markdown parser, offering fast and lightweight Markdown-to-HTML conversion. Though no longer maintained, it remains a historical reference or alternative for specific use cases where performance is critical.

metadata.name: python-markdown2
metadata.description: markdown2: A fast and complete implementation of Markdown in Python

summary.zh: markdown2 是一个高性能、完整的 Python Markdown 解析器，严格遵循原始 Perl 实现的行为。支持丰富的扩展语法（如代码高亮、表格、脚注等），兼容 Python 3.5+，提供模块和命令行两种使用方式，适合快速将 Markdown 转换为结构化的 HTML。
summary.en: markdown2 is a fast, complete Python implementation of Markdown that closely matches the original Perl version. It supports numerous extras like syntax highlighting, tables, and footnotes, works with Python 3.5+, and offers both module and CLI usage for converting Markdown to HTML.

metadata.name: django_markdown
metadata.description: Django markdown support and wysiwig

summary.zh: Django-Markdown 是一个为 Django 框架提供 Markdown 富文本编辑支持的扩展应用，支持在模型字段、表单、管理后台及静态页面中集成所见即所得（WYSIWYG）编辑器，内置预览功能和可配置扩展，适用于内容管理系统（CMS）和文档类 Web 应用。
summary.en: Django-Markdown is a Django app enabling Markdown WYSIWYG editing in models, forms, admin interfaces, and flatpages. It integrates a rich text editor with preview functionality, configurable extensions, and admin overrides, ideal for CMS and documentation-driven web applications.

metadata.name: django-uuslug
metadata.description: Generates Unique (& Unicode) slugs in Django Edit Add topics

summary.zh: Django Uuslug 是一个专为 Django 框架设计的 slug 生成工具，核心功能是确保生成的 URL 标识符既支持 Unicode 字符又具备唯一性。它通过智能截断、分隔符控制和停用词过滤，适用于多语言内容管理系统、博客平台和电商网站等需要友好 URL 的场景。
summary.en: Django Uuslug is a Django-specific slug generator that guarantees both Unicode support and uniqueness for URLs. It intelligently truncates, handles separators, and filters stopwords, making it ideal for multilingual CMS, blogs, and e-commerce sites requiring clean, readable URLs.

metadata.name: cmder
metadata.description: Lovely console emulator package for Windows

summary.zh: Cmder 是一款专为 Windows 设计的轻量级终端模拟器，基于 ConEmu 深度优化，集成 Monokai 配色、clink 增强命令行及自定义提示符。其核心优势在于完全便携性，无外部依赖，支持 USB 存储或云同步，内置 wget、curl、git 等工具，适合开发者随时随地高效使用命令行环境。
summary.en: Cmder is a portable console emulator for Windows, built on ConEmu with major enhancements including Monokai color scheme, clink integration, and customizable prompts. It offers zero external dependencies, ideal for USB drives or cloud storage, and includes tools like wget, curl, and git for seamless command-line productivity.

metadata.name: Clamp.js
metadata.description: Clamps an HTML element by adding ellipsis to it if the content inside is too long.

summary.zh: Clamp.js 是一个轻量级 JavaScript 库，用于在 HTML 元素内容过长时自动截断并添加省略号。支持单行、多行及基于高度的自适应截断，提供灵活的字符分割策略和原生 WebKit 支持，适用于响应式文本展示场景。
summary.en: Clamp.js is a lightweight JavaScript library that truncates HTML element content with ellipsis when text overflows. It supports single/multi-line clamping, auto-sizing based on height, customizable truncation characters, and optional native WebKit -webkit-line-clamp support, ideal for responsive text display.

metadata.name: django-chunks
metadata.description: Think of it as flatpages for small bits of reusable content you might want to insert into your templates and manage from the admin interface.

summary.zh: django-chunks 是一个轻量级 Django 应用，提供类似 flatpages 的可复用内容块管理功能。通过简单的模型和模板标签，开发者可在后台管理界面创建命名内容块（如 'home_page_left'），并在模板中动态插入，支持富文本编辑，适用于需要多区域内容管理的场景。
summary.en: django-chunks is a lightweight Django app that enables reusable content blocks similar to flatpages. It provides a model and template tag to manage named content chunks via the admin interface, allowing dynamic insertion into templates with rich text editing support—ideal for sites requiring multiple editable content areas.

metadata.name: Telegram-cn-l10n-bot
metadata.description: 一个发布 Telegram 翻译的 Bot

summary.zh: Telegram-cn-l10n-bot 是一个用于发布 Telegram 中文翻译的自动化 Bot，支持通过命令上传和管理 Android、iOS、桌面端语言文件。用户发送语言文件获取 file_id 后，使用 /setandroid、/setios、/setdesktop 命令绑定文件槽，实现多平台翻译包的高效分发。
summary.en: Telegram-cn-l10n-bot is an automated bot for publishing Telegram Chinese translations. It allows users to upload language files via commands (/setandroid, /setios, /setdesktop) using file_id, enabling efficient distribution of localized packages across platforms.

metadata.name: django-persistent-messages
metadata.description: A Django app for unified and persistent user messages/notifications, built on top of Django's messages framework

summary.zh: Django Persistent Messages 是一个基于 Django 消息框架的扩展应用，提供持久化用户消息/通知功能。支持认证用户将消息存储在数据库中，实现跨会话的‘粘性’提醒，直到用户标记为已读。未认证用户仍使用会话存储。统一 API 支持屏幕显示和邮件通知，兼容 Django 原生消息系统。
summary.en: Django Persistent Messages is a Django app extending the built-in messages framework to support persistent user notifications. It stores messages in the database for authenticated users, enabling sticky reminders until marked read. Anonymous users use session storage. Offers unified API for display and email notifications, fully compatible with Django's native messaging system.

metadata.name: django-persistent-messages
metadata.description: My independent fork of django-persistent-messages. A Django app for unified and persistent user messages/notifications, built on top of Django's messages framework

summary.zh: django-persistent-messages 是一个基于 Django 消息框架的扩展应用，为认证用户提供持久化消息存储，支持消息标记已读、删除和回复，同时为匿名用户保留会话级消息功能，实现统一的消息管理接口。
summary.en: Django Persistent Messages extends Django's messaging framework to provide persistent message storage for authenticated users via database, with features like mark-as-read, delete, and reply. Anonymous users retain session-based messages. Offers a unified API combining persistent and temporary messaging.

metadata.name: django-monitio
metadata.description: Unified, persistent user messages with live notifications via SSE for Django.

summary.zh: Django Monitio 是一个基于 Django 的消息通知系统，支持持久化存储和实时推送。它利用 Redis 和 Server-Sent Events (SSE) 实现消息的持久化与实时同步，兼容主流浏览器，适用于需要长期保留用户通知的场景。
summary.en: Django Monitio is a unified, persistent messaging system for Django that stores messages in the database and delivers live updates via Server-Sent Events (SSE). Built on Redis and compatible with modern browsers, it enables real-time notifications while supporting both authenticated and anonymous users.

metadata.name: wallop
metadata.description: :no_entry: currently unmaintained :no_entry: A minimal JS library for showing & hiding things

summary.zh: Wallop 是一个轻量级（4KB）JavaScript 库，用于实现元素的显示与隐藏切换，支持移动端优先、渐进增强和纯 CSS 动画。它通过添加动态类名控制内容展示，内置多种动画修饰符（如滑动、淡入淡出），提供灵活的 API 和自定义事件，适用于轮播、选项卡等场景。
summary.en: Wallop is a minimal 4kb JavaScript library for showing and hiding elements, designed with mobile-first, progressive enhancement, and CSS-based animations. It dynamically adds classes to control visibility, supports multiple animation modifiers (e.g., slide, fade), and offers a flexible API with custom events for use in sliders, tabs, and more.

metadata.name: PureSlider
metadata.description: A lightweight, no-dependency image slider library

summary.zh: PureSlider 是一个轻量级、无依赖的 JavaScript 图片轮播库，支持淡入淡出切换效果。它无需 jQuery 等外部库，提供简洁的 API 和自定义配置选项，适用于现代网页开发中的图片展示场景。
summary.en: PureSlider is a lightweight, dependency-free image slider library that supports fade transitions. It offers a simple API and customizable options, ideal for modern web projects requiring jQuery-free image carousels.

metadata.name: ShadowsocksRDroid
metadata.description: A ShadowsocksR client for Android4.0+.Compatible Shadowsocks protocol and support some ShadowsocksR function.

summary.zh: ShadowsocksR Droid 是一款专为 Android 4.0+ 设备设计的 ShadowsocksR 客户端，兼容 Shadowsocks 协议并支持部分 ShadowsocksR 功能，采用 Kotlin 和 Java 开发，提供跨平台网络代理解决方案。
summary.en: ShadowsocksR Droid is an Android 4.0+ client for ShadowsocksR, compatible with Shadowsocks protocol and supporting some ShadowsocksR features. Built with Kotlin and Java, it offers a cross-platform network proxy solution for enhanced privacy and access.

metadata.name: Parallel-Programming-with-Python
metadata.description: Parallel Programming with Python简体中文版

summary.zh: 《Parallel Programming with Python》简体中文版是一本系统讲解Python并行编程的书籍，涵盖并发、并行与分布式编程的核心概念、算法设计与实践工具。内容从GIL限制、通信机制到分治、数据分解、管道任务等并行模式，结合斐波那契计算与网页爬取等实例，帮助开发者识别可并行问题并高效实现多核/分布式加速。
summary.en: The Chinese translation of 'Parallel Programming with Python' is a comprehensive guide covering core concepts, algorithms, and tools for concurrent, parallel, and distributed programming in Python. It addresses GIL limitations, communication patterns, and parallel design techniques like divide-and-conquer and data decomposition, with practical examples such as Fibonacci computation and web scraping to demonstrate parallelizable problems and multi-core/distributed acceleration.

metadata.name: winauth
metadata.description: Authenticator on Windows for Battle.net / Steam / Guild Wars 2 / Glyph / Runescape / SWTOR / Bitcoin and digital currency exchanges

summary.zh: WinAuth 是一款开源的 Windows 多平台双因子认证工具，支持 RFC 6238 时间型（TOTP）和 HOTP 计数器型验证码，兼容 Battle.net、Steam、Guild Wars 2、SWTOR 及主流数字货币交易所。具备密码保护、机器绑定、YubiKey 支持、热键操作、便携模式及跨设备导入导出功能，适用于安全与便捷的双重认证管理。
summary.en: WinAuth is an open-source, portable authenticator for Windows that supports RFC 6238 (TOTP) and HOTP-based 2FA codes. It integrates authenticators for Battle.net, Steam, Guild Wars 2, SWTOR, and major cryptocurrency exchanges like Coinbase and Bitstamp. Features include password protection, machine binding, YubiKey support, hotkey controls, portable mode, and import/export via UriKeyFormat, enabling secure and unified two-factor authentication management.

metadata.name: zh-google-styleguide
metadata.description: Google 开源项目风格指南 (中文版)

summary.zh: 本项目是 Google 开源项目风格指南的权威中文翻译版，涵盖 C++、Python、Java、JavaScript、TypeScript、Shell、HTML/CSS 等 8 种主流语言的编码规范。内容详尽，提供统一的代码风格指导，提升大型项目协作效率与可维护性。
summary.en: This is the authoritative Chinese translation of Google's open-source style guides, covering coding standards for 8 major languages including C++, Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Shell, and HTML/CSS. It provides comprehensive guidelines to ensure consistency, readability, and maintainability in large-scale software projects.

metadata.name: PhotoClip.js
metadata.description: 一款手势驱动的裁图插件 / A gesture to drive image cropping plug-in

summary.zh: PhotoClip.js 是一款手势驱动的移动端图片裁剪插件，支持双指缩放、旋转等直观操作，兼容主流浏览器。通过集成 iscroll-zoom、hammer.js 和 lrz 压缩库，实现高效图片裁剪与压缩，适用于移动端照片处理场景，提供灵活的配置选项和回调机制。
summary.en: PhotoClip.js is a gesture-driven image cropping plugin for mobile devices, supporting intuitive pinch-to-zoom and rotation. It integrates iscroll-zoom, hammer.js, and lrz compression for efficient image processing. Compatible with modern browsers, it offers flexible configuration and callbacks for mobile photo editing workflows.

summary.zh: Shadowsocks 是一个高性能的 TCP/UDP 隧道代理工具，支持用户管理 API、TCP Fast Open 和 IP 黑名单，用于绕过网络防火墙，提供跨平台服务端与客户端支持，适用于 Linux、Windows、Android 及 OpenWRT 等环境。
summary.en: Shadowsocks is a high-performance TCP/UDP tunnel proxy with features like user management API, TCP Fast Open, and IP blacklisting, designed to bypass firewalls. It supports cross-platform deployment on Linux, Windows, Android, and OpenWRT, offering both server and client implementations.

metadata.name: material
metadata.description: Material design for AngularJS

summary.zh: AngularJS Material 是 Google Material Design 规范在 AngularJS (v1.x) 中的官方实现，提供轻量级、可复用的 UI 组件库，支持响应式布局和无障碍访问。项目已于2022年终止维护，推荐迁移至 Angular Material (v2+) 版本。
summary.en: AngularJS Material is the official implementation of Google's Material Design specification for AngularJS (v1.x), offering a lightweight set of reusable, accessible UI components. Support ended in January 2022; users are advised to migrate to Angular Material (v2+).

metadata.name: AngularjsTutorial_cn
metadata.description: AngularJS入门教程——AngularJS中文社区提供

summary.zh: 本仓库提供完整的AngularJS入门教程，涵盖快速开始、模板系统、双向绑定、路由、REST服务等核心功能。由AngularJS中文社区维护，包含15个循序渐进的实践章节，适合前端开发者系统学习AngularJS框架。
summary.en: This repository offers a comprehensive AngularJS tutorial covering core features like templates, two-way binding, routing, and REST services. Maintained by the AngularJS Chinese Community, it includes 15 progressive chapters ideal for developers learning the framework.

metadata.name: webuploader
metadata.description: It's a new file uploader solution!

summary.zh: WebUploader 是一个基于 HTML5 为主、Flash 为辅的现代文件上传组件，兼容 IE6+ 及移动端。支持大文件分片并发上传、图片预览压缩、拖拽粘贴添加文件，并提供 MD5 秒传与模块化扩展能力，显著提升上传效率与用户体验。
summary.en: WebUploader is a modern file uploader built primarily on HTML5 with Flash fallback, supporting IE6+ and mobile browsers. It enables chunked concurrent uploads, image preview/compression, drag-and-drop/paste file addition, MD5 instant upload, and modular extensibility for enhanced performance and flexibility.

metadata.name: avalon
metadata.description: an elegant efficient express mvvm framework

summary.zh: Avalon2 是一个高效优雅的 MVVM 前端框架，支持双向数据绑定与组件化开发，具备优异的渲染性能与后端渲染能力。它兼容 IE6+，提供丰富的指令系统（如 ms-duplex、ms-if）和组件开发支持，适用于构建高性能单页应用（SPA）。
summary.en: Avalon2 is an elegant and efficient MVVM framework for frontend development, featuring two-way data binding, componentization, and high-performance rendering. It supports server-side rendering, IE6+ compatibility, and provides a rich directive system (e.g., ms-duplex, ms-if) for building scalable single-page applications (SPAs).

metadata.name: avalon.oniui
metadata.description: 基于avalon的组件库

summary.zh: avalon.oniui 是去哪儿网前端团队基于 Avalon 1.4 开发的 UI 组件库，提供丰富的 UI 组件（如表格、弹窗、分页）和功能性组件（如拖拽、定位、快捷键），覆盖表单、交互、数据展示等场景，支持模块化调用与扩展。
summary.en: avalon.oniui is a UI component library developed by Qunar's frontend team, built on Avalon 1.4. It offers a comprehensive set of UI components (e.g., grids, dialogs, pagination) and utility modules (e.g., drag-and-drop, positioning, hotkeys), enabling modular integration for web applications with rich interactivity and data presentation.

metadata.name: javascript-in-one-pic
metadata.description: Learn javascript in one picture.

summary.zh: 本项目通过一张思维导图（Mind Map）直观展示 JavaScript 核心语法与概念，涵盖函数、对象、作用域、闭包等关键知识点，适合快速查阅与教学。采用可视化设计，单图呈现语言全貌，支持多语言版本，并计划扩展 Python3 和 Go 版本。
summary.en: This project visualizes JavaScript syntax and concepts in a single mind map, covering functions, objects, scope, closures, and more. Designed for quick reference and teaching, it offers a comprehensive yet concise overview. Multi-language support and upcoming Python3/Go versions enhance its utility.

metadata.name: python3-in-one-pic
metadata.description: Learn python3 in one picture.

summary.zh: 本项目通过一张图片全面展示 Python3 核心语法与特性，涵盖数据类型、流程控制、函数、类、模块等关键内容，辅以 IPython Notebook 交互版本，适合快速入门与参考。
summary.en: This project presents a comprehensive one-page visual guide to Python 3 syntax and features, including data types, control flow, functions, classes, and modules, with an interactive IPython Notebook version for easy learning and reference.

metadata.name: ua-parser-js
metadata.description: UAParser.js - The Essential Web Development Tool for User-Agent Detection. Detect Browsers, OS, Devices, Bots, Apps, AI Crawlers, and more. Run in Browser (client-side) or Node.js (server-side).

summary.zh: UAParser.js 是一款轻量级、高性能的 JavaScript 库，支持在浏览器和 Node.js 环境中解析 User-Agent 字符串，精准识别浏览器、操作系统、设备类型、CPU 架构、机器人及 AI 爬虫等信息，适用于前端分析、服务端日志处理和跨平台兼容性检测。
summary.en: UAParser.js is a lightweight, high-performance JavaScript library that parses User-Agent strings in both browser (client-side) and Node.js (server-side) environments. It accurately detects browsers, operating systems, devices, CPU architectures, bots, AI crawlers, and more, making it ideal for analytics, compatibility checks, and intelligent routing.

metadata.name: django-pjax-middleware
metadata.description: Middleware that sets a base template name on the context

summary.zh: django-pjax-middleware 是一个 Django 中间件，用于在 PJAX 请求中自动设置基础模板名称，简化了 PJAX 页面的模板继承结构。它支持自定义基础模板和 PJAX 模板名称，并通过版本控制机制确保布局更新时触发完整页面重载，提升用户体验。
summary.en: django-pjax-middleware is a Django middleware that automatically sets the base template name in PJAX requests, simplifying template inheritance for PJAX-enabled pages. It supports custom base and PJAX-specific templates, and uses versioning to force full page reloads when layout changes occur, enhancing user experience.

summary.zh: django-pjaxr 是一个为 Django 项目提供 PJAX 支持的轻量级扩展，通过集成 jquery-pjaxr 实现无刷新页面加载，提升用户体验。它通过模板标签和上下文处理器简化配置，支持自定义模板，适用于需要局部刷新的 Web 应用。
summary.en: django-pjaxr is a lightweight Django extension enabling PJAX support via jquery-pjaxr, allowing seamless partial page updates without full reloads. It simplifies integration with template tags and context processors, supporting customizable templates for enhanced user experience in Django web applications.

metadata.name: django-easy-pjax
metadata.description: Easy PJAX for Django

summary.zh: django-easy-pjax 是一个为 Django 项目提供 PJAX 支持的轻量级应用，通过智能模板切换实现无刷新页面加载，提升用户体验。它自动根据请求头选择基础模板，支持缓存清理与 URL 净化，无需修改视图或 URL 配置，集成简单且兼容性强。
summary.en: django-easy-pjax is a lightweight Django app that enables PJAX support by intelligently switching templates to enable partial page loads without full reloads. It auto-selects base or PJAX-specific templates based on HTTP headers, supports cache-busting cleanup, and requires no view or URL changes, making integration seamless and non-intrusive.

metadata.name: Carbon-Forum
metadata.description: A high performance open-source forum software written in PHP. Discussions Tags based with Quora/StackOverflow style.
