metadata.description: Powerful menu bar manager for macOS

summary.zh: Ice 是一款专为 macOS 设计的强大菜单栏管理工具，核心功能是隐藏和显示菜单栏项目，并支持拖拽排列、搜索、自定义外观（如色调、阴影、形状）等高级特性。它利用 macOS 14+ 的系统 API，旨在提供全面的菜单栏定制体验，适用于需要优化工作空间和提升效率的用户。
summary.en: Ice is a powerful menu bar management tool for macOS, primarily focused on hiding and showing menu bar items, with advanced features like drag-and-drop arrangement, search, and custom appearance (e.g., tint, shadow, shape). Leveraging macOS 14+ system APIs, it aims to deliver a comprehensive customization experience for users seeking to optimize workspace and enhance productivity.

metadata.name: termora
metadata.description: Termora is a terminal emulator and SSH client for Windows, macOS and Linux.

summary.zh: Termora 是一款跨平台终端模拟器和 SSH 客户端，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux。它基于 Kotlin/JVM 开发，部分实现 XTerm 控制序列协议，内置密钥管理、X11 转发、SSH-Agent 集成等功能，并提供 GUI 文件管理、多并发传输和插件扩展，适用于远程运维和开发环境。
summary.en: Termora is a cross-platform terminal emulator and SSH client for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Built with Kotlin/JVM and partially implementing the XTerm control sequence protocol, it features built-in key management, X11 forwarding, SSH-Agent integration, GUI file management, concurrent transfers, and plugin support, ideal for remote operations and development.

metadata.name: excalidraw-mcp
metadata.description: excalidraw mcp

summary.zh: Excalidraw MCP Server 是一个基于 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 的服务器，使 AI 智能体（如 Claude、Cursor）能够通过对话直接创建、编辑和管理 Excalidraw 图表。它通过 WebSocket 实现实时预览，支持 Mermaid 语法转换、多会话切换和多种导出格式，适用于 AI 驱动的可视化思维和快速图表生成。
summary.en: Excalidraw MCP Server is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables AI agents (e.g., Claude, Cursor) to create, edit, and manage Excalidraw diagrams directly within conversations. It features real-time preview via WebSocket, supports Mermaid syntax conversion, multi-session switching, and multiple export formats, ideal for AI-powered visual thinking and rapid diagramming.

summary.zh: 该仓库是《OpenResty最佳实践》的开源书籍，基于作者在奇虎360等公司的实战经验，系统总结了OpenResty的高性能Web开发最佳实践。内容涵盖基础介绍、代码质量提升、性能优化和团队协作，旨在帮助开发者快速掌握OpenResty，减少加班并提高开发效率。
summary.en: This repository hosts the open-source book 'OpenResty Best Practices', which systematically documents best practices for high-performance web development using OpenResty, based on the author's hands-on experience at companies like Qihoo 360. It covers fundamentals, code quality improvement, performance optimization, and team collaboration, aiming to help developers master OpenResty efficiently and reduce overtime work.

metadata.name: kubedog
metadata.description: Library to watch and follow kubernetes resources in CI/CD deploy pipelines

summary.zh: Kubedog 是一个用于在 CI/CD 部署流水线中监控和跟踪 Kubernetes 资源的库，集成于 werf 工具，提供资源状态实时追踪功能，简化部署过程。
summary.en: Kubedog is a library for watching and following Kubernetes resources in CI/CD deploy pipelines, integrated with the werf tool to provide real-time resource tracking and simplify deployment processes.

metadata.name: go-bindata
metadata.description: Turn data file into go code.

summary.zh: go-bindata 是一个 Go 语言工具，用于将任意文件转换为可管理的 Go 源代码，实现二进制数据嵌入到 Go 程序中。它支持 gzip 压缩和调试模式，适用于静态资源嵌入、Web 服务器开发等场景，提升部署效率和开发便捷性。
summary.en: go-bindata is a Go tool that converts any file into manageable Go source code, enabling binary data embedding into Go programs. It supports gzip compression and debug mode, ideal for embedding static resources, web server development, and enhancing deployment efficiency and development convenience.

metadata.name: btop
metadata.description: A monitor of resources

summary.zh: btop++ 是一款跨平台的终端系统资源监控工具，采用 C++23 编写，支持 Linux、macOS、FreeBSD、NetBSD 和 OpenBSD。它提供实时监控 CPU、内存、磁盘、网络和 GPU 等资源，具有高度可配置的界面和主题支持，适用于系统管理员和开发者进行性能分析和故障排查。
summary.en: btop++ is a cross-platform terminal system resource monitor written in C++23, supporting Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, NetBSD, and OpenBSD. It offers real-time monitoring of CPU, memory, disk, network, and GPU resources, with a highly configurable interface and theme support, ideal for system administrators and developers for performance analysis and troubleshooting.

metadata.name: Easydict
metadata.description: 一个简洁优雅的词典翻译 macOS App。开箱即用，支持离线 OCR 识别，支持有道词典，🍎 苹果系统词典，🍎 苹果系统翻译，OpenAI，Gemini，DeepL，Google，Bing，腾讯，百度，阿里，小牛，彩云和火山翻译。A concise and elegant Dictionary and Translator macOS App for looking up words and translating text.

summary.zh: Easydict 是一款简洁优雅的 macOS 词典翻译应用，开箱即用，支持离线 OCR 识别和多种翻译服务，包括苹果系统词典、OpenAI、DeepL 等 20 余种，适用于快速查词和文本翻译场景。
summary.en: Easydict is a concise and elegant macOS dictionary and translation app, ready to use out of the box with offline OCR support and over 20 translation services including Apple System Dictionary, OpenAI, and DeepL, ideal for quick word lookup and text translation.

metadata.name: sqlc
metadata.description: Generate type-safe code from SQL

summary.zh: sqlc 是一个 SQL 编译器，通过分析 SQL 查询自动生成类型安全的代码，支持 Go、Kotlin、Python 和 TypeScript 等多种语言。它简化了数据库交互，减少手动编写 ORM 或查询代码的错误，提升开发效率和代码质量，适用于需要强类型数据库访问的现代应用开发。
summary.en: sqlc is a SQL compiler that generates type-safe code from SQL queries, supporting languages like Go, Kotlin, Python, and TypeScript. It streamlines database interactions by automating query code generation, reducing errors from manual ORM or query writing, and enhancing development efficiency and code reliability for modern applications requiring strong type safety.

metadata.name: LLPlayer
metadata.description: The media player for language learning, with dual subtitles, AI-generated subtitles, real-time translation, and more!

summary.zh: LLPlayer是一款专为语言学习设计的媒体播放器，集成了双字幕显示、AI生成字幕、实时翻译和OCR字幕转换等核心功能。它支持多种翻译引擎和在线视频播放，通过C#/WPF开发，提供高度可定制的界面和快捷键，适用于外语学习者和内容创作者提升语言技能。
summary.en: LLPlayer is a media player designed for language learning, featuring dual subtitles, AI-generated subtitles via OpenAI Whisper, real-time translation, and OCR conversion. It supports multiple translation engines and online video playback, built with C#/WPF for high customizability, ideal for language learners and content creators.

metadata.name: dockerman.app
metadata.description: A modern, lightweight Docker management UI built with Tauri and React. Focus on simplicity and performance for Docker container management.

summary.zh: Dockerman 是一款基于 Tauri 和 React 构建的现代化轻量级 Docker 管理界面，专注于简化容器管理流程并提升性能。它提供实时监控、容器管理、终端访问和文件浏览等功能，支持本地操作、深色主题和多语言界面，适用于开发者和运维人员高效管理 Docker 环境。
summary.en: Dockerman is a modern, lightweight Docker management UI built with Tauri and React, focusing on simplicity and performance for container management. It offers real-time monitoring, container management, terminal access, and file browsing, with features like local-only operation, dark mode, and internationalization, ideal for developers and operators to manage Docker environments efficiently.

metadata.name: lima
metadata.description: Linux virtual machines, with a focus on running containers

summary.zh: Lima 是一个专注于运行容器的 Linux 虚拟机管理工具，支持自动文件共享和端口转发，类似 WSL2。它最初旨在为 Mac 用户推广 containerd 和 nerdctl，但也支持 Docker、Podman、Kubernetes 等其他容器引擎，并可运行非容器应用。适用于跨平台开发、容器化部署和本地测试场景。
summary.en: Lima is a Linux virtual machine manager focused on running containers, featuring automatic file sharing and port forwarding, similar to WSL2. Initially designed to promote containerd and nerdctl for Mac users, it supports other container engines like Docker, Podman, and Kubernetes, and can run non-container applications. Ideal for cross-platform development, containerized deployment, and local testing.

metadata.name: Mate-Engine
metadata.description: A free Desktop Mate alternative with a lightweight interface and custom VRM support, though with more features.

summary.zh: Mate Engine 是一款免费、轻量级的桌面伴侣软件，作为 Desktop Mate 的开源替代品，支持自定义 VRM 模型和丰富的模组功能。它提供窗口/任务栏坐姿、音乐舞蹈、头部/脊柱/眼部追踪等交互特性，并集成 Steam Workshop 支持，适用于虚拟角色展示和个性化桌面增强场景。
summary.en: Mate Engine is a free, lightweight desktop companion software serving as an open-source alternative to Desktop Mate, featuring custom VRM model support and extensive modding capabilities. It offers interactive features like window/taskbar sitting, music-based dancing, and head/spine/eye tracking, with Steam Workshop integration, ideal for virtual character display and personalized desktop enhancement.

metadata.name: deskflow
metadata.description: Share a single keyboard and mouse between multiple computers.

summary.zh: Deskflow是一款免费开源的键盘鼠标共享应用，允许用户使用一台计算机的键盘、鼠标或触控板无缝控制附近的多台计算机，实现跨设备高效协作。它类似于软件KVM（但不包括视频传输），默认启用TLS加密确保安全，支持Wayland和剪贴板共享，适用于多设备办公和开发环境。
summary.en: Deskflow is a free and open-source keyboard and mouse sharing application that enables users to seamlessly control multiple nearby computers using a single keyboard, mouse, or trackpad. It functions like a software KVM (without video), with default TLS encryption for security, support for Wayland, and clipboard sharing, ideal for multi-device workflows in office and development settings.

metadata.name: sun-panel
metadata.description: A server, NAS navigation panel, Homepage, browser homepage. | 一个服务器、NAS导航面板、Homepage、浏览器首页。

summary.zh: Sun-Panel 是一个开源的服务器和 NAS 导航面板，可作为浏览器首页或主页，提供简洁界面、低资源消耗和可视化操作。支持 Docker 部署、多账户隔离、系统状态监控和自定义 JS/CSS，适用于个人或企业快速搭建个性化导航页面。
summary.en: Sun-Panel is an open-source server and NAS navigation panel that serves as a browser homepage or dashboard, featuring a clean interface, low resource usage, and visual operation. It supports Docker deployment, multi-account isolation, system status monitoring, and custom JS/CSS, ideal for individuals or organizations to quickly set up personalized navigation pages.

metadata.name: server
metadata.description: ☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

summary.zh: Nextcloud Server 是一个开源的自托管云存储和协作平台，提供文件、日历、联系人等数据的存储、同步与共享功能。它强调安全性和可扩展性，支持数百个应用插件，适用于个人、企业及组织的数据管理需求。
summary.en: Nextcloud Server is an open-source self-hosted cloud storage and collaboration platform that enables storage, synchronization, and sharing of files, calendars, contacts, and more. It emphasizes security and extensibility with hundreds of apps, suitable for personal, enterprise, and organizational data management.

metadata.name: yacd
metadata.description: Yet Another Clash Dashboard

summary.zh: yacd 是一个专为 Clash 代理工具设计的现代化 Web 仪表盘，提供简洁直观的界面来管理和监控代理连接。它支持通过 Docker 快速部署，并允许通过 URL 参数自定义后端 API 配置和主题，适用于个人或团队的网络代理管理场景。
summary.en: yacd is a modern web dashboard designed for the Clash proxy tool, offering a clean and intuitive interface to manage and monitor proxy connections. It supports quick deployment via Docker and allows customization of backend API settings and themes through URL parameters, suitable for personal or team network proxy management.

metadata.name: NoteDiscovery
metadata.description: Your Self-Hosted Knowledge Base

summary.zh: NoteDiscovery 是一款轻量级、自托管的笔记应用，提供现代美观的界面，支持 Markdown 编辑、本地文件存储和交互式图谱视图。核心价值在于完全控制数据隐私、零成本部署和跨平台响应式设计，适用于个人知识管理、团队协作和隐私敏感用户。
summary.en: NoteDiscovery is a lightweight, self-hosted note-taking application featuring a modern interface, Markdown editing, local file storage, and interactive graph views. It emphasizes full data privacy control, zero-cost deployment, and cross-platform responsiveness, ideal for personal knowledge management, team collaboration, and privacy-conscious users.

summary.zh: 该项目将经典游戏《地下城与勇士》封装为Docker镜像，基于CentOS官方镜像构建，支持快速部署和自定义配置。核心功能包括多区服管理、环境变量驱动初始化、Supervisor进程监控，适用于游戏私服搭建、开发测试和容器化运维场景。技术亮点在于自动化数据库初始化、端口映射优化和资源分配控制。
summary.en: This project packages the classic game Dungeon & Fighter into a Docker image, built on official CentOS images for rapid deployment and customization. Key features include multi-server management, environment-driven initialization, and Supervisor process monitoring, suitable for private server setups, development testing, and containerized operations. Technical highlights are automated database initialization, optimized port mapping, and resource allocation control.

metadata.name: intro-linux-sys-prog
metadata.description: A repository of all code from Introduction to System Programming in Linux, by Stewart Weiss

summary.zh: 该仓库是《Linux系统编程入门：实践指南》一书的配套代码库，提供书中所有示例程序的源代码，涵盖Linux系统编程的核心概念与实践。代码按章节组织，便于学习和实验，支持通过make命令构建，适用于教学、自学和系统编程开发参考。
summary.en: This repository contains the source code for all example programs from the book 'System Programming in Linux: A Hands-On Introduction', organized by chapter to facilitate learning and experimentation. It supports building via make commands and is ideal for educational purposes, self-study, and reference in system programming development.

metadata.name: awesome-go
metadata.description: A curated list of awesome Go frameworks, libraries and software

summary.zh: 这是一个精心整理的Go语言资源精选列表，涵盖框架、库和软件，旨在为开发者提供一站式参考，适用于学习、项目开发和社区贡献。核心价值在于高质量、分类清晰的资源聚合，技术亮点包括持续更新、社区驱动和自动化测试。
summary.en: This is a curated list of awesome Go frameworks, libraries, and software, designed to provide developers with a one-stop reference for learning, project development, and community contributions. Its core value lies in high-quality, well-categorized resource aggregation, with technical highlights including continuous updates, community-driven maintenance, and automated testing.

metadata.name: fastscheduler
metadata.description: Decorator-first Python scheduler — cron/interval/at jobs with simple persistence and built-in run history.

summary.zh: FastScheduler 是一个基于装饰器的 Python 任务调度库，提供简单易用的 API 支持定时、间隔和一次性任务。核心特性包括异步支持、时区处理、cron 表达式、持久化存储和实时监控仪表板，适用于自动化脚本、后台任务和运维监控等场景。
summary.en: FastScheduler is a decorator-first Python task scheduler with a simple API for cron, interval, and one-time jobs. Key features include async support, timezone handling, cron expressions, persistent storage, and a real-time dashboard, ideal for automation scripts, background tasks, and operational monitoring.

metadata.name: marten
metadata.description: Elegant, minimalist Go web framework – nothing in the way.

summary.zh: Marten 是一个优雅、极简的 Go Web 框架，完全基于 Go 标准库构建，零外部依赖。它提供快速路由、链式中间件、高效上下文池和类型化参数等功能，适用于构建高性能、可预测的 Web 应用和服务。
summary.en: Marten is an elegant, minimalist Go web framework built entirely on Go's standard library with zero external dependencies. It features fast routing, chainable middleware, efficient context pooling, and typed parameters, ideal for building high-performance, predictable web applications and services.

metadata.name: icloud_photos_downloader
metadata.description: A command-line tool to download photos from iCloud

summary.zh: iCloud Photos Downloader 是一个命令行工具，用于从 iCloud 下载照片，支持跨平台（Linux、Windows、macOS）和多种部署方式（如 Docker、PyPI）。核心功能包括复制、同步和移动模式，支持 Live Photos、RAW 图像和自动去重，适用于个人备份和自动化数据管理。
summary.en: iCloud Photos Downloader is a command-line tool for downloading photos from iCloud, supporting cross-platform (Linux, Windows, macOS) and multiple deployment methods (e.g., Docker, PyPI). Key features include copy, sync, and move modes, with support for Live Photos, RAW images, and automatic deduplication, ideal for personal backup and automated data management.

metadata.name: TaskExplorer
metadata.description: Power full Task Manager

summary.zh: TaskExplorer 是一款功能强大的任务管理器，专为深度监控 Windows 系统进程而设计。它通过实时面板展示线程堆栈、内存编辑、句柄详情、网络连接等关键信息，支持多进程并行检查和系统资源图形化监控，适用于系统调试、性能优化和安全分析。基于 Qt 框架开发，具备跨平台潜力。
summary.en: TaskExplorer is a powerful task manager designed for deep monitoring of Windows system processes. It displays real-time panels for thread stacks, memory editing, handle details, network connections, and more, supporting multi-process inspection and graphical system resource monitoring. Ideal for system debugging, performance optimization, and security analysis. Built with Qt framework, offering cross-platform potential.

metadata.name: CrystalDiskInfo
metadata.description: CrystalDiskInfo

summary.zh: CrystalDiskInfo 是一款专业的磁盘健康监测工具，支持 PATA、SATA、NVMe 等多种硬盘接口，并提供 SMART 信息读取和故障预警功能。适用于个人电脑和服务器运维，帮助用户实时监控磁盘状态，预防数据丢失。
summary.en: CrystalDiskInfo is a professional disk health monitoring tool that supports various drive interfaces including PATA, SATA, and NVMe, with SMART data reading and failure alerts. It is ideal for personal computer and server maintenance, enabling real-time disk status monitoring to prevent data loss.

metadata.name: banana-slides
metadata.description: 一个基于nano banana pro🍌的原生AI PPT生成应用，迈向真正的＂Vibe PPT＂; 支持上传任意模板图片；上传任意素材&智能解析；一句话/大纲/页面描述自动生成PPT；口头修改指定区域、一键导出可编辑ppt - An AI-native slides generator based on nano banana pro🍌

summary.zh: Banana Slides 是一款基于 nano banana pro 模型的原生 AI PPT 生成应用，旨在通过自然语言交互快速创建专业美观的演示文稿。它支持上传任意模板和素材进行智能解析，提供一句话、大纲或页面描述等多种生成路径，并允许口头修改指定区域，最终一键导出可编辑的 PPT 文件，显著降低制作门槛，适用于教育、职场和学生等多种场景。
summary.en: Banana Slides is a native AI slides generator based on the nano banana pro model, designed to quickly create professional and aesthetically pleasing presentations through natural language interaction. It supports uploading any templates and materials for intelligent parsing, offers multiple generation paths such as one-sentence, outline, or page descriptions, allows verbal modifications to specific areas, and enables one-click export to editable PPT files, significantly lowering the creation barrier for various scenarios like education, business, and student use.

metadata.name: build-your-own-x
metadata.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供一系列从零开始构建流行技术的详细教程，涵盖3D渲染器、AI模型、区块链、操作系统等30多个领域。通过动手实践帮助开发者深入理解底层原理，提升编程能力，适合学习系统设计与实现。
summary.en: This repository offers step-by-step tutorials for building popular technologies from scratch, covering over 30 areas including 3D renderers, AI models, blockchain, and operating systems. It helps developers gain deep understanding of underlying principles through hands-on practice, enhancing programming skills and system design knowledge.

metadata.name: Ventoy
metadata.description: A new bootable USB solution.

summary.zh: Ventoy是一款开源工具，用于创建可启动USB驱动器，支持ISO/WIM/IMG/VHD(x)/EFI文件。用户无需重复格式化磁盘，只需复制镜像文件即可启动，并支持多镜像选择和本地文件浏览。兼容多种架构（如x86、ARM64）和分区风格（MBR/GPT），广泛支持Windows、Linux等操作系统，已测试超过1300个ISO文件。
summary.en: Ventoy is an open-source tool for creating bootable USB drives that support ISO/WIM/IMG/VHD(x)/EFI files. It eliminates the need for repeated disk formatting by allowing users to simply copy image files and boot them, with support for multiple image selection and local file browsing. It is compatible with various architectures (e.g., x86, ARM64) and partition styles (MBR/GPT), and widely supports operating systems like Windows and Linux, with over 1,300 ISO files tested.

metadata.name: monica
metadata.description: Personal CRM. Remember everything about your friends, family and business relationships.

summary.zh: Monica 是一款开源的个人关系管理系统，帮助用户记录和管理与亲友、同事的互动细节。它提供联系人管理、生日提醒、活动日志、多语言支持等功能，强调数据隐私和用户控制，适合需要系统化维护人际关系的人群。
summary.en: Monica is an open-source personal relationship management system that helps users document and manage interactions with friends, family, and business contacts. It features contact management, birthday reminders, activity logs, multi-language support, and emphasizes data privacy and user control, ideal for those needing structured relationship maintenance.

metadata.name: devpush
metadata.description: Like Vercel, but open source and for all languages.

summary.zh: DevPush 是一个开源、可自托管的现代化应用部署平台，提供类似 Vercel 的零停机部署、实时日志和多语言支持（如 Python、Node.js、PHP），适用于团队协作和自定义环境管理。
summary.en: DevPush is an open-source, self-hostable modern application deployment platform offering Vercel-like features such as zero-downtime deployments, real-time logs, and multi-language support (e.g., Python, Node.js, PHP), ideal for team collaboration and customizable environment management.

metadata.name: zap
metadata.description: Blazing fast, structured, leveled logging in Go.

summary.zh: Zap 是 Go 语言中一个高性能、结构化、分级的日志库，专为对性能要求苛刻的应用场景设计。它通过无反射、零分配的 JSON 编码器实现极速日志记录，提供 Logger 和 SugaredLogger 两种 API 以平衡类型安全与易用性，相比标准库和其他日志包显著提升效率。
summary.en: Zap is a high-performance, structured, leveled logging library for Go, designed for performance-critical applications. It achieves blazing-fast logging through a reflection-free, zero-allocation JSON encoder, offering both Logger and SugaredLogger APIs to balance type safety and ease of use, significantly outperforming standard libraries and other logging packages.

metadata.name: LiteMonitor
metadata.description: 一款轻量级、高度可定制的 Windows桌面和任务栏硬件性能监控工具，支持监测 CPU、GPU、内存、磁盘、网速、FPS 计数、插件扩展及内存清理。A lightweight, customizable hardware monitor for the Windows desktop & taskbar. Features CPU/GPU/RAM/Network monitoring, FPS counter, plugin support, and memory optimization.

summary.zh: LiteMonitor是一款专为Windows设计的轻量级开源桌面硬件监控工具，提供CPU、GPU、内存、磁盘、网络等实时性能监测，支持横竖屏、任务栏和网页显示。其核心亮点包括高度可定制的主题系统、插件扩展能力、三色报警机制以及内存清理功能，适用于系统优化、游戏监控和日常运维场景。
summary.en: LiteMonitor is a lightweight, open-source desktop hardware monitoring tool for Windows, offering real-time performance tracking of CPU, GPU, memory, disk, and network. Key features include a highly customizable theme system, plugin support, three-color alerting, and memory optimization, ideal for system tuning, gaming monitoring, and daily maintenance.

metadata.name: how-to-write-makefile
metadata.description: 跟我一起写Makefile重制版

summary.zh: 该仓库是《跟我一起写Makefile》的PDF重制版，基于陈皓的经典教程和GNU Make手册，使用Sphinx工具重新排版生成精美文档。核心价值在于提供高质量的学习资源，适用于开发者学习Makefile构建自动化，技术亮点包括代码语法高亮和跨平台PDF/HTML输出。
summary.en: This repository is a PDF remake of 'How to Write Makefile', based on Chen Hao's classic tutorial and the GNU Make manual, using Sphinx for enhanced formatting. It offers high-quality learning materials for developers to master Makefile automation, featuring code syntax highlighting and cross-platform PDF/HTML outputs.

metadata.name: super-productivity
metadata.description: Super Productivity is an advanced todo list app with integrated Timeboxing and time tracking capabilities. It also comes with integrations for Jira, GitLab, GitHub and Open Project.

summary.zh: Super Productivity 是一款高级待办事项应用，集成了时间盒和时间追踪功能，支持从日历、Jira、GitHub 等平台导入任务，适用于个人和团队生产力管理。
summary.en: Super Productivity is an advanced todo list app with integrated timeboxing and time tracking capabilities, supporting task imports from calendars, Jira, GitHub, and other platforms, ideal for personal and team productivity management.

metadata.name: fluentui-system-icons
metadata.description: Fluent System Icons are a collection of familiar, friendly and modern icons from Microsoft.

summary.zh: Fluent UI System Icons 是微软提供的一套熟悉、友好且现代的图标集合，专为跨平台应用设计。它支持 Android、iOS、macOS 和 Flutter 等平台，提供 SVG 格式和自动化构建工具，便于开发者快速集成和自定义图标，提升用户界面的一致性和美观度。
summary.en: Fluent UI System Icons is a collection of familiar, friendly, and modern icons from Microsoft, designed for cross-platform applications. It supports platforms like Android, iOS, macOS, and Flutter, offering SVG formats and automated build tools to facilitate easy integration and customization for developers, enhancing UI consistency and aesthetics.

metadata.name: dokploy
metadata.description: Open Source Alternative to Vercel, Netlify and Heroku.

summary.zh: Dokploy 是一个开源、可自托管的平台即服务（PaaS），提供类似 Vercel、Netlify 和 Heroku 的简化部署与管理功能。它支持多种编程语言应用和数据库，集成 Docker Compose、Traefik 和实时监控，适用于个人开发者或团队在私有服务器上高效部署和扩展应用。
summary.en: Dokploy is an open-source, self-hostable Platform as a Service (PaaS) that simplifies deployment and management akin to Vercel, Netlify, and Heroku. It supports multiple programming languages and databases, integrates Docker Compose, Traefik, and real-time monitoring, ideal for individuals or teams to efficiently deploy and scale applications on private servers.

metadata.name: reminders-menubar
metadata.description: Simple macOS menu bar application to view and interact with reminders. Developed with SwiftUI and using Apple Reminders as a source.

summary.zh: Reminders MenuBar 是一款简洁高效的 macOS 菜单栏应用，允许用户直接在菜单栏查看、创建和管理 Apple Reminders 提醒事项。它通过 SwiftUI 开发，与 Apple Reminders 实时同步，支持自然语言设置日期、过滤列表和标记完成状态，提升日常任务管理效率。
summary.en: Reminders MenuBar is a simple and efficient macOS menu bar application that enables users to view, create, and manage Apple Reminders directly from the menu bar. Built with SwiftUI, it syncs seamlessly with Apple Reminders, supports natural language date setting, list filtering, and completion marking, enhancing daily task management productivity.

metadata.name: filebrowser
metadata.description: 📂 Web File Browser

summary.zh: FileBrowser Quantum 是一款免费、自托管的 Web 文件管理器，提供现代化的响应式界面，支持多源配置、用户认证（如 OIDC、密码+2FA）、实时索引与搜索、高级共享选项和目录级访问控制。它易于安装和配置，适用于个人或团队的文件管理和远程访问场景。
summary.en: FileBrowser Quantum is a free, self-hosted web file manager with a modern responsive interface, supporting multiple sources, user authentication (e.g., OIDC, password+2FA), real-time indexing and search, advanced sharing options, and directory-level access control. It is easy to install and configure, ideal for personal or team file management and remote access.

metadata.name: clip-save
metadata.description: 剪存-剪贴板历史管理工具

summary.zh: 剪存是一款基于Wails + Vue 3 + TypeScript的多平台剪贴板历史管理工具，支持自动保存文本、图片和文件，提供实时搜索、OCR文字识别和本地SQLite存储，确保隐私安全。适用于个人效率提升和跨平台数据管理。
summary.en: Clip-Save is a multi-platform clipboard history management tool built with Wails, Vue 3, and TypeScript. It automatically saves text, images, and files, offering real-time search, OCR text recognition, and local SQLite storage for privacy. Ideal for personal productivity and cross-platform data management.

metadata.name: sponge
metadata.description: A powerful and easy-to-use Go development framework that enables you to effortlessly build stable, reliable, and high-performance backend services with a "low-code" approach.

summary.zh: Sponge 是一个强大易用的 Go 开发框架，基于“定义即代码”理念，通过代码生成引擎深度集成 Gin 和 gRPC，实现低代码开发。它支持从 SQL、Protobuf 和 JSON 配置自动生成高质量模块化代码，灵活构建单体应用、微服务集群和网关服务，显著提升后端开发效率，适用于快速构建高性能、可维护的后端系统。
summary.en: Sponge is a powerful and easy-to-use Go development framework based on the 'Definition is Code' philosophy, integrating a code generation engine with Gin and gRPC for low-code development. It automatically generates high-quality modular code from SQL, Protobuf, and JSON configurations, enabling flexible construction of monolithic applications, microservice clusters, and gateway services, significantly boosting backend development efficiency for high-performance, maintainable systems.

metadata.name: mushak
metadata.description: Mushak is a CLI tool that enables PaaS-like deployments to your own Linux server or home lab.

summary.zh: Mushak 是一个 CLI 工具，为个人 Linux 服务器或家庭实验室提供类似 PaaS 的零配置、零停机部署体验。它通过 Git 推送自动构建 Docker 应用，利用 Caddy 反向代理实现无缝流量切换，支持多应用部署和健康检查，简化了远程服务器的容器化部署流程。
summary.en: Mushak is a CLI tool that delivers a PaaS-like deployment experience to your own Linux server or home lab, featuring zero-configuration and zero-downtime. It automates Docker-based application deployments via Git push, using Caddy reverse proxy for seamless traffic switching, with support for multi-app hosting and health checks, streamlining containerized deployment on remote servers.

metadata.name: bunster
metadata.description: Compile shell scripts to static binaries.

summary.zh: Bunster 是一个创新的 shell 编译器，将 shell 脚本转换为安全、可移植的静态二进制文件。它通过将脚本转译为 Go 代码并编译为独立可执行程序，实现跨平台部署，无需依赖外部 shell 环境。核心亮点包括模块化设计、内置包管理器、原生 .env 文件支持和静态资源嵌入，适用于自动化工具和运维脚本的打包分发。
summary.en: Bunster is an innovative shell compiler that converts shell scripts into secure, portable static binaries. It transpiles scripts to Go code and compiles them into standalone executables, enabling cross-platform deployment without external shell dependencies. Key features include modular design, built-in package manager, native .env file support, and static asset embedding, ideal for packaging and distributing automation tools and operational scripts.

metadata.name: mRemoteNG
metadata.description: mRemoteNG is the next generation of mRemote, open source, tabbed, multi-protocol, remote connections manager.

summary.zh: mRemoteNG 是一款开源、多协议、标签化的远程连接管理器，作为 mRemote 的下一代产品，提供简洁而强大的界面集中管理各类远程连接。它支持多种协议，适用于 IT 运维、系统管理等场景，具备跨平台特性，通过标签页和统一界面提升远程访问效率。
summary.en: mRemoteNG is an open-source, multi-protocol, tabbed remote connections manager, serving as the next generation of mRemote. It offers a simple yet powerful interface to centrally manage various remote connections, supporting multiple protocols for IT operations, system administration, and more, with cross-platform capabilities to enhance remote access efficiency through tabs and unified management.

metadata.name: sshfs
metadata.description: A network filesystem client to connect to SSH servers

summary.zh: SSHFS 是一个基于 FUSE 的网络文件系统客户端，允许用户通过 SFTP 协议安全地挂载远程 SSH 服务器上的文件系统。它无需服务器端配置，支持直接端口和 vsock 连接以提升性能，广泛应用于跨平台文件访问和虚拟化环境。
summary.en: SSHFS is a network filesystem client based on FUSE that enables secure mounting of remote filesystems via the SFTP protocol over SSH. It requires no server-side configuration, supports direct port and vsock connections for performance optimization, and is widely used for cross-platform file access and virtualization scenarios.

metadata.name: fastfetch
metadata.description: A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.

summary.zh: Fastfetch 是一款类似 neofetch 的系统信息工具，专注于高性能和可定制性，主要用于在终端中快速获取并美观展示系统信息。它采用 C 语言编写，支持 Linux、macOS、Windows 等多种操作系统，提供丰富的配置选项和跨平台兼容性，适用于系统监控、个性化展示和开发调试场景。
summary.en: Fastfetch is a neofetch-like system information tool that prioritizes performance and customizability, designed to quickly retrieve and display system details in a visually appealing terminal output. Written primarily in C, it supports multiple operating systems including Linux, macOS, and Windows, offering extensive configuration options and cross-platform compatibility for system monitoring, personalization, and development debugging.

metadata.name: Pearcleaner
metadata.description: A free, source-available and fair-code licensed mac app cleaner

summary.zh: Pearcleaner 是一款免费、开源且采用公平代码许可的 macOS 应用清理工具，旨在帮助用户彻底卸载应用程序并清理残留文件。核心功能包括应用卸载、孤立文件搜索、开发环境管理、Homebrew 包管理以及 Sentinel 监控自动清理。它支持拖拽操作、CLI 命令、Finder 扩展和主题自定义，适用于 macOS 用户优化系统存储和维护应用整洁。
summary.en: Pearcleaner is a free, source-available, and fair-code licensed macOS app cleaner designed to thoroughly uninstall applications and remove leftover files. Core features include app uninstallation, orphaned file search, development environment management, Homebrew package management, and Sentinel monitoring for automatic cleanup. It supports drag-and-drop, CLI commands, Finder extensions, and theme customization, making it ideal for macOS users to optimize storage and maintain app hygiene.

metadata.name: HyDE
metadata.description: HyDE, your Development Environment 🖥️💻

summary.zh: HyDE 是一个基于 Arch Linux 的现代化开发环境项目，专注于提供高度可定制和美观的桌面体验。它通过集成 Hyprland 窗口管理器、Wayland 显示服务器和丰富的主题样式，支持多种 Linux 发行版，旨在提升开发者的工作效率和视觉舒适度。
summary.en: HyDE is a modern development environment project based on Arch Linux, focusing on providing a highly customizable and aesthetically pleasing desktop experience. It integrates the Hyprland window manager, Wayland display server, and rich themes, supporting multiple Linux distributions to enhance developer productivity and visual comfort.

metadata.name: stats
metadata.description: macOS system monitor in your menu bar

summary.zh: Stats 是一款 macOS 系统监控工具，以菜单栏图标形式实时显示 CPU、GPU、内存、磁盘、网络、电池等关键系统资源使用情况。它支持传感器信息、蓝牙设备监控和多时区时钟，提供高效的系统性能可视化，适用于开发者和普通用户进行系统优化与故障排查。
summary.en: Stats is a macOS system monitoring tool that displays real-time key system resource usage such as CPU, GPU, memory, disk, network, and battery in the menu bar. It supports sensor information, Bluetooth device monitoring, and multiple time zone clocks, offering efficient system performance visualization for developers and general users to optimize and troubleshoot systems.

metadata.name: Keyden
metadata.description: Keyden is a clean and elegant macOS menu bar TOTP authenticator — securely store secrets in macOS Keychain, add accounts via QR code scanning, and copy codes with one click . Keyden 是一款简洁优雅的 macOS 菜单栏 TOTP 验证器——密钥安全存储于 macOS 钥匙串，支持扫码添加账号与一键复制验证码

summary.zh: Keyden 是一款专为 macOS 设计的菜单栏 TOTP 验证器，提供简洁优雅的用户体验。它通过 macOS 钥匙串安全存储密钥，支持扫码添加账号、一键复制验证码，并具备批量导入、GitHub Gist 同步、离线优先和主题支持等功能，适用于需要高效管理双因素认证的用户。
summary.en: Keyden is a clean and elegant macOS menu bar TOTP authenticator designed for secure and efficient two-factor authentication management. It securely stores secrets in macOS Keychain, supports QR code scanning for account addition, one-click code copying, and features batch import, GitHub Gist sync, offline-first operation, and theme support.

metadata.name: Everywhere
metadata.description: Context-aware AI assistant for your desktop. Ready to respond intelligently, seamlessly integrating multiple LLMs and MCP tools.

summary.zh: Everywhere 是一款上下文感知的桌面 AI 助手，通过快捷键无缝集成屏幕内容，无需截图或切换应用即可提供智能响应。它支持多 LLM 和 MCP 工具，适用于故障排除、网页摘要、即时翻译和邮件起草等场景，具备现代化 UI 和强大的集成功能。
summary.en: Everywhere is a context-aware AI assistant for the desktop that seamlessly integrates screen content via hotkeys, providing intelligent responses without screenshots or app switching. It supports multiple LLMs and MCP tools, ideal for troubleshooting, web summarization, instant translation, and email drafting, featuring a modern UI and robust integration.

metadata.name: shell360
metadata.description: Shell360 is a cross-platform SSH and SFTP client.

summary.zh: Shell360 是一款跨平台 SSH 和 SFTP 客户端，支持 Windows、macOS、Linux、Android 和 iOS。它提供安全的远程连接、文件传输和端口转发功能，适用于远程开发、服务器管理和运维自动化。技术亮点包括基于 Tauri 框架的跨平台兼容性、Rust 后端实现的自定义 SSH 插件，以及支持多种认证方式和主题定制。
summary.en: Shell360 is a cross-platform SSH and SFTP client supporting Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, and iOS. It offers secure remote connections, file transfer, and port forwarding, ideal for remote development, server management, and operational automation. Key features include cross-platform compatibility via the Tauri framework, a custom Rust-based SSH plugin, and support for multiple authentication methods and theme customization.

metadata.name: duplicati
metadata.description: Store securely encrypted backups in the cloud!

summary.zh: Duplicati 是一款免费开源的备份客户端，支持在云端存储服务和远程文件服务器上安全存储加密、增量、压缩的备份。它采用 AES-256 加密，支持多种云存储平台，提供增量备份以节省带宽和存储空间，并内置调度器和跨平台支持，适用于个人和企业数据保护。
summary.en: Duplicati is a free, open-source backup client that securely stores encrypted, incremental, and compressed backups on cloud storage services and remote file servers. It features AES-256 encryption, supports multiple cloud platforms, uses incremental backups to save bandwidth and storage, and includes built-in scheduling with cross-platform compatibility, ideal for personal and enterprise data protection.

metadata.name: WailBrew
metadata.description: Minimalistic Homebrew GUI made with Go, Wails and React.

summary.zh: WailBrew 是一款基于 Go、Wails 和 React 构建的极简 Homebrew GUI 管理器，专为 macOS 设计。它提供直观的图形界面，支持包搜索、安装、更新和依赖管理，旨在简化 Homebrew 包管理流程，提升用户体验。
summary.en: WailBrew is a minimalist Homebrew GUI manager built with Go, Wails, and React for macOS. It offers an intuitive graphical interface for package search, installation, updates, and dependency management, simplifying Homebrew package management and enhancing user experience.

metadata.name: flymd
metadata.description: 高性能Markdown笔记工具！免费AI，智能便签、TODO推送、本地知识库、AI小说引擎。PDF解析、自动语音笔记、录音转文本。毫秒级启动High-performance Markdown note tool! Free AI, smart notes, TODO reminders, local knowledge base, AI novel engine. PDF parsing, auto voice notes, audio-to-text. Millisecond startup.

summary.zh: FlyMD是一款高性能本地Markdown笔记工具，集AI辅助写作、智能待办推送、PDF解析和本地知识库于一体。支持毫秒级启动、跨平台运行和插件扩展，强调数据安全与隐私保护，适用于个人笔记、内容创作和知识管理场景。
summary.en: FlyMD is a high-performance local Markdown note tool integrating AI-assisted writing, smart TODO reminders, PDF parsing, and a local knowledge base. It features millisecond startup, cross-platform support, and plugin extensibility, prioritizing data security and privacy for personal note-taking, content creation, and knowledge management.

metadata.name: kite
metadata.description: 🪁 A modern, lightweight Kubernetes dashboard.

summary.zh: Kite 是一款现代化的轻量级 Kubernetes 仪表板，提供直观界面用于管理和监控 Kubernetes 集群。它支持多集群管理、实时指标监控、全面资源操作（如 YAML 编辑和资源关系可视化），并具备响应式设计和多语言支持，提升运维效率与用户体验。
summary.en: Kite is a modern, lightweight Kubernetes dashboard offering an intuitive interface for managing and monitoring Kubernetes clusters. It features multi-cluster management, real-time metrics, comprehensive resource operations (including YAML editing and resource relationship visualization), with responsive design and multilingual support to enhance operational efficiency and user experience.

metadata.name: trzsz-ssh
metadata.description: trzsz-ssh ( tssh ) is an ssh client designed as a drop-in replacement for the openssh client. It aims to provide complete compatibility with openssh, mirroring all its features, while also offering additional useful features. Such as login prompt, batch login, remember password, automated interaction, trzsz, zmodem(rz/sz), udp mode like mosh, etc.

summary.zh: trzsz-ssh (tssh) 是一款旨在完全替代 OpenSSH 客户端的 SSH 客户端，提供与 OpenSSH 的完全兼容性，同时集成额外实用功能，如登录提示、批量登录、密码记忆、自动化交互、trzsz 文件传输、Zmodem 支持和类似 Mosh 的 UDP 模式，适用于远程运维和自动化场景。
summary.en: trzsz-ssh (tssh) is an SSH client designed as a drop-in replacement for OpenSSH, offering full compatibility with all its features while adding extra utilities like login prompts, batch login, password memory, automated interaction, trzsz file transfer, Zmodem support, and UDP mode similar to Mosh, ideal for remote operations and automation.

metadata.name: sshpilot
metadata.description: User-friendly, cross-platform SSH connection manager

summary.zh: SSH Pilot 是一款用户友好、跨平台的 SSH 连接管理器，专为 Linux 和 macOS 设计，提供集成终端和文件管理器。它支持标签式界面、SFTP 文件管理、服务器分组、端口转发等功能，并采用安全存储机制保护凭证，是 Termius、Putty 等工具的轻量级替代品。
summary.en: SSH Pilot is a user-friendly, cross-platform SSH connection manager for Linux and macOS, featuring an integrated terminal and file manager. It offers tabbed interfaces, SFTP file management, server grouping, port forwarding, and secure credential storage, serving as a lightweight alternative to tools like Termius and Putty.

metadata.name: uncloud
metadata.description: A lightweight tool for deploying and managing containerised applications across a network of Docker hosts. Bridging the gap between Docker and Kubernetes ✨

summary.zh: Uncloud 是一款轻量级容器编排工具，专为跨多台 Docker 主机部署和管理容器化应用而设计。它通过去中心化的对等网络架构，消除了传统编排器如 Kubernetes 的控制平面和仲裁开销，提供自动服务发现、负载均衡、HTTPS 入口和简单 CLI 命令，适用于希望自托管基础设施但避免复杂运维的开发者。
summary.en: Uncloud is a lightweight container orchestration tool designed for deploying and managing containerized applications across multiple Docker hosts. It uses a decentralized peer-to-peer network architecture to eliminate the control plane and quorum overhead of traditional orchestrators like Kubernetes, offering automatic service discovery, load balancing, HTTPS ingress, and simple CLI commands, ideal for developers seeking self-hosted infrastructure without operational complexity.

metadata.name: easydb_app
metadata.description: EasyDB is a lightweight desktop app built with Tauri and Rust, enabling you to query local CSV, Excel, and JSON files with SQL—no external database required. It handles datasets from hundreds of MB to several GB with ease. 让所有数据说同一种“语言”

summary.zh: EasyDB是一款基于Tauri和Rust构建的轻量级桌面应用，无需外部数据库即可通过SQL直接查询本地CSV、Excel、JSON等文件。它利用DataFusion查询引擎，支持复杂SQL操作如JOIN和窗口函数，高效处理数百MB至数GB的大型数据集，适用于数据分析、数据探索和快速查询场景。
summary.en: EasyDB is a lightweight desktop application built with Tauri and Rust, enabling SQL queries on local CSV, Excel, and JSON files without an external database. It leverages the DataFusion query engine to support complex SQL operations like JOINs and window functions, efficiently handling datasets from hundreds of MB to several GB, ideal for data analysis, exploration, and quick querying.

metadata.name: dpanel
metadata.description: 轻量化 docker 可视化管理面板。lightweight  panel for docker

summary.zh: DPanel 是一款轻量化的 Docker 可视化管理面板，提供完善的容器管理功能，包括容器、镜像、网络和卷的监控与操作。它支持标准版和精简版部署，适用于个人开发者和小型团队简化 Docker 运维流程，提升管理效率。
summary.en: DPanel is a lightweight Docker visual management panel that offers comprehensive container management features, including monitoring and operations for containers, images, networks, and volumes. It supports standard and lite deployments, suitable for individual developers and small teams to simplify Docker operations and enhance management efficiency.

metadata.name: freelens
metadata.description: Free IDE for Kubernetes

summary.zh: Freelens 是一款免费开源的 Kubernetes 集群管理界面，提供跨平台桌面应用，支持 macOS、Windows 和 Linux。它通过直观的用户界面简化 Kubernetes 的复杂性，适用于开发者和运维人员高效管理容器化环境。
summary.en: Freelens is a free and open-source user interface for managing Kubernetes clusters, offering a cross-platform desktop application compatible with macOS, Windows, and Linux. It simplifies Kubernetes complexities with an intuitive interface, ideal for developers and operators to efficiently handle containerized environments.

metadata.name: podman-desktop
metadata.description: Podman Desktop is the best free and open source tool to work with Containers and Kubernetes for developers. Get an intuitive and user-friendly interface to effortlessly build, manage, and deploy containers and Kubernetes — all from your desktop.

summary.zh: Podman Desktop 是一款免费开源的桌面图形化工具，专为开发者设计，用于简化容器和 Kubernetes 的开发与管理。它提供直观的用户界面，支持构建、运行、调试容器和 Pod，并集成多容器引擎和 Kubernetes 部署，提升开发效率。
summary.en: Podman Desktop is a free and open-source graphical desktop tool designed for developers to simplify container and Kubernetes development and management. It offers an intuitive interface for building, running, and debugging containers and Pods, with support for multiple container engines and Kubernetes deployment, enhancing developer productivity.

metadata.name: ArchiveBox
metadata.description: 🗃 Open source self-hosted web archiving. Takes URLs/browser history/bookmarks/Pocket/Pinboard/etc., saves HTML, JS, PDFs, media, and more...

summary.zh: ArchiveBox 是一款开源自托管的网页归档工具，支持从多种来源（如URL、浏览器历史、书签、Pocket等）抓取并保存网页内容，包括HTML、JS、PDF、媒体文件等，以标准格式存储确保长期可读性。适用于个人或组织进行数据备份、法律证据保存、社交媒体内容归档等场景，提供CLI、REST API和Web界面等多种交互方式。
summary.en: ArchiveBox is an open-source self-hosted web archiving tool that captures and preserves web content from various sources (e.g., URLs, browser history, bookmarks, Pocket) in formats like HTML, JS, PDF, and media files, ensuring long-term readability with standard outputs. It is suitable for individuals and organizations for data backup, legal evidence preservation, social media archiving, etc., offering CLI, REST API, and web interface for interaction.

metadata.name: docker-static-website
metadata.description: A very small Docker image (~80KB) to run any static website

summary.zh: 这是一个极简的Docker镜像（约80KB），基于BusyBox httpd静态文件服务器，用于高效部署任何静态网站。它支持多架构（linux/amd64、linux/arm64、linux/arm/v7），并提供灵活的配置选项，如gzip压缩、反向代理、自定义错误页面和基本认证，适用于轻量级Web托管和容器化部署场景。
summary.en: This is a minimal Docker image (~80KB) based on BusyBox httpd static file server, designed for efficiently deploying any static website. It supports multi-architecture builds (linux/amd64, linux/arm64, linux/arm/v7) and offers flexible configuration options such as gzip compression, reverse proxy, custom error pages, and basic authentication, ideal for lightweight web hosting and containerized deployment scenarios.

metadata.name: AirBattery
metadata.description: Get the battery usage of all your devices on your Mac and put them on the Dock / Menu Bar / Widget! && 在Mac上获取你所有设备的电量信息并显示在Dock / 状态栏 / 小组件上!

summary.zh: AirBattery 是一款 macOS 应用，通过 Nearbility Engine 自动检测局域网内所有支持设备（如 iPhone、iPad、Apple Watch）的电量，并实时显示在 Dock、状态栏或小组件上。支持蓝牙和 WiFi 连接，提供 Nearcast 功能跨设备查看电量，无需手动配置，提升多设备电量管理效率。
summary.en: AirBattery is a macOS application that automatically detects battery levels of all supported devices (e.g., iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch) on the same LAN via the Nearbility Engine, displaying them in real-time on the Dock, status bar, or widgets. It supports Bluetooth and WiFi connections, offers Nearcast for cross-device battery monitoring, and requires no manual setup, enhancing multi-device battery management efficiency.

metadata.name: pinchflat
metadata.description: Your next YouTube media manager

summary.zh: Pinchflat 是一款基于 yt-dlp 的自托管 YouTube 媒体管理器，专为自动化下载频道或播放列表内容而设计。它提供轻量级 Docker 容器、强大的文件命名系统和易用的 Web 界面，支持与 Plex、Jellyfin 等媒体中心无缝集成，适用于媒体归档和离线观看场景。
summary.en: Pinchflat is a self-hosted YouTube media manager built on yt-dlp, designed for automated downloading of channel or playlist content. It features a lightweight Docker container, powerful file naming system, and user-friendly web interface, with seamless integration for media centers like Plex and Jellyfin, ideal for media archiving and offline viewing.

metadata.name: vfox
metadata.description: A cross-platform and extendable version manager with support for Java, Node.js, Golang, Python, Flutter, .NET & more

summary.zh: vfox 是一个跨平台、可扩展的版本管理器，支持 Java、Node.js、Golang、Python、Flutter、.NET 等多种运行时环境。它通过插件系统提供一致的命令行管理，自动切换项目版本，简化多环境配置，适用于开发者在不同项目间高效切换开发环境。
summary.en: vfox is a cross-platform and extendable version manager that supports multiple runtime environments such as Java, Node.js, Golang, Python, Flutter, and .NET. It offers consistent command-line management via a plugin system, automatically switches versions per project, and simplifies multi-environment configurations, ideal for developers switching between projects with different requirements.

metadata.name: bili-sync
metadata.description: 由 Rust & Tokio 驱动的哔哩哔哩同步工具

summary.zh: bili-sync 是一款专为 NAS 用户设计的哔哩哔哩视频同步工具，由 Rust 和 Tokio 驱动，实现高效异步并发下载。它支持收藏夹、稍后再看和 UP 主投稿的自动扫描与下载，自动选择最优视频流，使用 FFmpeg 合并，并生成媒体服务器兼容的文件命名，便于导入媒体库。提供 Web UI 配置、多平台二进制和 Docker 镜像，适用于个人媒体库管理和自动化备份场景。
summary.en: bili-sync is a Bilibili video synchronization tool designed for NAS users, powered by Rust and Tokio for efficient asynchronous concurrent downloading. It supports automatic scanning and downloading of favorites, watch-later lists, and UP creator uploads, automatically selects optimal video streams, merges them with FFmpeg, and generates media server-compatible file naming for easy library import. It offers Web UI configuration, multi-platform binaries, and Docker images, suitable for personal media library management and automated backup scenarios.

metadata.name: LaunchNext
metadata.description: Bring your Launchpad back in MacOS26+ ,highly customizable, powerful, free.

summary.zh: LaunchNext 是一款专为 macOS 26+ 设计的免费启动器应用，旨在恢复被移除的 Launchpad 功能。它高度可定制，支持一键导入原生 Launchpad 数据库，完美还原应用布局和文件夹，提供多语言界面、图标大小调整和智能搜索，为 macOS Tahoe 用户带来经典且强大的应用管理体验。
summary.en: LaunchNext is a free, highly customizable launcher app for macOS 26+, designed to restore the removed Launchpad functionality. It offers one-click import from the native Launchpad database to perfectly recreate app layouts and folders, with features like multi-language support, customizable icon sizes, and instant search, delivering a classic and powerful app management experience for macOS Tahoe users.

metadata.name: ssh-hypervisor
metadata.description: 🏠 SSH, but each user gets their own microVM

summary.zh: ssh-hypervisor 是一个基于 Go 语言开发的 SSH 服务器，通过 Firecracker 动态创建 Linux 微虚拟机。它允许用户通过 SSH 连接即时分配独立的微 VM，支持状态快照恢复，适用于轻量级虚拟化测试和开发环境，目前为实验性项目。
summary.en: ssh-hypervisor is an SSH server written in Go that dynamically provisions Linux microVMs using Firecracker. It enables users to instantly allocate isolated microVMs via SSH connections, with snapshot support for state restoration, ideal for lightweight virtualization testing and development, currently experimental.

metadata.name: rustnet
metadata.description: A cross-platform network monitoring terminal UI tool built with Rust.

summary.zh: RustNet 是一个基于 Rust 开发的跨平台网络监控终端 UI 工具，提供实时网络连接监控、深度包检测和进程关联功能。它填补了简单连接工具与复杂包分析器之间的空白，适用于远程服务器监控和网络故障排查，支持 Linux、macOS、Windows 和 FreeBSD 系统。
summary.en: RustNet is a cross-platform network monitoring terminal UI tool built with Rust, offering real-time network connection monitoring, deep packet inspection, and process attribution. It bridges the gap between basic connection tools and complex packet analyzers, ideal for remote server monitoring and network troubleshooting, with support for Linux, macOS, Windows, and FreeBSD.

metadata.name: omarchy
metadata.description: Beautiful, Modern & Opinionated Linux

summary.zh: Omarchy 是由 DHH 开发的一款美观、现代且具有鲜明设计理念的 Linux 发行版，专注于提供优雅的用户体验和高效的操作系统环境，适用于追求美学与功能平衡的开发者及桌面用户。
summary.en: Omarchy is a beautiful, modern, and opinionated Linux distribution developed by DHH, focusing on delivering an elegant user experience and efficient operating system environment, ideal for developers and desktop users seeking a balance between aesthetics and functionality.

metadata.name: theByteBook
metadata.description: ⭐ 【出版书籍】京东购买链接 https://item.jd.com/14531549.html  深入讲解内核网络、Kubernetes、ServiceMesh、容器等云原生相关技术。经历实践检验的 DevOps、SRE指南。

summary.zh: 《深入高可用系统原理与设计》是一本已出版的云原生技术书籍，深入讲解内核网络、Kubernetes、ServiceMesh、容器等核心主题，结合DevOps和SRE实践，提供高可用系统架构的体系化指南。
summary.en: TheByteBook is a published book titled 'In-depth Principles and Design of High Availability Systems', focusing on cloud-native technologies such as kernel networking, Kubernetes, ServiceMesh, and containers, with practical DevOps and SRE guidance for building resilient architectures.

metadata.name: Seelen-UI
metadata.description: The Fully Customizable Desktop Environment for Windows 10/11.

summary.zh: Seelen UI 是一款专为 Windows 10/11 设计的完全可定制桌面环境，旨在提升用户体验与工作效率。它提供平铺窗口管理器、应用启动器、媒体模块等核心功能，支持70多种语言，允许用户通过直观界面个性化菜单、主题和布局，实现高效多任务处理与视觉美化。
summary.en: Seelen UI is a fully customizable desktop environment for Windows 10/11, designed to enhance user experience and productivity. It features a tiling window manager, app launcher, media module, and supports over 70 languages, enabling users to personalize menus, themes, and layouts through an intuitive interface for efficient multitasking and visual appeal.

metadata.name: Parabolic
metadata.description: Download web video and audio

summary.zh: Parabolic 是一款基于 yt-dlp 的跨平台视频音频下载工具，提供图形化界面支持数百个网站，支持多种格式下载、并发下载、元数据和字幕获取，适用于个人媒体内容管理。
summary.en: Parabolic is a cross-platform video and audio download tool based on yt-dlp, offering a graphical interface for hundreds of sites, supporting multiple formats, concurrent downloads, metadata, and subtitle retrieval, ideal for personal media content management.

metadata.name: UniGetUI
metadata.description: UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

summary.zh: UniGetUI 是一款为 Windows 10/11 设计的图形化包管理器界面，统一支持 Winget、Scoop、Chocolatey、Pip、Npm 等主流命令行包管理器。它提供直观的 GUI，简化软件安装、更新和卸载流程，提升用户体验，适用于需要集中管理多源软件包的开发者和普通用户。
summary.en: UniGetUI is a graphical interface for package managers on Windows 10/11, unifying support for CLI tools like Winget, Scoop, Chocolatey, Pip, and Npm. It offers an intuitive GUI to simplify software installation, updates, and uninstallation, enhancing user experience for developers and general users managing multi-source packages.

metadata.name: brew
metadata.description: 🍺 The missing package manager for macOS (or Linux)

summary.zh: Homebrew 是 macOS 和 Linux 系统上缺失的包管理器，提供便捷的软件安装、更新和管理功能。它通过公式和桶机制支持大量开源软件，简化了系统依赖管理，广泛应用于开发环境和日常工具部署。
summary.en: Homebrew is the missing package manager for macOS and Linux, offering easy software installation, updating, and management. It supports a vast array of open-source software via formulas and casks, streamlining dependency management for development environments and daily tool deployment.

metadata.name: nixos-and-flakes-book
metadata.description: :hammer_and_wrench: :heart: Want to know NixOS & Flakes in detail? Looking for a beginner-friendly tutorial? Then you've come to the right place!  想要学习使用 NixOS 与 Flakes 吗？在寻找一份新手友好的教程？那你可来对地方了！

summary.zh: 《NixOS & Flakes Book》是一份面向初学者的非官方教程，详细讲解NixOS操作系统及其Flakes实验性功能。该书提供多语言版本，旨在帮助用户掌握NixOS的配置管理、提升系统可重现性和可组合性，并包含社区讨论与贡献指南。
summary.en: The 'NixOS & Flakes Book' is an unofficial, beginner-friendly tutorial that provides in-depth coverage of the NixOS operating system and its experimental Flakes feature. It offers multilingual versions to help users learn configuration management, enhance reproducibility and composability, and includes community discussion and contribution guidelines.

metadata.name: devbox
metadata.description: Instant, easy, and predictable development environments

summary.zh: Devbox 是一个命令行工具，用于快速创建隔离的开发环境。它通过定义项目所需的操作系统级包列表，基于 Nix 包管理器提供超过 40 万个包版本，实现环境的一致性和可移植性。核心优势包括团队协作一致性、无污染本地尝试、高速执行和避免版本冲突，支持本地 shell、Docker 容器和云端环境等多种使用方式。
summary.en: Devbox is a command-line tool for creating isolated development environments instantly. It defines OS-level package requirements using the Nix Package Registry with over 400,000 versions, ensuring consistency and portability. Key benefits include team-wide shell consistency, pollution-free local testing, high-speed execution without virtualization, and conflict-free version management, supporting local shells, Docker containers, and cloud environments.

metadata.name: SafeLine
metadata.description: SafeLine is a self-hosted WAF(Web Application Firewall) / reverse proxy to protect your web apps from attacks and exploits.

summary.zh: SafeLine是一款自托管Web应用防火墙（WAF）/反向代理，旨在保护Web应用免受SQL注入、XSS、暴力破解等多种攻击。其核心功能包括Web攻击防御、主动机器人滥用防护、HTML/JS代码加密、基于IP的速率限制和Web访问控制列表，适用于企业级Web安全防护场景。
summary.en: SafeLine is a self-hosted Web Application Firewall (WAF) / reverse proxy designed to protect web applications from attacks such as SQL injection, XSS, and brute force. Its core features include web attack defense, proactive bot abuse protection, HTML/JS code encryption, IP-based rate limiting, and Web Access Control List, suitable for enterprise-level web security scenarios.

metadata.name: go-retry
metadata.description: Go library for retrying with configurable backoffs

summary.zh: go-retry 是一个 Go 语言库，用于实现可配置退避策略的重试逻辑。它提供多种内置退避算法（如指数退避、斐波那契退避），支持通过中间件扩展功能（如添加抖动、限制重试次数），并具备无外部依赖、并发安全和上下文感知等特性，适用于网络请求、数据库连接等需要容错处理的场景。
summary.en: go-retry is a Go library for implementing retry logic with configurable backoff strategies. It offers built-in backoff algorithms (e.g., exponential, Fibonacci), extensible via middleware (e.g., jitter, max retries), and features no external dependencies, concurrency safety, and context awareness, ideal for fault-tolerant scenarios like network requests and database connections.

metadata.name: flow-browser
metadata.description: A modern, privacy-focused browser with a minimalistic design.

summary.zh: Flow Browser 是一款基于 Electron 构建的现代化、注重隐私的轻量级浏览器，采用极简设计。它结合 Chromium 内核的强大功能，支持 Chrome 扩展，提供多配置文件、空间管理、侧边栏、命令面板和原生广告拦截器等特性，适用于追求隐私保护和高效浏览的用户。
summary.en: Flow Browser is a modern, privacy-focused lightweight browser built on Electron with a minimalistic design. It leverages Chromium's power, supports Chrome extensions, and offers features like multiple profiles, spaces, sidebar, command palette, and native adblocker, ideal for users seeking privacy and efficient browsing.

metadata.name: claude-relay-service
metadata.description: CRS-自建Claude Code镜像，一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini、Droid 订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

summary.zh: Claude Relay Service 是一个开源的中转服务，允许用户自建 Claude API 镜像，统一接入 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini 和 Droid 等订阅，支持多账户管理和拼车共享以分摊成本。项目提供原生工具无缝使用、智能切换、性能优化和监控面板，适用于隐私敏感、地区受限或需要稳定访问的场景，基于 Node.js 和 Redis 构建，支持 Docker 部署。
summary.en: Claude Relay Service is an open-source relay service that enables users to self-host Claude API mirrors, unifying access to subscriptions like Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, and Droid. It supports multi-account management and carpool sharing to distribute costs, offering native tool integration, intelligent switching, performance optimization, and monitoring dashboards. Suitable for privacy-sensitive, region-restricted, or stability-demanding scenarios, it is built on Node.js and Redis with Docker support.

metadata.name: agents.md
metadata.description: AGENTS.md — a simple, open format for guiding coding agents

summary.zh: AGENTS.md 是一个简单、开放的格式规范，用于指导 AI 编码智能体在项目中高效工作。它类似于项目的 README 文件，提供开发环境设置、测试指令和 PR 规范等上下文信息，帮助智能体理解项目结构和最佳实践，提升自动化编码的准确性和效率。
summary.en: AGENTS.md is a simple, open format specification designed to guide AI coding agents in working efficiently on projects. It serves as a dedicated, predictable location for providing context and instructions, such as development environment tips, testing guidelines, and PR rules, to help agents understand project structure and best practices, enhancing automation accuracy and productivity.

metadata.name: checkcle
metadata.description: CheckCle is a self-hosted, open-source monitoring platform for seamless, real-time full-stack systems, applications, and infrastructure. It provides real-time uptime monitoring, distributed checks, incident tracking, and alerts. All deployable anywhere.

summary.zh: CheckCle 是一个自托管、开源的实时全栈监控平台，专为系统、应用和基础设施提供无缝监控。它支持分布式检查、实时可用性监控、事件追踪和告警，可部署在任何环境，帮助开发者和运维团队确保技术栈的稳定性和性能。
summary.en: CheckCle is a self-hosted, open-source real-time monitoring platform for seamless full-stack systems, applications, and infrastructure. It offers distributed checks, real-time uptime monitoring, incident tracking, and alerts, deployable anywhere to ensure stability and performance for developers and operations teams.

metadata.name: backoff
metadata.description: ⏱ The exponential backoff algorithm in Go

summary.zh: 这是一个Go语言实现的指数退避算法库，移植自Google的Java HTTP客户端库。它通过指数级增加重试间隔来优雅处理网络请求失败，适用于分布式系统、API调用和微服务中的错误恢复场景，核心特点是算法简洁、易于集成且性能高效。
summary.en: This is a Go implementation of the exponential backoff algorithm, ported from Google's Java HTTP client library. It gracefully handles network request failures by exponentially increasing retry intervals, suitable for error recovery in distributed systems, API calls, and microservices, with key features of simplicity, easy integration, and high performance.

metadata.name: DevToys
metadata.description: A Swiss Army knife for developers.

summary.zh: DevToys 是一款面向开发者的多功能桌面应用，集成了30多种常用工具，涵盖格式转换、编解码、数据生成与测试等场景。其核心亮点包括智能检测剪贴板内容自动匹配工具，以及支持扩展开发，提供跨平台、离线使用的便捷体验，有效替代不可靠的在线服务。
summary.en: DevToys is a versatile desktop application for developers, integrating over 30 essential tools for tasks like format conversion, encoding/decoding, data generation, and testing. Key features include smart detection for clipboard content to auto-select tools, extensibility through plugins, and cross-platform, offline functionality, offering a reliable alternative to untrustworthy online services.

metadata.name: How-To-Secure-A-Linux-Server
metadata.description: An evolving how-to guide for securing a Linux server.

summary.zh: 这是一个关于如何保护Linux服务器的实用指南，涵盖从SSH安全、防火墙配置到入侵检测和审计等多个方面。它提供了详细的步骤和工具推荐，适用于系统管理员和开发者，旨在提升服务器的安全性和防御能力。
summary.en: This is a practical guide on securing Linux servers, covering aspects from SSH security, firewall configuration to intrusion detection and auditing. It offers detailed steps and tool recommendations, suitable for system administrators and developers to enhance server security and defense capabilities.

metadata.name: Termix
metadata.description: Termix is a web-based server management platform with SSH terminal, tunneling, and file editing capabilities.

summary.zh: Termix 是一个开源的、永久免费的、自托管的服务器管理平台，提供基于 Web 的 SSH 终端、隧道管理、远程文件编辑和 Docker 容器控制等功能。它支持多平台访问，具备用户认证、角色权限和数据加密等安全特性，是 Termius 的免费替代方案。
summary.en: Termix is an open-source, forever-free, self-hosted server management platform offering web-based SSH terminal, tunneling, remote file editing, and Docker container control. It supports multi-platform access with security features like user authentication, RBAC, and data encryption, serving as a free alternative to Termius.

metadata.name: apisix-dashboard
metadata.description: Dashboard for Apache APISIX

summary.zh: Apache APISIX Dashboard 是 Apache APISIX 的官方前端管理界面，旨在通过直观的图形化操作简化 API 网关的配置、监控和管理。它支持与 APISIX 主版本同步更新，提供路由、插件、上游服务等核心功能的可视化控制，适用于微服务架构和云原生环境中的运维自动化。
summary.en: Apache APISIX Dashboard is the official frontend management interface for Apache APISIX, designed to simplify the configuration, monitoring, and management of the API gateway through an intuitive graphical interface. It synchronizes updates with the APISIX master version, offering visual control over core features like routes, plugins, and upstream services, suitable for operational automation in microservices and cloud-native environments.

metadata.name: homelab
metadata.description: Fully automated homelab from empty disk to running services with a single command.

summary.zh: Khue's Homelab 是一个基于基础设施即代码和GitOps的自动化家庭实验室框架，支持从裸机PXE启动到Kubernetes集群部署及服务管理的全流程自动化。它提供模块化架构，集成常见应用如Gitea、Jellyfin，并具备监控、备份、证书管理等特性，适用于个人技术实践和自托管服务场景。
summary.en: Khue's Homelab is an automated homelab framework based on Infrastructure as Code and GitOps, enabling full automation from bare-metal PXE boot to Kubernetes cluster deployment and service management. It features a modular architecture, integrates common applications like Gitea and Jellyfin, and includes monitoring, backup, certificate management, making it suitable for personal tech experimentation and self-hosted services.

metadata.name: ladybird
metadata.description: Truly independent web browser

summary.zh: Ladybird是一款真正独立的网页浏览器，采用基于Web标准的新型引擎，处于预Alpha阶段，主要面向开发者。其核心亮点包括多进程架构，通过独立的渲染进程、图像解码进程和网络请求进程实现安全隔离，有效抵御恶意内容。该浏览器继承了SerenityOS的多个核心库，如LibWeb渲染引擎和LibJS引擎，支持跨平台运行，旨在构建一个完整、可用的现代浏览器。
summary.en: Ladybird is a truly independent web browser that utilizes a novel engine based on web standards, currently in a pre-alpha state and primarily targeted at developers. Its key features include a multi-process architecture with isolated renderer, image decoder, and request server processes for enhanced security against malicious content. Inheriting core libraries from SerenityOS, such as LibWeb and LibJS, it supports cross-platform operation and aims to deliver a complete, usable browser for the modern web.

metadata.name: godoxy
metadata.description: High-performance reverse proxy and container orchestrator for self-hosters

summary.zh: GoDoxy 是一个专为自托管用户设计的高性能反向代理和容器编排工具，提供轻量级、简单易用的 WebUI 管理界面。核心功能包括自动 SSL 证书管理、Docker 和 Podman 容器支持、空闲容器休眠、Proxmox 集成以及 ACL 访问控制，适用于家庭服务器、小型企业部署等场景，强调自动化配置和实时监控。
summary.en: GoDoxy is a high-performance reverse proxy and container orchestrator designed for self-hosters, featuring a lightweight and user-friendly WebUI. Key capabilities include automatic SSL certificate management, support for Docker and Podman containers, idle container sleep, Proxmox integration, and ACL access control, ideal for home servers and small business deployments with a focus on automation and real-time monitoring.

metadata.name: ansible-ui
metadata.description: 轻量级，简单易用的Ansible Web管理面板，提供批量主机管理、运行剧本任务、命令执行、文件传输和Web终端等功能。

summary.zh: Ansible Web管理面板是一个轻量级、简单易用的Web界面，用于管理Ansible自动化运维任务。它提供批量主机管理、命令执行、文件传输、Playbook执行和Web终端等功能，适合初学者和运维团队快速部署和使用。通过Docker容器化部署，支持密码和密钥认证，注重安全性，但需注意公网环境下的安全配置。
summary.en: Ansible Web Management Panel is a lightweight and user-friendly web interface for managing Ansible automation tasks. It offers features such as batch host management, command execution, file transfer, Playbook execution, and web terminal, suitable for beginners and operations teams. Deployable via Docker with support for password and key authentication, it emphasizes security but requires careful configuration in public networks.

metadata.name: blog_os
metadata.description: Writing an OS in Rust

summary.zh: 这是一个使用Rust语言编写操作系统的教程项目，通过系列博客文章提供从零开始的逐步指导。核心价值在于结合Rust的安全性与系统编程，涵盖内核开发、内存管理、中断处理等关键主题，适合学习操作系统原理和Rust系统级编程的开发者。
summary.en: This is a tutorial project for writing an operating system in Rust, offering step-by-step guidance through a series of blog posts. It leverages Rust's safety features for system programming, covering essential topics like kernel development, memory management, and interrupt handling, ideal for developers learning OS principles and Rust low-level programming.

metadata.name: BetterDisplay
metadata.description: Unlock your displays on your Mac! Flexible HiDPI scaling, XDR/HDR extra brightness, virtual screens, DDC control, extra dimming, PIP/streaming, EDID override and lots more!

summary.zh: BetterDisplay 是一款专为 macOS 设计的强大显示管理工具，通过 HiDPI 缩放、XDR/HDR 亮度增强、虚拟屏幕创建和 DDC 控制等功能，解锁显示器的全部潜力。它支持自定义分辨率、EDID 覆盖、画中画模式及网络设备控制，适用于专业设计、多屏办公和媒体消费场景，提升视觉体验和生产力。
summary.en: BetterDisplay is a powerful display management tool for macOS, unlocking the full potential of monitors through HiDPI scaling, XDR/HDR brightness enhancement, virtual screen creation, and DDC control. It supports custom resolutions, EDID overrides, Picture-in-Picture mode, and networked device control, ideal for professional design, multi-screen workflows, and media consumption to enhance visual experience and productivity.

metadata.name: teleport
metadata.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

summary.zh: Teleport 是一款基础设施访问与安全平台，提供统一的身份认证、访问控制和审计功能。它支持 SSH、Kubernetes、数据库、RDP 等多种协议，通过短时证书和零信任原则消除长期密钥，实现最小权限和即时访问，适用于混合云环境的安全运维。
summary.en: Teleport is an infrastructure access and security platform that provides unified identity authentication, access control, and auditing. It supports multiple protocols like SSH, Kubernetes, databases, and RDP, using short-lived certificates and zero-trust principles to eliminate long-lived keys, enforce least privilege and just-in-time access, suitable for secure operations in hybrid cloud environments.

metadata.name: kubeconform
metadata.description: A FAST Kubernetes manifests validator, with support for Custom Resources!

summary.zh: Kubeconform 是一个高性能的 Kubernetes 清单验证工具，专为 CI/CD 集成和本地开发设计。它通过多线程并行处理和内存缓存机制显著提升验证速度，支持自定义资源（CRD）和离线验证，并基于自更新的 Kubernetes JSON 模式库确保最新版本兼容性。
summary.en: Kubeconform is a high-performance Kubernetes manifest validation tool designed for CI/CD integration and local development. It significantly speeds up validation through multi-threaded parallel processing and in-memory caching, supports custom resources (CRDs) and offline validation, and ensures compatibility with the latest Kubernetes versions via a self-updating JSON schema repository.

metadata.name: p2p
metadata.description: 🖥️ P2P Remote Desktop - Portable, No Configuration or Installation Needed.

summary.zh: P2P Remote Desktop 是一款基于点对点技术的远程桌面工具，无需配置或安装即可便携使用。它利用 UDT 协议和 rendezvous 连接机制，能够绕过大多数防火墙规则，实现类似 TeamViewer 的远程控制和消息传输功能，适用于快速、零成本的远程协助场景。
summary.en: P2P Remote Desktop is a peer-to-peer remote desktop tool that is portable and requires no configuration or installation. It uses the UDT protocol and rendezvous connection to bypass most firewall rules, enabling remote control and messaging similar to TeamViewer at zero cost, ideal for quick remote assistance.

metadata.name: Chaterm
metadata.description: Open source AI terminal and SSH Client for EC2, Database and Kubernetes.

summary.zh: Chaterm 是一款开源 AI 终端和 SSH 客户端，专为 EC2、数据库和 Kubernetes 设计，通过自然语言交互重塑传统命令行体验。它内置专家知识库和智能代理引擎，支持任务分解、自动化运维和实时语音交互，旨在成为智能 DevOps 助手，降低技术栈认知门槛。
summary.en: Chaterm is an open-source AI terminal and SSH client designed for EC2, databases, and Kubernetes, reshaping traditional command-line experiences through natural language interaction. It features a built-in expert knowledge base and autonomous agent engine, supporting task decomposition, automated operations, and real-time voice interaction, aiming to serve as an intelligent DevOps co-pilot to reduce technical barriers.

metadata.name: UE-Game-ModManager
metadata.description: 支持所有虚幻引擎游戏的MOD管理器，可灵活使用

summary.zh: UE Mod Manager 是一款专为虚幻引擎游戏设计的MOD管理器，支持多款热门游戏如《剑星》《黑神话悟空》等，提供云端同步、自动备份、批量操作和智能搜索等功能。基于.NET 8.0开发，适用于Windows平台，简化MOD管理流程，提升游戏体验。
summary.en: UE Mod Manager is a MOD management tool designed for Unreal Engine games, supporting popular titles like Stellar Blade and Black Myth: Wukong. It offers cloud sync, automatic backups, batch operations, and smart search features. Built with .NET 8.0 for Windows, it streamlines MOD management and enhances gaming experiences.

metadata.name: syncthing
metadata.description: Open Source Continuous File Synchronization

summary.zh: Syncthing 是一款开源、去中心化的持续文件同步工具，专注于数据安全与隐私保护。它通过点对点加密技术，在多个设备间自动同步文件，无需依赖云服务器，适用于个人数据备份、跨平台文件共享等场景。核心优势包括防数据丢失、抗攻击、易用性和跨平台支持，采用 Go 语言开发，确保高效稳定运行。
summary.en: Syncthing is an open-source, decentralized continuous file synchronization tool that prioritizes data security and privacy. It automatically syncs files between multiple devices using peer-to-peer encryption, eliminating reliance on cloud servers, ideal for personal data backup and cross-platform file sharing. Key strengths include data loss prevention, attack resistance, ease of use, and cross-platform compatibility, built with Go for efficient performance.

metadata.name: clash-rs
metadata.description: custom protocol network proxy

summary.zh: ClashRS 是一款基于 Rust 开发的网络代理软件，支持自定义协议和规则驱动，提供灵活的流量路由、本地防欺骗 DNS 及多种代理模式（如 HTTP/Socks5 和 utun 网关）。它兼容多种传输协议和跨平台环境，适用于网络代理、隐私保护和自动化运维场景。
summary.en: ClashRS is a network proxy software developed in Rust, featuring custom protocols and rule-based traffic routing. It offers flexible routing, local anti-spoofing DNS, and supports multiple proxy modes (e.g., HTTP/Socks5 and utun gateway). Compatible with various transport protocols and cross-platform environments, it is suitable for network proxying, privacy protection, and automation operations.

metadata.name: sniffnet
metadata.description: Comfortably monitor your Internet traffic 🕵️‍♂️

summary.zh: Sniffnet 是一款跨平台网络流量监控应用，提供直观界面和实时数据可视化，支持多语言和自定义主题，适用于个人用户和开发者轻松监控互联网流量、分析网络活动并接收通知。
summary.en: Sniffnet is a cross-platform application for monitoring Internet traffic, offering an intuitive interface and real-time data visualization. It supports multiple languages and custom themes, suitable for individuals and developers to easily track network activity and receive notifications.

metadata.name: kargo
metadata.description: Application lifecycle orchestration

summary.zh: Kargo 是基于 GitOps 原则的应用生命周期编排平台，专注于自动化管理软件制品在多阶段环境中的流转与部署。它提供直观的仪表板和声明式配置，简化了从开发到生产的持续交付流程，适用于需要高效、可审计部署管道的云原生团队。
summary.en: Kargo is an application lifecycle orchestration platform built on GitOps principles, automating the promotion of software artifacts across multiple stages. It offers a declarative approach and a user-friendly dashboard to streamline continuous delivery from development to production, ideal for cloud-native teams seeking efficient and auditable deployment pipelines.

metadata.name: meowrch
metadata.description: 🔮 Beautiful dots for Arch hyprland and bspwm

summary.zh: Meowrch 是一个针对 Arch Linux 的优化桌面环境配置项目，专注于在性能与美观之间取得平衡。它提供 BSPWM（X11）和 Hyprland（Wayland）两种环境选择，集成社区主题商店和自动化安装工具，旨在通过轻量级组件实现低资源消耗（如启动时仅占用 1GB RAM），并开发了如 Nemo Tags 和 BlueVein 等实用工具解决 Linux 社区的长期痛点。
summary.en: Meowrch is an optimized desktop environment configuration project for Arch Linux, focusing on balancing performance and aesthetics. It offers BSPWM (X11) and Hyprland (Wayland) environments, integrates a community theme store and automated installation tools, aims for low resource usage with lightweight components (e.g., 1GB RAM at startup), and develops utilities like Nemo Tags and BlueVein to address long-standing pain points in the Linux community.

metadata.name: defaults
metadata.description: Initialize structs with default values

summary.zh: 这是一个用于Go语言结构体初始化的库，通过标签定义默认值，支持标量、复杂、嵌套、别名和指针类型，并递归初始化嵌套字段。它提供动态设置接口，避免覆盖非零值，适用于配置管理和数据模型初始化场景。
summary.en: A Go library for initializing structs with default values via tags, supporting scalar, complex, nested, aliased, and pointer types with recursive field initialization. It offers a dynamic setter interface to preserve non-zero values, ideal for configuration management and data model setup.

metadata.name: autoMate
metadata.description: Like Manus, Computer Use Agent(CUA) and Omniparser, we are computer-using agents.AI-driven local automation assistant that uses natural language to make computers work by themselves

summary.zh: autoMate是一款基于大语言模型的本地自动化助手，通过自然语言指令驱动计算机完成复杂任务。它利用AI视觉理解屏幕内容并模拟人类操作，支持无代码自动化，适用于办公自动化、数据采集等场景，强调本地部署以保障数据安全。
summary.en: autoMate is an AI-powered local automation assistant that uses natural language to drive computers for complex tasks. It leverages AI vision to understand screen content and simulate human operations, enabling no-code automation for scenarios like office automation and data collection, with a focus on local deployment for data security.

metadata.name: gitstars
metadata.description: Github Starred Repositories Manager

summary.zh: Gitstars 是一个专为开发者设计的 GitHub Starred 存储库管理器，旨在解决 Star 项目过多时查找困难的问题。它通过 Topics 和 Language 智能分类，支持 README.md 预览和链接直达，并集成 Gitstars Ranking 功能，每日更新热门项目排名，帮助用户高效管理和发现优质开源资源。
summary.en: Gitstars is a GitHub Starred Repositories Manager designed for developers to address the challenge of finding starred projects as they accumulate. It intelligently categorizes repositories by Topics and Language, offers README.md previews and direct links, and includes Gitstars Ranking for daily updates on top projects, enabling efficient management and discovery of high-quality open-source resources.

metadata.name: borg
metadata.description: Deduplicating archiver with compression and authenticated encryption.

summary.zh: BorgBackup 是一款高效安全的去重备份工具，通过内容定义分块技术实现数据去重，仅存储变化内容，适合日常备份。支持客户端加密、多种压缩算法，可将备份挂载为文件系统，便于数据恢复和检查。适用于需要高效存储和加密备份的场景。
summary.en: BorgBackup is an efficient and secure deduplicating backup tool that uses content-defined chunking to store only changed data, ideal for daily backups. It features client-side encryption, multiple compression algorithms, and mountable backups as file systems for easy recovery and inspection, suitable for scenarios requiring high storage efficiency and encrypted backups.

metadata.name: mise
metadata.description: dev tools, env vars, task runner

summary.zh: mise 是一个现代化的开发环境管理工具，集成了开发工具版本管理、环境变量配置和任务运行功能。它类似于 asdf、direnv 和 make 的结合体，支持数百种工具如 Node.js、Python 和 Terraform，通过统一界面简化多语言项目配置，提升开发效率。
summary.en: mise is a modern development environment management tool that integrates version control for dev tools, environment variable configuration, and task running. It combines features similar to asdf, direnv, and make, supporting hundreds of tools like Node.js, Python, and Terraform, streamlining multi-language project setup through a unified interface to enhance development productivity.

metadata.name: OpenList
metadata.description: A new AList Fork to Anti Trust Crisis

summary.zh: OpenList是AList的一个社区驱动分叉，专注于抵御开源信任危机，提供长期治理和弹性架构。它支持多种云存储服务（如阿里云盘、OneDrive、Google Drive等），通过AGPL-3.0许可证确保代码透明和开放，旨在维护开源生态健康，避免商业滥用和混淆。
summary.en: OpenList is a community-driven fork of AList, designed to defend open source against trust-based attacks with resilient, long-term governance. It supports multiple cloud storage services (e.g., Aliyundrive, OneDrive, Google Drive) under the AGPL-3.0 license, ensuring code transparency and openness to foster a healthy open-source ecosystem and prevent commercial misuse.

metadata.name: starship
metadata.description: ☄🌌️  The minimal, blazing-fast, and infinitely customizable prompt for any shell!

summary.zh: Starship 是一款极简、超快且高度可定制的跨 Shell 提示符工具，适用于 Bash、Zsh、Fish 等多种 Shell 环境。它通过 Rust 实现，提供实时系统信息显示（如 Git 状态、编程语言版本、执行时间等），提升开发效率和终端体验。
summary.en: Starship is a minimal, blazing-fast, and infinitely customizable cross-shell prompt tool, compatible with Bash, Zsh, Fish, and other shells. Built with Rust, it displays real-time system information (e.g., Git status, programming language versions, execution time) to enhance developer productivity and terminal experience.

metadata.name: filebrowser
metadata.description: 📂 Web File Browser

summary.zh: File Browser 是一个基于 Go 语言开发的单文件 Web 文件管理器，允许用户通过浏览器上传、删除、预览和编辑服务器上的文件，实现私有云存储功能。它易于部署，适用于个人或团队的文件管理场景，支持跨平台运行，提供简洁的界面和高效的文件操作。
summary.en: File Browser is a single-binary web file manager built with Go, enabling users to upload, delete, preview, and edit files on a server via a browser, serving as a self-hosted cloud solution. It is easy to deploy, suitable for personal or team file management, cross-platform, and offers a clean interface with efficient file operations.

metadata.name: container
metadata.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

summary.zh: `container` 是苹果官方开发的工具，用于在搭载 Apple silicon 的 Mac 上通过轻量级虚拟机创建和运行 Linux 容器。它基于 Swift 编写，支持 OCI 兼容的容器镜像，可在 macOS 26 及以上版本中利用虚拟化和网络增强功能，适用于本地开发、测试和容器化应用部署。
summary.en: `container` is an official Apple tool for creating and running Linux containers as lightweight virtual machines on Macs with Apple silicon. Written in Swift, it supports OCI-compatible container images and leverages virtualization and networking enhancements in macOS 26 and above, ideal for local development, testing, and containerized application deployment.

metadata.name: harness
metadata.description: Harness Open Source is an end-to-end developer platform with Source Control Management, CI/CD Pipelines, Hosted Developer Environments, and Artifact Registries.

summary.zh: Harness Open Source 是一个开源的端到端开发者平台，集成了源代码管理、CI/CD流水线、托管开发环境（Gitspaces）和制品仓库，提供一体化的DevOps解决方案。它基于Docker容器化部署，支持本地运行和自动化构建，旨在替代并扩展Drone的功能，适用于团队协作和持续交付场景。
summary.en: Harness Open Source is an open-source end-to-end developer platform that integrates source control management, CI/CD pipelines, hosted development environments (Gitspaces), and artifact registries, offering a unified DevOps solution. It is containerized with Docker for local deployment and automated builds, designed to replace and extend Drone's capabilities, suitable for team collaboration and continuous delivery scenarios.

metadata.name: blinko
metadata.description: An open-source, self-hosted personal AI note tool prioritizing privacy, built using TypeScript .

summary.zh: Blinko 是一款开源、自托管的个人 AI 笔记工具，专注于隐私保护，采用 TypeScript 和 Tauri 构建。它通过 AI 增强的 RAG 技术实现自然语言检索笔记，支持多平台部署，帮助用户快速捕捉和组织灵感，确保数据完全自主控制。
summary.en: Blinko is an open-source, self-hosted personal AI note-taking tool built with TypeScript and Tauri, prioritizing privacy. It features AI-enhanced RAG for natural language note retrieval, supports multi-platform deployment, and enables users to quickly capture and organize ideas with full data ownership.

metadata.name: server
metadata.description: A simple server for sending and receiving messages in real-time per WebSocket. (Includes a sleek web-ui)

summary.zh: Gotify/server 是一个基于 WebSocket 的实时消息推送服务器，支持自托管，提供 REST API 发送消息和 WebSocket 接收消息，包含简洁的 Web 界面、用户管理和插件系统，适用于个人或团队的轻量级通知服务。
summary.en: Gotify/server is a real-time message push server based on WebSocket, supporting self-hosting. It offers REST API for sending messages and WebSocket for receiving them, featuring a sleek web UI, user management, and plugin system, ideal for lightweight notification services for individuals or teams.

metadata.name: python-mastery
metadata.description: Advanced Python Mastery (course by @dabeaz)

summary.zh: 《高级Python精通》是由David Beazley开发的进阶Python编程课程，专注于提升开发者从脚本编写到构建复杂程序的能力。课程通过实战练习深入讲解Python核心机制，如生成器、协程和元编程，适用于希望深入理解Python语言内部工作原理并应用于实际项目的程序员。
summary.en: Advanced Python Mastery is a course by David Beazley designed to elevate Python programmers from writing simple scripts to developing sophisticated applications. It focuses on core Python mechanisms like generators, coroutines, and metaprogramming through hands-on exercises, ideal for those seeking a deeper understanding of the language's internals for real-world projects.

metadata.name: dcm
metadata.description: DockerComposeMaker (DCM) is a self-hostable website to help you pick and create a docker-compose.yml file for your home server. Discover new containers, discover and share a config in a couple of clicks!

summary.zh: DCM是一个自托管网站，帮助用户快速创建和管理Docker Compose配置文件，适用于家庭服务器部署。它提供精选容器列表、模板库和社区分享功能，简化配置流程，支持一键生成和部署，提升运维效率。
summary.en: DCM is a self-hostable website that assists users in quickly creating and managing Docker Compose configuration files for home server deployments. It offers curated container lists, template galleries, and community sharing features, streamlining configuration processes with one-click generation and deployment to enhance operational efficiency.

metadata.name: Second-Me
