metadata.description: Train your AI self, amplify you, bridge the world

summary.zh: Second Me 是一个开源项目，旨在让用户训练个性化的AI自我，通过AI原生记忆技术（如分层记忆建模和Me-Alignment算法）捕捉用户身份和上下文，实现本地训练与托管，确保数据隐私和控制。它支持在去中心化网络中扩展智能，作为AI身份接口，促进AI自我间的协作，应用于角色扮演、AI空间等场景，强调个体放大而非替代。
summary.en: Second Me is an open-source project that enables users to train personalized AI selves using AI-native memory technologies like Hierarchical Memory Modeling and the Me-Alignment Algorithm, capturing identity and context. It offers local training and hosting for data privacy and control, scales intelligence on a decentralized network, and serves as an AI identity interface for collaboration among AI selves in applications such as roleplay and AI spaces, focusing on amplifying individuality.

metadata.name: json-to-go
metadata.description: Translates JSON into a Go type in your browser instantly (original)

summary.zh: JSON-to-Go 是一款在线工具，可在浏览器中即时将 JSON 数据转换为 Go 语言结构体定义，简化 Go 开发中的类型声明过程。它支持从文件或标准输入读取 JSON，自动推断类型并生成可读代码，适用于快速原型开发和数据处理场景。
summary.en: JSON-to-Go is an online tool that instantly translates JSON data into Go struct definitions in your browser, streamlining type declaration in Go development. It reads JSON from files or stdin, infers types automatically, and generates readable code, ideal for rapid prototyping and data processing tasks.

metadata.name: openresty-manager
metadata.description: Modern, secure, and elegant server control panel, alternative to OpenResty Edge and Nginx Proxy Manager.

summary.zh: OpenResty Manager 是一款现代化、安全且优雅的服务器控制面板，作为 OpenResty Edge 和 Nginx Proxy Manager 的开源替代方案。它通过 Web 界面简化 OpenResty 管理，支持反向代理、访问控制、DDoS 防护、身份认证和免费 SSL 证书自动续期。此外，提供主机管理、Web 终端、文件管理、Docker 应用商店和多节点批量管理，降低网站搭建和容器运维难度。
summary.en: OpenResty Manager is a modern, secure, and elegant server control panel, serving as an open-source alternative to OpenResty Edge and Nginx Proxy Manager. It simplifies OpenResty management via a web interface, supporting reverse proxy, access control, DDoS protection, authentication, and automatic renewal of free SSL certificates. Additionally, it offers host management, web terminal, file management, Docker app store, and multi-node batch administration, reducing the complexity of website deployment and container operations.

metadata.name: MotionEaseTune
metadata.description: A simple application that can prevent you from motion sickness via 100Hz sound.

summary.zh: MotionEaseTune 是一款基于 100Hz 纯音预防晕动症的简单应用，通过播放特定频率声音缓解症状，适用于乘车、乘船等场景。核心亮点包括一键启动、操作便捷，并基于科学论文验证其有效性，提供跨平台安装选项。
summary.en: MotionEaseTune is a simple application that prevents motion sickness by playing a 100Hz pure tone, designed for scenarios like car or boat travel. Key features include one-click operation, ease of use, and scientific validation from research papers, with cross-platform installation options available.

metadata.name: komodo
metadata.description: 🦎 a tool to build and deploy software on many servers 🦎

summary.zh: Komodo 是一款开源工具，用于在多台服务器上构建和部署软件，支持无限服务器连接和自定义 API 自动化，无商业版本限制，提供可视化界面和主题切换功能。
summary.en: Komodo is an open-source tool for building and deploying software across multiple servers, supporting unlimited server connections and custom API automation with no commercial edition restrictions, featuring a visual interface and theme switching.

metadata.name: homepage
metadata.description: A highly customizable homepage (or startpage / application dashboard) with Docker and service API integrations.

summary.zh: Homepage 是一个高度可定制的现代化应用仪表盘，支持 Docker 自动发现和超过 100 种服务集成。它采用静态生成技术确保快速加载，并通过代理保护 API 密钥安全，适用于个人或团队的自托管环境，提供多语言支持和丰富的小部件功能。
summary.en: Homepage is a highly customizable modern application dashboard with Docker auto-discovery and integrations for over 100 services. It uses static generation for fast loading, proxies API requests for security, and supports multiple languages, ideal for self-hosted personal or team environments with rich widget features.

metadata.name: NTrace-core
metadata.description: NextTrace, an open source visual route tracking CLI tool

summary.zh: NextTrace 是一款开源的可视化路由追踪 CLI 工具，采用 Golang 开发，追求轻量化设计。它通过命令行界面提供直观的网络路径跟踪功能，适用于网络诊断、运维监控和性能分析等场景，帮助用户快速定位网络问题。
summary.en: NextTrace is an open-source visual route tracking CLI tool developed in Golang, emphasizing lightweight design. It offers intuitive network path tracing through a command-line interface, suitable for network diagnostics, operations monitoring, and performance analysis, aiding users in quickly identifying network issues.

metadata.name: slidev
metadata.description: Presentation Slides for Developers

summary.zh: Slidev 是一款专为开发者设计的基于 Markdown 的演示文稿工具，支持实时编码、Vue 组件嵌入和 LaTeX 数学公式，提供丰富的主题和交互功能，适用于技术演讲和教学场景。
summary.en: Slidev is a Markdown-based presentation tool designed for developers, featuring live coding, Vue component integration, and LaTeX math support, with extensive themes and interactive capabilities for technical talks and educational use.

metadata.name: note-gen
metadata.description: A cross-platform Markdown AI note-taking software.

summary.zh: NoteGen是一款跨平台Markdown笔记软件，通过AI智能体将碎片化信息转化为结构化笔记，支持RAG检索增强生成和MCP工具集成，实现轻量级、免费、无广告的智能笔记体验。
summary.en: NoteGen is a cross-platform Markdown note-taking application that uses AI agents to transform fragmented information into structured notes, featuring RAG support and MCP integration for a lightweight, free, and ad-free intelligent note-taking experience.

metadata.name: LinuxMirrors
metadata.description: GNU/Linux 更换系统软件源脚本及 Docker 安装与换源脚本

summary.zh: LinuxMirrors 是一个自动化脚本工具，用于快速更换 GNU/Linux 系统的软件源，并支持 Docker 的安装与换源。它覆盖 Debian、Ubuntu 等主流发行版，简化运维流程，提升软件包下载速度与系统更新效率。
summary.en: LinuxMirrors is an automated script tool for quickly changing software sources in GNU/Linux systems, with support for Docker installation and source replacement. It covers major distributions like Debian and Ubuntu, streamlining operations and enhancing package download speeds and system update efficiency.

metadata.name: WeClone
metadata.description: 🚀 One-stop solution for creating your digital avatar from chat history 💡 Fine-tune LLMs with your chat logs to capture your unique style, then bind to a chatbot to bring your digital self to life.  从聊天记录创造数字分身的一站式解决方案

summary.zh: WeClone 是一个从聊天记录创建数字分身的一站式解决方案。它通过微调大语言模型来捕捉用户的独特风格，并绑定到聊天机器人上，实现数字自我的个性化表达。核心功能包括端到端的流程支持、多平台数据源集成以及本地化部署，确保数据隐私和安全。
summary.en: WeClone is a one-stop solution for creating digital avatars from chat history. It fine-tunes large language models to capture users' unique styles and binds them to chatbots for personalized digital self-expression. Key features include end-to-end workflow support, multi-platform data source integration, and local deployment for data privacy and security.

metadata.name: apollo
metadata.description: Apollo is a reliable configuration management system suitable for microservice configuration management scenarios.

summary.zh: Apollo是一个可靠的配置管理系统，专为微服务架构设计，提供集中式配置管理。它支持多环境、多集群的统一管理，具备实时配置热更新、灰度发布、版本管理和权限控制等核心功能，基于Spring Boot/Cloud开发，提供Java和.Net SDK，适用于大规模分布式系统的配置治理。
summary.en: Apollo is a reliable configuration management system designed for microservices, offering centralized configuration management. It supports unified management across multiple environments and clusters, with core features like real-time hot updates, grayscale releases, version control, and authorization. Built on Spring Boot/Cloud, it provides Java and .Net SDKs, suitable for large-scale distributed systems.

metadata.name: docker-kms
metadata.description: Activate any version of Windows and Office, forever

summary.zh: 这是一个基于Docker的KMS服务器镜像，用于永久激活Windows和Office的批量授权版本。它支持从Vista到Server 2025的广泛Windows版本及Office 2010至2024，提供Web GUI界面和Docker Compose部署方案，适用于本地或网络环境中的软件激活管理。
summary.en: This is a Docker-based KMS server image designed for permanently activating volume-licensed versions of Windows and Office. It supports a wide range of Windows versions from Vista to Server 2025 and Office 2010 to 2024, featuring a Web GUI and Docker Compose deployment for easy management in local or network environments.

metadata.name: k8s-club
metadata.description: K8s-club for learn, share and explore the K8s world :)

summary.zh: K8s-club 是一个专注于 Kubernetes 技术学习与分享的开源社区，提供深度技术文章和实际贡献案例。核心内容包括 Informer 机制、Pod 生命周期、网络与存储等核心组件解析，以及从零搭建集群和故障排查等实践指南。通过高质量的中文文档和向 Kubernetes 上游提交的 PR，助力开发者深入理解 K8s 内部原理并提升实战能力。
summary.en: K8s-club is an open-source community dedicated to learning and sharing Kubernetes technology, offering in-depth technical articles and practical contribution cases. Core content includes analysis of key components like Informer mechanisms, Pod lifecycle, networking, and storage, along with hands-on guides such as building clusters from scratch and troubleshooting. Through high-quality Chinese documentation and PRs submitted to the Kubernetes upstream, it helps developers deeply understand K8s internals and enhance practical skills.

metadata.name: k3s
metadata.description: Lightweight Kubernetes

summary.zh: K3s 是一个轻量级、生产就绪的 Kubernetes 发行版，专为边缘计算、物联网和资源受限环境设计。它打包为单个二进制文件，内存占用减半，支持 SQLite 等存储后端，简化安装和运维，适用于开发、CI/CD 和嵌入式场景。
summary.en: K3s is a lightweight, production-ready Kubernetes distribution designed for edge computing, IoT, and resource-constrained environments. Packaged as a single binary with half the memory footprint, it supports SQLite and other storage backends, simplifying installation and operations for development, CI/CD, and embedded use cases.

metadata.name: pangolin
metadata.description: Identity-aware VPN and proxy for remote access to anything, anywhere.

summary.zh: Pangolin 是一个基于 WireGuard 的开源身份感知远程访问平台，集成了反向代理和 VPN 功能，提供零信任安全和细粒度访问控制。它支持浏览器访问 Web 应用和客户端访问私有资源，适用于远程办公、多云环境连接和内部服务暴露等场景。
summary.en: Pangolin is an open-source, identity-based remote access platform built on WireGuard, combining reverse proxy and VPN capabilities. It offers zero-trust security and granular access control for browser-based web application access and client-based private resource connectivity, ideal for remote work, multi-cloud environments, and internal service exposure.

metadata.name: maily.to
metadata.description: Craft beautiful emails effortlessly with Maily, the powerful email editor that ensures impeccable communication across all major clients.

summary.zh: Maily.to 是一款强大的电子邮件编辑器，专注于帮助用户轻松创建美观、预设计且移动端友好的邮件。它提供丰富的预设计组件，如按钮、变量、图片和布局工具，确保邮件在所有主流客户端中完美显示，简化跨平台邮件设计流程。
summary.en: Maily.to is a powerful email editor designed to effortlessly create beautiful, pre-designed, and mobile-ready emails. It offers a rich set of pre-designed components, such as buttons, variables, images, and layout tools, ensuring flawless display across all major email clients and simplifying cross-platform email design.

metadata.name: Free-Docker-K8s-Books
metadata.description: Learn books from Docker & K8s

summary.zh: 这是一个个人收集的免费Docker和Kubernetes电子书仓库，提供多种格式的书籍下载，涵盖从入门到高级的容器化技术、DevOps实践和微服务部署。核心价值在于为开发者、运维人员和学习者提供便捷的学习资源，支持通过Google Drive和百度网盘访问，适用于自学和技术提升场景。
summary.en: This is a personal collection of free Docker and Kubernetes e-books, offering downloads in various formats that cover containerization technologies, DevOps practices, and microservices deployment from beginner to advanced levels. It provides valuable learning resources for developers, operations staff, and learners, accessible via Google Drive and Baidu Netdisk, ideal for self-study and skill enhancement.

metadata.name: WSL
metadata.description: Windows Subsystem for Linux

summary.zh: Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) 是一个在 Windows 上直接运行原生 Linux 命令行工具和应用程序的子系统，无需虚拟机或双启动，提供高效、无缝的跨平台开发体验。它支持完整的 Linux 环境，包括 GUI 应用，适用于开发、运维和测试场景。
summary.en: Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) is a subsystem that enables running native Linux command-line tools and applications directly on Windows without the overhead of a virtual machine or dual-boot setup. It offers a seamless, high-performance cross-platform development environment, including support for Linux GUI apps, ideal for development, operations, and testing.

metadata.name: ZeroOmega
metadata.description: Manage and switch between multiple proxies quickly & easily.

summary.zh: ZeroOmega 是一款基于 SwitchyOmega 的浏览器代理管理扩展，兼容 Manifest V3，支持 Chrome、Edge 和 Firefox。它提供快速切换多个代理的功能，适用于网络调试、隐私保护和跨区域访问等场景。项目采用模块化架构，包含独立的 PAC 生成器和跨平台选项管理器，技术亮点包括 WebExtension 支持和多语言翻译集成。
summary.en: ZeroOmega is a browser proxy management extension forked from SwitchyOmega, compatible with Manifest V3 and available for Chrome, Edge, and Firefox. It enables quick switching between multiple proxies, ideal for network debugging, privacy protection, and cross-region access. The project features a modular architecture with standalone PAC generator and cross-platform options manager, highlighting WebExtension support and multilingual translation integration.

metadata.name: docmost
metadata.description: Docmost is an open-source collaborative wiki and documentation software. It is an open-source alternative to Confluence and Notion.

summary.zh: Docmost是一款开源的协作式Wiki和文档软件，可作为Confluence和Notion的替代方案。它支持实时协作、图表绘制（如Draw.io和Mermaid）、权限管理、多语言翻译和文件嵌入，适用于团队知识管理和文档共享。
summary.en: Docmost is an open-source collaborative wiki and documentation software, serving as an alternative to Confluence and Notion. It features real-time collaboration, diagram tools (e.g., Draw.io and Mermaid), permission management, multi-language translations, and file embeds, ideal for team knowledge management and document sharing.

metadata.name: gixy
metadata.description: Nginx configuration static analyzer

summary.zh: Gixy 是一款 Nginx 配置静态分析工具，专注于自动化检测安全配置缺陷，如 SSRF、HTTP 拆分和路径遍历等漏洞。它通过静态分析 Nginx 配置文件，帮助运维人员预防安全风险，提升配置可靠性，支持 Python 多版本和 Docker 部署。
summary.en: Gixy is a static analyzer for Nginx configurations, designed to automate the detection of security misconfigurations such as SSRF, HTTP splitting, and path traversal vulnerabilities. It analyzes Nginx config files to prevent security flaws, enhance reliability, and supports multiple Python versions and Docker deployment.

metadata.name: shadPS4
metadata.description: PlayStation 4 emulator for Windows, Linux and macOS written in C++

summary.zh: shadPS4 是一款用 C++ 编写的 PlayStation 4 模拟器，支持 Windows、Linux 和 macOS 平台。该项目处于早期开发阶段，已能运行《血源诅咒》等游戏，核心功能专注于模拟 PS4 硬件，提供跨平台兼容性，适合游戏爱好者和开发者进行测试与体验。
summary.en: shadPS4 is a PlayStation 4 emulator written in C++, supporting Windows, Linux, and macOS. Currently in early development, it can run games like Bloodborne, focusing on hardware emulation and cross-platform compatibility, ideal for gaming enthusiasts and developers for testing and experimentation.

metadata.name: timeshift
metadata.description: System restore tool for Linux. Creates filesystem snapshots using rsync+hardlinks, or BTRFS snapshots. Supports scheduled snapshots, multiple backup levels, and exclude filters. Snapshots can be restored while system is running or from Live CD/USB.

summary.zh: Timeshift 是一款 Linux 系统恢复工具，通过 rsync+硬链接或 BTRFS 快照创建文件系统快照，支持定时备份、多级别保留和排除过滤。专注于保护系统文件和设置，默认排除用户数据，确保恢复时个人文件不受影响，适用于系统故障恢复和版本回滚。
summary.en: Timeshift is a system restore tool for Linux that creates filesystem snapshots using rsync+hardlinks or BTRFS snapshots, with support for scheduled backups, multiple retention levels, and exclude filters. It focuses on protecting system files and settings while excluding user data by default, ideal for system recovery and rollback scenarios.

metadata.name: Foundations-of-LLMs
metadata.description: A book for Learning the Foundations of LLMs

summary.zh: 《大模型基础》是一本系统讲解大语言模型基础知识和前沿技术的开源教材，涵盖传统语言模型、架构演化、Prompt工程、参数高效微调、模型编辑和检索增强生成等核心内容。本书以动物背景举例增强易读性，提供月度更新和论文列表，适合学习、科研和教学使用。
summary.en: Foundations of LLMs is an open-source textbook that systematically explains the fundamentals and cutting-edge technologies of large language models, covering traditional language models, architecture evolution, prompt engineering, parameter-efficient fine-tuning, model editing, and retrieval-augmented generation. It uses animal-themed examples for readability, offers monthly updates and paper lists, and is ideal for learning, research, and teaching.

metadata.name: pex
metadata.description: A tool for generating .pex (Python EXecutable) files, lock files and venvs.

summary.zh: PEX 是一个用于生成 .pex（Python 可执行）文件的工具，支持创建锁文件和虚拟环境。它简化了 Python 应用的部署，通过单一文件实现跨平台可移植性，并可与构建系统集成，提升开发效率。
summary.en: PEX is a tool for generating .pex (Python EXecutable) files, lock files, and virtual environments. It simplifies Python application deployment with single-file portability across platforms and integrates with build systems to enhance development efficiency.

metadata.name: chinese-poetry
metadata.description: The most comprehensive database of Chinese poetry 🧶最全中华古诗词数据库,  唐宋两朝近一万四千古诗人,  接近5.5万首唐诗加26万宋诗.  两宋时期1564位词人，21050首词。

summary.zh: chinese-poetry 是一个全面的中华古典诗歌数据库，包含约5.5万首唐诗、26万首宋诗和2.1万首宋词，覆盖唐宋时期近1.4万诗人。数据以JSON格式提供，便于开发者快速构建诗词应用，支持文化传承和学术研究。
summary.en: chinese-poetry is a comprehensive database of classical Chinese poetry, including approximately 55,000 Tang poems, 260,000 Song poems, and 21,000 Song lyrics, covering nearly 14,000 poets from the Tang and Song dynasties. The data is provided in JSON format, enabling developers to easily build poetry-related applications for cultural preservation and academic research.

metadata.name: ruff
metadata.description: An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.

summary.zh: Ruff 是一个用 Rust 编写的极速 Python 代码检查器和格式化工具，比现有工具快 10-100 倍。它提供 Flake8、Black 和 isort 的替代方案，支持超过 800 条内置规则、自动修复和缓存功能，适用于大型项目和持续集成环境。
summary.en: Ruff is an extremely fast Python linter and code formatter written in Rust, offering 10-100x speed improvements over existing tools. It replaces Flake8, Black, and isort with over 800 built-in rules, auto-fix support, and caching, ideal for large-scale projects and CI/CD workflows.

metadata.name: PDFMathTranslate
metadata.description: [EMNLP 2025 Demo] PDF scientific paper translation with preserved formats - 基于 AI 完整保留排版的 PDF 文档全文双语翻译，支持 Google/DeepL/Ollama/OpenAI 等服务，提供 CLI/GUI/MCP/Docker/Zotero

summary.zh: PDFMathTranslate 是一款基于 AI 的 PDF 科学论文翻译工具，完整保留原始排版、公式、图表和注释，支持 Google/DeepL/Ollama/OpenAI 等多种翻译服务，提供 CLI/GUI/Docker/Zotero 等多种部署方式，适用于学术研究和跨语言文档处理。
summary.en: PDFMathTranslate is an AI-powered PDF scientific paper translation tool that preserves original layouts, formulas, charts, and annotations. It supports multiple translation services like Google/DeepL/Ollama/OpenAI and offers CLI/GUI/Docker/Zotero deployment options, ideal for academic research and cross-language document processing.

metadata.name: mermaid
metadata.description: Generation of diagrams like flowcharts or sequence diagrams from text in a similar manner as markdown

summary.zh: Mermaid 是一个基于 JavaScript 的图表生成工具，通过类似 Markdown 的文本语法快速创建流程图、序列图等复杂图表。它简化了文档编写流程，支持实时编辑和跨平台集成，广泛应用于技术文档、项目管理和自动化脚本中，提升开发效率和可视化沟通。
summary.en: Mermaid is a JavaScript-based diagramming tool that generates complex diagrams like flowcharts and sequence diagrams from Markdown-like text syntax. It streamlines documentation workflows, supports live editing and cross-platform integration, and is widely used in technical documentation, project management, and automation scripts to enhance development efficiency and visual communication.

metadata.name: kom
metadata.description: kom 是一个用于 Kubernetes 操作的工具，SDK级的kubectl、client-go的使用封装。并且支持作为管理k8s 的 MCP server。 它提供了一系列功能来管理 Kubernetes 资源，包括创建、更新、删除和获取资源，甚至使用SQL查询k8s资源。这个项目支持多种 Kubernetes 资源类型的操作，并能够处理自定义资源定义（CRD）。 通过使用 kom，你可以轻松地进行资源的增删改查和日志获取以及操作POD内文件等动作。

summary.zh: Kom 是一个用于 Kubernetes 操作的 SDK 级工具，封装了 kubectl 和 client-go，提供资源增删改查、SQL 查询、Pod 文件操作等功能。支持多集群管理、MCP 服务器模式（含 SSE 和 stdio），并内置 58 种工具，适用于自动化运维和 AI 智能体集成场景。
summary.en: Kom is an SDK-level tool for Kubernetes operations, encapsulating kubectl and client-go to provide CRUD operations, SQL queries, and Pod file management. It supports multi-cluster management, MCP server modes (including SSE and stdio), and includes 58 built-in tools, suitable for automation and AI agent integration.

metadata.name: nightingale
metadata.description: Nightingale is to monitoring and alerting what Grafana is to visualization.

summary.zh: Nightingale 是一款专注于告警的开源监控系统，类比于 Grafana 在可视化领域的地位。它支持连接多种数据源（如 VictoriaMetrics、ElasticSearch），提供强大的告警引擎和通知分发功能，适用于云原生环境下的监控与运维自动化。项目支持分布式部署，确保在网络不佳的边缘数据中心也能稳定运行告警服务。
summary.en: Nightingale is an open-source monitoring system focused on alerting, analogous to Grafana's role in visualization. It connects to various data sources (e.g., VictoriaMetrics, ElasticSearch), offering a robust alerting engine and notification distribution, ideal for cloud-native monitoring and operational automation. The project supports distributed deployment to ensure reliable alerting in edge data centers with poor network connectivity.

metadata.name: macos
metadata.description: MacOS inside a Docker container.

summary.zh: dockur/macos 是一个在 Docker 容器中运行 macOS 系统的开源项目，支持 KVM 加速和基于 Web 的图形界面，适用于开发测试、跨平台应用验证和虚拟化环境部署。
summary.en: dockur/macos is an open-source project that runs macOS inside a Docker container, featuring KVM acceleration and a web-based viewer, ideal for development testing, cross-platform application validation, and virtualization environment deployment.

metadata.name: listen1_desktop
metadata.description: one for all free music in china (Windows, Mac, Linux desktop)

summary.zh: Listen 1 是一款跨平台桌面音乐播放器，聚合网易云音乐、QQ音乐、酷狗音乐等多个主流平台资源，支持搜索、播放和歌单收藏功能，为用户提供一站式免费音乐体验。
summary.en: Listen 1 is a cross-platform desktop music player that aggregates resources from multiple mainstream platforms like NetEase Cloud Music, QQ Music, and Kugou Music, supporting search, playback, and playlist features for a unified free music experience.

metadata.name: frpc-desktop
metadata.description: frp跨平台桌面客户端，可视化配置，轻松实现内网穿透！ 支持所有frp版本

summary.zh: Frpc-Desktop 是一款跨平台桌面客户端，专为 FRP 内网穿透工具设计，提供可视化配置界面，支持所有 FRP 版本。核心价值在于简化内网穿透的部署与管理，适用于个人开发者、小型团队及远程访问场景。技术亮点包括自动启动、多语言支持、批量端口配置、镜像下载及配置导入导出，提升用户体验与操作效率。
summary.en: Frpc-Desktop is a cross-platform desktop client designed for the FRP intranet penetration tool, offering a visual configuration interface and supporting all FRP versions. Its core value lies in simplifying the deployment and management of intranet penetration, suitable for individual developers, small teams, and remote access scenarios. Technical highlights include auto-start, multi-language support, batch port configuration, mirror downloads, and config import/export, enhancing user experience and operational efficiency.

metadata.name: terraform
metadata.description: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

summary.zh: Terraform 是一款基础设施即代码工具，通过声明式配置文件安全高效地构建、变更和管理云基础设施。它支持执行计划预览、资源依赖图并行化与变更自动化，实现跨服务提供商和内部解决方案的统一编排。
summary.en: Terraform is an Infrastructure as Code tool that safely and efficiently builds, changes, and manages cloud infrastructure through declarative configuration files. It features execution plans, resource graph parallelization, and change automation for unified orchestration across service providers and in-house solutions.

metadata.name: OliveTin
metadata.description: OliveTin gives safe and simple access to predefined shell commands from a web interface.

summary.zh: OliveTin 是一个通过 Web 界面安全、简单地访问预定义 Shell 命令的工具，适用于家庭自动化、服务器运维等场景，提供响应式 UI、YAML 配置和轻量级资源消耗。
summary.en: OliveTin provides safe and simple access to predefined shell commands via a web interface, ideal for home automation and server management, featuring a responsive UI, YAML configuration, and lightweight resource usage.

metadata.name: kubernetes-the-hard-way
metadata.description: Bootstrap Kubernetes the hard way. No scripts.

summary.zh: 本教程通过手动配置Kubernetes集群的每个核心组件，深入讲解其底层原理与架构，适用于希望掌握Kubernetes基础知识和运维细节的学习者。它强调无脚本操作，涵盖证书生成、etcd集群引导、控制平面和节点配置等关键步骤，帮助用户从零构建一个功能完整的集群。
summary.en: This tutorial guides users through manually configuring each core component of a Kubernetes cluster, focusing on underlying principles and architecture. It is designed for learners aiming to master Kubernetes fundamentals and operational details, covering key steps like certificate generation, etcd cluster bootstrapping, and control plane setup without scripts, enabling hands-on cluster building from scratch.

metadata.name: protoc-gen-validate
metadata.description: Protocol Buffer Validation - replaced by https://github.com/bufbuild/protovalidate

summary.zh: protoc-gen-validate (PGV) 是一个 Protocol Buffers 插件，用于生成多语言消息验证器。它通过注解在 proto 文件中定义语义约束规则，如数值范围、字符串格式和必填字段，自动生成 Validate 方法，确保数据符合业务逻辑。尽管项目已进入维护模式，推荐迁移至 protovalidate，但其在 Go、Java 等语言中仍提供稳定的验证功能，适用于微服务和 API 开发中的数据校验场景。
summary.en: protoc-gen-validate (PGV) is a Protocol Buffers plugin that generates polyglot message validators. It allows developers to annotate semantic constraints in proto files, such as value ranges, string formats, and required fields, automatically generating Validate methods to enforce business rules. While the project is in maintenance mode with a recommendation to migrate to protovalidate, it remains stable for validation in languages like Go and Java, suitable for data validation in microservices and API development.

metadata.name: stable-diffusion-webui-docker
metadata.description: Easy Docker setup for Stable Diffusion with user-friendly UI

summary.zh: 该项目提供基于Docker的Stable Diffusion WebUI一键部署方案，支持AUTOMATIC1111和ComfyUI等多种用户界面，简化了AI图像生成的本地安装流程，适用于个人创作、实验和开发环境搭建。
summary.en: This project offers a Docker-based setup for Stable Diffusion WebUI, supporting multiple UIs like AUTOMATIC1111 and ComfyUI, streamlining local installation for AI image generation, ideal for personal creation, experimentation, and development environments.

metadata.name: hugo-PaperMod
metadata.description: A fast, clean, responsive Hugo theme.

summary.zh: Hugo PaperMod 是一个基于 Hugo 的现代化博客主题，专注于提供快速、简洁、响应式的网站构建体验。它内置了多种模式（常规、主页信息、个人资料）、多语言支持、SEO 优化、暗黑/亮色主题切换等功能，无需依赖 Node.js 等外部工具，适合个人博客和内容网站。
summary.en: Hugo PaperMod is a modern Hugo theme designed for fast, clean, and responsive website building. It features multiple modes (regular, home-info, profile), multilingual support, SEO optimization, dark/light theme switching, and more, with no dependencies like Node.js, ideal for personal blogs and content sites.

metadata.name: gojenkins
metadata.description: Jenkins API Client in Go. Looking for maintainers to move this project forward.

summary.zh: 这是一个用Go语言编写的Jenkins API客户端库，提供开发者友好的方式与Jenkins持续集成系统交互。核心功能包括查询和管理节点、作业、构建、插件等，支持自动化操作如启动/停止节点、触发构建、验证指纹等。适用于需要集成Jenkins到Go应用或自动化运维的场景，技术亮点包括完整的API覆盖和灵活的HTTP客户端配置。
summary.en: This is a Jenkins API client library written in Go, offering a developer-friendly way to interact with the Jenkins continuous integration system. Core features include querying and managing nodes, jobs, builds, plugins, and more, with support for automation tasks like starting/stopping nodes, triggering builds, and validating fingerprints. It is suitable for integrating Jenkins into Go applications or automating DevOps workflows, with technical highlights including comprehensive API coverage and flexible HTTP client configuration.

metadata.name: kruise
metadata.description: Automated management of large-scale applications on Kubernetes (incubating project under CNCF)

summary.zh: OpenKruise 是一个 CNCF 孵化项目，专注于扩展 Kubernetes 核心控制器，提供高级工作负载管理、Sidecar 容器管理、多域管理和增强操作等功能，支持大规模应用的自动化部署、更新和运维，适用于云原生环境下的复杂应用场景。
summary.en: OpenKruise is a CNCF incubating project that extends Kubernetes core controllers with advanced workload management, sidecar container management, multi-domain management, and enhanced operations, enabling automated deployment, updates, and maintenance for large-scale applications in cloud-native environments.

metadata.name: go-learning
metadata.description: A learning and practise map for OpenStack, kubernetes, golang and the others.

summary.zh: Go-Learning 是一个面向 Kubernetes 和云原生开发者的学习与实践指南，专注于提供 OpenStack、Kubernetes、Golang 和 Rust 的深入教程与代码示例。核心内容包括 Kubernetes 源码分析（如调度器、网络、kube-proxy）、客户端用法、Operator 开发，以及基于 Cobra 的命令行工具和 gRPC 实践，帮助用户提升云原生技术栈的实战能力。
summary.en: Go-Learning is a learning and practice guide for Kubernetes and cloud-native developers, focusing on in-depth tutorials and code examples for OpenStack, Kubernetes, Golang, and Rust. Key features include Kubernetes source code analysis (e.g., scheduler, network, kube-proxy), client usage, Operator development, and practical tools like Cobra-based CLI and gRPC, aimed at enhancing hands-on skills in cloud-native technologies.

metadata.name: beszel
metadata.description: Lightweight server monitoring hub with historical data, docker stats, and alerts.

summary.zh: Beszel 是一个轻量级服务器监控平台，提供 Docker 容器统计、历史数据追踪和可配置告警功能。它基于 PocketBase 构建，具备友好的 Web 界面、简单配置和开箱即用特性，支持多用户管理、OAuth 认证和自动备份，适用于中小型服务器环境的实时监控与运维自动化。
summary.en: Beszel is a lightweight server monitoring platform that offers Docker container statistics, historical data tracking, and configurable alerts. Built on PocketBase, it features a user-friendly web interface, easy setup, and out-of-the-box usability, supporting multi-user management, OAuth authentication, and automatic backups, ideal for real-time monitoring and operational automation in small to medium server environments.

metadata.name: Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
metadata.description: Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

summary.zh: Bulk Crap Uninstaller (BCUninstaller) 是一款免费开源的批量程序卸载工具，专为高效清理Windows系统上的大量应用程序而设计。它支持自动清理残留文件、检测孤立应用、按预设列表执行卸载，并兼容Windows商店应用、Steam及多种卸载系统，适用于IT专业人士和普通用户，提升系统维护效率。
summary.en: Bulk Crap Uninstaller (BCUninstaller) is a free, open-source batch program uninstaller designed for efficiently removing large numbers of applications on Windows systems. It features automatic cleanup of leftovers, detection of orphaned apps, execution of uninstallers via premade lists, and compatibility with Windows Store apps, Steam, and various uninstall systems, catering to IT professionals and general users to enhance system maintenance efficiency.

metadata.name: aria2
metadata.description: aria2 is a lightweight multi-protocol & multi-source, cross platform download utility operated in command-line. It supports HTTP/HTTPS, FTP, SFTP, BitTorrent and Metalink.

summary.zh: aria2 是一个轻量级、多协议、多源、跨平台的命令行下载工具，支持 HTTP/HTTPS、FTP、SFTP、BitTorrent 和 Metalink。它通过分段下载和智能带宽利用，实现高速文件获取，并支持 JSON-RPC/XML-RPC 接口，适用于自动化下载和服务器环境。
summary.en: aria2 is a lightweight, multi-protocol, multi-source, cross-platform command-line download utility supporting HTTP/HTTPS, FTP, SFTP, BitTorrent, and Metalink. It enables high-speed file retrieval through segmented downloading and bandwidth optimization, with JSON-RPC/XML-RPC interfaces for automation and server-side use.

metadata.name: resty
metadata.description: Simple HTTP, REST, and SSE client library for Go

summary.zh: Resty 是一个简单易用的 Go 语言 HTTP、REST 和 SSE 客户端库，专为简化网络请求而设计。它支持现代 Go 版本，提供丰富的功能如自动重试、超时设置和响应处理，适用于微服务、API 集成和实时数据流场景。
summary.en: Resty is a simple and easy-to-use HTTP, REST, and SSE client library for Go, designed to simplify network requests. It supports modern Go versions and offers features like automatic retries, timeout settings, and response handling, making it ideal for microservices, API integrations, and real-time data streaming.

metadata.name: RunCat365
metadata.description: A cute running cat animation on your windows taskbar.

summary.zh: RunCat 365 是一款在 Windows 任务栏上显示可爱奔跑猫动画的桌面应用，通过 Win32 API 和 .NET 9.0 实现，提供轻量级、趣味性的系统托盘动画，增强用户体验。
summary.en: RunCat 365 is a desktop application that displays a cute running cat animation on the Windows taskbar, implemented using Win32 API and .NET 9.0, offering a lightweight and fun system tray animation to enhance user experience.

metadata.name: viper
metadata.description: Go configuration with fangs

summary.zh: Viper 是一个功能强大的 Go 语言配置管理库，专为处理复杂应用配置需求设计。它支持多种配置源（如文件、环境变量、命令行标志、远程存储），提供动态加载、实时更新和优先级合并功能，适用于 12-Factor 应用和大型项目，简化配置管理并提升灵活性。
summary.en: Viper is a powerful configuration management library for Go, designed to handle complex application configuration needs. It supports multiple sources (e.g., files, environment variables, command-line flags, remote stores), offers dynamic loading, live updates, and priority merging, suitable for 12-Factor apps and large-scale projects, simplifying configuration management and enhancing flexibility.

metadata.name: log-pilot
metadata.description: Collect logs for docker containers

summary.zh: log-pilot 是阿里云容器服务推出的 Docker 日志收集工具，专为容器化环境设计。它支持从 Docker 主机收集容器日志，包括标准输出和容器内部日志文件，并发送到 Elasticsearch、Graylog2 等集中式日志系统。通过声明式配置和标签功能，简化日志管理，无需为每个容器单独创建 Fluentd 或 Filebeat 进程，提升运维效率。
summary.en: log-pilot is a Docker log collection tool developed by Alibaba Cloud Container Service, designed for containerized environments. It collects logs from Docker hosts, including stdout and internal log files, and sends them to centralized systems like Elasticsearch and Graylog2. With declarative configuration and tagging, it simplifies log management without requiring separate Fluentd or Filebeat processes per container, enhancing operational efficiency.

metadata.name: guide
metadata.description: The Uber Go Style Guide.

summary.zh: Uber Go 风格指南是 Uber 公司内部 Go 语言代码规范的官方文档，详细记录了 Go 编程的最佳实践、模式和约定。它旨在提升代码质量、可维护性和团队协作效率，适用于 Go 开发者遵循企业级编码标准，并已被社区翻译成多种语言，促进全球共享。
summary.en: The Uber Go Style Guide is the official documentation of Go code conventions and patterns used at Uber, detailing best practices for Go programming. It aims to enhance code quality, maintainability, and team collaboration, serving as a reference for developers adhering to enterprise-level coding standards, with community translations available in multiple languages for global accessibility.

metadata.name: cobra
metadata.description: A Commander for modern Go CLI interactions

summary.zh: Cobra 是一个用于创建强大现代命令行界面（CLI）应用程序的 Go 库，广泛应用于 Kubernetes、Hugo 和 GitHub CLI 等项目。它提供子命令支持、POSIX 兼容标志、智能建议、自动帮助生成和 shell 自动补全等功能，简化 CLI 开发流程。
summary.en: Cobra is a Go library for building powerful modern CLI applications, widely used in projects like Kubernetes, Hugo, and GitHub CLI. It offers subcommand support, POSIX-compliant flags, intelligent suggestions, automatic help generation, and shell autocompletion, streamlining CLI development.

metadata.name: fiber
metadata.description: ⚡️ Express inspired web framework written in Go

summary.zh: Fiber 是一个受 Express 启发的 Go 语言 Web 框架，基于高性能的 Fasthttp HTTP 引擎构建，旨在实现快速开发和零内存分配。它提供简洁的 API 和高效的路由处理，适用于构建高性能的 Web 应用和微服务，特别注重性能和易用性。
summary.en: Fiber is an Express-inspired web framework written in Go, built on top of the high-performance Fasthttp HTTP engine, designed for fast development with zero memory allocation. It offers a clean API and efficient routing, suitable for building high-performance web applications and microservices, with a strong focus on performance and ease of use.

metadata.name: WatchYourLAN
metadata.description: Lightweight network IP scanner written in Go. With notifications, history, export to Grafana

summary.zh: WatchYourLAN 是一款基于 Go 语言开发的轻量级网络 IP 扫描器，提供 Web 图形界面，支持新主机发现通知、在线/离线历史监控，并能将数据导出至 InfluxDB2 或 Prometheus，用于构建 Grafana 仪表板，适用于家庭或小型企业网络监控。
summary.en: WatchYourLAN is a lightweight network IP scanner written in Go, featuring a web GUI. It sends notifications for new host discoveries, monitors online/offline history, and exports data to InfluxDB2 or Prometheus for Grafana dashboards, ideal for home or small business network monitoring.

metadata.name: xpipe
metadata.description: Access your entire server infrastructure from your local desktop

summary.zh: XPipe 是一个连接中心，允许用户从本地桌面访问整个服务器基础设施。它基于已安装的命令行程序（如 SSH、Docker）工作，无需远程系统设置，并集成文本编辑器、终端、VNC/RDP 客户端等工具。平台设计为可扩展，支持 SSH、容器、虚拟机、云服务器等多种连接，适用于运维自动化和跨平台管理场景。
summary.en: XPipe is a connection hub that enables users to access their entire server infrastructure from their local desktop. It operates on top of installed command-line programs like SSH and Docker, requiring no setup on remote systems, and integrates with text editors, terminals, VNC/RDP clients, and more. Designed to be extensible, it supports connections for SSH, containers, virtual machines, cloud servers, and others, ideal for automation and cross-platform management.

metadata.name: project-layout
metadata.description: Standard Go Project Layout

summary.zh: 该仓库定义了Go语言项目的标准目录结构，提供了一套社区公认的布局模式，适用于中大型企业级应用和开源项目。它强调模块化、可维护性和代码组织，包含cmd、internal、pkg等核心目录，帮助开发者避免常见陷阱，提升团队协作效率。
summary.en: This repository defines a standard directory layout for Go projects, offering a community-driven set of patterns for medium to large-scale enterprise and open-source applications. It emphasizes modularity, maintainability, and code organization with core directories like cmd, internal, and pkg, helping developers avoid common pitfalls and enhance team collaboration.

metadata.name: k8s_PaaS
metadata.description: 如何基于K8s(Kubernetes)部署成PaaS/DevOps(一套完整的软件研发和部署平台)--教程/学习(实战代码/架构设计/大量注释/操作配图)，你将习得部署如：K8S(Kubernetes)、Dashboard、Harbor、Jenkins、本地Gitlab、Apollo框架、Promtheus、Grafana、Spinnaker等。

summary.zh: 本仓库提供基于Kubernetes构建完整PaaS/DevOps平台的实战教程，涵盖K8S、Dashboard、Harbor、Jenkins、GitLab、Apollo、Prometheus、Grafana、Spinnaker等核心组件部署。通过详细注释、配图和操作指南，帮助用户理解架构设计并实现自动化部署，适用于企业级云原生平台搭建与学习。
summary.en: This repository offers a hands-on tutorial for building a complete PaaS/DevOps platform on Kubernetes, covering deployments of K8S, Dashboard, Harbor, Jenkins, GitLab, Apollo, Prometheus, Grafana, Spinnaker, and more. With extensive annotations, diagrams, and step-by-step instructions, it facilitates understanding of architecture design and automation, ideal for enterprise cloud-native platform setup and learning.

metadata.name: reactive-resume
metadata.description: A one-of-a-kind resume builder that keeps your privacy in mind. Completely secure, customizable, portable, open-source and free forever. Try it out today!

summary.zh: Reactive Resume 是一款注重隐私的开源简历构建器，提供实时预览、拖拽排序和多种导出格式。核心亮点包括支持自托管确保数据安全、AI集成辅助内容生成，以及丰富的可定制模板，适用于个人求职和专业简历制作。
summary.en: Reactive Resume is a privacy-focused open-source resume builder offering real-time preview, drag-and-drop ordering, and multiple export formats. Key features include self-hosting for data security, AI integration for content assistance, and customizable templates, ideal for personal job applications and professional resume creation.

metadata.name: sonic
metadata.description: A blazingly fast JSON serializing & deserializing library

summary.zh: Sonic 是字节跳动开源的高性能 JSON 序列化与反序列化库，通过 JIT 即时编译和 SIMD 指令集加速，实现极速处理。支持运行时对象绑定，无需代码生成，适用于大规模数据处理和高并发场景，显著提升 Go 应用性能。
summary.en: Sonic is a high-performance JSON serialization and deserialization library by ByteDance, accelerated by JIT and SIMD for blazing-fast processing. It supports runtime object binding without code generation, ideal for large-scale data handling and high-concurrency scenarios, significantly boosting Go application performance.

metadata.name: kubernetes
metadata.description: Production-Grade Container Scheduling and Management

summary.zh: Kubernetes (K8s) 是一个开源的生产级容器编排和管理系统，用于跨多主机自动化部署、扩展和运维容器化应用。它基于谷歌 Borg 系统的经验，提供高可用、可扩展的微服务架构支持，广泛应用于云原生和分布式环境。
summary.en: Kubernetes (K8s) is an open-source, production-grade container orchestration and management system for automating deployment, scaling, and operations of containerized applications across multiple hosts. Built on Google's Borg experience, it offers high availability and scalability for microservices, widely used in cloud-native and distributed environments.

metadata.name: django-rq
metadata.description: A simple app that provides django integration for RQ (Redis Queue)

summary.zh: Django-RQ 是一个为 Django 框架提供 Redis Queue (RQ) 集成的简单应用，支持在 settings.py 中配置队列，并集成 Django 管理界面，用于后台任务处理和监控。适用于需要异步任务处理的 Django 项目，如 Web 应用的后台作业、数据处理和定时任务。
summary.en: Django-RQ is a simple app that integrates Redis Queue (RQ) with Django, allowing queue configuration in settings.py and seamless integration with Django's admin interface for background job processing and monitoring. It is ideal for Django projects requiring asynchronous task handling, such as web app background jobs, data processing, and scheduled tasks.

metadata.name: Sucrose
metadata.description: Sucrose is a versatile wallpaper engine that brings life to your desktop with a wide range of interactive wallpapers.

summary.zh: Sucrose 是一款多功能桌面壁纸引擎，支持创建和运行交互式动态壁纸。它提供音频和系统状态 API 用于自定义壁纸，支持多屏幕和全分辨率，并集成 CefSharp 和 WebView 以网页作为壁纸。开源免费，具备性能优化和节能模式，适用于个性化桌面美化。
summary.en: Sucrose is a versatile desktop wallpaper engine that enables creation and playback of interactive dynamic wallpapers. It offers Audio and System APIs for customization, supports multi-screen and all resolutions, and integrates CefSharp and WebView for web-based wallpapers. Open-source and free, it features performance optimization and power-saving modes, ideal for desktop personalization.

metadata.name: uv
metadata.description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

summary.zh: uv 是一个用 Rust 编写的高速 Python 包和项目管理器，旨在替代 pip、poetry 等工具，提供 10-100 倍的速度提升。它支持项目依赖管理、虚拟环境、脚本运行、Python 版本控制及工具安装，具备通用锁文件、工作空间和全局缓存等特性，适用于开发、测试和部署场景。
summary.en: uv is an extremely fast Python package and project manager written in Rust, designed to replace tools like pip and poetry with 10-100x speed improvements. It offers dependency management, virtual environments, script execution, Python version control, and tool installation, featuring a universal lockfile, workspaces, and a global cache for efficient development, testing, and deployment.

metadata.name: advanced-go-programming-book
metadata.description: :books: 《Go语言高级编程》开源图书，涵盖CGO、Go汇编语言、RPC实现、Protobuf插件实现、Web框架实现、分布式系统等高阶主题(完稿)

summary.zh: 《Go语言高级编程》是一本开源技术书籍，专注于Go语言的高级主题，涵盖CGO、Go汇编语言、RPC实现、Web框架和分布式系统等核心内容。本书面向有一定Go经验的开发者，提供深入的技术解析和实践指南，帮助读者掌握Go底层机制和复杂应用开发，是提升Go编程技能的重要资源。
summary.en: 《Advanced Go Programming》 is an open-source technical book focusing on advanced Go topics, including CGO, Go assembly language, RPC implementation, web frameworks, and distributed systems. Aimed at developers with prior Go experience, it offers in-depth technical analysis and practical guidance to master Go's underlying mechanisms and complex application development, serving as a key resource for enhancing Go programming skills.

metadata.name: chsrc
metadata.description: chsrc 全平台通用换源工具与框架. Change Source everywhere for every software

summary.zh: chsrc 是一个全平台通用换源工具与框架，采用 C11 编写，支持 Linux、Windows、macOS、BSD、Android 等多种操作系统和 CPU 架构。它提供超过 65 种软件的换源功能，通过 MVC 架构设计，允许用户轻松编写和维护换源方法（recipe），无需依赖庞大解释器，实现轻量级、高效的软件源管理。
summary.en: chsrc is a cross-platform source-changing tool and framework written in C11, supporting Linux, Windows, macOS, BSD, Android, and various CPU architectures. It offers source switching for over 65 software packages, featuring an MVC design that enables users to easily write and maintain recipes without heavy interpreters, ensuring lightweight and efficient software source management.

metadata.name: zadig
metadata.description: Zadig: An AI-powered, cloud-native, distributed DevOps platform designed for developers

summary.zh: Zadig 是一款基于 Kubernetes 的云原生 DevOps 平台，集成了 AI 环境检查、性能诊断和智能 Pilot 等能力，支持高并发工作流、多发布策略编排和一键安全审计。它旨在通过项目模板快速接入数千服务，提供企业级 XOps 仪表板，助力企业实现研产数字化，提升微服务架构下的部署效率。
summary.en: Zadig is a Kubernetes-based cloud-native DevOps platform that integrates AI capabilities such as environment inspection, performance diagnosis, and intelligent Pilot. It supports high-concurrency workflows, multiple release strategy orchestration, and one-click security audits. Designed to quickly onboard thousands of services via project templates, it offers enterprise-grade XOps dashboards to facilitate digital transformation and enhance deployment efficiency in microservices architectures.

metadata.name: glance
metadata.description: A self-hosted dashboard that puts all your feeds in one place

summary.zh: Glance 是一个自托管的信息聚合仪表板，支持 RSS、Reddit、Hacker News、天气、YouTube 等多种数据源，通过可定制的 YAML 配置和轻量级设计，提供快速加载和移动端优化，适用于个人或团队的信息集中管理。
summary.en: Glance is a self-hosted dashboard that aggregates various feeds like RSS, Reddit, Hacker News, weather, and YouTube into a single, customizable interface. It features lightweight design, fast loading, mobile optimization, and YAML-based configuration, ideal for personal or team information management.

metadata.name: nginx-ui
metadata.description: Yet another WebUI for Nginx

summary.zh: Nginx UI 是一个基于 Web 的 Nginx 配置管理工具，提供图形化界面简化服务器配置、SSL 证书管理和站点部署。适用于运维人员和开发者，支持 Docker 部署，提升 Nginx 管理效率与可视化操作体验。
summary.en: Nginx UI is a web-based configuration management tool for Nginx, offering a graphical interface to simplify server setup, SSL certificate handling, and site deployment. It targets DevOps and developers, supports Docker deployment, and enhances Nginx management efficiency with visual operations.

metadata.name: optimizer
metadata.description: The finest Windows Optimizer

summary.zh: Optimizer是一款高级Windows隐私与安全配置工具，专为提升系统性能和隐私保护设计。它支持多语言，提供禁用Windows遥测、服务优化、DNS设置、自动化模板等功能，适用于新系统安装后的优化和日常维护。
summary.en: Optimizer is an advanced Windows privacy and security configuration utility designed to enhance system performance and privacy. It features multilingual support, disables Windows telemetry, optimizes services, manages DNS settings, and supports automation via templates, ideal for post-installation optimization and routine maintenance.

metadata.name: OFGB
metadata.description: GUI Tool To Remove Ads From Various Places Around Windows 11

summary.zh: OFGB是一款针对Windows 11的图形界面工具，旨在通过修改Windows注册表键值来移除操作系统中的广告，如文件资源管理器、开始菜单等处的广告。它基于C#和WPF开发，提供用户友好的界面，帮助用户快速禁用广告，提升系统纯净度。
summary.en: OFGB is a GUI tool for Windows 11 designed to remove ads from the operating system, such as in File Explorer and Start Menu, by modifying Windows Registry keys. Built with C# and WPF, it offers a user-friendly interface to quickly disable ads and enhance system cleanliness.

metadata.name: rq
metadata.description: Simple job queues for Python

summary.zh: RQ（Redis Queue）是一个基于Redis或Valkey的Python任务队列库，用于将耗时或阻塞函数异步处理，支持作业优先级、调度、重复执行和失败重试。它设计简单易用，可无缝集成到Web栈中，适用于从轻量应用到高并发企业系统的各种规模项目。
summary.en: RQ (Redis Queue) is a Python task queue library backed by Redis or Valkey, designed for queuing and processing jobs asynchronously in the background. It supports job prioritization, scheduling, repeating, and retry mechanisms, with a low barrier to entry and excellent scalability for applications ranging from simple to high-volume enterprise systems.

metadata.name: NotepadNext
metadata.description: A cross-platform, reimplementation of Notepad++

summary.zh: NotepadNext 是一个跨平台的文本编辑器，重新实现了 Notepad++ 的核心功能。它支持 Windows、Linux 和 macOS，提供安装包和 AppImage 等多种分发方式。项目基于 Qt 6.5 和 C++ 开发，强调稳定性和可用性，但仍在积极开发中，欢迎贡献。
summary.en: NotepadNext is a cross-platform text editor that reimplements the core features of Notepad++. It supports Windows, Linux, and macOS, offering various distribution methods such as installers and AppImage. The project is built with Qt 6.5 and C++, focusing on stability and usability while actively seeking contributions for ongoing development.

metadata.name: controller-runtime
metadata.description: Repo for the controller-runtime subproject of kubebuilder (sig-apimachinery)

summary.zh: Kubernetes controller-runtime 是一个用于构建控制器的 Go 库集合，为 Kubebuilder 和 Operator SDK 提供核心支持，简化 Kubernetes 控制器开发。它提供管理器、控制器构建器等工具，支持与特定版本的 client-go 兼容，适用于云原生应用和自动化运维场景。
summary.en: Kubernetes controller-runtime is a set of Go libraries for building controllers, providing core support for Kubebuilder and Operator SDK to simplify Kubernetes controller development. It offers tools like managers and controller builders, ensuring compatibility with specific client-go versions, ideal for cloud-native applications and automation operations.

metadata.name: client-go
metadata.description: Go client for Kubernetes.

summary.zh: client-go 是 Kubernetes 官方维护的 Go 语言客户端库，用于与 Kubernetes 集群进行交互。它提供了完整的 API 客户端、动态客户端、发现机制和缓存工具，支持自动化运维和云原生应用开发。核心价值在于简化 Go 程序对 Kubernetes 资源的操作，确保与 Kubernetes 版本的兼容性，广泛应用于容器编排、微服务管理和自动化部署场景。
summary.en: client-go is the official Go client library for Kubernetes, designed to interact with Kubernetes clusters. It offers a comprehensive API client, dynamic client, discovery mechanisms, and caching tools, facilitating automation and cloud-native application development. Its core value lies in simplifying Go-based operations on Kubernetes resources, ensuring compatibility with Kubernetes versions, and is widely used in container orchestration, microservices management, and automated deployment scenarios.

metadata.name: BewlyBewly
metadata.description: Just make a few small changes to your Bilibili homepage. (English | 简体中文 | 正體中文 | 廣東話)

summary.zh: BewlyBewly 是一款针对 Bilibili 的浏览器扩展，专注于优化页面设计和用户体验。通过借鉴 YouTube、Vision OS 和 iOS 的设计理念，提供更美观、易用的界面，主要适配常用页面的深色模式，提升视觉吸引力。
summary.en: BewlyBewly is a browser extension for Bilibili that focuses on enhancing page design and user experience. Inspired by YouTube, Vision OS, and iOS, it offers a more visually appealing and user-friendly interface, primarily adapting dark mode for commonly used pages.

metadata.name: kind
metadata.description: Kubernetes IN Docker - local clusters for testing Kubernetes

summary.zh: Kind 是一个使用 Docker 容器作为节点来运行本地 Kubernetes 集群的工具，专为测试 Kubernetes 本身设计，也可用于本地开发或持续集成。它基于 Go 语言实现，通过 kubeadm 引导节点，提供命令行界面和 Docker 镜像，支持快速创建和销毁集群，简化了 Kubernetes 环境的搭建和测试流程。
summary.en: Kind is a tool for running local Kubernetes clusters using Docker container nodes, primarily designed for testing Kubernetes itself, with applications in local development or CI. Built with Go and leveraging kubeadm for node bootstrapping, it offers a CLI and Docker images to facilitate quick cluster creation and teardown, streamlining Kubernetes environment setup and testing.

metadata.name: docker-webtop
metadata.description: Ubuntu, Alpine, Arch, and Fedora based Webtop images, Linux in a web browser supporting popular desktop environments.

summary.zh: LinuxServer.io 提供的 Docker 镜像项目，支持 Ubuntu、Alpine、Arch 和 Fedora 等多种 Linux 发行版，通过 Web 浏览器提供完整的桌面环境，实现远程访问和跨平台使用。核心价值在于简化部署、支持用户映射和定期安全更新，适用于远程办公、教育和开发测试场景。
summary.en: A Docker image project by LinuxServer.io, offering Ubuntu, Alpine, Arch, and Fedora-based Linux distributions with full desktop environments accessible via web browsers for remote access and cross-platform use. Key features include simplified deployment, user mapping support, and regular security updates, ideal for remote work, education, and development testing.

metadata.name: rustdesk
metadata.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

summary.zh: RustDesk 是一款开源远程桌面应用，支持自托管，可作为 TeamViewer 的替代方案。它基于 Rust 语言开发，提供开箱即用的体验，无需配置，用户可完全控制数据，确保安全。支持使用官方或自定义中继服务器，适用于个人和企业远程访问与技术支持场景。
summary.en: RustDesk is an open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, serving as an alternative to TeamViewer. Built with Rust, it offers out-of-the-box functionality with no configuration required, giving users full control over their data for enhanced security. It supports using official or custom relay servers, ideal for personal and enterprise remote access and technical support.

metadata.name: jellyfin
metadata.description: The Free Software Media System - Server Backend & API

summary.zh: Jellyfin 是一个免费开源的媒体管理系统，提供服务器后端和API，用于管理和流式传输个人媒体内容。它基于.NET平台开发，支持跨平台部署，可作为Emby和Plex的替代方案，强调无许可费用和完全控制。
summary.en: Jellyfin is a free and open-source media system that provides a server backend and API for managing and streaming personal media content. Built on the .NET platform, it offers cross-platform support as an alternative to Emby and Plex, emphasizing no licensing fees and full user control.

summary.zh: kongming-kit 是一个基于 Go 语言的快速开发工具库，旨在解决开发过程中的常见问题，提升效率。它集成了日志、配置管理、容器化启动、HTTP 客户端、Kubernetes 操作等功能，特别适用于微服务、单元测试和简单项目开发。技术亮点包括对 logrus 和 viper 的封装、轻量级容器管理以及 Kubernetes 资源的便捷操作。
summary.en: kongming-kit is a rapid development toolkit built on Go, designed to address common issues in development and enhance productivity. It integrates features such as logging, configuration management, containerized startup, HTTP client, and Kubernetes operations, making it particularly suitable for microservices, unit testing, and simple project development. Key technical highlights include wrappers for logrus and viper, lightweight container management, and convenient Kubernetes resource handling.

metadata.name: terminal
metadata.description: The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!

summary.zh: Windows Terminal 是微软推出的现代化终端应用程序，集成了 Windows 控制台主机，提供高性能、可定制和跨平台兼容的终端体验。它支持多标签、GPU 加速渲染、主题自定义和丰富的配置选项，适用于开发者和系统管理员进行命令行操作和自动化任务。
summary.en: Windows Terminal is a modern terminal application by Microsoft, integrating the Windows console host to deliver a high-performance, customizable, and cross-platform compatible terminal experience. It features multi-tab support, GPU-accelerated rendering, theme customization, and extensive configuration options, ideal for developers and system administrators for command-line operations and automation tasks.

metadata.name: cachetools
metadata.description: Extensible memoizing collections and decorators

summary.zh: cachetools 是一个 Python 缓存工具库，提供可扩展的缓存集合和装饰器，用于优化函数调用性能。它支持多种缓存算法（如 LRU、TTL），适用于动态编程、API 调用和数据处理等场景，提升应用效率。
summary.en: cachetools is a Python caching library offering extensible memoizing collections and decorators to optimize function call performance. It supports various cache algorithms (e.g., LRU, TTL) and is suitable for dynamic programming, API calls, and data processing to enhance application efficiency.

metadata.name: Shell
metadata.description: Powerful context menu manager for Windows File Explorer

summary.zh: Shell 是一款强大的 Windows 文件资源管理器上下文菜单管理器，允许用户自定义菜单项，包括添加、修改或删除系统及第三方软件的项目。它支持文件、文件夹、桌面和任务栏，提供表达式语法、图标自定义和嵌套菜单功能，轻量便携且易于配置。
summary.en: Shell is a powerful context menu manager for Windows File Explorer, enabling users to customize menu items by adding, modifying, or removing entries from the system and third-party software. It supports files, folders, desktop, and taskbar, with features like expression syntax, icon customization, and nested menus, offering a lightweight, portable, and easy-to-configure solution.

metadata.name: kubebuilder
metadata.description: Kubebuilder - SDK for building Kubernetes APIs using CRDs

summary.zh: Kubebuilder 是一个用于构建 Kubernetes API 的框架，基于自定义资源定义（CRD），旨在简化 Go 语言中 API 的开发与发布。它提供插件架构和库支持，减少样板代码，提升开发效率，适用于云原生应用和运维自动化场景。
summary.en: Kubebuilder is a framework for building Kubernetes APIs using Custom Resource Definitions (CRDs), designed to simplify development and publishing in Go. It offers a plugin architecture and library support to reduce boilerplate and enhance productivity, ideal for cloud-native applications and operational automation.

metadata.name: TrafficMonitor
metadata.description: 这是一个用于显示当前网速、CPU及内存利用率的桌面悬浮窗软件，并支持任务栏显示，支持更换皮肤。

summary.zh: TrafficMonitor 是一款专为 Windows 平台设计的桌面悬浮窗软件，实时监控网速、CPU 及内存利用率，支持任务栏嵌入和皮肤更换。核心价值在于提供轻量级系统资源监控，适用于日常运维和性能优化场景，具备插件系统和历史流量统计功能，提升用户体验。
summary.en: TrafficMonitor is a desktop floating window software designed for Windows, providing real-time monitoring of network speed, CPU, and memory usage, with support for taskbar integration and skin customization. Its core value lies in lightweight system resource monitoring, suitable for daily operations and performance optimization, featuring a plugin system and historical traffic statistics to enhance user experience.

metadata.name: virtual-dsm
metadata.description: Virtual DSM in a Docker container.

summary.zh: Virtual DSM 是一个在 Docker 容器中运行的虚拟化 Synology DiskStation Manager (DSM) 系统，提供完整的 NAS 功能。它支持 KVM 加速、多磁盘配置、在线升级，并可通过 Docker Compose、Docker CLI、Kubernetes 和 GitHub Codespaces 部署，适用于个人或开发环境中的轻量级 NAS 解决方案。
summary.en: Virtual DSM is a virtualized Synology DiskStation Manager (DSM) system running in a Docker container, offering full NAS functionality. It supports KVM acceleration, multiple disk configurations, online upgrades, and can be deployed via Docker Compose, Docker CLI, Kubernetes, and GitHub Codespaces, suitable for lightweight NAS solutions in personal or development environments.

metadata.name: archbase
metadata.description: 教科书《计算机体系结构基础》（胡伟武等，第三版）的开源版本

summary.zh: 这是《计算机体系结构基础》（第三版）的开源版本，由龙芯团队胡伟武等人编写，专注于计算机体系结构教学。核心价值在于提供一本活的教科书，采用RMarkdown和Bookdown工具实现内容开源与版本管理，支持自动生成HTML、PDF和DOCX格式，便于教学使用和持续改进。应用场景包括高校课程教材、技术参考和开源教育项目，技术亮点包括基于Git的协作、Docker环境复现和龙芯架构实例。
summary.en: This is the open-source version of 'Fundamentals of Computer Architecture' (3rd Edition), authored by Hu Weiwu and the Loongson team, focusing on computer architecture education. Its core value lies in providing a living textbook, using RMarkdown and Bookdown for open content management and version control, with automatic generation of HTML, PDF, and DOCX formats to facilitate teaching and continuous improvement. Application scenarios include university course materials, technical references, and open-source educational projects, with technical highlights such as Git-based collaboration, Docker environment replication, and Loongson architecture examples.

metadata.name: go-ansible
metadata.description: Go-ansible is a Go package that enables the execution of ansible-playbook or ansible commands directly from Golang applications. It supports a wide range of options for each command, enabling smooth integration of Ansible functionality into your projects.

summary.zh: Go-ansible 是一个 Go 库，用于从 Go 应用程序直接执行 Ansible 命令（如 ansible-playbook、ansible-inventory、ansible-galaxy 和 ansible）。它作为 Ansible CLI 的包装器，支持广泛的命令选项、工作流编排、Vault 集成和灵活的输出管理，实现 Ansible 自动化与 Go 项目的无缝集成。
summary.en: Go-ansible is a Go library that enables direct execution of Ansible commands (e.g., ansible-playbook, ansible-inventory, ansible-galaxy, and ansible) from Go applications. It acts as a wrapper around the Ansible CLI, supporting extensive command options, workflow orchestration, Vault integration, and flexible output management for seamless integration of Ansible automation into Go projects.

metadata.name: photoview
metadata.description: Photo gallery for self-hosted personal servers

summary.zh: Photoview 是一款专为摄影师设计的自托管个人服务器照片画廊，提供简单友好的界面，支持快速浏览包含数千张高分辨率照片的目录。它通过自动扫描文件系统目录中的媒体文件并生成缩略图，实现高效浏览，同时保持与文件系统相同的组织结构。
summary.en: Photoview is a self-hosted personal server photo gallery designed for photographers, offering a simple and user-friendly interface for fast navigation through directories with thousands of high-resolution photos. It automatically scans media files from specified directories, generates thumbnails for efficient browsing, and organizes content mirroring the filesystem structure.

metadata.name: windows
metadata.description: Windows inside a Docker container.

summary.zh: dockur/windows 是一个将 Windows 操作系统运行在 Docker 容器中的项目，支持从 Windows 2000 到 Windows 11 及服务器版本。它提供 ISO 自动下载、KVM 硬件加速和基于 Web 的图形界面，实现快速部署和远程访问，适用于测试、开发或隔离环境。
summary.en: dockur/windows is a project that runs Windows operating systems inside Docker containers, supporting versions from Windows 2000 to Windows 11 and server editions. It features automatic ISO downloading, KVM hardware acceleration, and a web-based graphical interface, enabling rapid deployment and remote access for testing, development, or isolated environments.

metadata.name: tiny-rdm
metadata.description: Tiny RDM (Tiny Redis Desktop Manager) - A modern, colorful, super lightweight Redis GUI client for Mac, Windows, and Linux. It also provides a web version that can be deployed via Docker.

summary.zh: Tiny RDM 是一款现代、多彩、超轻量的 Redis 图形界面客户端，支持 Mac、Windows 和 Linux 平台，并提供可通过 Docker 部署的 Web 版本。它具备直观的用户界面、多语言支持、高级连接管理（如 SSH 隧道和集群模式）、可视化键值操作、实时命令监控和数据导入导出功能，适用于 Redis 数据库的日常管理和开发调试。
summary.en: Tiny RDM is a modern, colorful, and super lightweight Redis GUI client for Mac, Windows, and Linux, with a web version deployable via Docker. It features an intuitive UI, multi-language support, advanced connection management (e.g., SSH tunnel and cluster mode), visual key-value operations, real-time command monitoring, and data import/export, ideal for daily Redis database management and development debugging.

metadata.name: headscale
metadata.description: An open source, self-hosted implementation of the Tailscale control server

summary.zh: Headscale 是一个开源自托管的 Tailscale 控制服务器实现，专为个人和小型组织设计。它基于 WireGuard 技术，提供安全的 VPN 网络管理，支持节点间密钥交换、IP 地址分配和路由共享，适用于私有网络构建和远程访问场景。
summary.en: Headscale is an open-source, self-hosted implementation of the Tailscale control server, designed for personal and small organizational use. Built on WireGuard, it enables secure VPN network management, including key exchange, IP address assignment, and route sharing, ideal for private networking and remote access.

metadata.name: django-prometheus
metadata.description: Export Django monitoring metrics for Prometheus.io

summary.zh: django-prometheus 是一个 Django 应用，用于将 Django 监控指标导出给 Prometheus.io。它支持监控请求响应、数据库访问（通过 Django ORM）和缓存操作（通过 Django Cache 框架），提供自定义延迟桶和命名空间配置，便于集成到现有 Django 项目中，实现性能监控和运维自动化。
summary.en: django-prometheus is a Django application that exports monitoring metrics to Prometheus.io. It supports monitoring of requests and responses, database access via Django ORM, and cache operations via Django Cache framework, with customizable latency buckets and namespace configurations, enabling easy integration into existing Django projects for performance monitoring and operational automation.

metadata.name: Thanks-Mirror
metadata.description: 整理记录各个包管理器，系统镜像，以及常用软件的好用镜像，Thanks Mirror。     走过路过，如觉不错，麻烦点个赞👆🌟

summary.zh: Thanks Mirror 是一个集中整理高质量软件包管理器、系统镜像和常用软件国内镜像的开源项目。它旨在为开发者提供稳定、快速的下载源，提升软件安装和系统部署效率，并包含自动化链接检查确保可用性。
summary.en: Thanks Mirror is an open-source project that curates high-quality mirrors for package managers, system images, and common software, primarily targeting Chinese users. It offers stable and fast download sources to enhance software installation and system deployment efficiency, with automated link checks for reliability.

metadata.name: excalidraw
metadata.description: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams

summary.zh: Excalidraw 是一款开源的虚拟白板工具，专注于绘制手绘风格的图表、线框图等。它提供无限画布、实时协作、端到端加密等功能，支持导出多种格式，并可作为 npm 包集成到其他应用中。核心价值在于其简洁、可定制和协作性，适用于团队设计、教育和笔记场景。
summary.en: Excalidraw is an open-source virtual whiteboard tool designed for sketching hand-drawn style diagrams and wireframes. It features an infinite canvas, real-time collaboration, end-to-end encryption, and supports exporting to various formats. Available as an npm package for integration, it emphasizes simplicity, customizability, and collaborative use in team design, education, and note-taking.

metadata.name: GolangStudy
metadata.description: 《GolangStudy》：从简单到难最全总结，go基础，数据结构，算法，设计模式

summary.zh: 《GolangStudy》是一个系统性的Go语言学习资源库，涵盖从基础语法到高级机制（如并发、垃圾回收）、数据结构、算法、设计模式及云原生技术（如Kubernetes、Docker）。核心价值在于通过思维导图结构化总结知识点，帮助开发者高效复习和面试准备，已助力作者获得腾讯云等企业offer。应用场景包括Go后端开发学习和技能提升。
summary.en: GolangStudy is a systematic learning resource repository for Go language, covering basics to advanced topics like concurrency, garbage collection, data structures, algorithms, design patterns, and cloud-native technologies such as Kubernetes and Docker. Its core value lies in structuring knowledge with mind maps for efficient review and interview preparation, having helped the author secure offers from companies like Tencent Cloud. It targets Go backend development learning and skill enhancement.

metadata.name: inkdown
metadata.description: Inkdown is a WYSIWYG editor and an LLM dialogue tool, fully compatible with GitHub Flavored Markdown Spec.

summary.zh: Inkdown是一款集所见即所得编辑与大模型对话功能于一体的工具，完全兼容GitHub风格Markdown规范。它支持跨平台桌面应用和VSCode插件，提供直观的编辑界面和智能对话辅助，适用于文档编写、技术笔记和AI协作场景。
summary.en: Inkdown is a WYSIWYG editor and LLM dialogue tool, fully compatible with GitHub Flavored Markdown Spec. It supports cross-platform desktop applications and VSCode extensions, offering an intuitive editing interface and AI-powered conversation assistance for documentation, technical notes, and collaborative workflows.

metadata.name: smartdns
metadata.description: A local DNS server to obtain the fastest website IP for the best Internet experience, support DoT, DoH, DoQ. 一个本地DNS服务器，获取最快的网站IP，获得最佳上网体验，支持DoH，DoT，DoQ。

summary.zh: SmartDNS 是一个本地 DNS 服务器，通过从多个上游 DNS 服务器获取查询结果并返回访问速度最快的 IP，显著提升网络访问速度。支持 DoT、DoH、DoQ 等加密协议保护隐私，具备广告过滤、域名分流和高性能匹配功能，适用于树莓派、OpenWrt、Windows 等多种平台。
summary.en: SmartDNS is a local DNS server that retrieves query results from multiple upstream DNS servers and returns the fastest IP to enhance internet speed. It supports encrypted protocols like DoT, DoH, and DoQ for privacy, with features such as ad blocking, domain splitting, and high-performance matching, compatible with platforms like Raspberry Pi, OpenWrt, and Windows.

metadata.name: casbin
metadata.description: Apache Casbin: an authorization library that supports access control models like ACL, RBAC, ABAC in Golang: https://discord.gg/S5UjpzGZjN

summary.zh: Casbin 是一个强大高效的 Go 语言开源访问控制库，支持 ACL、RBAC、ABAC 等多种授权模型，适用于微服务、API 网关等场景，提供跨语言支持和在线编辑器，简化权限管理。
summary.en: Casbin is a powerful and efficient open-source access control library for Golang, supporting authorization models like ACL, RBAC, and ABAC. It is suitable for microservices, API gateways, and other scenarios, offering cross-language support and an online editor to simplify permission management.

metadata.name: hugo-eureka
metadata.description: Eureka is a feature-rich and highly customizable Hugo theme.

summary.zh: Eureka 是一个功能丰富且高度可定制的 Hugo 主题，专为快速构建和部署静态网站设计。它提供优雅的界面、多语言支持和灵活的配置选项，适用于个人博客、文档站点和项目展示等场景，帮助用户轻松创建专业级网站。
summary.en: Eureka is a feature-rich and highly customizable Hugo theme designed for quickly building and deploying static websites. It offers an elegant interface, multilingual support, and flexible configuration options, suitable for personal blogs, documentation sites, and project showcases, enabling users to easily create professional-grade websites.

metadata.name: django-db-connection-pool
metadata.description: Database connection pool component library for Django

summary.zh: django-db-connection-pool 是一个基于 SQLAlchemy 的 Django 数据库连接池组件库，支持 MySQL、Oracle、PostgreSQL 和 JDBC 驱动。它通过替换 Django 默认数据库后端，提供可配置的连接池管理，优化高并发场景下的数据库连接性能，适用于多进程和多线程的 Django 项目。
summary.en: django-db-connection-pool is a Django database connection pool component library based on SQLAlchemy, supporting MySQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL, and JDBC drivers. It replaces Django's default database backends with configurable connection pool management, enhancing database connection performance in high-concurrency scenarios, suitable for multiprocessing and multithreading Django projects.

metadata.name: netshoot
metadata.description: a Docker + Kubernetes network trouble-shooting swiss-army container

summary.zh: netshoot 是一个专为 Docker 和 Kubernetes 网络故障排查设计的瑞士军刀式容器镜像。它集成了丰富的网络诊断工具，允许用户通过进入容器、Pod 或主机的网络命名空间，在不修改目标环境的情况下进行高效网络问题定位，支持 Docker Compose 和 Kubernetes 等多种部署场景。
summary.en: netshoot is a Swiss-army container image designed for Docker and Kubernetes network troubleshooting. It integrates a comprehensive set of network diagnostic tools, enabling users to efficiently locate network issues by entering the network namespace of containers, pods, or hosts without modifying the target environment, supporting various deployment scenarios like Docker Compose and Kubernetes.

metadata.name: document-style-guide
metadata.description: 中文技术文档的写作规范

summary.zh: 该仓库提供中文技术文档的写作规范，涵盖标题、文本、段落、数值、标点符号和文档体系等核心要素，旨在提升技术文档的清晰度、一致性和专业性，适用于开发者、技术写作者和开源项目维护者。
summary.en: This repository offers a style guide for writing Chinese technical documentation, covering key elements such as titles, text, paragraphs, numbers, punctuation, and document structure, designed to enhance clarity, consistency, and professionalism for developers, technical writers, and open-source maintainers.

metadata.name: OhmGraphite
metadata.description: Expose hardware sensor data to Graphite / InfluxDB / Prometheus / Postgres / Timescaledb

summary.zh: OhmGraphite 是一款 Windows 服务，通过 LibreHardwareMonitor 采集硬件传感器数据（如 CPU/GPU 功耗、温度、风扇速度等），并导出到 Graphite、InfluxDB、Prometheus 或 Postgres/TimescaleDB 等时序数据库，支持在 Grafana 中创建可视化仪表板，实现系统监控与运维自动化。
summary.en: OhmGraphite is a Windows service that collects hardware sensor data (e.g., CPU/GPU power consumption, temperature, fan speed) via LibreHardwareMonitor and exports it to time-series databases like Graphite, InfluxDB, Prometheus, or Postgres/TimescaleDB, enabling visualization dashboards in Grafana for system monitoring and operational automation.

metadata.name: Atlas
metadata.description: 🚀 An open and lightweight modification to Windows, designed to optimize performance, privacy and usability.

summary.zh: AtlasOS 是一个开源的 Windows 系统轻量级修改项目，专注于优化性能、增强隐私和提升易用性。通过移除遥测、调整组策略和界面设置，它在保持系统稳定性和兼容性的同时，提供透明、可定制的安全选项，适用于追求高效、私密计算环境的用户。
summary.en: AtlasOS is an open-source, lightweight modification of Windows designed to optimize performance, enhance privacy, and improve usability. By removing telemetry, adjusting group policies, and configuring settings, it maintains system stability and compatibility while offering transparent, customizable security options for users seeking efficient and private computing environments.

metadata.name: dockge
metadata.description: A fancy, easy-to-use and reactive self-hosted docker compose.yaml stack-oriented manager

summary.zh: Dockge 是一款美观易用、响应式的自托管 Docker Compose 栈管理器，专注于管理 compose.yaml 文件。它提供交互式编辑器、Web 终端、多代理支持，可将 docker run 命令转换为 compose.yaml，并保持文件结构不变，适用于个人或团队高效管理容器化应用。
summary.en: Dockge is a fancy, easy-to-use, and reactive self-hosted Docker Compose stack manager focused on managing compose.yaml files. It features an interactive editor, web terminal, multi-agent support, converts docker run commands to compose.yaml, and maintains file-based structure, ideal for efficiently managing containerized applications.

metadata.name: AirPodsDesktop
metadata.description: ☄️ AirPods desktop user experience enhancement program, for Windows and Linux (WIP)

summary.zh: AirPodsDesktop 是一款专为 Windows 和 Linux 设计的桌面应用程序，旨在提升 AirPods 在非苹果系统上的用户体验。核心功能包括实时显示电池电量、自动入耳检测、低延迟音频模式以及精美的动画效果，通过开源项目优化跨平台蓝牙连接。
summary.en: AirPodsDesktop is a desktop application designed for Windows and Linux to enhance the user experience of AirPods on non-Apple systems. Key features include real-time battery display, automatic ear detection, low-latency audio mode, and elegant animations, leveraging open-source projects for improved cross-platform Bluetooth connectivity.

metadata.name: uptime-kuma
metadata.description: A fancy self-hosted monitoring tool

summary.zh: Uptime Kuma 是一款功能丰富的自托管监控工具，支持 HTTP(s)、TCP、Ping、DNS 等多种协议监控，提供 20 秒间隔的实时状态检测。其亮点包括美观的响应式界面、90+ 通知服务集成（如 Telegram、Discord）、多语言支持和状态页面定制，适用于个人或企业服务器运维监控，确保服务高可用性。
summary.en: Uptime Kuma is a feature-rich self-hosted monitoring tool that supports monitoring for HTTP(s), TCP, Ping, DNS, and other protocols with 20-second intervals. It features a reactive UI, integration with 90+ notification services (e.g., Telegram, Discord), multi-language support, and customizable status pages, ideal for personal or enterprise server operations to ensure high availability.

metadata.name: onedev
metadata.description: Git Server with CI/CD, Kanban, and Packages. Seamless integration. Unparalleled experience.

summary.zh: OneDev 是一款集 Git 服务器、CI/CD、看板和软件包管理于一体的开源平台，提供无缝集成体验。核心亮点包括语言感知的代码搜索导航、自动化依赖更新、代码覆盖率与问题标注、灵活代码保护规则、可定制看板与问题工作流，以及无需编码的图形化 CI/CD 配置，适用于团队协作与 DevOps 自动化。
summary.en: OneDev is an open-source platform integrating Git server, CI/CD, Kanban, and package management for seamless collaboration. Key features include language-aware code search and navigation, automated dependency updates, code coverage and problem annotation, flexible code protection rules, customizable Kanban and issue workflows, and a no-code GUI for CI/CD configuration, ideal for team collaboration and DevOps automation.

metadata.name: memos
metadata.description: An open-source, self-hosted note-taking service. Your thoughts, your data, your control — no tracking, no ads, no subscription fees.

summary.zh: Memos 是一款开源、自托管的笔记服务，强调隐私优先和数据自主。它采用 Go 和 React 技术栈，以单二进制文件部署，支持 Markdown 原生编辑和多种数据库，适用于个人笔记、团队知识库和知识管理场景。
summary.en: Memos is an open-source, self-hosted note-taking service that prioritizes privacy and data control. Built with Go and React, it runs as a single binary with minimal resource usage, supports Markdown natively, and is suitable for personal notes, team wikis, and knowledge management.

metadata.name: asynq
metadata.description: Simple, reliable, and efficient distributed task queue in Go

summary.zh: Asynq 是一个基于 Go 语言和 Redis 的分布式任务队列库，提供简单、可靠、高效的异步任务处理。它支持任务调度、重试、优先级队列和自动恢复，适用于构建高可用、可扩展的后台作业系统，如微服务任务分发和数据处理。
summary.en: Asynq is a Go-based distributed task queue library backed by Redis, offering simple, reliable, and efficient asynchronous task processing. It features task scheduling, retries, priority queues, and automatic recovery, ideal for building highly available and scalable background job systems, such as microservices task distribution and data processing.

metadata.name: deploy
metadata.description: Ansible role to deploy scripting applications like PHP, Python, Ruby, etc. in a capistrano style

summary.zh: Ansistrano 是一个基于 Ansible 的部署角色，用于以 Capistrano 风格自动化部署 PHP、Python、Ruby 等脚本应用。它提供零停机部署、回滚、钩子任务和旧版本清理功能，简化多服务器环境下的应用发布流程，提升运维效率。
summary.en: Ansistrano is an Ansible role for automating deployments of scripting applications like PHP, Python, and Ruby in a Capistrano style. It features zero-downtime deployments, rollback capabilities, hook tasks, and old release pruning, streamlining application releases in multi-server environments to enhance operational efficiency.

metadata.name: notepad--
metadata.description: 一个支持windows/linux/mac的文本编辑器，目标是做中国人自己的编辑器，来自中国。

summary.zh: Notepad-- 是一款跨平台轻量级文本编辑器，支持 Windows、Linux 和 macOS，专注于国产软件替代，尤其在国产信创 UOS 系统上优化。其核心价值在于提供可替代竞品的开源解决方案，强调技术中立和专注软件开发，避免政治言论。
summary.en: Notepad-- is a cross-platform lightweight text editor supporting Windows, Linux, and macOS, focusing on domestic software substitution, especially optimized for UOS systems. Its core value lies in providing an open-source alternative to competitors, emphasizing technical neutrality and dedicated software development without political discourse.

metadata.name: Scoop
metadata.description: A command-line installer for Windows.

summary.zh: Scoop 是 Windows 平台的命令行安装工具，专注于简化软件安装流程。它通过消除 UAC 提示、隐藏 GUI 安装界面、避免 PATH 污染和自动处理依赖，提供高效、无干扰的安装体验。支持脚本化配置和 aria2 多连接下载，适用于开发者和系统管理员快速部署环境。
summary.en: Scoop is a command-line installer for Windows, designed to streamline software installation. It eliminates UAC prompts, hides GUI installers, prevents PATH pollution, and automatically resolves dependencies, offering a frictionless setup experience. With script-friendly operations and aria2 multi-connection downloads, it's ideal for developers and sysadmins to manage environments efficiently.

metadata.name: yay
metadata.description: Yet another Yogurt - An AUR Helper written in Go

summary.zh: yay 是一个用 Go 语言编写的 Arch Linux AUR 助手，专注于简化 AUR 包的管理。它提供高级依赖解析、PKGBUILD 下载、搜索优化和构建自动化等功能，适用于 Arch 用户高效安装和维护第三方软件。
summary.en: yay is an AUR helper written in Go for Arch Linux, designed to streamline AUR package management. It features advanced dependency resolution, PKGBUILD downloading, search optimization, and build automation, making it ideal for Arch users to efficiently install and maintain third-party software.

metadata.name: traefik
metadata.description: The Cloud Native Application Proxy

summary.zh: Traefik 是一款现代化的云原生应用代理和负载均衡器，专为简化微服务部署而设计。它能够自动集成 Docker、Kubernetes 等基础设施，动态配置路由，无需手动干预，支持 HTTPS、WebSocket 和多种监控指标，适用于容器化环境的高效流量管理。
summary.en: Traefik is a modern cloud-native application proxy and load balancer designed to simplify microservices deployment. It automatically integrates with infrastructure like Docker and Kubernetes, dynamically configures routes without manual intervention, and supports HTTPS, WebSocket, and various monitoring metrics, ideal for efficient traffic management in containerized environments.

metadata.name: scrutiny
metadata.description: Hard Drive S.M.A.R.T Monitoring, Historical Trends & Real World Failure Thresholds

summary.zh: Scrutiny 是一款专注于硬盘健康监控的 Web 仪表盘工具，通过集成 smartd 实现 S.M.A.R.T 数据的自动采集与历史趋势分析。它基于真实故障率设定自定义阈值，提供温度追踪和可配置告警，适用于服务器运维场景，帮助用户提前预警硬盘故障，保障数据安全。
summary.en: Scrutiny is a web-based dashboard tool for hard drive health monitoring, integrating smartd to automatically collect and analyze S.M.A.R.T. data with historical trend tracking. It sets custom thresholds based on real-world failure rates, offers temperature monitoring and configurable alerts, ideal for server maintenance to preemptively detect drive failures and ensure data integrity.

metadata.name: awesome-selfhosted
metadata.description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers

summary.zh: Awesome-Selfhosted 是一个精选的开源自托管软件列表，涵盖网络服务和Web应用，帮助用户在自有服务器上部署和管理各类工具，实现数据自主与隐私保护。核心价值在于提供全面的分类指南，支持从分析、备份到通信、文件同步等多种场景，技术亮点包括自由软件优先、持续维护验证和社区驱动更新。
summary.en: Awesome-Selfhosted is a curated list of open-source self-hosted software for network services and web applications, enabling users to deploy and manage various tools on their own servers for data autonomy and privacy. It offers comprehensive categorized guidance across scenarios like analytics, backup, communication, and file sync, with key features including free software prioritization, ongoing maintenance verification, and community-driven updates.

metadata.name: python-validator
metadata.description: a data validator like Django ORM

summary.zh: python-validator 是一个类似 Django ORM 的数据校验库，专为 Web 后端等应用设计，用于高效校验前端输入数据。它通过类定义数据结构，支持类型检查、默认值设置和错误处理，并自动生成模拟数据，简化开发流程。
summary.en: python-validator is a data validation library similar to Django ORM, designed for applications like web backends to efficiently validate frontend input data. It uses class-based definitions for data structures, supports type checking, default values, error handling, and auto-generates mock data to streamline development.

metadata.name: the-art-of-command-line
metadata.description: Master the command line, in one page

summary.zh: 《命令行艺术》是一个简洁而全面的命令行使用指南，旨在帮助用户掌握Linux命令行技能，提升工程师的灵活性和生产力。它涵盖了从基础到高级的实用技巧，包括文件处理、系统调试和一行命令等，适用于初学者和经验丰富的用户。该仓库以单页形式呈现，支持多语言翻译，强调实用性和广度，是学习和参考命令行操作的宝贵资源。
summary.en: The Art of Command Line is a concise yet comprehensive guide to mastering command-line skills, designed to enhance flexibility and productivity for engineers. It covers practical tips from basics to advanced techniques, including file processing, system debugging, and one-liners, suitable for both beginners and experienced users. Presented in a single-page format with multilingual translations, it emphasizes practicality and breadth, serving as a valuable resource for learning and referencing command-line operations.

metadata.name: nginxconfig.io
metadata.description: ⚙️ NGINX config generator on steroids 💉

summary.zh: NGINX配置生成器，提供可视化界面，支持HTTPS、HTTP/2、安全头、缓存、反向代理等功能，帮助用户快速生成优化的NGINX配置文件，适用于Web服务器配置和运维自动化。
summary.en: NGINX configuration generator with a visual interface, supporting HTTPS, HTTP/2, security headers, caching, reverse proxy, and more, enabling users to quickly generate optimized NGINX config files for web server setup and automation.

metadata.name: comcast
metadata.description: Simulating shitty network connections so you can build better systems.

summary.zh: Comcast 是一个网络模拟工具，用于在开发环境中模拟常见的网络问题，如延迟、带宽限制和数据包丢失/重排/损坏。它通过封装系统工具（如 Linux 的 iptables/tc 和 BSD/OSX 的 ipfw/pfctl）提供跨平台支持，帮助开发者测试分布式系统在非理想网络条件下的性能与可靠性。
summary.en: Comcast is a network simulation tool designed to emulate common network issues like latency, bandwidth restrictions, and packet loss/reordering/corruption in development environments. It provides cross-platform support by wrapping system tools (e.g., iptables/tc on Linux and ipfw/pfctl on BSD/OSX), enabling developers to test distributed systems under realistic network conditions for improved robustness.

metadata.name: gost
