metadata.description: GO Simple Tunnel - a simple tunnel written in golang

summary.zh: GO Simple Tunnel (GOST) 是一个用 Go 语言编写的安全隧道工具，支持多协议、多级转发链和端口转发，适用于正向代理、反向代理和内网穿透等场景。其核心亮点包括负载均衡、路由控制、插件系统和 Prometheus 监控，提供 Web API 和 GUI 界面，便于网络运维和自动化管理。
summary.en: GO Simple Tunnel (GOST) is a secure tunnel tool written in Go, supporting multiple protocols, multi-level forwarding chains, and port forwarding for use cases like forward proxy, reverse proxy, and intranet penetration. Key features include load balancing, routing control, a plugin system, and Prometheus monitoring, with Web API and GUI interfaces for network operations and automation.

metadata.name: understand_linux_process
metadata.description: The open-source ebook of Understand Linux Process

summary.zh: 《理解Linux进程》是一本开源电子书，通过Go语言重写示例程序，系统讲解Linux进程的核心原理与概念。本书结合Docker提供可复现的实验环境，适合Linux程序员深入学习进程机制，涵盖进程创建、通信、调度等关键知识，强调实践与理论结合。
summary.en: 《Understanding Linux Processes》 is an open-source ebook that explains the core principles and concepts of Linux processes using Go language examples. It provides reproducible experimental environments with Docker, making it ideal for Linux programmers to delve into process mechanisms such as creation, communication, and scheduling, emphasizing practical application alongside theory.

metadata.name: easeprobe
metadata.description: A simple, standalone, and lightweight tool that can do health/status checking, written in Go.

summary.zh: EaseProbe 是一个用 Go 语言编写的简单、独立、轻量级的健康状态检查工具，支持 HTTP、TCP、Ping、Shell、SSH、TLS 等多种探测方法，以及 Slack、Discord、Telegram、Email 等通知渠道，适用于运维监控和系统健康管理场景。
summary.en: EaseProbe is a simple, standalone, and lightweight health/status checking tool written in Go, supporting various probe methods like HTTP, TCP, Ping, Shell, SSH, and TLS, with notification channels including Slack, Discord, Telegram, and Email, ideal for operational monitoring and system health management.

metadata.name: nps
metadata.description: 一款轻量级、高性能、功能强大的内网穿透代理服务器。支持tcp、udp、socks5、http等几乎所有流量转发，可用来访问内网网站、本地支付接口调试、ssh访问、远程桌面，内网dns解析、内网socks5代理等等……，并带有功能强大的web管理端。a lightweight, high-performance, powerful intranet penetration proxy server, with a powerful web management terminal.

summary.zh: NPS是一款轻量级、高性能的内网穿透代理服务器，支持TCP、UDP、HTTP、SOCKS5等多种协议转发，适用于访问内网网站、远程桌面、SSH调试等场景。它提供强大的Web管理端，支持全平台部署、HTTPS集成和用户管理，简化配置流程，提升运维效率。
summary.en: NPS is a lightweight, high-performance intranet penetration proxy server that supports forwarding for protocols like TCP, UDP, HTTP, and SOCKS5. It is ideal for accessing internal networks, remote desktop, SSH debugging, and more. Featuring a robust web management terminal, it offers cross-platform compatibility, HTTPS integration, and user management to streamline configuration and enhance operational efficiency.

metadata.name: devops-exercises
metadata.description: Linux, Jenkins, AWS, SRE, Prometheus, Docker, Python, Ansible, Git, Kubernetes, Terraform, OpenStack, SQL, NoSQL, Azure, GCP, DNS, Elastic, Network, Virtualization. DevOps Interview Questions

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个专注于DevOps和SRE领域的综合性学习资源库，包含2624个问题和练习，覆盖Linux、Jenkins、AWS、Docker、Kubernetes、Terraform等核心技术栈。核心价值在于为技术面试准备和技能提升提供结构化实践材料，强调实际应用而非理论堆砌，适合工程师自学和职业发展。
summary.en: This repository is a comprehensive learning resource focused on DevOps and SRE domains, featuring 2624 questions and exercises covering core technologies like Linux, Jenkins, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform. It provides structured practice materials for technical interview preparation and skill enhancement, emphasizing practical application over theoretical accumulation, suitable for self-study and career development.

metadata.name: bubbletea
metadata.description: A powerful little TUI framework 🏗

summary.zh: Bubble Tea 是一个基于 Go 语言的终端用户界面（TUI）框架，采用 Elm 架构设计，提供功能式、状态化的开发方式。它适用于构建简单到复杂的终端应用，支持内联、全窗口或混合模式，具备高性能渲染、键盘鼠标处理、剪贴板支持等特性，适合开发命令行工具和交互式终端应用。
summary.en: Bubble Tea is a Go-based Terminal User Interface (TUI) framework built on the Elm Architecture, offering a functional and stateful approach to development. It is suitable for building simple to complex terminal applications, supporting inline, full-window, or mixed modes, with features like high-performance rendering, keyboard and mouse handling, and clipboard support, ideal for command-line tools and interactive terminal apps.

metadata.name: go-leetcode
metadata.description: A collection of 100+ popular LeetCode problems solved in Go.

summary.zh: 该仓库收集了100多个热门LeetCode问题的Go语言解决方案，涵盖数组、动态规划等核心算法类别。每个问题包含描述、已通过测试的代码和单元测试，旨在帮助开发者学习Go编程和算法技巧，提升面试准备效率。
summary.en: This repository provides Go solutions for over 100 popular LeetCode problems, covering key algorithm categories like arrays and dynamic programming. Each solution includes a description, code that has passed LeetCode tests, and unit tests, designed to aid developers in learning Go programming and algorithmic skills for interview preparation.

metadata.name: ProxyMan
metadata.description: Configuring proxy settings made easy.

summary.zh: ProxyMan 是一个简化 Linux 系统代理配置的工具，通过命令行界面提供设置、保存和加载代理配置的功能，解决了早期版本中配置繁琐的问题。它适用于需要快速管理网络代理的场景，如开发测试或网络调试，具有安装简便、代码结构优化和配置管理高效的特点。
summary.en: ProxyMan is a tool that simplifies proxy configuration on Linux systems, offering command-line functionality to set, save, and load proxy settings, addressing the complexity of earlier versions. It is suitable for scenarios requiring quick network proxy management, such as development testing or network debugging, featuring easy installation, optimized code structure, and efficient configuration management.

metadata.name: LeetCodeAnimation
metadata.description: Demonstrate all the questions on LeetCode in the form of animation.（用动画的形式呈现解LeetCode题目的思路）

summary.zh: 该仓库通过动画形式直观演示LeetCode算法题的解题思路，涵盖排序算法、链表操作等高频题目，旨在帮助初学者和进阶者理解算法原理，提升编程能力。核心价值在于将抽象算法可视化，降低学习门槛，应用场景包括算法教学、面试准备和个人技能提升。技术亮点包括精美的动画配图和详细的代码解析。
summary.en: This repository visualizes LeetCode algorithm solutions through animations, covering high-frequency topics like sorting algorithms and linked list operations. It aims to help beginners and advanced learners grasp algorithmic concepts and improve coding skills. The core value lies in making abstract algorithms intuitive, reducing learning barriers, with applications in algorithm education, interview preparation, and personal skill development. Key features include high-quality animations and detailed code explanations.

metadata.name: croc
metadata.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another :crocodile: :package:

summary.zh: croc 是一个跨平台命令行文件传输工具，通过中继服务器实现任意两台计算机间的安全数据传输。它采用端到端加密（PAKE）、支持断点续传、无需本地服务器或端口转发，并兼容 IPv6/IPv4 及代理（如 Tor），适用于快速、安全的文件共享场景。
summary.en: croc is a cross-platform CLI tool for secure file transfer between any two computers via a relay. It features end-to-end encryption (PAKE), resume interrupted transfers, no local server or port-forwarding required, and supports IPv6-first with IPv4 fallback and proxies like Tor, ideal for quick and safe file sharing.

metadata.name: uber_go_guide_cn
metadata.description: Uber Go 语言编码规范中文版. The Uber Go Style Guide .

summary.zh: Uber Go 语言编码规范中文版是Uber公司内部Go语言编码规范的中文翻译，旨在提供高质量、可维护的Go代码编写指南。它涵盖了从基础语法到高级并发、错误处理等核心主题，适用于Go开发者提升代码质量和团队协作效率。
summary.en: The Uber Go Style Guide Chinese version is a translation of Uber's internal Go coding standards, offering comprehensive guidelines for writing high-quality, maintainable Go code. It covers essential topics from basic syntax to advanced concurrency and error handling, serving as a valuable resource for Go developers to enhance code quality and team collaboration.

metadata.name: chanify
metadata.description: Chanify is a safe and simple notification tools. This repository is command line tools for Chanify.

summary.zh: Chanify 是一个安全、简单的通知工具，专为开发者、系统管理员等用户设计，支持通过 API 推送通知。它提供命令行工具，支持 Docker 部署和跨平台应用（如 iOS、Chrome 扩展、Windows），核心亮点包括端到端加密、无服务器节点和丰富的 API 集成，适用于自动化脚本、系统监控和即时提醒等场景。
summary.en: Chanify is a secure and straightforward notification tool designed for developers, system administrators, and others, enabling notification pushes via API. It offers command-line tools, supports Docker deployment, and is cross-platform (e.g., iOS, Chrome extension, Windows). Key features include end-to-end encryption, serverless nodes, and extensive API integration, suitable for automation scripts, system monitoring, and instant alerts.

metadata.name: one-python-craftsman
metadata.description: 来自一位 Pythonista 的编程经验分享，内容涵盖编码技巧、最佳实践与思维模式等方面。

summary.zh: 《Python 工匠》是一个专注于分享Python编程经验的开源项目，提供编码技巧、最佳实践和思维模式的深度解析。内容涵盖变量命名、条件分支、容器使用、函数设计等核心主题，旨在帮助开发者提升代码质量和工程实践能力。项目还关联同名图书，扩展了函数和面向对象编程等章节，适合Python初学者和进阶者学习。
summary.en: The 'Python Craftsman' is an open-source project dedicated to sharing Python programming experiences, offering in-depth insights into coding techniques, best practices, and mindset. It covers core topics such as variable naming, conditional branching, container usage, and function design, aiming to help developers improve code quality and engineering practices. The project is linked to a book of the same name, which expands on chapters like functions and object-oriented programming, suitable for both beginners and advanced Python learners.

metadata.name: kubernetes-handbook
metadata.description: Kubernetes 架构与生态：从云原生到 AI 原生基础设施的构建指南

summary.zh: 《Kubernetes 手册》是一本全面介绍容器编排技术的实战指南，涵盖 Kubernetes 核心架构、服务网格、Serverless 和 AI 原生基础设施。本书以实战为导向，深入浅出解析云原生生态，适合从零开始学习和应用 Kubernetes 的开发者和运维人员，内容持续更新至最新版本。
summary.en: The 'Kubernetes Handbook' is a comprehensive practical guide to container orchestration, covering Kubernetes core architecture, service mesh, Serverless, and AI-native infrastructure. It focuses on hands-on experience and best practices, providing in-depth explanations of cloud-native ecosystems, ideal for developers and operators learning Kubernetes from scratch, with continuous updates to the latest versions.

metadata.name: KeymouseGo
metadata.description: 类似按键精灵的鼠标键盘录制和自动化操作 模拟点击和键入 | automate mouse clicks and keyboard input

summary.zh: KeymouseGo 是一款跨平台的鼠标键盘录制与自动化工具，类似精简版按键精灵。它通过Python编写，支持Windows、Linux和macOS系统，可录制用户操作并自动重复执行，适用于自动化重复性任务，如数据录入、软件测试等。核心功能包括录制回放、脚本编辑和热键控制，技术亮点在于使用pynput库实现事件捕获与模拟，并支持JSON5脚本格式进行灵活配置。
summary.en: KeymouseGo is a cross-platform mouse and keyboard recording and automation tool, akin to a lightweight version of AutoHotkey. Built with Python, it supports Windows, Linux, and macOS, enabling users to record actions and replay them automatically for repetitive tasks like data entry or software testing. Key features include recording/playback, script editing, and hotkey controls, with technical highlights leveraging the pynput library for event capture/simulation and JSON5 script format for flexible configuration.

metadata.name: tao-of-programming
metadata.description: 《编程之道》 (Tao of Programming, 1987) 最新中英双语版

summary.zh: 该仓库提供《编程之道》的最新中英双语版，这是一部1987年出版的经典编程哲学著作，以道家思想探讨编程本质。核心价值在于通过双语对照和社区讨论，促进技术哲学思考与跨文化交流，适用于程序员精神修养和技术文化学习。亮点包括开源协作翻译和深度议题探讨。
summary.en: This repository hosts the latest bilingual edition of 'Tao of Programming', a classic 1987 work that explores programming philosophy through Taoist principles. It offers Chinese-English parallel texts and community discussions, fostering technical philosophy reflection and cross-cultural exchange, ideal for programmers' spiritual growth and tech culture learning. Highlights include open-source collaborative translation and in-depth topic debates.

metadata.name: the-way-to-go_ZH_CN
metadata.description: 《The Way to Go》中文译本，中文正式名《Go 入门指南》

summary.zh: 《Go入门指南》是《The Way to Go》的中文译本，旨在为国内Go语言爱好者提供高质量的学习资源。该书由原作者授权，开源免费分享，内容针对当前Go版本进行了更新，覆盖Go语言核心概念与实践，帮助初学者快速入门并壮大国内Go社区。
summary.en: 《Go入门指南》 is the Chinese translation of 《The Way to Go》, providing high-quality learning resources for Go language enthusiasts in China. Authorized by the original author, it is shared open-source and free, with content updated for current Go versions, covering core concepts and practices to help beginners get started and grow the domestic Go community.

metadata.name: gost
metadata.description: GO Simple Tunnel - a simple tunnel written in golang

summary.zh: GOST是一个用Go语言编写的多功能代理和隧道工具，支持HTTP/HTTPS/HTTP2/SOCKS5等多种协议，具备多级转发、负载均衡和透明代理功能，适用于网络加速、安全访问和跨平台部署。
summary.en: GOST is a versatile proxy and tunneling tool written in Go, supporting protocols like HTTP/HTTPS/HTTP2/SOCKS5, with features such as multi-level forwarding, load balancing, and transparent proxy, ideal for network acceleration, secure access, and cross-platform deployment.

metadata.name: follow-me-install-kubernetes-cluster
metadata.description: 和我一步步部署 kubernetes 集群

summary.zh: 本仓库提供使用二进制方式手动部署Kubernetes v1.16.6集群的详细教程，采用Hard-Way模式，涵盖从初始化系统到部署核心组件（如etcd、apiserver、containerd、calico）及监控插件（Prometheus、Grafana）的全过程。重点讲解x509证书、RBAC授权等安全机制，适合有一定Kubernetes基础的用户深入学习集群配置与原理，适用于CentOS 7及以上系统环境。
summary.en: This repository offers a step-by-step guide for manually deploying a Kubernetes v1.16.6 cluster using the binary method in Hard-Way mode. It covers the entire process from system initialization to core components (e.g., etcd, apiserver, containerd, calico) and monitoring plugins (Prometheus, Grafana), with emphasis on security mechanisms like x509 certificates and RBAC authorization. Ideal for users with basic Kubernetes knowledge to deeply learn cluster configuration and principles, targeting CentOS 7 and above systems.

metadata.name: chinese-dos-games
metadata.description: 🎮 Chinese DOS games collections.

summary.zh: 这是一个中文DOS游戏合集项目，包含1898款游戏，通过Python脚本下载数据，并集成IPFS和Web前端实现在线访问与存档。核心价值在于保存和传播经典DOS游戏文化，应用场景包括游戏历史研究、怀旧娱乐和数字遗产保护。技术亮点包括自动化数据收集、分布式存储和跨平台Web模拟。
summary.en: This project is a collection of Chinese DOS games, featuring 1898 titles, with data downloadable via a Python script and integrated IPFS and web frontend for online access and archiving. It preserves and disseminates classic DOS gaming culture, applicable for historical research, nostalgic entertainment, and digital heritage conservation. Key technical highlights include automated data collection, distributed storage, and cross-platform web emulation.
